papers.title: CSLE: A Reinforcement Learning Platform for Autonomous Security Management
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning is a promising approach to autonomous and adaptive security management in networked systems. However, current reinforcement learning solutions for security management are mostly limited to simulation environments and it is unclear how they generalize to operational systems. In this paper, we address this limitation by presenting CSLE: a reinforcement learning platform for autonomous security management that enables experimentation under realistic conditions. Conceptually, CSLE encompasses two systems. First, it includes an emulation system that replicates key components of the target system in a virtualized environment. We use this system to gather measurements and logs, based on which we identify a system model, such as a Markov decision process. Second, it includes a simulation system where security strategies are efficiently learned through simulations of the system model. The learned strategies are then evaluated and refined in the emulation system to close the gap between theoretical and operational performance. We demonstrate CSLE through four use cases: flow control, replication control, segmentation control, and recovery control. Through these use cases, we show that CSLE enables near-optimal security management in an environment that approximates an operational system.

analysis.tldr: 提出CSLE平台，结合仿真与模拟实现网络系统自主安全管理的强化学习，并在四个用例中验证近最优性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习安全方案多限于仿真环境，难以推广到实际系统，缺乏真实条件下的实验平台。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能在接近真实条件下进行强化学习实验的自主安全管理平台。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CSLE平台包含两个系统：仿真系统（复制目标系统关键组件，收集数据并识别MDP模型）和模拟系统（基于模型高效学习策略），策略在仿真系统中评估和优化以缩小理论与实际差距。
contributions: 提出CSLE平台，结合仿真与模拟实现强化学习在自主安全管理中的真实条件实验。
通过四个用例（流控制、复制控制、分段控制、恢复控制）展示平台的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖仿真系统的保真度，实际系统差异可能影响泛化。
用例有限，未覆盖所有安全场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 平台设计有实用价值，但摘要未提供实验细节，创新性和影响力中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CSLE平台，结合仿真与模拟实现网络系统自主安全管理的强化学习，并在四个用例中验证近最优性能。

papers.title: LLM attribution analysis across different fine-tuning strategies and model scales for automated code compliance
papers.abstract: Existing research on large language models (LLMs) for automated code compliance has primarily focused on performance, treating the models as black boxes and overlooking how training decisions affect their interpretive behavior. This paper addresses this gap by employing a perturbation-based attribution analysis to compare the interpretive behaviors of LLMs across different fine-tuning strategies such as full fine-tuning (FFT), low-rank adaptation (LoRA) and quantized LoRA fine-tuning, as well as the impact of model scales which include varying LLM parameter sizes. Our results show that FFT produces attribution patterns that are statistically different and more focused than those from parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods. Furthermore, we found that as model scale increases, LLMs develop specific interpretive strategies such as prioritizing numerical constraints and rule identifiers in the building text, albeit with performance gains in semantic similarity of the generated and reference computer-processable rules plateauing for models larger than 7B. This paper provides crucial insights into the explainability of these models, taking a step toward building more transparent LLMs for critical, regulation-based tasks in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction industry.

analysis.tldr: 通过扰动归因分析，发现全微调比参数高效微调产生更聚焦的归因模式，且模型规模增大时LLM会发展出特定解释策略，但7B以上性能提升趋于饱和。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究将LLM视为黑箱，忽略训练决策对解释行为的影响，而自动化代码合规任务需要模型透明性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对不同微调策略和模型规模下LLM解释行为的系统比较分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全微调产生统计上不同且更聚焦的归因模式；模型规模增大时LLM优先关注数值约束和规则标识符，但7B以上语义相似度提升停滞。
analysis.method: 基于扰动的归因分析，比较全微调、LoRA和量化LoRA微调策略，以及不同参数规模的LLM。
contributions: 首次系统比较不同微调策略对LLM解释行为的影响
揭示模型规模增大时LLM解释策略的演变及性能饱和现象
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对建筑规范文本，可能不适用于其他领域
归因分析基于扰动方法，可能受扰动方式影响
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验细节不足，但方向有应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过扰动归因分析，发现全微调比参数高效微调产生更聚焦的归因模式，且模型规模增大时LLM会发展出特定解释策略，但7B以上性能提升趋于饱和。

papers.title: "Excuse me, may I say something..." CoLabScience, A Proactive AI Assistant for Biomedical Discovery and LLM-Expert Collaborations
papers.abstract: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into scientific workflows presents exciting opportunities to accelerate biomedical discovery. However, the reactive nature of LLMs, which respond only when prompted, limits their effectiveness in collaborative settings that demand foresight and autonomous engagement. In this study, we introduce CoLabScience, a proactive LLM assistant designed to enhance biomedical collaboration between AI systems and human experts through timely, context-aware interventions. At the core of our method is PULI (Positive-Unlabeled Learning-to-Intervene), a novel framework trained with a reinforcement learning objective to determine when and how to intervene in streaming scientific discussions, by leveraging the team's project proposal and long- and short-term conversational memory. To support this work, we introduce BSDD (Biomedical Streaming Dialogue Dataset), a new benchmark of simulated research discussion dialogues with intervention points derived from PubMed articles. Experimental results show that PULI significantly outperforms existing baselines in both intervention precision and collaborative task utility, highlighting the potential of proactive LLMs as intelligent scientific assistants.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoLabScience，一个通过PULI框架在生物医学对话中主动干预的LLM助手，并构建了BSDD基准数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在科学协作中只能被动响应，缺乏主动性和前瞻性，限制了其在需要自主参与的协作场景中的有效性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在生物医学研究对话中自主判断何时以及如何主动干预，以提升协作效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PULI（Positive-Unlabeled Learning-to-Intervene）框架，使用强化学习目标训练模型，结合项目提案和长短期对话记忆，决定在流式科学讨论中何时及如何干预。
contributions: 提出CoLabScience，一个主动式LLM助手，用于生物医学发现中的AI-专家协作。
提出PULI框架，利用正-无标签学习和强化学习实现主动干预决策。
构建BSDD数据集，包含模拟研究讨论对话和基于PubMed文章的干预点。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果显示PULI在干预精度和协作任务效用上显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 数据集为模拟对话，可能无法完全反映真实协作场景的复杂性。
主动干预的时机和内容可能受限于对话历史长度和项目提案的完整性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（主动干预+正无标签学习），但实验信息有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoLabScience，一个通过PULI框架在生物医学对话中主动干预的LLM助手，并构建了BSDD基准数据集。

papers.title: PAWN: Piece Value Analysis with Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Predicting the relative value of any given chess piece in a position remains an open challenge, as a piece's contribution depends on its spatial relationships with every other piece on the board. We demonstrate that incorporating the state of the full chess board via latent position representations derived using a CNN-based autoencoder significantly improves accuracy for MLP-based piece value prediction architectures. Using a dataset of over 12 million piece-value pairs gathered from Grandmaster-level games, with ground-truth labels generated by Stockfish 17, our enhanced piece value predictor significantly outperforms context-independent MLP-based systems, reducing validation mean absolute error by 16% and predicting relative piece value within approximately 0.65 pawns. More generally, our findings suggest that encoding the full problem state as context provides useful inductive bias for predicting the contribution of any individual component.

analysis.tldr: 通过CNN自编码器编码全局棋盘状态，显著提升MLP对棋子价值的预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 棋子价值依赖于全局空间关系，现有上下文无关方法精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何准确预测任意棋子在给定局面下的相对价值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用CNN自编码器提取棋盘全局潜在表示，作为MLP价值预测网络的输入。
contributions: 提出PAWN方法，将全局棋盘状态编码为上下文特征用于棋子价值预测。
在1200万大师级棋局数据上验证，MAE降低16%，预测误差约0.65兵。
analysis.experiments: 使用Stockfish 17生成的1200万棋子-价值对数据集，验证MAE降低16%，预测误差约0.65兵。
limitations: 仅针对国际象棋，泛化性未知。
依赖Stockfish生成标签，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，应用领域较窄，但实验充分，可推荐阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过CNN自编码器编码全局棋盘状态，显著提升MLP对棋子价值的预测精度。

papers.title: Symbolic Guardrails for Domain-Specific Agents: Stronger Safety and Security Guarantees Without Sacrificing Utility
papers.abstract: AI agents that interact with their environments through tools enable powerful applications, but in high-stakes business settings, unintended actions can cause unacceptable harm, such as privacy breaches and financial loss. Existing mitigations, such as training-based methods and neural guardrails, improve agent reliability but cannot provide guarantees. We study symbolic guardrails as a practical path toward strong safety and security guarantees for AI agents. Our three-part study includes a systematic review of 80 state-of-the-art agent safety and security benchmarks to identify the policies they evaluate, an analysis of which policy requirements can be guaranteed by symbolic guardrails, and an evaluation of how symbolic guardrails affect safety, security, and agent success on $τ^2$-Bench, CAR-bench, and MedAgentBench. We find that 85\% of benchmarks lack concrete policies, relying instead on underspecified high-level goals or common sense. Among the specified policies, 74\% of policy requirements can be enforced by symbolic guardrails, often using simple, low-cost mechanisms. These guardrails improve safety and security without sacrificing agent utility. Overall, our results suggest that symbolic guardrails are a practical and effective way to guarantee some safety and security requirements, especially for domain-specific AI agents. We release all codes and artifacts at https://github.com/hyn0027/agent-symbolic-guardrails.

analysis.tldr: 符号护栏能在不牺牲实用性的前提下为领域特定AI智能体提供更强的安全与保障保证。
analysis.research_motivation: AI智能体在工具交互中可能引发隐私泄露和财务损失等不可接受危害，现有训练方法和神经护栏无法提供保证。
analysis.problem: 如何为领域特定AI智能体提供可保证的安全与保障策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 85%的基准缺乏具体策略，依赖未指定的高层目标或常识；在指定策略中，74%的策略要求可通过符号护栏强制执行。
analysis.method: 三部分研究：系统回顾80个智能体安全与保障基准以识别策略，分析符号护栏可保证的策略要求，在三个基准上评估符号护栏对安全、保障和成功率的影响。
contributions: 系统梳理了80个智能体安全与保障基准中的策略现状，发现多数缺乏具体策略。
证明符号护栏能强制执行74%的指定策略要求，且不牺牲智能体实用性。
analysis.experiments: 在τ²-Bench、CAR-bench和MedAgentBench上评估符号护栏对安全、保障和成功率的影响，结果显示护栏提升了安全与保障且不牺牲实用性。
limitations: 符号护栏可能无法覆盖所有策略要求（26%无法强制执行）。
评估限于三个基准，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法系统性强，实验覆盖多个基准，对安全对齐领域有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 符号护栏能在不牺牲实用性的前提下为领域特定AI智能体提供更强的安全与保障保证。

papers.title: Reward Weighted Classifier-Free Guidance as Policy Improvement in Autoregressive Models
papers.abstract: Consider an auto-regressive model that produces outputs x (e.g., answers to questions, molecules) each of which can be summarized by an attribute vector y (e.g., helpfulness vs. harmlessness, or bio-availability vs. lipophilicity). An arbitrary reward function r(y) encodes tradeoffs between these properties. Typically, tilting the model's sampling distribution to increase this reward is done at training time via reinforcement learning. However, if the reward function changes, re-alignment requires re-training. In this paper, we show that a reward weighted classifier-free guidance (RCFG) can act as a policy improvement operator in this setting, approximating tilting the sampling distribution by the Q function. We apply RCFG to molecular generation, demonstrating that it can optimize novel reward functions at test time. Finally, we show that using RCFG as a teacher and distilling into the base policy to serve as a warm start significantly speeds up convergence for standard RL.

analysis.tldr: 提出奖励加权无分类器引导（RCFG）作为自回归模型的策略改进算子，实现测试时奖励优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归模型生成样本时，通常需要针对特定奖励函数进行训练时强化学习对齐，但奖励函数变化时需重新训练，成本高且不灵活。
analysis.problem: 如何在测试时无需重新训练即可优化自回归模型生成样本的任意奖励函数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出奖励加权无分类器引导（RCFG），将其作为策略改进算子，近似用Q函数倾斜采样分布，并在测试时优化新奖励函数。
contributions: 理论证明RCFG可作为自回归模型中的策略改进算子，近似Q函数倾斜采样分布。
在分子生成任务上验证RCFG能在测试时优化新奖励函数。
展示RCFG作为教师蒸馏到基础策略可加速标准RL收敛。
analysis.experiments: 在分子生成任务上验证RCFG优化新奖励函数的能力，并展示其作为教师蒸馏加速RL收敛。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可被属性向量y总结的输出。
测试时优化效果可能受限于奖励函数形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有理论创新，但实验信息有限，且与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出奖励加权无分类器引导（RCFG）作为自回归模型的策略改进算子，实现测试时奖励优化。

papers.title: Why Fine-Tuning Encourages Hallucinations and How to Fix It
papers.abstract: Large language models are prone to hallucinating factually incorrect statements. A key source of these errors is exposure to new factual information through supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which can increase hallucinations w.r.t. knowledge acquired during pre-training. In this work, we explore whether SFT-induced hallucinations can be mitigated using established tools from the continual learning literature, since they arise as a by-product of knowledge degradation during training. We propose a self-distillation-based SFT method that facilitates effective factual learning while minimizing hallucinations w.r.t. pre-existing knowledge by regularizing output-distribution drift. We also show that, in settings where new knowledge acquisition is unnecessary, suppressing factual plasticity by freezing parameter groups, can preserve task performance while reducing hallucinations. Lastly, we investigate the mechanism behind SFT-induced hallucinations through three hypotheses: capacity limitations, behavior cloning, and localized interference. Our experiments show that a main driver is interference among overlapping semantic representations, and that self-distillation succeeds by mitigating this interference.

analysis.tldr: 微调导致幻觉的根源是语义表征干扰，自蒸馏方法可有效缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在微调后容易产生事实性幻觉，影响可靠性，亟需理解机制并开发缓解方法。
analysis.problem: 微调引入新知识时如何避免破坏预训练知识并减少幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微调导致幻觉的主要原因是重叠语义表征间的干扰，而非容量限制或行为克隆。
analysis.method: 提出基于自蒸馏的微调方法，通过正则化输出分布漂移来平衡新知识学习与旧知识保持；在无需新知识时冻结参数组。
contributions: 揭示微调导致幻觉的核心机制是语义表征干扰
提出自蒸馏微调方法有效缓解幻觉
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 自蒸馏可能增加训练复杂度
方法在极端新知识场景下的效果未知
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且针对LLM关键问题，但实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调导致幻觉的根源是语义表征干扰，自蒸馏方法可有效缓解。

papers.title: CTSCAN: Evaluation Leakage in Chest CT Segmentation and a Reproducible Patient-Disjoint Benchmark
papers.abstract: Reported chest CT segmentation performance can be strongly inflated when train and test partitions mix slices from the same study. We present CTSCAN, a reproducible multi-source chest CT benchmark and research stack designed to measure what survives under patient-disjoint evaluation. The current four-class artifact aggregates 89 cases from PleThora, MedSeg SIRM, and LongCIU, and we show that the original slice-PNG workflow induces near-complete case reuse across train, validation, and test. Using the playground environment, we run a multi-seed protocol sweep with the same FPN plus EfficientNet-B0 control configuration under slice-mixed and case-disjoint evaluation. Across 3 seeds and 12 epochs per seed, the slice-mixed protocol reaches 0.6665 foreground Dice and 0.5031 foreground IoU, whereas the case-disjoint protocol reaches 0.2066 Dice and 0.1181 IoU. Removing patient reuse therefore reduces foreground Dice by 0.4599 absolute (69.00% relative) and foreground IoU by 0.3850 absolute (76.52% relative). CTSCAN packages the corrected benchmark with deterministic split manifests, explicit weak-supervision controls, a scripted multi-seed protocol sweep, and reproducible figure generation, providing a reusable basis for patient-disjoint chest CT evaluation.

analysis.tldr: CTSCAN 揭示了胸部CT分割中因患者数据泄露导致的性能高估，并提供了一个患者分离的基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 胸部CT分割性能常因训练和测试集混合同一患者的切片而被严重高估，现有基准缺乏患者分离的评估，导致结果不可靠。
analysis.problem: 解决胸部CT分割评估中因患者数据泄露（切片级混合）导致的性能膨胀问题，并建立可复现的患者分离基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要显示，原始切片级PNG工作流导致训练、验证和测试集几乎完全复用同一患者的切片；在相同配置下，切片混合协议的前景Dice为0.6665，而患者分离协议仅为0.2066，性能下降69.00%。
analysis.method: 构建CTSCAN基准，包含来自三个来源的89例病例，提供确定性分割清单、显式弱监督控制、脚本化多种子协议扫描和可复现的图表生成。
contributions: 揭示了胸部CT分割中因患者数据泄露导致的性能高估现象，并量化了其影响。
提供了可复现的患者分离基准CTSCAN，包含多来源数据、确定性分割和标准化评估协议。
analysis.experiments: 使用FPN+EfficientNet-B0控制配置，在3个种子和每个种子12个epoch下，比较切片混合和患者分离协议的性能。
limitations: 仅包含89例病例，规模较小。
仅评估了四类分割任务，可能不适用于其他类别或更复杂的任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 揭示了重要但已知的数据泄露问题，提供了可复现基准，但方法简单，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CTSCAN 揭示了胸部CT分割中因患者数据泄露导致的性能高估，并提供了一个患者分离的基准。

papers.title: Subliminal Transfer of Unsafe Behaviors in AI Agent Distillation
papers.abstract: Recent work on subliminal learning demonstrates that language models can transmit semantic traits through data that is semantically unrelated to those traits. However, it remains unclear whether behavioral traits can transfer in agentic systems, where policies are learned from trajectories rather than static text. In this work, we provide the first empirical evidence that unsafe agent behaviors can transfer subliminally through model distillation across two complementary experimental settings. In our primary setting, we construct a teacher agent exhibiting a strong deletion bias, a tendency to perform destructive file-system actions via an API-style tool interface, and distill it into a student using only trajectories from ostensibly safe tasks, with all explicit deletion keywords rigorously filtered. In our secondary setting, we replicate the threat model in a native Bash environment, replacing API tool calls with shell commands and operationalizing the bias as a preference for issuing chmod as the first permission-related command over semantically equivalent alternatives such as chown or setfacl. Despite full keyword sanitation in both settings, students inherit measurable behavioral biases. In the API setting the student's deletion rate reaches 100% (versus a 5% baseline) under homogeneous distillation; in the Bash setting the student's chmod-first rate reaches 30%-55% (versus a 0%-10% baseline), with the strongest transfer observed in large-to-small distillation. Our results demonstrate that explicit data sanitation is an insufficient defense, and behavioral biases are encoded implicitly in trajectory dynamics regardless of the tool interface.

analysis.tldr: AI agent蒸馏中不安全行为可通过轨迹数据隐式传递，即使显式过滤关键词也无法防御。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究表明语言模型可通过语义无关数据传递语义特征，但行为特征能否在agent系统中通过轨迹蒸馏传递尚不清楚，且显式数据清洗可能不足以防御此类隐式传递。
analysis.problem: 验证不安全agent行为能否通过蒸馏过程从教师模型隐式传递给学生模型，即使训练数据经过严格关键词过滤。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在API和Bash两种环境下，即使完全过滤删除或权限相关关键词，学生模型仍继承教师的行为偏差（如删除倾向或chmod优先偏好），且大规模到小规模蒸馏时传递最强。
analysis.method: 构建具有特定行为偏差（删除偏差或chmod优先偏差）的教师agent，使用仅包含安全任务的轨迹数据（经关键词过滤）蒸馏学生模型，在API工具接口和原生Bash两种设置下验证行为传递。
contributions: 首次提供经验证据表明不安全agent行为可通过蒸馏隐式传递，即使训练数据经过严格关键词过滤。
在两种互补实验设置（API工具接口和原生Bash）中验证了行为偏差的跨接口传递，并量化了传递强度。
analysis.experiments: 在API设置中，同构蒸馏下学生删除率达100%（基线5%）；在Bash设置中，学生chmod优先率达30%-55%（基线0%-10%），大规模到小规模蒸馏传递最强。
limitations: 仅研究了特定行为偏差（删除和chmod优先），其他类型行为偏差的传递性未知。
未探索防御机制（如对抗训练或行为正则化）的有效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次揭示agent蒸馏中行为隐式传递的安全漏洞，实验设计严谨，对AI安全有重要警示意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI agent蒸馏中不安全行为可通过轨迹数据隐式传递，即使显式过滤关键词也无法防御。

papers.title: Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts
papers.abstract: Deliberative multi-agent systems allow agents to exchange messages and revise beliefs over time. While this interaction is meant to improve performance, it can also create dangerous conformity effects: agreement, confidence, prestige, or majority size may be treated as if they were evidence, producing high-confidence convergence to false conclusions. To address this, we introduce PBRC (Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts), a protocol-level mechanism that strictly separates open communication from admissible epistemic change. A PBRC contract publicly fixes first-order evidence triggers, admissible revision operators, a priority rule, and a fallback policy. A non-fallback step is accepted only when it cites a preregistered trigger and provides a nonempty witness set of externally validated evidence tokens. This ensures that every substantive belief change is both enforceable by a router and auditable after the fact. In this paper, (a) we prove that under evidential contracts with conservative fallback, social-only rounds cannot increase confidence and cannot generate purely conformity-driven wrong-but-sure cascades. (b) We show that auditable trigger protocols admit evidential PBRC normal forms that preserve belief trajectories and canonicalized audit traces. (c) We demonstrate that sound enforcement yields epistemic accountability: any change of top hypothesis is attributable to a concrete validated witness set. For token-invariant contracts, (d) we prove that enforced trajectories depend only on token-exposure traces; under flooding dissemination, these traces are characterized exactly by truncated reachability, giving tight diameter bounds for universal evidence closure. Finally, we introduce a companion contractual dynamic doxastic logic to specify trace invariants, and provide simulations illustrating cascade suppression, auditability, and robustness-liveness trade-offs.

analysis.tldr: 提出预注册信念修正合同（PBRC），通过协议级机制分离通信与信念变化，防止多智能体系统中的从众性错误收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统中，自由通信可能导致从众效应（如将同意、信心、声望或多数规模当作证据），产生高置信度的错误结论，现有方法缺乏对信念变化过程的严格约束和审计。
analysis.problem: 如何设计协议级机制，使得多智能体系统中的信念修正仅基于外部验证的证据，而非社会性信号，从而避免从众性错误并保证可审计性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在无约束的协商中，同意、信心、声望或多数规模可能被错误地当作证据，导致高置信度收敛到错误结论（从众性错误级联）。
analysis.method: 提出PBRC协议，公开固定证据触发器、可接受的修正算子、优先级规则和回退策略；非回退步骤必须引用预注册触发器并提供外部验证的证据集，确保信念变化可执行且可审计。
contributions: 证明在保守回退的证据合同下，纯社交轮次不能增加置信度，不能产生从众驱动的错误级联。
证明可审计触发器协议存在证据性PBRC范式，保持信念轨迹和规范化审计痕迹。
证明可靠执行产生认知责任：任何顶层假设的变化都可归因于具体的验证证据集。
对于令牌不变合同，证明强制轨迹仅取决于令牌暴露痕迹；在洪泛传播下，这些痕迹由截断可达性精确刻画，给出通用证据闭包的紧直径界。
引入配套的契约动态认知逻辑以指定轨迹不变量，并提供模拟展示级联抑制、可审计性和鲁棒性-活性权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及模拟展示级联抑制、可审计性和鲁棒性-活性权衡。
limitations: 协议可能增加通信和计算开销，实际部署效率需进一步评估。
依赖外部验证的证据集，在证据获取困难或延迟的场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论证明扎实，但缺乏实验验证，且与主流VLM/LLM方向距离较远，适合对多智能体安全对齐感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出预注册信念修正合同（PBRC），通过协议级机制分离通信与信念变化，防止多智能体系统中的从众性错误收敛。

papers.title: Learning Affine-Equivariant Proximal Operators
papers.abstract: Proximal operators are fundamental across many applications in signal processing and machine learning, including solving ill-posed inverse problems. Recent work has introduced Learned Proximal Networks (LPNs), providing parametric functions that compute exact proximals for data-driven and potentially non-convex regularizers. However, in many settings it is important to include additional structure to these regularizers--and their corresponding proximals--such as shift and scale equivariance. In this work, we show how to obtain learned functions parametrized by neural networks that provably compute exact proximal operators while being equivariant to shifts and scaling, which we dub Affine-Equivariant Learned Proximal Networks (AE-LPNs). We demonstrate our results on synthetic, constructive examples, and then on real data via denoising in out-of-distribution settings. Our equivariant learned proximals enhance robustness to noise distributions and affine shifts far beyond training distributions, improving the practical utility of learned proximal operators

analysis.tldr: 提出仿射等变学习近端网络，增强近端算子的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 近端算子在信号处理和机器学习中广泛应用，但现有学习型近端网络缺乏对平移和缩放等仿射变换的等变性，限制了其在分布外场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计神经网络参数化的近端算子，使其在计算精确近端的同时具备平移和缩放等变性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出仿射等变学习近端网络（AE-LPNs），通过约束网络结构实现平移和缩放等变性，并保证输出为精确近端算子。
contributions: 首次将仿射等变性引入学习型近端算子，理论保证精确性。
在合成和真实数据上验证了等变性对分布外噪声和仿射偏移的鲁棒性提升。
analysis.experiments: 在合成构造性示例和真实数据（去噪任务）上进行了实验，展示了分布外场景下的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定的仿射变换（平移和缩放），更一般的等变性未探索。
实验规模较小，未在复杂逆问题（如图像修复）上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且理论扎实，但实验范围有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出仿射等变学习近端网络，增强近端算子的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

papers.title: CXR-LT 2026 Challenge: Multi-Center Long-Tailed and Zero Shot Chest X-ray Classification
papers.abstract: Chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation is hindered by the long-tailed distribution of pathologies and the open-world nature of clinical environments. Existing benchmarks often rely on closed-set classes from a single institution, failing to capture the prevalence of rare diseases or the appearance of novel findings. To address this, we present the CXR-LT challenge. The first event, CXR-LT 2023, established a large-scale benchmark for long-tailed multi-label CXR classification and identified key challenges in rare disease recognition. CXR-LT 2024 further expanded the label space and introduced a zero-shot task to study generalization to unseen findings. Building on the success of CXR-LT 2023 and 2024, this third iteration of the benchmark introduces a multi-center dataset comprising over 145,000 images from PadChest and NIH Chest X-ray datasets. Additionally, all development and test sets in CXR-LT 2026 are annotated by radiologists, providing a more reliable and clinically grounded evaluation than report-derived labels. The challenge defines two core tasks this year: (1) Robust Multi-Label Classification on 30 known classes and (2) Open-World Generalization to 6 unseen (out-of-distribution) rare disease classes. This paper summarizes the overview of the CXR-LT 2026 challenge. We describe the data collection and annotation procedures, analyze solution strategies adopted by participating teams, and evaluate head-versus-tail performance, calibration, and cross-center generalization gaps. Our results show that vision-language foundation models improve both in-distribution and zero-shot performance, but detecting rare findings under multi-center shift remains challenging. Our study provides a foundation for developing and evaluating AI systems in realistic long-tailed and open-world clinical conditions.

analysis.tldr: CXR-LT 2026挑战赛提出多中心长尾和零样本胸部X光分类基准，发现视觉-语言基础模型提升性能但罕见病检测仍具挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 胸部X光解读受病理长尾分布和临床环境开放世界性质阻碍，现有基准依赖单机构封闭集，无法捕捉罕见病和新发现。
analysis.problem: 解决多中心环境下长尾多标签分类和开放世界泛化（零样本）问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉-语言基础模型提升分布内和零样本性能，但多中心偏移下罕见病检测仍困难。
analysis.method: 构建多中心数据集（PadChest和NIH Chest X-ray，超145,000张图像），由放射科医生标注，定义两个任务：30个已知类的鲁棒多标签分类和6个未见罕见病类的开放世界泛化。
contributions: 提出CXR-LT 2026挑战赛，包含多中心长尾和零样本CXR分类基准。
提供放射科医生标注的开发集和测试集，比报告派生标签更可靠。
分析参赛团队策略，评估头部vs尾部性能、校准和跨中心泛化差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述挑战赛设置和观察到的现象。
limitations: 仅覆盖30个已知类和6个未见类，可能不足以代表所有临床罕见病。
多中心偏移下罕见病检测仍具挑战，方法泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 挑战赛基准有实际应用价值，但方法创新有限，适合关注医学图像分类的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CXR-LT 2026挑战赛提出多中心长尾和零样本胸部X光分类基准，发现视觉-语言基础模型提升性能但罕见病检测仍具挑战。

papers.title: Natural gradient descent with momentum
papers.abstract: We consider the problem of approximating a function by an element of a nonlinear manifold which admits a differentiable parametrization, typical examples being neural networks with differentiable activation functions or tensor networks. Natural gradient descent (NGD) for the optimization of a loss function can be seen as a preconditioned gradient descent where updates in the parameter space are driven by a functional perspective. In a spirit similar to Newton's method, a NGD step uses, instead of the Hessian, the Gram matrix of the generating system of the tangent space to the approximation manifold at the current iterate, with respect to a suitable metric. This corresponds to a locally optimal update in function space, following a projected gradient onto the tangent space to the manifold. Still, both gradient and natural gradient descent methods get stuck in local minima. Furthermore, when the model class is a nonlinear manifold or the loss function is not ideally conditioned (e.g., the KL-divergence for density estimation, or a norm of the residual of a partial differential equation in physics informed learning), even the natural gradient might yield non-optimal directions at each step. This work introduces a natural version of classical inertial dynamic methods like Heavy-Ball or Nesterov and show how it can improve the learning process when working with nonlinear model classes.

analysis.tldr: 提出自然梯度下降的动量版本，在非线性模型类中改善学习过程。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然梯度下降（NGD）在非线性流形优化中虽优于普通梯度下降，但仍会陷入局部极小值，且在非线性模型类或非理想损失函数下可能产生非最优更新方向。
analysis.problem: 如何将经典动量方法（如Heavy-Ball、Nesterov）推广到自然梯度框架，以克服NGD在非线性模型类中的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当模型类是非线性流形或损失函数条件不佳时，自然梯度也可能产生非最优方向。
analysis.method: 提出自然梯度下降的动量版本（Natural Gradient Descent with Momentum），将Heavy-Ball或Nesterov加速思想融入自然梯度框架。
contributions: 首次将经典动量方法系统性地引入自然梯度下降框架。
理论分析表明该方法在非线性模型类中能改善学习过程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可微参数化的非线性流形。
动量超参数的选择可能影响收敛性。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.reason: 理论创新较强，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注优化理论的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自然梯度下降的动量版本，在非线性模型类中改善学习过程。

papers.title: Consistency Analysis of Sentiment Predictions using Syntactic & Semantic Context Assessment Summarization (SSAS)
papers.abstract: The fundamental challenge of using Large Language Models (LLMs) for reliable, enterprise-grade analytics, such as sentiment prediction, is the conflict between the LLMs' inherent stochasticity (generative, non-deterministic nature) and the analytical requirement for consistency. The LLM inconsistency, coupled with the noisy nature of chaotic modern datasets, renders sentiment predictions too volatile for strategic business decisions. To resolve this, we present a Syntactic & Semantic Context Assessment Summarization (SSAS) framework for establishing context. Context established by SSAS functions as a sophisticated data pre-processing framework that enforces a bounded attention mechanism on LLMs. It achieves this by applying a hierarchical classification structure (Themes, Stories, Clusters) and an iterative Summary-of-Summaries (SoS) based context computation architecture. This endows the raw text with high-signal, sentiment-dense prompts, that effectively mitigate both irrelevant data and analytical variance. We empirically evaluated the efficacy of SSAS, using Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite, against a direct-LLM approach across three industry-standard datasets - Amazon Product Reviews, Google Business Reviews, Goodreads Book Reviews - and multiple robustness scenarios. Our results show that our SSAS framework is capable of significantly improving data quality, up to 30%, through a combination of noise removal and improvement in the estimation of sentiment prediction. Ultimately, consistency in our context-estimation capabilities provides a stable and reliable evidence base for decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出SSAS框架，通过层次化分类和摘要计算为LLM提供高信号上下文，提升情感预测一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的随机性与企业级分析对一致性的要求存在冲突，导致情感预测波动大，无法支持战略决策。
analysis.problem: LLM在情感预测中的不一致性以及噪声数据对预测稳定性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SSAS框架：采用层次化分类结构（主题、故事、聚类）和迭代的摘要-摘要（SoS）上下文计算架构，为LLM提供高信号、情感密集的提示，实现有界注意力机制。
contributions: 提出SSAS框架，通过上下文预处理提升LLM情感预测的一致性。
在三个行业标准数据集上验证了SSAS能显著提高数据质量（高达30%）。
analysis.experiments: 在Amazon Product Reviews、Google Business Reviews、Goodreads Book Reviews三个数据集上，使用Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite评估，与直接LLM方法对比，显示数据质量提升高达30%。
limitations: 仅使用单一LLM（Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite）进行实验，泛化性未知。
未讨论SSAS的计算开销和实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模有限，且未与最新方法对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SSAS框架，通过层次化分类和摘要计算为LLM提供高信号上下文，提升情感预测一致性。

papers.title: UA-Net: Uncertainty-Aware Network for TRISO Image Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Tristructural isotropic (TRISO)-coated particle fuels undergo dimensional changes and chemical reactions during high-temperature neutron irradiation. Post-irradiation materialography helps understand processes that impact fuel performance, such as coating integrity and fission product retention. Conventionally, experts manually evaluate features in thousands of cross sections of sub-mm-sized samples, which is tedious and subjective. In this work, we propose UA-Net, a deep learning framework that segments five characteristic regions of TRISO fuel micrographs and generates an uncertainty map for predictions. The model uses a multi-stage pretraining strategy, starting with general image representations learned from ImageNet, followed by fine-tuning on TRISO micrographs from various irradiation experiments and AGR-5/6/7 particle cross sections. A meta-model for uncertainty prediction is integrated to identify small defects in TRISO images. UA-Net was evaluated on a test set of 102 images, achieving mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) and mean Precision (mP) of 95.5% and 97.3%, respectively. The meta-model achieved a specificity of 91.8% and sensitivity of 93.5%, demonstrating strong performance in detecting misclassifications. The model was also applied to new TRISO images for qualitative evaluation, showing high accuracy in extracting layer regions.

analysis.tldr: 提出UA-Net，一种用于TRISO燃料图像语义分割的不确定性感知网络，结合多阶段预训练和不确定性预测元模型，在102张测试集上达到95.5% mIoU。
analysis.research_motivation: TRISO燃料颗粒在辐照后需通过材料学分析评估性能，但传统人工评估数千张显微图像既繁琐又主观，亟需自动化分割方法。
analysis.problem: 实现TRISO燃料显微图像中五个特征区域的精确语义分割，并量化预测不确定性以检测小缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用多阶段预训练策略（ImageNet预训练→不同辐照实验TRISO图像微调→AGR-5/6/7粒子截面微调），并集成不确定性预测元模型。
contributions: 提出UA-Net框架，实现TRISO图像语义分割与不确定性预测。
多阶段预训练策略有效利用不同来源数据提升分割性能。
不确定性元模型在检测误分类方面表现良好（特异性91.8%，敏感性93.5%）。
analysis.experiments: 在102张测试集上评估，mIoU 95.5%，mP 97.3%；元模型特异性91.8%，敏感性93.5%；并在新TRISO图像上定性验证。
limitations: 测试集规模较小（102张），泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对TRISO图像，方法在其他领域适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法针对特定领域（核燃料图像），创新性中等，实验规模较小，但应用价值明确。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UA-Net，一种用于TRISO燃料图像语义分割的不确定性感知网络，结合多阶段预训练和不确定性预测元模型，在102张测试集上达到95.5% mIoU。

papers.title: LACE: Lattice Attention for Cross-thread Exploration
papers.abstract: Current large language models reason in isolation. Although it is common to sample multiple reasoning paths in parallel, these trajectories do not interact, and often fail in the same redundant ways. We introduce LACE, a framework that transforms reasoning from a collection of independent trials into a coordinated, parallel process. By repurposing the model architecture to enable cross-thread attention, LACE allows concurrent reasoning paths to share intermediate insights and correct one another during inference. A central challenge is the absence of natural training data that exhibits such collaborative behavior. We address this gap with a synthetic data pipeline that explicitly teaches models to communicate and error-correct across threads. Experiments show that this unified exploration substantially outperforms standard parallel search, improving reasoning accuracy by over 7 points. Our results suggest that large language models can be more effective when parallel reasoning paths are allowed to interact.

analysis.tldr: LACE通过跨线程注意力机制让LLM的并行推理路径相互协作，显著提升推理准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前大语言模型推理时各路径独立，缺乏交互，导致冗余失败，亟需一种协调并行推理的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让并行推理路径在推理过程中共享中间见解并相互纠错，以提升整体推理效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出并行推理路径不交互时往往以相同方式失败，存在冗余模式。
analysis.method: 提出LACE框架，通过修改模型架构实现跨线程注意力，并设计合成数据管道训练模型进行跨线程通信和纠错。
contributions: 提出LACE框架，将独立推理转化为协调并行过程。
设计合成数据管道，解决协作行为训练数据缺失问题。
analysis.experiments: 在推理任务上，LACE相比标准并行搜索提升超过7个百分点的准确率。
limitations: 合成数据可能无法完全覆盖真实协作场景。
跨线程注意力可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验提升显著，但技术细节和局限性需进一步阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LACE通过跨线程注意力机制让LLM的并行推理路径相互协作，显著提升推理准确率。

papers.title: Understanding Tool-Augmented Agents for Lean Formalization: A Factorial Analysis
papers.abstract: Automatic translation of natural language mathematics into faithful Lean 4 code is hindered by the fundamental dissonance between informal set-theoretic intuition and strict formal type theory. This gap often causes LLMs to hallucinate non-existent library definitions, resulting in code that fails to compile or lacks semantic fidelity. In this work, we investigate the effectiveness of tool-augmented agents for this task through a systematic factorial analysis of three distinct tool categories: Fine-tuned Model Querying (accessing expert drafts), Knowledge Search (retrieving symbol definitions), and Compiler Feedback (verifying code via a Lean REPL). We first benchmark the agent against one-shot baselines, demonstrating large gains in both compilation success and semantic equivalence. We then use the factorial decomposition to quantify the impact of each category, isolating the marginal contribution of each tool type to overall performance.

analysis.tldr: 通过因子分析系统评估工具增强型智能体在将自然语言数学翻译为Lean 4代码中的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言数学到形式化代码的自动翻译面临非正式集合论直觉与严格形式类型理论之间的根本性不匹配，导致LLM产生幻觉，生成无法编译或语义不忠的代码。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用工具增强型智能体提升自然语言数学到Lean 4代码的翻译质量，特别是编译成功率和语义等价性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种工具增强型智能体，包含三种工具类别：微调模型查询（访问专家草稿）、知识搜索（检索符号定义）和编译器反馈（通过Lean REPL验证代码），并通过因子分析量化每种工具的边际贡献。
contributions: 首次通过因子分析系统评估工具增强型智能体在Lean形式化任务中的有效性。
量化了三种工具类别（微调模型查询、知识搜索、编译器反馈）对编译成功率和语义等价性的边际贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在自然语言数学到Lean 4代码翻译任务上，与一次性基线对比，展示了编译成功率和语义等价性的大幅提升，并通过因子分解量化了每种工具类别的贡献。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Lean 4形式化任务，泛化性未知。
因子分析可能未考虑工具之间的交互效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新（因子分析评估工具贡献）且实验充分，与LLM Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因子分析系统评估工具增强型智能体在将自然语言数学翻译为Lean 4代码中的有效性。

papers.title: Robustifying and Selecting Cohort-Appropriate Prognostic Models under Distributional Shifts
papers.abstract: External validation is widely regarded as the gold standard for prognostic model evaluation. In this study, we challenge the assumption that successful external calibration guarantees model generalizability and propose two complementary strategies to improve transportability of prognostic models across cohorts. Using six real-world surgical cohorts from tertiary academic centers, we tested whether successful external calibration depends largely on similarity in covariates and outcomes between training and validation cohorts, quantified using Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence, with calibration assessed by the Integrated Calibration Index (ICI). From the model-developer's perspective, we trained the "best-on-average" prognostic model by tuning toward a meta-analysis-derived covariate and outcome distribution as an approximation of the broader target population. From the end-user perspective, we proposed a simple measure for cohort outcome similarity to identify, among published models, the one most suitable for a given target cohort in terms of both calibration and clinical utility. External calibration worsened as distributional mismatch increased. Higher KL divergence was associated with higher ICI in both surgery-alone (Spearman $ρ=0.614$, $p=0.004$) and surgery + adjuvant chemotherapy cohorts (Spearman $ρ=0.738$, $p<0.001$). Meta-analysis-informed weighting improved calibration in most settings without materially affecting discrimination, with the clearest benefit when evaluated on the aggregated external population ($p=0.037$). Models developed in more similar cohorts achieved lower ICI in surgery-alone (Spearman $ρ=0.803$, $p<0.001$) and surgery + adjuvant chemotherapy cohorts (Spearman $ρ=0.737$, $p<0.001$), and provided greater clinical utility on DCA.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种策略（元分析加权训练和基于结果相似性的模型选择）以提升预后模型在不同队列间的可迁移性。
analysis.research_motivation: 外部验证被认为是预后模型评估的金标准，但成功的外部校准并不保证模型泛化性，分布偏移下模型可迁移性差是临床应用的痛点。
analysis.problem: 如何提升预后模型在不同队列间的可迁移性，使其在分布偏移下仍能保持良好校准和临床效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 外部校准随分布不匹配加剧而恶化；KL散度与校准指数ICI显著正相关；在相似队列上训练的模型校准更好且临床效用更高。
analysis.method: 从模型开发者角度，通过元分析导出的协变量和结局分布进行加权训练，得到“平均最优”模型；从终端用户角度，提出基于队列结局相似性的简单度量，从已发表模型中选择最适合目标队列的模型。
contributions: 挑战了成功外部校准即保证泛化性的假设，揭示了分布不匹配对校准的影响。
提出两种互补策略（元分析加权训练和基于相似性的模型选择）以提升模型可迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在六个真实世界手术队列上验证，使用KL散度量化分布差异，ICI评估校准，DCA评估临床效用。
limitations: 仅基于手术队列，可能不适用于其他疾病领域。
元分析加权训练需要外部元分析数据，获取可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但应用领域（手术预后）与重点方向（VLM/视频生成等）相关性较低，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种策略（元分析加权训练和基于结果相似性的模型选择）以提升预后模型在不同队列间的可迁移性。

papers.title: Towards Reliable Testing of Machine Unlearning
papers.abstract: Machine learning components are now central to AI-infused software systems, from recommendations and code assistants to clinical decision support. As regulations and governance frameworks increasingly require deleting sensitive data from deployed models, machine unlearning is emerging as a practical alternative to full retraining. However, unlearning introduces a software quality-assurance challenge: under realistic deployment constraints and imperfect oracles, how can we test that a model no longer relies on targeted information? This paper frames unlearning testing as a first-class software engineering problem. We argue that practical unlearning tests must provide (i) thorough coverage over proxy and mediated influence pathways, (ii) debuggable diagnostics that localize where leakage persists, (iii) cost-effective regression-style execution under query budgets, and (iv) black-box applicability for API-deployed models. We outline a causal, pathway-centric perspective, causal fuzzing, that generates budgeted interventions to estimate residual direct and indirect effects and produce actionable "leakage reports". Proof-of-concept results illustrate that standard attribution checks can miss residual influence due to proxy pathways, cancellation effects, and subgroup masking, motivating causal testing as a promising direction for unlearning testing.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果模糊测试方法，用于在现实部署约束下可靠测试机器学习模型是否真正遗忘目标信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 法规要求从部署模型中删除敏感数据，但现有遗忘测试方法在现实约束下（如黑盒API、有限查询预算）无法全面检测残留影响，存在质量保障挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在黑盒、有限预算、不完美预言条件下，系统测试模型是否真正遗忘目标信息，并定位泄漏路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准归因检查可能因代理路径、抵消效应和子组掩蔽而遗漏残留影响。
analysis.method: 提出因果模糊测试（causal fuzzing），从因果、路径中心视角生成预算干预，估计残余直接和间接效应，生成可操作的“泄漏报告”。
contributions: 将遗忘测试定义为一等软件工程问题，提出四项实用测试要求（覆盖、可调试、成本效益、黑盒适用）。
提出因果模糊测试框架，通过预算干预估计残余效应并定位泄漏路径。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及概念验证结果说明标准归因检查的不足。
limitations: 概念验证结果有限，缺乏大规模实证。
因果干预在复杂模型上的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出遗忘测试的新视角和因果方法，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注隐私方向的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果模糊测试方法，用于在现实部署约束下可靠测试机器学习模型是否真正遗忘目标信息。

papers.title: Frequency-Aware Flow Matching for High-Quality Image Generation
papers.abstract: Flow matching models have emerged as a powerful framework for realistic image generation by learning to reverse a corruption process that progressively adds Gaussian noise. However, because noise is injected in the latent domain, its impact on different frequency components is non-uniform. As a result, during inference, flow matching models tend to generate low-frequency components (global structure) in the early stages, while high-frequency components (fine details) emerge only later in the reverse process. Building on this insight, we propose Frequency-Aware Flow Matching (FreqFlow), a novel approach that explicitly incorporates frequency-aware conditioning into the flow matching framework via time-dependent adaptive weighting. We introduce a two-branch architecture: (1) a frequency branch that separately processes low- and high-frequency components to capture global structure and refine textures and edges, and (2) a spatial branch that synthesizes images in the latent domain, guided by the frequency branch's output. By explicitly integrating frequency information into the generation process, FreqFlow ensures that both large-scale coherence and fine-grained details are effectively modeled low-frequency conditioning reinforces global structure, while high-frequency conditioning enhances texture fidelity and detail sharpness. On the class-conditional ImageNet-256 generation benchmark, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with an FID of 1.38, surpassing the prior diffusion model DiT and flow matching model SiT by 0.79 and 0.58 FID, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/FreqFlow.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率感知流匹配（FreqFlow），通过显式频率条件化提升图像生成质量，在ImageNet-256上取得SOTA FID=1.38。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配模型在潜空间注入噪声时对不同频率分量的影响不均匀，导致低频全局结构先于高频细节生成，限制了图像质量。
analysis.problem: 现有流匹配模型无法有效同时建模低频全局结构和高频细节，生成图像在纹理和边缘清晰度上存在不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 流匹配模型推理时，低频分量（全局结构）在早期阶段生成，高频分量（精细细节）在后期才出现，这种时序差异导致细节不足。
analysis.method: 提出FreqFlow，包含频率分支（分别处理低/高频分量）和空间分支（在潜域合成图像），通过时间依赖的自适应权重将频率条件显式融入流匹配框架。
contributions: 揭示了流匹配模型中频率分量生成时序差异的现象
提出频率感知流匹配方法，通过双分支架构和自适应频率条件化提升图像质量
在ImageNet-256上取得FID=1.38的SOTA结果，超越DiT和SiT
analysis.experiments: 在类条件ImageNet-256生成基准上评估，FID为1.38，优于DiT（2.17）和SiT（1.96）。
limitations: 仅验证了类条件图像生成，未在文本条件或更高分辨率上测试
双分支架构可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与图像生成方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率感知流匹配（FreqFlow），通过显式频率条件化提升图像生成质量，在ImageNet-256上取得SOTA FID=1.38。

papers.title: Bureaucratic Silences: What the Canadian AI Register Reveals, Omits, and Obscures
papers.abstract: In November 2025, the Government of Canada operationalized its commitment to transparency by releasing its first Federal AI Register. In this paper, we argue that such registers are not neutral mirrors of government activity, but active instruments of ontological design that configure the boundaries of accountability. We analyzed the Register's complete dataset of 409 systems using the Algorithmic Decision-Making Adapted for the Public Sector (ADMAPS) framework, combining quantitative mapping with deductive qualitative coding. Our findings reveal a sharp divergence between the rhetoric of "sovereign AI" and the reality of bureaucratic practice: while 86\% of systems are deployed internally for efficiency, the Register systematically obscures the human discretion, training, and uncertainty management required to operate them. By privileging technical descriptions over sociotechnical context, the Register constructs an ontology of AI as "reliable tooling" rather than "contestable decision-making." We conclude that without a shift in design, such transparency artifacts risk automating accountability into a performative compliance exercise, offering visibility without contestability.

analysis.tldr: 加拿大AI登记册并非中立透明工具，而是通过技术描述掩盖了AI系统中的人类裁量权与不确定性，将问责制简化为表演性合规。
analysis.research_motivation: 政府AI透明度登记册被广泛视为问责工具，但其设计可能隐含偏见，影响公众对AI系统的理解与监督。
analysis.problem: 揭示加拿大联邦AI登记册如何通过选择性呈现信息，构建AI作为“可靠工具”的虚假本体论，从而削弱实际问责性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 登记册中86%的系统用于内部效率提升，但系统性地忽略了操作所需的人类裁量、培训与不确定性管理，造成“主权AI”修辞与官僚实践之间的脱节。
analysis.method: 使用ADMAPS框架对409个系统的完整数据集进行定量映射与演绎定性编码分析。
contributions: 首次系统分析加拿大联邦AI登记册的完整数据集，揭示其选择性呈现模式。
提出登记册作为本体论设计工具的概念，挑战其作为中立透明机制的假设。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于加拿大单一登记册，可能不适用于其他司法管辖区。
未提供定量评估登记册实际影响的具体指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 主题与AI治理相关，但偏政策分析，技术深度有限，适合对AI伦理与政策感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 加拿大AI登记册并非中立透明工具，而是通过技术描述掩盖了AI系统中的人类裁量权与不确定性，将问责制简化为表演性合规。

papers.title: LLMbench: A Comparative Close Reading Workbench for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: LLMbench is a browser-based workbench for the comparative close reading of large language model (LLM) outputs. Where existing tools for LLM comparison, such as Google PAIR's LLM Comparator are engineered for quantitative evaluation and user-rating metrics, LLMbench is oriented towards the hermeneutic practices of the digital humanities. Two model responses to the same prompt are side by side in annotatable panels with four analytical overlays (Probabilities for token-level log-probability inspection, Differences for word-level diff across the two panels, Tone for Hyland-style metadiscourse analysis, and Structure for sentence-level parsing with discourse connective highlighting), alongside five analytical modes, Stochastic Variation, Temperature Gradient, Prompt Sensitivity, Token Probabilities, and Cross-Model Divergence, that make the probabilistic structure of generated text legible at the token level. The tool treats the generated text as a research object in its own right from a probability distribution, a text that could have been otherwise, and provides visualisations including continuous heatmaps, entropy sparklines, pixel maps, and three-dimensional probability terrains, that show the counterfactual history from which each word emerged. This paper describes the tool's architecture, its six modes, and its design rationale, and argues that log-probability data, currently underused in humanistic and social-scientific readings of AI, is an important resource for a critical studies of generative AI models.

analysis.tldr: LLMbench是一个面向数字人文学科的LLM输出比较阅读工作台，提供概率分析覆盖层和多种分析模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM比较工具（如LLM Comparator）侧重于定量评估和用户评分，缺乏对生成文本的深度解释性分析，尤其不适用于数字人文学科的解释学实践。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个工具，支持对LLM输出进行细粒度的比较阅读，并利用log-probability数据揭示生成文本的概率结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发了一个基于浏览器的工具LLMbench，包含四个分析覆盖层（概率、差异、语气、结构）和五种分析模式（随机变异、温度梯度、提示敏感性、令牌概率、跨模型差异），并提供热力图、熵图、像素图和3D概率地形等可视化。
contributions: 提出了一个面向数字人文学科的LLM输出比较阅读工作台，支持细粒度分析和可视化。
论证了log-probability数据在人文和社会科学中对生成式AI模型批判性研究的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于文本生成任务，对其他模态支持有限。
工具的有效性可能依赖于用户对概率概念的理解。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 工具设计有创新，但摘要未提供实验验证，应用范围较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMbench是一个面向数字人文学科的LLM输出比较阅读工作台，提供概率分析覆盖层和多种分析模式。

papers.title: PolicyBank: Evolving Policy Understanding for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: LLM agents operating under organizational policies must comply with authorization constraints typically specified in natural language. In practice, such specifications inevitably contain ambiguities and logical or semantic gaps that cause the agent's behavior to systematically diverge from the true requirements. We ask: by letting an agent evolve its policy understanding through interaction and corrective feedback from pre-deployment testing, can it autonomously refine its interpretation to close specification gaps? We propose PolicyBank, a memory mechanism that maintains structured, tool-level policy insights and iteratively refines them -- unlike existing memory mechanisms that treat the policy as immutable ground truth, reinforcing "compliant but wrong" behaviors. We also contribute a systematic testbed by extending a popular tool-calling benchmark with controlled policy gaps that isolate alignment failures from execution failures. While existing memory mechanisms achieve near-zero success on policy-gap scenarios, PolicyBank closes up to 82% of the gap toward a human oracle.

analysis.tldr: 提出PolicyBank记忆机制，让LLM Agent通过交互反馈自主演化策略理解，弥合规范文本与真实需求之间的语义鸿沟。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在组织策略下运行时，自然语言规范常含歧义或逻辑漏洞，导致行为系统性偏离真实要求，现有记忆机制将策略视为不可变真理，强化了“合规但错误”的行为。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM Agent在部署前通过交互和纠正反馈自主精炼策略理解，以弥合规范文本中的语义鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有记忆机制将策略视为不可变真理，在策略存在歧义或漏洞时，会强化“合规但错误”的行为，导致对齐失败。
analysis.method: PolicyBank是一种结构化、工具级别的策略洞察记忆机制，通过迭代精炼策略理解，而非将其视为不可变真理。
contributions: 提出PolicyBank记忆机制，允许LLM Agent通过交互反馈自主演化策略理解。
构建系统化测试平台，在流行工具调用基准中引入可控策略漏洞，隔离对齐失败与执行失败。
analysis.experiments: 在扩展的工具调用基准上测试，现有记忆机制在策略漏洞场景下成功率接近零，而PolicyBank弥合了高达82%的与人类oracle的差距。
limitations: 仅针对工具调用场景，可能不适用于其他类型的策略约束。
依赖预部署测试阶段的交互反馈，实际部署中反馈获取可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与LLM Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PolicyBank记忆机制，让LLM Agent通过交互反馈自主演化策略理解，弥合规范文本与真实需求之间的语义鸿沟。

papers.title: SecureRouter: Encrypted Routing for Efficient Secure Inference
papers.abstract: Cryptographically secure neural network inference typically relies on secure computing techniques such as Secure Multi-Party Computation (MPC), enabling cloud servers to process client inputs without decrypting them. Although prior privacy-preserving inference systems co-design network optimizations with MPC, they remain slow and costly, limiting real-world deployment. A major bottleneck is their use of a single, fixed transformer model for all encrypted inputs, ignoring that different inputs require different model sizes to balance efficiency and accuracy. We present SecureRouter, an end-to-end encrypted routing and inference framework that accelerates secure transformer inference through input-adaptive model selection under encryption. SecureRouter establishes a unified encrypted pipeline that integrates a secure router with an MPC-optimized model pool, enabling coordinated routing, inference, and protocol execution while preserving full data and model confidentiality. The framework includes training-phase and inference-phase components: an MPC-cost-aware secure router that predicts per-model utility and cost from encrypted features, and an MPC-optimized model pool whose architectures and quantization schemes are co-trained to minimize MPC communication and computation overhead. Compared to prior work, SecureRouter achieves a latency reduction by 1.95x with negligible accuracy loss, offering a practical path toward scalable and efficient secure AI inference. Our open-source implementation is available at: https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/SecureRouter

analysis.tldr: SecureRouter通过输入自适应模型选择加速安全Transformer推理，实现1.95倍延迟降低且精度损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有隐私保护推理系统使用固定模型处理所有加密输入，忽略了不同输入需要不同模型大小来平衡效率与精度，导致推理速度慢、成本高，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个端到端加密路由与推理框架，在加密状态下根据输入自适应选择最优模型，以加速安全Transformer推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SecureRouter包含训练阶段和推理阶段组件：一个MPC成本感知的安全路由器，从加密特征中预测每个模型的效用和成本；一个MPC优化的模型池，其架构和量化方案联合训练以最小化MPC通信和计算开销。
contributions: 提出首个端到端加密路由与推理框架，实现输入自适应模型选择下的安全推理。
设计MPC成本感知的安全路由器和联合优化的模型池，显著降低延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在安全推理任务上，与先前工作相比，SecureRouter实现了1.95倍延迟降低，且精度损失可忽略。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Transformer架构，对其他模型泛化性未知。
路由器的额外开销可能在某些场景下抵消收益。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验显示显著加速，与隐私保护推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SecureRouter通过输入自适应模型选择加速安全Transformer推理，实现1.95倍延迟降低且精度损失极小。

papers.title: SCATR: Simple Calibrated Test-Time Ranking
papers.abstract: Test-time scaling (TTS) improves large language models (LLMs) by allocating additional compute at inference time. In practice, TTS is often achieved through parallel scaling: generating multiple candidate responses and selecting the best via a Best-of-N (BoN) strategy. Its effectiveness therefore hinges on the scoring function. Learned scorers such as process reward models (PRMs) can be strong, but they are expensive to train and run. Lightweight confidence heuristics based on token log-probabilities are much cheaper, yet we find that they often perform substantially worse. To improve on lightweight confidence heuristics without incurring the full cost of stronger learned scorers, we introduce SCATR, a simple and efficient BoN ranking method that learns a lightweight scorer from a small calibration set using hidden representations from the base model. Across coding and mathematical reasoning benchmarks, SCATR improves over prior confidence-based baselines by up to 9%. Relative to LoRA fine-tuning on the same calibration data, it achieves comparable accuracy with up to 8000x fewer trainable parameters and much lower compute, reducing training and inference latency by up to 150x and 1000x, respectively. SCATR is also competitive with strong PRM baselines, and in several settings improves accuracy by up to 7.8% on math and 4.2% on coding while enabling up to 1000x faster inference. Overall, SCATR offers a strong accuracy-efficiency trade-off for scalable test-time selection.

analysis.tldr: SCATR 通过从少量校准数据中学习轻量级评分器，在测试时选择中实现高效且准确的 Best-of-N 排序。
analysis.research_motivation: 测试时扩展通过增加推理计算提升 LLM 性能，但现有评分方法要么昂贵（如 PRM），要么轻量但性能差（如基于 token 对数概率的启发式方法），需要一种平衡精度与效率的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入大量训练和推理开销的前提下，提升轻量级评分器在测试时选择中的排序准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于 token 对数概率的轻量级置信度启发式方法性能显著弱于学习型评分器（如 PRM），但后者训练和运行成本高。
analysis.method: SCATR 利用基础模型的隐藏表示，从少量校准数据中学习一个轻量级评分器，用于 Best-of-N 排序。
contributions: 提出 SCATR，一种简单高效的测试时排序方法，仅需少量校准数据即可学习轻量级评分器。
在编码和数学推理基准上，SCATR 相比基于置信度的基线提升高达 9%，与 LoRA 微调相比训练参数减少 8000 倍，推理延迟降低 1000 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在编码和数学推理基准上评估，与基于置信度的基线、LoRA 微调及 PRM 基线对比，报告了准确率、训练参数和延迟等指标。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型隐藏表示的质量，对于不同架构的泛化性未明确。
校准集大小对性能的影响未深入探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，实验充分，但创新性中等，适合关注测试时扩展和高效推理的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SCATR 通过从少量校准数据中学习轻量级评分器，在测试时选择中实现高效且准确的 Best-of-N 排序。

papers.title: Public and private blockchain for decentralized digital building twins and building automation system
papers.abstract: The communication protocols and data transfer mechanisms employed by IoT devices in smart buildings and corresponding digital twin systems predominantly rely on centralized architectures. Such centralized systems are vulnerable to single points of failure, where a malfunction can disrupt operational processes. This study introduces a blockchain-based decentralized protocol to enhance the cyber resilience of IoT data transfer for digital twins and enable decentralized automation of building operations. The framework incorporates public and private blockchain technologies alongside two case studies showcasing prototypes of each system. These prototypes were validated within a real-world building environment using smart home appliances and two digital twin platforms, with their performance evaluated based on cost, scalability, data security, and privacy. The findings reveal that the Hyperledger Fabric-based system excels in terms of scalability, speed, and cost-effectiveness, while both frameworks offer advantages over traditional centralized protocols in system cyber resilience, data security, and privacy.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于公共和私有区块链的去中心化协议，用于数字建筑孪生和自动化系统，提升网络弹性与数据安全。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能建筑中IoT设备和数字孪生系统依赖中心化架构，存在单点故障风险，影响运营连续性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计去中心化协议以增强IoT数据在数字孪生中的网络弹性，并实现建筑运营的去中心化自动化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出一种结合公共和私有区块链的去中心化协议，用于数字建筑孪生和自动化系统。
通过真实环境中的原型验证，展示了Hyperledger Fabric在可扩展性、速度和成本效益方面的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在真实建筑环境中使用智能家居设备和两个数字孪生平台进行原型验证，评估成本、可扩展性、数据安全和隐私。
limitations: 摘要未提及大规模部署的挑战。
可能未考虑不同区块链平台的互操作性。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于公共和私有区块链的去中心化协议，用于数字建筑孪生和自动化系统，提升网络弹性与数据安全。

papers.title: GIST: Multimodal Knowledge Extraction and Spatial Grounding via Intelligent Semantic Topology
papers.abstract: Navigating complex, densely packed environments like retail stores, warehouses, and hospitals poses a significant spatial grounding challenge for humans and embodied AI. In these spaces, dense visual features quickly become stale given the quasi-static nature of items, and long-tail semantic distributions challenge traditional computer vision. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) help assistive systems navigate semantically-rich spaces, they still struggle with spatial grounding in cluttered environments. We present GIST (Grounded Intelligent Semantic Topology), a multimodal knowledge extraction pipeline that transforms a consumer-grade mobile point cloud into a semantically annotated navigation topology. Our architecture distills the scene into a 2D occupancy map, extracts its topological layout, and overlays a lightweight semantic layer via intelligent keyframe and semantic selection. We demonstrate the versatility of this structured spatial knowledge through critical downstream Human-AI interaction tasks: (1) an intent-driven Semantic Search engine that actively infers categorical alternatives and zones when exact matches fail; (2) a one-shot Semantic Localizer achieving a 1.04 m top-5 mean translation error; (3) a Zone Classification module that segments the walkable floor plan into high-level semantic regions; and (4) a Visually-Grounded Instruction Generator that synthesizes optimal paths into egocentric, landmark-rich natural language routing. In multi-criteria LLM evaluations, GIST outperforms sequence-based instruction generation baselines. Finally, an in-situ formative evaluation (N=5) yields an 80% navigation success rate relying solely on verbal cues, validating the system's capacity for universal design.

analysis.tldr: GIST通过智能语义拓扑将消费级点云转化为语义导航图，支持语义搜索、定位、分区和指令生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 零售店、仓库等密集环境对具身AI的空间定位构成挑战，传统视觉方法难以处理长尾语义分布，VLM在杂乱场景中空间定位能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从消费级点云中提取结构化语义知识，并支持多种下游人机交互任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GIST管道：将点云转化为2D占用图，提取拓扑布局，通过智能关键帧和语义选择叠加轻量语义层。
contributions: 提出GIST多模态知识提取管道，将消费级点云转化为语义标注的导航拓扑。
展示四个下游任务：语义搜索、单次语义定位、区域分类、视觉引导指令生成，并在LLM评估和用户研究中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 多准则LLM评估中GIST优于序列指令生成基线；现场形成性评估（N=5）仅凭口头指令达到80%导航成功率。
limitations: 摘要未提及局限性。
可能依赖点云质量，且评估规模较小。
