papers.title: ProtoTTA: Prototype-Guided Test-Time Adaptation
papers.abstract: Deep networks that rely on prototypes-interpretable representations that can be related to the model input-have gained significant attention for balancing high accuracy with inherent interpretability, which makes them suitable for critical domains such as healthcare. However, these models are limited by their reliance on training data, which hampers their robustness to distribution shifts. While test-time adaptation (TTA) improves the robustness of deep networks by updating parameters and statistics, the prototypes of interpretable models have not been explored for this purpose. We introduce ProtoTTA, a general framework for prototypical models that leverages intermediate prototype signals rather than relying solely on model outputs. ProtoTTA minimizes the entropy of the prototype-similarity distribution to encourage more confident and prototype-specific activations on shifted data. To maintain stability, we employ geometric filtering to restrict updates to samples with reliable prototype activations, regularized by prototype-importance weights and model-confidence scores. Experiments across four prototypical backbones on four diverse benchmarks spanning fine-grained vision, histopathology, and NLP demonstrate that ProtoTTA improves robustness over standard output entropy minimization while restoring correct semantic focus in prototype activations. We also introduce novel interpretability metrics and a vision-language model (VLM) evaluation framework to explain TTA dynamics, confirming ProtoTTA restores human-aligned semantic focus and correlates reliably with VLM-rated reasoning quality. Code is available at: https://github.com/DeepRCL/ProtoTTA.

analysis.tldr: ProtoTTA通过原型相似性分布熵最小化与几何滤波，首次将测试时自适应引入可解释原型网络，提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 可解释原型网络在医疗等关键领域有重要应用，但依赖训练数据，对分布偏移鲁棒性差；现有测试时自适应方法未利用原型中间信号。
analysis.problem: 如何利用原型网络中的中间原型信号进行测试时自适应，以提升模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ProtoTTA框架，通过最小化原型相似性分布的熵来鼓励置信且原型特定的激活，并采用几何滤波仅更新可靠原型激活的样本，结合原型重要性权重和模型置信度分数进行正则化。
contributions: 首次将测试时自适应应用于可解释原型网络，利用中间原型信号而非仅模型输出。
提出几何滤波和正则化策略，确保自适应过程的稳定性。
引入新的可解释性度量和VLM评估框架，解释TTA动态并验证语义聚焦恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在四个原型骨干网络和四个基准（细粒度视觉、组织病理学、NLP）上实验，表明ProtoTTA优于标准输出熵最小化，并恢复原型激活的正确语义聚焦。
limitations: 可能依赖原型网络的结构，通用性需进一步验证。
几何滤波可能丢弃部分样本，影响极端偏移下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将TTA与原型网络结合，实验充分，但应用领域较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProtoTTA通过原型相似性分布熵最小化与几何滤波，首次将测试时自适应引入可解释原型网络，提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: A Q-learning-based QoS-aware multipath routing protocol in IoMT-based wireless body area network
papers.abstract: The Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) enables intelligent healthcare services but faces challenges such as dynamic topology, energy constraints, and diverse QoS requirements. This paper proposes QQMR, a Q-learning-based QoS-aware multipath routing method for WBANs. QQMR classifies data into three priority levels and employs adaptive multi-level queuing and fuzzy C-means clustering to optimize routing decisions. It maintains separate learning policies for each data type and selects primary and backup paths accordingly. Experimental results demonstrate improved packet delivery ratio and significant reductions in delay, routing overhead, and energy consumption compared to existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Q学习的多径路由协议，通过优先级分类和模糊聚类优化IoMT无线体域网中的QoS。
analysis.research_motivation: IoMT面临动态拓扑、能量约束和多样化QoS需求，现有路由方法难以同时满足高可靠、低延迟和低能耗。
analysis.problem: 如何在无线体域网中实现兼顾数据优先级、能量效率和QoS的多径路由。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合Q学习、自适应多级队列和模糊C均值聚类，为不同优先级数据维护独立学习策略，选择主备路径。
contributions: 提出QQMR协议，将数据分为三级并采用自适应多级队列调度。
利用模糊C均值聚类和Q学习优化路由决策，降低开销和能耗。
analysis.experiments: 仿真实验表明，与现有方法相比，QQMR提高了包交付率，显著降低了延迟、路由开销和能耗。
limitations: 可能未考虑真实医疗场景中的干扰和移动性。
Q学习收敛速度可能受状态空间影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合Q学习与聚类，但应用场景较窄，实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Q学习的多径路由协议，通过优先级分类和模糊聚类优化IoMT无线体域网中的QoS。

papers.title: FineSteer: A Unified Framework for Fine-Grained Inference-Time Steering in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit undesirable behaviors, such as safety violations and hallucinations. Although inference-time steering offers a cost-effective way to adjust model behavior without updating its parameters, existing methods often fail to be simultaneously effective, utility-preserving, and training-efficient due to their rigid, one-size-fits-all designs and limited adaptability. In this work, we present FineSteer, a novel steering framework that decomposes inference-time steering into two complementary stages: conditional steering and fine-grained vector synthesis, allowing fine-grained control over when and how to steer internal representations. In the first stage, we introduce a Subspace-guided Conditional Steering (SCS) mechanism that preserves model utility by avoiding unnecessary steering. In the second stage, we propose a Mixture-of-Steering-Experts (MoSE) mechanism that captures the multimodal nature of desired steering behaviors and generates query-specific steering vectors for improved effectiveness. Through tailored designs in both SCS and MoSE, FineSteer maintains robust performance on general queries while adaptively optimizing steering vectors for targeted inputs in a training-efficient manner. Extensive experiments on safety and truthfulness benchmarks show that FineSteer outperforms state-of-the-art methods in overall performance, achieving stronger steering performance with minimal utility loss. Code is available at https://github.com/YukinoAsuna/FineSteer

analysis.tldr: FineSteer通过两阶段分解实现细粒度推理时干预，在安全性和真实性基准上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常出现安全违规和幻觉等不良行为，推理时干预虽成本低但现有方法因设计僵化、适应性差而难以同时兼顾有效性、效用保持和训练效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个同时满足有效、保持模型效用且训练高效的推理时干预框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有干预方法采用一刀切设计，缺乏对何时干预和如何干预的细粒度控制，导致效用损失或效果不佳。
analysis.method: FineSteer将推理时干预分解为两个互补阶段：子空间引导的条件干预（SCS）避免不必要的干预以保持效用，以及混合干预专家（MoSE）捕获干预行为的多模态性并生成查询特定的干预向量。
contributions: 提出FineSteer框架，通过两阶段分解实现细粒度推理时干预。
设计SCS机制和MoSE机制，分别解决效用保持和干预有效性。
在安全性和真实性基准上取得优于现有方法的性能，且代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 在安全性和真实性基准上进行了实验，FineSteer优于现有方法，实现了更强的干预性能且效用损失最小。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的干预方向子空间，泛化到新行为需重新定义。
实验仅在安全性和真实性任务上验证，其他领域效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验充分，与安全对齐方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FineSteer通过两阶段分解实现细粒度推理时干预，在安全性和真实性基准上优于现有方法。

papers.title: Harmonizing Multi-Objective LLM Unlearning via Unified Domain Representation and Bidirectional Logit Distillation
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) unlearning is crucial for removing hazardous or privacy-leaking information from the model. Practical LLM unlearning demands satisfying multiple challenging objectives simultaneously: removing undesirable knowledge, preserving general utility, avoiding over-refusal of neighboring concepts, and, crucially, ensuring robustness against adversarial probing attacks. However, existing unlearning methods primarily focus on a limited subset of these goals, typically unlearning efficacy and utility preservation while overlooking robustness and boundary behaviors. Naively extending these methods to multi-objective settings may lead to unlearning task interference. We propose a novel multi-objective unlearning framework that harmonizes multiple unlearning objectives through a data and optimization co-design: We standardize training corpora into a unified data representation to reduce the domain gap, and then introduce a bidirectional distillation method that simultaneously elicits desired behavior from a context-instructed teacher while suppressing undesirable behavior in the student model. Theoretical and empirical analyses show that our method aligns domain distributions and converts seemingly irrelevant unlearning tasks into cooperative optimization. Evaluation demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, which enables balanced and reliable unlearning across diverse, challenging requirements.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一域表示和双向蒸馏的多目标LLM遗忘框架，实现遗忘、效用、边界鲁棒性的协同优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法主要关注遗忘效果和效用保持，忽视了鲁棒性和边界行为，且多目标扩展会导致任务干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何同时满足LLM遗忘中的多个目标（移除有害知识、保持通用能力、避免过度拒绝邻近概念、抵御对抗探测攻击）并避免任务干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多目标遗忘任务之间存在域差异和优化冲突，简单组合方法会导致任务干扰。
analysis.method: 通过数据和优化协同设计：统一训练数据表示为标准格式以减少域差距，引入双向蒸馏方法，同时从上下文指导的教师模型引出期望行为并抑制学生模型中的不良行为。
contributions: 提出统一域表示和双向蒸馏的多目标遗忘框架，实现多个遗忘目标的协同优化。
理论分析和实验证明该方法对齐域分布，将看似无关的遗忘任务转化为协作优化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到最先进性能。
limitations: 未在摘要中说明具体实验设置和数据集。
可能对复杂多任务场景的扩展性需要进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，解决多目标遗忘的关键问题，但实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一域表示和双向蒸馏的多目标LLM遗忘框架，实现遗忘、效用、边界鲁棒性的协同优化。

papers.title: G-PARC: Graph-Physics Aware Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks for Spatiotemporal Dynamics on Unstructured Meshes
papers.abstract: Physics-aware recurrent convolutional networks (PARC) have demonstrated strong performance in predicting nonlinear spatiotemporal dynamics by embedding differential operators directly into the computational graph of a neural network. However, pixel-based convolutions are restricted to static, uniform Cartesian grids, making them ill-suited to following evolving localized structures in an efficient manner. Graph neural networks (GNNs) naturally handle irregular spatial discretizations, but existing graph-based physics-aware deep learning (PADL) methods have difficulty handling extreme nonlinear regimes. To address these limitations, we propose Graph PARC (G-PARC), which uses moving least squares (MLS) kernels to approximate spatial derivatives on unstructured graphs, and embeds the derivatives of governing partial differential equations into the network's computational graph. G-PARC achieves better accuracy with 2-3x fewer parameters than MeshGraphNet, MeshGraphKAN, and GraphSAGE, replacing the traditional encoder-processor-decoder framework with analytically computed differential operators. We demonstrate that G-PARC (1) generalizes across nonuniform spatial and temporal discretizations; (2) handles moving meshes required for structural deformation; and (3) outperforms existing graph-based PADL methods on nonlinear benchmarks including fluvial hydrology, planar shock waves, and elastoplastic dynamics. By embedding explicit physical operators within the flexibility of GNNs, G-PARC enables accurate modeling of extreme nonlinear phenomena on complex computational domains, moving PADLbeyond idealized Cartesian grids.

analysis.tldr: G-PARC将移动最小二乘核嵌入图神经网络，以解析微分算子替代传统编码-处理-解码框架，在非结构网格上高效预测极端非线性时空动力学。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物理感知深度学习方法受限于均匀笛卡尔网格，无法高效处理非结构网格上的演化局部结构；而图神经网络虽能处理不规则离散化，但难以应对极端非线性动力学。
analysis.problem: 如何在非结构网格上实现物理感知的深度学习，以准确高效地预测极端非线性时空动力学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出G-PARC，使用移动最小二乘核在非结构图上近似空间导数，并将控制偏微分方程的导数嵌入网络计算图，替代传统的编码-处理-解码框架。
contributions: 提出G-PARC，结合图神经网络与移动最小二乘核，实现非结构网格上的物理感知深度学习。
在多个非线性基准（河流水文、平面激波、弹塑性动力学）上以2-3倍更少参数超越MeshGraphNet等方法。
analysis.experiments: 在河流水文、平面激波、弹塑性动力学等非线性基准上评估，G-PARC在精度和参数效率上优于MeshGraphNet、MeshGraphKAN和GraphSAGE。
limitations: 可能依赖移动最小二乘核的近似精度，在极端复杂几何上可能受限。
未讨论大规模三维问题或长时间预测的稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合图神经网络与物理嵌入，在非结构网格上取得显著效果，但应用领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: G-PARC将移动最小二乘核嵌入图神经网络，以解析微分算子替代传统编码-处理-解码框架，在非结构网格上高效预测极端非线性时空动力学。

papers.title: The Semi-Executable Stack: Agentic Software Engineering and the Expanding Scope of SE
papers.abstract: AI-based systems, currently driven largely by LLMs and tool-using agentic harnesses, are increasingly discussed as a possible threat to software engineering. Foundation models get stronger, agents can plan and act across multiple steps, and tasks such as scaffolding, routine test generation, straightforward bug fixing, and small integration work look more exposed than they did only a few years ago. The result is visible unease not only among students and junior developers, but also among experienced practitioners who worry that hard-won expertise may lose value. This paper argues for a different reading. The important shift is not that software engineering loses relevance. It is that the thing being engineered expands beyond executable code to semi-executable artifacts; combinations of natural language, tools, workflows, control mechanisms, and organizational routines whose enactment depends on human or probabilistic interpretation rather than deterministic execution. The Semi-Executable Stack is introduced as a six-ring diagnostic reference model for reasoning about that expansion, spanning executable artifacts, instructional artifacts, orchestrated execution, controls, operating logic, and societal and institutional fit. The model helps locate where a contribution, bottleneck, or organizational transition primarily sits, and which adjacent rings it depends on. The paper develops the argument through three worked cases, reframes familiar objections as engineering targets rather than reasons to dismiss the transition, and closes with a preserve-versus-purify heuristic for deciding which legacy software engineering processes, controls, and coordination routines should be kept and which should be simplified or redesigned. This paper is a conceptual keynote companion: diagnostic and agenda-setting rather than empirical.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出半可执行栈模型，论证软件工程正从纯可执行代码扩展到包含自然语言、工具、工作流等半可执行制品，并给出诊断框架与保留-纯化启发式。
analysis.research_motivation: AI（尤其是LLM和智能体）对软件工程构成潜在威胁，引发从业者焦虑，但现有讨论多聚焦于取代而非理解工程对象的本质变化。
analysis.problem: 软件工程的对象如何从纯可执行代码扩展到半可执行制品，以及如何系统化地诊断和应对这一转变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
analysis.method: 提出半可执行栈（Semi-Executable Stack）六环诊断参考模型，涵盖可执行制品、指令制品、编排执行、控制、运营逻辑、社会与制度适配，并通过三个案例论证。
contributions: 提出半可执行栈模型，系统化描述软件工程对象的扩展。
将常见反对意见重新定义为工程目标，并给出保留-纯化启发式用于决策。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 概念性论文，缺乏实证验证。
模型可能过于抽象，实际应用需进一步细化。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 概念新颖但缺乏实证，与核心ML方向关联较弱，适合对AI+SE交叉领域感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出半可执行栈模型，论证软件工程正从纯可执行代码扩展到包含自然语言、工具、工作流等半可执行制品，并给出诊断框架与保留-纯化启发式。

papers.title: Beyond Attack Success Rate: A Multi-Metric Evaluation of Adversarial Transferability in Medical Imaging Models
papers.abstract: While deep learning systems are becoming increasingly prevalent in medical image analysis, their vulnerabilities to adversarial perturbations raise serious concerns for clinical deployment. These vulnerability evaluations largely rely on Attack Success Rate (ASR), a binary metric that indicates solely whether an attack is successful. However, the ASR metric does not account for other factors, such as perturbation strength, perceptual image quality, and cross-architecture attack transferability, and therefore, the interpretation is incomplete. This gap requires consideration, as complex, large-scale deep learning systems, including Vision Transformers (ViTs), are increasingly challenging the dominance of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). These architectures learn differently, and it is unclear whether a single metric, e.g., ASR, can effectively capture adversarial behavior. To address this, we perform a systematic empirical study on four medical image datasets: PathMNIST, DermaMNIST, RetinaMNIST, and CheXpert. We evaluate seven models (VGG-16, ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, Inception-v3, DeiT, Swin Transformer, and ViT-B/16) against seven attack methods at five perturbation budgets, measuring ASR, Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR), Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM), and $L_2$ perturbation magnitude. Our findings show a consistent pattern: perceptual and distortion metrics are strongly associated with one another and exhibit minimal correlation with ASR. This applies to both CNNs and ViTs. The results demonstrate that ASR alone is an inadequate indicator of adversarial robustness and transferability. Consequently, we argue that a thorough assessment of adversarial risk in medical AI necessitates multi-metric frameworks that encompass not only the attack efficacy but also its methodology and associated overheads.

analysis.tldr: 提出多指标评估框架，证明仅靠攻击成功率（ASR）不足以衡量医学影像模型的对抗鲁棒性与迁移性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像深度学习模型面临对抗攻击风险，但现有评估主要依赖ASR这一二元指标，忽略了扰动强度、感知质量、跨架构迁移性等因素，导致评估不完整。
analysis.problem: ASR单一指标无法全面反映对抗攻击的鲁棒性与迁移性，需要多指标评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在四个医学影像数据集上，感知与失真指标（PSNR、SSIM、L2扰动）之间强相关，但与ASR相关性弱；该模式在CNN和ViT上一致。
analysis.method: 系统实证研究：在4个数据集上，评估7种模型（含CNN和ViT）对7种攻击方法在5个扰动预算下的ASR、PSNR、SSIM和L2扰动幅度。
contributions: 揭示ASR与感知/失真指标弱相关，证明ASR不足以评估对抗鲁棒性与迁移性。
提出医学AI对抗风险评估需要多指标框架，涵盖攻击效能、方法及开销。
analysis.experiments: 在PathMNIST、DermaMNIST、RetinaMNIST和CheXpert四个数据集上，对7种模型（VGG-16、ResNet-50、DenseNet-121、Inception-v3、DeiT、Swin Transformer、ViT-B/16）和7种攻击方法在5个扰动预算下进行实验。
limitations: 未提出具体多指标融合方法或新评估协议。
数据集和模型种类有限，可能不涵盖所有医学影像场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 实证研究揭示ASR局限性，但方法为现有指标组合，创新性中等；对医学AI安全评估有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多指标评估框架，证明仅靠攻击成功率（ASR）不足以衡量医学影像模型的对抗鲁棒性与迁移性。

papers.title: Ragged Paged Attention: A High-Performance and Flexible LLM Inference Kernel for TPU
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) deployment is increasingly shifting to cost-efficient accelerators like Google's Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), prioritizing both performance and total cost of ownership (TCO). However, existing LLM inference kernels and serving systems remain largely GPU-centric, and there is no well-established approach for efficiently mapping LLM workloads onto TPU architectures--particularly under the dynamic and ragged execution patterns common in modern serving. In this paper, we present Ragged Paged Attention (RPA), a high-performance and flexible attention kernel for TPUs, implemented using Pallas and Mosaic. RPA addresses these challenges through three key techniques: (1) fine-grained tiling to enable efficient dynamic slicing over ragged memory, (2) a custom software pipeline that fuses KV cache updates with attention computation, and (3) a distribution-aware compilation strategy that generates specialized kernels for decode, prefill, and mixed workloads. Evaluated on Llama 3 8B on TPU7x, RPA achieves up to 86% memory bandwidth utilization (MBU) in decode and 73% model FLOPs utilization (MFU) in prefill. Integrated as the primary TPU backend in vLLM and SGLang, RPA provides a production-grade foundation for efficient TPU inference and offers practical insights into kernel design.

analysis.tldr: 提出RPA，一个高性能、灵活的TPU注意力核，通过细粒度分块、融合流水线和分布感知编译，显著提升LLM推理效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署正向TPU等成本高效加速器转移，但现有推理核和系统主要面向GPU，缺乏高效映射LLM工作负载到TPU架构的方法，尤其难以处理动态、不规则执行模式。
analysis.problem: 如何在TPU上设计高性能且灵活的注意力核，以支持LLM推理中常见的动态和不规则执行模式（如ragged memory）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RPA，包含三种关键技术：1) 细粒度分块实现不规则内存的高效动态切片；2) 自定义软件流水线融合KV缓存更新与注意力计算；3) 分布感知编译策略，为解码、预填充和混合工作负载生成专用核。
contributions: 提出RPA，首个针对TPU的高性能、灵活注意力核，支持动态不规则执行模式。
实现细粒度分块、融合流水线和分布感知编译三项技术创新。
在TPUv7上评估Llama 3 8B，解码达到86% MBU，预填充达到73% MFU。
集成到vLLM和SGLang作为主要TPU后端，提供生产级基础。
analysis.experiments: 在TPUv7上使用Llama 3 8B模型评估，解码达到86%内存带宽利用率（MBU），预填充达到73%模型FLOPs利用率（MFU）。
limitations: 可能仅针对TPU架构优化，不直接适用于其他加速器。
评估仅基于单一模型和硬件配置，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 针对TPU的LLM推理核设计具有创新性和实用价值，实验性能优异，但领域相对特定。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RPA，一个高性能、灵活的TPU注意力核，通过细粒度分块、融合流水线和分布感知编译，显著提升LLM推理效率。

papers.title: The Crutch or the Ceiling? How Different Generations of LLMs Shape EFL Student Writings
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) has made them powerful tools for enhancing student writing. This study explores the extent and limitations of LLMs in assisting secondary-level English as a Foreign Language (EFL) students with their writing tasks. While existing studies focus on output quality, our research examines the developmental shift in LLMs and their impact on EFL students, assessing whether smarter models act as true scaffolds or mere compensatory crutches. To achieve this, we analyse student compositions assisted by LLMs before and after ChatGPT's release, using both expert qualitative scoring and quantitative metrics (readability tests, Pearson's correlation coefficient, MTLD, and others). Our results indicate that advanced LLMs boost assessment scores and lexical diversity for lower-proficiency learners, potentially masking their true ability. Crucially, increased LLM assistance correlated negatively with human expert ratings, suggesting surface fluency without deep coherence. To transform AI-assisted practice into genuine learning, pedagogy must shift from focusing on output quality to verifying the learning process. Educators should align AI functions, specifically differentiating ideational scaffolding from textual production, within the learner's Zone of Proximal Development.

analysis.tldr: 不同代际LLM对EFL学生写作的影响：高级模型提升分数但可能掩盖真实能力，需从关注输出转向验证学习过程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注LLM输出质量，但缺乏对不同代际LLM如何影响EFL学生写作能力发展的系统性分析，尤其不清楚更智能的模型是真正辅助学习还是仅作为补偿性拐杖。
analysis.problem: 探究不同代际LLM（如ChatGPT发布前后）对中学生EFL写作的辅助效果与局限，评估其是促进学习还是掩盖真实能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高级LLM提升了低水平学习者的评估分数和词汇多样性，但可能掩盖其真实能力；LLM辅助程度与人类专家评分负相关，表明表面流畅性缺乏深层连贯性。
analysis.method: 对比ChatGPT发布前后LLM辅助的学生作文，结合专家定性评分和定量指标（可读性测试、皮尔逊相关系数、MTLD等）进行分析。
contributions: 揭示了不同代际LLM对EFL学生写作的不同影响，指出高级模型可能作为补偿性拐杖而非真正支架。
提出了教学法应从关注输出质量转向验证学习过程的建议，并强调在最近发展区内区分观念支架与文本生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用专家定性评分和定量指标（可读性测试、皮尔逊相关系数、MTLD等）分析学生作文。
limitations: 样本可能局限于特定教育背景和语言水平，结论推广性需验证。
未详细说明LLM辅助的具体方式和程度控制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 研究视角新颖，但方法较常规，实验细节有限，适合对教育AI应用感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 不同代际LLM对EFL学生写作的影响：高级模型提升分数但可能掩盖真实能力，需从关注输出转向验证学习过程。

papers.title: RelativeFlow: Taming Medical Image Denoising Learning with Noisy Reference
papers.abstract: Medical image denoising (MID) lacks absolutely clean images for supervision, leading to a noisy reference problem that fundamentally limits denoising performance. Existing simulated-supervised discriminative learning (SimSDL) and simulated-supervised generative learning (SimSGL) treat noisy references as clean targets, causing suboptimal convergence or reference-biased learning, while self-supervised learning (SSL) imposes restrictive noise assumptions that are seldom satisfied in realistic MID scenarios. We propose \textbf{RelativeFlow}, a flow matching framework that learns from heterogeneous noisy references and drives inputs from arbitrary quality levels toward a unified high-quality target. RelativeFlow reformulates flow matching by decomposing the absolute noise-to-clean mapping into relative noisier-to-noisy mappings, and realizes this formulation through two key components: 1) consistent transport (CoT), a displacement map that constrains relative flows to be components of and progressively compose a unified absolute flow, and 2) simulation-based velocity field (SVF), which constructs a learnable velocity field using modality-specific degradation operators to support different medical imaging modalities. Extensive experiments on Computed Tomography (CT) and Magnetic Resonance (MR) denoising demonstrate that RelativeFlow significantly outperforms existing methods, taming MID with noisy references.

analysis.tldr: 提出RelativeFlow流匹配框架，利用有噪参考实现医学图像去噪，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像去噪缺乏绝对干净图像作为监督，现有方法受限于有噪参考问题，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有噪参考进行有效的医学图像去噪学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有噪参考作为干净目标导致次优收敛或参考偏差，自监督学习噪声假设过于严格。
analysis.method: 提出RelativeFlow流匹配框架，将绝对噪声到干净映射分解为相对更噪到更噪映射，包含一致传输（CoT）和基于模拟的速度场（SVF）。
contributions: 提出RelativeFlow框架，利用有噪参考进行医学图像去噪。
设计一致传输（CoT）和基于模拟的速度场（SVF）实现相对流匹配。
analysis.experiments: 在CT和MR去噪任务上实验，RelativeFlow显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模态的退化算子。
未讨论对多种噪声类型的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验验证有效，与医学图像去噪方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RelativeFlow流匹配框架，利用有噪参考实现医学图像去噪，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: DeepER-Med: Advancing Deep Evidence-Based Research in Medicine Through Agentic AI
papers.abstract: Trustworthiness and transparency are essential for the clinical adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare and biomedical research. Recent deep research systems aim to accelerate evidence-grounded scientific discovery by integrating AI agents with multi-hop information retrieval, reasoning, and synthesis. However, most existing systems lack explicit and inspectable criteria for evidence appraisal, creating a risk of compounding errors and making it difficult for researchers and clinicians to assess the reliability of their outputs. In parallel, current benchmarking approaches rarely evaluate performance on complex, real-world medical questions. Here, we introduce DeepER-Med, a Deep Evidence-based Research framework for Medicine with an agentic AI system. DeepER-Med frames deep medical research as an explicit and inspectable workflow of evidence-based generation, consisting of three modules: research planning, agentic collaboration, and evidence synthesis. To support realistic evaluation, we also present DeepER-MedQA, an evidence-grounded dataset comprising 100 expert-level research questions derived from authentic medical research scenarios and curated by a multidisciplinary panel of 11 biomedical experts. Expert manual evaluation demonstrates that DeepER-Med consistently outperforms widely used production-grade platforms across multiple criteria, including the generation of novel scientific insights. We further demonstrate the practical utility of DeepER-Med through eight real-world clinical cases. Human clinician assessment indicates that DeepER-Med's conclusions align with clinical recommendations in seven cases, highlighting its potential for medical research and decision support.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于智能体的医学深度循证研究框架DeepER-Med，通过显式可审查的循证生成流程提升可信度，并构建专家级问答数据集DeepER-MedQA进行评测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI系统在医学应用中缺乏显式可审查的证据评估标准，导致错误累积且难以评估输出可靠性；同时缺乏针对复杂真实医学问题的评测基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可信、透明且可审查的医学深度循证研究AI系统，并建立相应的评测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DeepER-Med框架，将深度医学研究建模为显式可审查的循证生成工作流，包含研究规划、智能体协作和证据合成三个模块；同时构建DeepER-MedQA数据集，包含100个专家级研究问题。
contributions: 提出DeepER-Med，一个基于智能体的医学深度循证研究框架，具有显式可审查的循证生成流程。
构建DeepER-MedQA数据集，包含100个由11位生物医学专家策划的专家级研究问题，用于真实场景评测。
通过专家人工评估和8个真实临床案例验证了DeepER-Med优于现有平台，并展示了其临床决策支持潜力。
analysis.experiments: 专家人工评估显示DeepER-Med在多个标准上优于广泛使用的生产级平台，包括生成新颖科学见解；在8个真实临床案例中，人类临床医生评估表明DeepER-Med的结论在7个案例中与临床建议一致。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（100个问题），可能不足以全面评估系统能力。
临床案例评估仅涉及8个案例，泛化性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（显式可审查循证流程）和数据集构建具有较高价值，但技术细节和实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于智能体的医学深度循证研究框架DeepER-Med，通过显式可审查的循证生成流程提升可信度，并构建专家级问答数据集DeepER-MedQA进行评测。

papers.title: (1D) Ordered Tokens Enable Efficient Test-Time Search
papers.abstract: Tokenization is a key component of autoregressive (AR) generative models, converting raw data into more manageable units for modeling. Commonly, tokens describe local information, such as regions of pixels in images or word pieces in text, and AR generation predicts these tokens in a fixed order. A worthwhile question is whether token structures affect the ability to steer the generation through test-time search, where multiple candidate generations are explored and evaluated by a verifier. Using image generation as our testbed, we hypothesize that recent 1D ordered tokenizers with coarse-to-fine structure can be more amenable to search than classical 2D grid structures. This is rooted in the fact that the intermediate states in coarse-to-fine sequences carry semantic meaning that verifiers can reliably evaluate, enabling effective steering during generation. Through controlled experiments, we find that AR models trained on coarse-to-fine ordered tokens exhibit improved test-time scaling behavior compared to grid-based counterparts. Moreover, we demonstrate that, thanks to the ordered structure, pure test-time search over token sequences (i.e., without training an AR model) can perform training-free text-to-image generation when guided by an image-text verifier. Beyond this, we systematically study how classical search algorithms (best-of-N, beam search, lookahead search) interact with different token structures, as well as the role of different verifiers and AR priors. Our results highlight the impact of token structure on inference-time scalability and provide practical guidance for test-time scaling in AR models.

analysis.tldr: 1D有序粗到细tokenizer使自回归模型在测试时搜索中更高效，甚至无需训练即可实现文本到图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归生成模型在测试时通过搜索进行引导的能力受限于token结构，传统2D网格tokenizer的中间状态缺乏语义，难以被验证器有效评估。
analysis.problem: 如何设计token结构以提升自回归模型在测试时搜索中的可引导性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 粗到细有序token序列的中间状态携带语义信息，验证器可可靠评估，从而有效引导生成；而2D网格结构缺乏此特性。
analysis.method: 采用1D有序粗到细tokenizer替代传统2D网格tokenizer，结合测试时搜索算法（best-of-N、beam search、lookahead search）和验证器进行生成引导。
contributions: 发现粗到细有序token结构比2D网格结构更有利于测试时搜索，并改善测试时缩放行为。
证明纯测试时搜索（无需训练AR模型）结合图像-文本验证器可实现无训练文本到图像生成。
系统研究了不同搜索算法、验证器和AR先验与token结构的交互作用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到通过控制实验验证了假设，并展示了无训练文本到图像生成。
limitations: 仅以图像生成为测试平台，其他模态（如文本、视频）的泛化性未知。
搜索效率可能受限于验证器质量和搜索算法复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，系统实验揭示token结构对测试时搜索的影响，具有实际指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 1D有序粗到细tokenizer使自回归模型在测试时搜索中更高效，甚至无需训练即可实现文本到图像生成。

papers.title: Weak-to-Strong Knowledge Distillation Accelerates Visual Learning
papers.abstract: Large-scale visual learning is increasingly limited by training cost. Existing knowledge distillation methods transfer from a stronger teacher to a weaker student for compression or final-accuracy improvement. We instead investigate distillation to accelerate the training of strong students. We propose a generalizable plug-and-play recipe that freezes a weaker teacher, applies distillation only in early training, and turns it off once the student reaches and surpasses teacher-level performance. For ImageNet and CIFAR classification, this strategy reaches target thresholds much earlier, with up to 4.8 times speedup measured by epochs. We confirm that the method generalizes to other tasks and report 1.7 times epoch speedup for object detection on the COCO dataset, and 2.5 times earlier target-FID crossing for diffusion generation on the CIFAR-10 dataset, measured in steps. These findings validate our method as a universal speedup mechanism for visual learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出弱到强知识蒸馏方法，通过早期冻结弱教师加速强学生视觉训练，实现最高4.8倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模视觉学习训练成本日益高昂，现有知识蒸馏主要用于压缩或提升最终精度，而非加速训练。
analysis.problem: 如何利用知识蒸馏加速强模型（学生）的训练过程，而非仅关注最终性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种即插即用的通用方法：冻结弱教师模型，仅在训练早期施加蒸馏损失，一旦学生性能达到并超过教师水平则关闭蒸馏。
contributions: 提出弱到强知识蒸馏加速训练的新范式，区别于传统强到弱蒸馏。
在图像分类、目标检测和扩散生成任务上验证了方法的通用性和显著加速效果。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet和CIFAR分类任务上达到目标阈值最高4.8倍epoch加速；COCO目标检测1.7倍epoch加速；CIFAR-10扩散生成2.5倍步数加速。
limitations: 可能依赖弱教师与强学生的能力差距，极端情况下效果未知。
仅验证了视觉任务，其他模态（如语言）的适用性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱到强知识蒸馏方法，通过早期冻结弱教师加速强学生视觉训练，实现最高4.8倍加速。

papers.title: Transfer Learning from Foundational Optimization Embeddings to Unsupervised SAT Representations
papers.abstract: Foundational optimization embeddings have recently emerged as powerful pre-trained representations for mixed-integer programming (MIP) problems. These embeddings were shown to enable cross-domain transfer and reduce reliance on solver-generated labels. In this work, we investigate whether such representations generalize beyond optimization to decision problems, focusing on Boolean satisfiability (SAT). We adapt the foundational optimization architecture to SAT by mapping CNF formulas into the same bipartite constraint-variable graph representation used for MIPs. This allows direct reuse of the pre-trained embedding model without architectural changes or supervised fine-tuning. Our results show that these embeddings capture structural regularities in SAT instances and support unsupervised tasks such as instance clustering and distribution identification. We demonstrate, for the first time, that foundational optimization embeddings can transfer to constraint satisfaction domains. Our findings is a step toward a unified representational framework for both optimization and decision problems.

analysis.tldr: 将基础优化嵌入迁移到无监督SAT表示，首次证明跨领域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础优化嵌入在混合整数规划中表现出色，但能否泛化到决策问题（如SAT）尚不清楚，探索统一表示框架有重要价值。
analysis.problem: 验证基础优化嵌入能否直接迁移到布尔可满足性问题，并支持无监督任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将CNF公式映射为与MIP相同的二分约束-变量图结构，直接复用预训练嵌入模型，无需架构修改或监督微调。
contributions: 首次证明基础优化嵌入可迁移到约束满足领域（SAT）。
展示嵌入能捕获SAT实例的结构规律，支持无监督聚类和分布识别。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅验证了无监督任务，未涉及有监督或求解性能。

analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但实验信息不足，适合关注迁移学习与SAT交叉的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将基础优化嵌入迁移到无监督SAT表示，首次证明跨领域泛化能力。

papers.title: Bidirectional Cross-Modal Prompting for Event-Frame Asymmetric Stereo
papers.abstract: Conventional frame-based cameras capture rich contextual information but suffer from limited temporal resolution and motion blur in dynamic scenes. Event cameras offer an alternative visual representation with higher dynamic range free from such limitations. The complementary characteristics of the two modalities make event-frame asymmetric stereo promising for reliable 3D perception under fast motion and challenging illumination. However, the modality gap often leads to marginalization of domain-specific cues essential for cross-modal stereo matching. In this paper, we introduce Bi-CMPStereo, a novel bidirectional cross-modal prompting framework that fully exploits semantic and structural features from both domains for robust matching. Our approach learns finely aligned stereo representations within a target canonical space and integrates complementary representations by projecting each modality into both event and frame domains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy and generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出双向跨模态提示框架Bi-CMPStereo，利用事件和帧相机的互补特性提升非对称立体匹配的精度与泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统帧相机在动态场景中存在时间分辨率低和运动模糊问题，事件相机具有高动态范围但缺乏纹理信息，两者互补但模态差异导致跨模态立体匹配中领域特定特征被边缘化。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合事件和帧相机的语义与结构特征，实现鲁棒的跨模态非对称立体匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模态差异导致领域特定特征在跨模态立体匹配中被边缘化，影响匹配性能。
analysis.method: 提出Bi-CMPStereo框架，通过双向跨模态提示学习，在目标规范空间中精细对齐立体表示，并将每种模态投影到事件和帧两个域以整合互补表示。
contributions: 提出双向跨模态提示框架，同时利用语义和结构特征进行鲁棒匹配。
在目标规范空间中学习精细对齐的立体表示，并跨域投影实现互补表示整合。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明在准确性和泛化性上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定事件相机和帧相机的同步校准。
计算复杂度可能较高，影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对事件-帧非对称立体匹配有实际应用价值，但摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双向跨模态提示框架Bi-CMPStereo，利用事件和帧相机的互补特性提升非对称立体匹配的精度与泛化性。

papers.title: LeapAlign: Post-Training Flow Matching Models at Any Generation Step by Building Two-Step Trajectories
papers.abstract: This paper focuses on the alignment of flow matching models with human preferences. A promising way is fine-tuning by directly backpropagating reward gradients through the differentiable generation process of flow matching. However, backpropagating through long trajectories results in prohibitive memory costs and gradient explosion. Therefore, direct-gradient methods struggle to update early generation steps, which are crucial for determining the global structure of the final image. To address this issue, we introduce LeapAlign, a fine-tuning method that reduces computational cost and enables direct gradient propagation from reward to early generation steps. Specifically, we shorten the long trajectory into only two steps by designing two consecutive leaps, each skipping multiple ODE sampling steps and predicting future latents in a single step. By randomizing the start and end timesteps of the leaps, LeapAlign leads to efficient and stable model updates at any generation step. To better use such shortened trajectories, we assign higher training weights to those that are more consistent with the long generation path. To further enhance gradient stability, we reduce the weights of gradient terms with large magnitude, instead of completely removing them as done in previous works. When fine-tuning the Flux model, LeapAlign consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GRPO-based and direct-gradient methods across various metrics, achieving superior image quality and image-text alignment.

analysis.tldr: LeapAlign通过将长轨迹压缩为两步跳跃，实现了流匹配模型在任意生成步骤的高效对齐微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 直接梯度方法在微调流匹配模型时，因反向传播长轨迹导致内存成本高和梯度爆炸，难以更新早期生成步骤，而早期步骤对图像全局结构至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何降低流匹配模型对齐微调的计算成本，并实现从奖励到早期生成步骤的直接梯度传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出直接梯度方法因长轨迹反向传播导致内存和梯度问题，且早期步骤更新困难；LeapAlign通过两步跳跃和加权策略缓解了这些问题。
analysis.method: LeapAlign将长ODE采样轨迹压缩为两个连续跳跃，每个跳跃跳过多个步骤并一步预测未来潜变量；随机化跳跃的起始和结束时间步，并对与长路径更一致的轨迹赋予更高训练权重；同时降低大梯度项的权重以增强稳定性。
contributions: 提出LeapAlign方法，通过两步轨迹实现任意生成步骤的高效对齐微调。
设计随机化跳跃和加权策略，提升训练效率和梯度稳定性。
在Flux模型上超越GRPO和直接梯度方法，取得更优图像质量和图文对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在Flux模型上微调，与GRPO和直接梯度方法比较，LeapAlign在多个指标上一致优于基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于连续时间扩散/流匹配模型，对离散模型需调整。
两步跳跃的近似可能引入偏差，影响生成多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验验证有效，与生成模型对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LeapAlign通过将长轨迹压缩为两步跳跃，实现了流匹配模型在任意生成步骤的高效对齐微调。

papers.title: TokenLight: Precise Lighting Control in Images using Attribute Tokens
papers.abstract: This paper presents a method for image relighting that enables precise and continuous control over multiple illumination attributes in a photograph. We formulate relighting as a conditional image generation task and introduce attribute tokens to encode distinct lighting factors such as intensity, color, ambient illumination, diffuse level, and 3D light positions. The model is trained on a large-scale synthetic dataset with ground-truth lighting annotations, supplemented by a small set of real captures to enhance realism and generalization. We validate our approach across a variety of relighting tasks, including controlling in-scene lighting fixtures and editing environment illumination using virtual light sources, on synthetic and real images. Our method achieves state-of-the-art quantitative and qualitative performance compared to prior work. Remarkably, without explicit inverse rendering supervision, the model exhibits an inherent understanding of how light interacts with scene geometry, occlusion, and materials, yielding convincing lighting effects even in traditionally challenging scenarios such as placing lights within objects or relighting transparent materials plausibly. Project page: vrroom.github.io/tokenlight/

analysis.tldr: 提出属性令牌实现图像中多光照属性的精确连续控制，在合成和真实图像上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像重光照方法难以同时精确控制多个光照属性（如强度、颜色、环境光等），且缺乏对场景几何和材质交互的隐式理解。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多光照属性的连续、精确控制，并在无显式逆渲染监督下生成逼真的重光照效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在没有显式逆渲染监督的情况下，自发学会了光照与场景几何、遮挡、材质的交互，能处理光源置于物体内部或透明材质等挑战场景。
analysis.method: 将重光照建模为条件图像生成任务，引入属性令牌（attribute tokens）编码光照属性（强度、颜色、环境光、漫反射程度、3D光源位置），在大规模合成数据集（含真实光照标注）上训练，辅以少量真实图像增强泛化。
contributions: 提出属性令牌机制，实现对多个光照属性的连续精确控制。
在合成和真实图像上取得SOTA定量和定性结果，并展示对复杂场景的隐式理解。
analysis.experiments: 在多种重光照任务上验证，包括控制场景内灯具和编辑环境光照，涵盖合成和真实图像，与先前工作对比取得SOTA。
limitations: 依赖大规模合成数据，真实场景泛化可能受限。
未提及对动态场景或视频的支持。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（属性令牌），实验充分且SOTA，与图像编辑方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出属性令牌实现图像中多光照属性的精确连续控制，在合成和真实图像上达到SOTA。

papers.title: MM-WebAgent: A Hierarchical Multimodal Web Agent for Webpage Generation
papers.abstract: The rapid progress of Artificial Intelligence Generated Content (AIGC) tools enables images, videos, and visualizations to be created on demand for webpage design, offering a flexible and increasingly adopted paradigm for modern UI/UX. However, directly integrating such tools into automated webpage generation often leads to style inconsistency and poor global coherence, as elements are generated in isolation. We propose MM-WebAgent, a hierarchical agentic framework for multimodal webpage generation that coordinates AIGC-based element generation through hierarchical planning and iterative self-reflection. MM-WebAgent jointly optimizes global layout, local multimodal content, and their integration, producing coherent and visually consistent webpages. We further introduce a benchmark for multimodal webpage generation and a multi-level evaluation protocol for systematic assessment. Experiments demonstrate that MM-WebAgent outperforms code-generation and agent-based baselines, especially on multimodal element generation and integration. Code & Data: https://aka.ms/mm-webagent.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层多模态网页生成智能体框架，通过分层规划和迭代自反思提升全局一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AIGC工具在网页设计中生成元素时缺乏全局协调，导致风格不一致和整体连贯性差。
analysis.problem: 如何协调多模态元素生成以实现风格一致、全局连贯的网页自动生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出直接集成AIGC工具会导致元素孤立生成，引发风格不一致和全局连贯性差。
analysis.method: 提出MM-WebAgent分层智能体框架，通过分层规划协调全局布局与局部多模态内容生成，并引入迭代自反思机制优化整合。
contributions: 提出MM-WebAgent分层多模态网页生成框架，联合优化全局布局、局部内容及其整合。
引入多模态网页生成基准和多级评估协议。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明MM-WebAgent在代码生成和基于智能体的基线上表现更优，尤其在多模态元素生成与整合方面。
limitations: 可能依赖特定AIGC工具的质量。
分层规划的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，但实验细节有限，与VLM/Agent方向相关，建议精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层多模态网页生成智能体框架，通过分层规划和迭代自反思提升全局一致性。

papers.title: RAD-2: Scaling Reinforcement Learning in a Generator-Discriminator Framework
papers.abstract: High-level autonomous driving requires motion planners capable of modeling multimodal future uncertainties while remaining robust in closed-loop interactions. Although diffusion-based planners are effective at modeling complex trajectory distributions, they often suffer from stochastic instabilities and the lack of corrective negative feedback when trained purely with imitation learning. To address these issues, we propose RAD-2, a unified generator-discriminator framework for closed-loop planning. Specifically, a diffusion-based generator is used to produce diverse trajectory candidates, while an RL-optimized discriminator reranks these candidates according to their long-term driving quality. This decoupled design avoids directly applying sparse scalar rewards to the full high-dimensional trajectory space, thereby improving optimization stability. To further enhance reinforcement learning, we introduce Temporally Consistent Group Relative Policy Optimization, which exploits temporal coherence to alleviate the credit assignment problem. In addition, we propose On-policy Generator Optimization, which converts closed-loop feedback into structured longitudinal optimization signals and progressively shifts the generator toward high-reward trajectory manifolds. To support efficient large-scale training, we introduce BEV-Warp, a high-throughput simulation environment that performs closed-loop evaluation directly in Bird's-Eye View feature space via spatial warping. RAD-2 reduces the collision rate by 56% compared with strong diffusion-based planners. Real-world deployment further demonstrates improved perceived safety and driving smoothness in complex urban traffic.

analysis.tldr: RAD-2 提出生成器-判别器框架，结合扩散生成器和 RL 优化判别器，实现闭环规划，碰撞率降低 56%。
analysis.research_motivation: 高层自动驾驶需要能建模多模态未来不确定性并在闭环交互中保持鲁棒的规划器，但扩散规划器纯模仿学习训练时存在随机不稳定和缺乏负反馈的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何提升扩散规划器在闭环驾驶中的稳定性和长期驾驶质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散规划器在模仿学习下缺乏纠正性负反馈，导致闭环交互中性能不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出 RAD-2 框架，包含扩散生成器生成轨迹候选，RL 优化的判别器根据长期驾驶质量重排序；引入时序一致组相对策略优化（TC-GRPO）解决信用分配问题，以及在线策略生成器优化（OPGO）将闭环反馈转化为纵向优化信号；并设计 BEV-Warp 仿真环境进行高效大规模训练。
contributions: 提出统一生成器-判别器框架，解耦轨迹生成与评估，提升优化稳定性。
提出 TC-GRPO 和 OPGO 算法，分别解决信用分配和生成器优化问题。
设计 BEV-Warp 仿真环境，支持在 BEV 特征空间中进行高效闭环评估。
在真实世界部署中验证了碰撞率降低 56% 和驾驶平顺性提升。
analysis.experiments: 在闭环仿真和真实城市交通中评估，碰撞率降低 56%，并展示了感知安全性和驾驶平顺性的提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的 BEV 特征表示。
RL 训练的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合扩散生成与RL优化，实验效果显著，与自动驾驶规划方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RAD-2 提出生成器-判别器框架，结合扩散生成器和 RL 优化判别器，实现闭环规划，碰撞率降低 56%。

papers.title: Generalization in LLM Problem Solving: The Case of the Shortest Path
papers.abstract: Whether language models can systematically generalize remains actively debated. Yet empirical performance is jointly shaped by multiple factors such as training data, training paradigms, and inference-time strategies, making failures difficult to interpret. We introduce a controlled synthetic environment based on shortest-path planning, a canonical composable sequential optimization problem. The setup enables clean separation of these factors and supports two orthogonal axes of generalization: spatial transfer to unseen maps and length scaling to longer-horizon problems. We find that models exhibit strong spatial transfer but consistently fail under length scaling due to recursive instability. We further analyze how distinct stages of the learning pipeline influence systematic problem-solving: for example, data coverage sets capability limits; reinforcement learning improves training stability but does not expand those limits; and inference-time scaling enhances performance but cannot rescue length-scaling failures.

analysis.tldr: LLM在最短路径问题上表现出空间泛化但长度泛化失败，归因于递归不稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM能否系统泛化存在争议，但实际性能受训练数据、范式、推理策略等多因素交织影响，失败原因难以解释。
analysis.problem: 在最短路径规划这一组合优化任务中，分离并分析影响LLM泛化的关键因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在空间转移（新地图）上表现良好，但在长度缩放（更长路径）上持续失败，原因是递归不稳定性。
analysis.method: 构建基于最短路径规划的受控合成环境，支持空间转移和长度缩放两个正交泛化轴，并分析训练数据覆盖、强化学习、推理时缩放等环节的影响。
contributions: 提出一个受控合成环境用于分离LLM问题求解中的泛化因素
揭示长度缩放失败源于递归不稳定性，并分析不同训练阶段的影响
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 合成环境可能与真实世界问题存在差距
仅针对最短路径任务，结论的通用性待验证

papers.title: Diagnosing LLM Judge Reliability: Conformal Prediction Sets and Transitivity Violations
papers.abstract: LLM-as-judge frameworks are increasingly used for automatic NLG evaluation, yet their per-instance reliability remains poorly understood. We present a two-pronged diagnostic toolkit applied to SummEval: $\textbf{(1)}$ a transitivity analysis that reveals widespread per-input inconsistency masked by low aggregate violation rates ($\barρ = 0.8$-$4.1\%$), with $33$-$67\%$ of documents exhibiting at least one directed 3-cycle; and $\textbf{(2)}$ split conformal prediction sets over 1-5 Likert scores providing theoretically-guaranteed $\geq(1{-}α)$ coverage, with set width serving as a per-instance reliability indicator ($r_s = {+}0.576$, $N{=}1{,}918$, $p < 10^{-100}$, pooled across all judges). Critically, prediction set width shows consistent cross-judge agreement ($\bar{r} = 0.32$-$0.38$), demonstrating it captures document-level difficulty rather than judge-specific noise. Across four judges and four criteria, both diagnostics converge: criterion matters more than judge, with relevance judged most reliably (avg. set size $\approx 3.0$) and coherence moderately so (avg. set size $\approx 3.9$), while fluency and consistency remain unreliable (avg. set size $\approx 4.9$). We release all code, prompts, and cached results.

analysis.tldr: 通过传递性分析和共形预测集诊断LLM评判者的可靠性，发现文档级难度是预测集宽度的主要来源。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为评判者被广泛用于自动评估自然语言生成，但其逐实例可靠性尚不明确，现有方法缺乏对不一致性的细粒度诊断。
analysis.problem: 如何量化LLM评判者在单个实例上的可靠性，并识别其不一致性的来源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：低聚合违反率（0.8%-4.1%）掩盖了广泛的逐输入不一致性，33%-67%的文档存在至少一个有向3-环；预测集宽度与实例难度相关，且跨评判者一致（r=0.32-0.38），表明其捕捉文档级难度而非评判者特定噪声。
analysis.method: 提出双管齐下的诊断工具：传递性分析检测逐输入不一致性，以及基于分裂共形预测的置信集方法提供理论保证的覆盖率，并以集合宽度作为可靠性指标。
contributions: 揭示LLM评判者中广泛存在的传递性违反现象，即使聚合违反率很低。
提出使用共形预测集宽度作为逐实例可靠性指标，并验证其跨评判者一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在SummEval数据集上，使用四个评判者和四个标准进行实验，评估传递性违反率和共形预测集性能。
limitations: 仅针对SummEval数据集，可能不适用于其他任务或评判者。
共形预测集宽度作为可靠性指标的解释性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，诊断工具实用，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过传递性分析和共形预测集诊断LLM评判者的可靠性，发现文档级难度是预测集宽度的主要来源。

papers.title: Think in Latent Thoughts: A New Paradigm for Gloss-Free Sign Language Translation
papers.abstract: Many SLT systems quietly assume that brief chunks of signing map directly to spoken-language words. That assumption breaks down because signers often create meaning on the fly using context, space, and movement. We revisit SLT and argue that it is mainly a cross-modal reasoning task, not just a straightforward video-to-text conversion. We thus introduce a reasoning-driven SLT framework that uses an ordered sequence of latent thoughts as an explicit middle layer between the video and the generated text. These latent thoughts gradually extract and organize meaning over time. On top of this, we use a plan-then-ground decoding method: the model first decides what it wants to say, and then looks back at the video to find the evidence. This separation improves coherence and faithfulness. We also built and released a new large-scale gloss-free SLT dataset with stronger context dependencies and more realistic meanings. Experiments across several benchmarks show consistent gains over existing gloss-free methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/fletcherjiang/SignThought.

analysis.tldr: 提出以潜在思维序列作为中间层的推理驱动手语翻译框架，无需依赖标注词汇。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手语翻译系统假设手语片段直接对应口语词汇，但手语实际依赖上下文、空间和动作动态构建意义，导致跨模态推理困难。
analysis.problem: 解决无标注词汇（gloss-free）手语翻译中视频到文本的跨模态推理问题，提升翻译的连贯性和忠实度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出手语翻译本质是跨模态推理任务，而非简单的视频到文本转换；现有方法因忽略推理过程而表现不佳。
analysis.method: 提出推理驱动框架，在视频和文本之间引入有序的潜在思维序列作为显式中间层，逐步提取和组织语义；并采用先规划后验证的解码策略，先决定输出内容再回溯视频证据。
contributions: 提出以潜在思维序列为中间层的推理驱动手语翻译范式，将翻译视为跨模态推理任务。
设计先规划后验证的解码方法，提升翻译的连贯性和忠实度。
构建并开源大规模无标注词汇手语翻译数据集，具有更强的上下文依赖和更真实的语义。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，一致优于现有无标注词汇方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 潜在思维序列的表示和生成可能增加计算开销。
数据集虽大，但可能仍无法覆盖所有手语变体和语境。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，将推理引入手语翻译，实验验证有效，但摘要未提供具体结果，影响评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以潜在思维序列作为中间层的推理驱动手语翻译框架，无需依赖标注词汇。

papers.title: AnimationBench: Are Video Models Good at Character-Centric Animation?
papers.abstract: Video generation has advanced rapidly, with recent methods producing increasingly convincing animated results. However, existing benchmarks-largely designed for realistic videos-struggle to evaluate animation-style generation with its stylized appearance, exaggerated motion, and character-centric consistency. Moreover, they also rely on fixed prompt sets and rigid pipelines, offering limited flexibility for open-domain content and custom evaluation needs. To address this gap, we introduce AnimationBench, the first systematic benchmark for evaluating animation image-to-video generation. AnimationBench operationalizes the Twelve Basic Principles of Animation and IP Preservation into measurable evaluation dimensions, together with Broader Quality Dimensions including semantic consistency, motion rationality, and camera motion consistency. The benchmark supports both a standardized close-set evaluation for reproducible comparison and a flexible open-set evaluation for diagnostic analysis, and leverages visual-language models for scalable assessment. Extensive experiments show that AnimationBench aligns well with human judgment and exposes animation-specific quality differences overlooked by realism-oriented benchmarks, leading to more informative and discriminative evaluation of state-of-the-art I2V models.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向动画角色驱动的图像到视频生成基准AnimationBench，系统评估动画风格生成中的角色一致性与运动合理性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成基准主要针对真实感视频设计，难以评估动画风格生成中的风格化外观、夸张运动和角色一致性，且依赖固定提示集和刚性流程，缺乏灵活性和开放性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个系统、灵活且针对动画图像到视频生成的评估基准，以衡量动画特有的质量维度（如角色一致性、运动合理性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有真实感视频基准在评估动画生成时存在不足，无法捕捉动画特有的质量差异，而AnimationBench通过实验表明其与人类判断高度一致，能暴露被忽视的动画特定问题。
analysis.method: 提出AnimationBench基准，将动画十二原则和IP保持性转化为可测量评估维度，结合语义一致性、运动合理性、相机运动一致性等广义质量维度，支持封闭集和开放集评估，并利用视觉语言模型进行可扩展评估。
contributions: 首个系统评估动画图像到视频生成的基准AnimationBench
将动画十二原则和IP保持性操作化为可量化评估维度
支持封闭集和开放集评估，结合视觉语言模型实现可扩展评估
实验证明与人类判断高度一致，能揭示真实感基准忽略的动画特定质量差异
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及与人类判断一致并暴露动画特定差异。
limitations: 可能仅关注图像到视频生成，未覆盖文本到视频或纯动画生成
评估维度可能依赖视觉语言模型，其自身偏差可能影响结果
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个动画视频生成基准，方法系统且实验有说服力，但摘要未提供具体实验数据，评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向动画角色驱动的图像到视频生成基准AnimationBench，系统评估动画风格生成中的角色一致性与运动合理性。

papers.title: StoSignSGD: Unbiased Structural Stochasticity Fixes SignSGD for Training Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Sign-based optimization algorithms, such as SignSGD, have garnered significant attention for their remarkable performance in distributed learning and training large foundation models. Despite their empirical superiority, SignSGD is known to diverge on non-smooth objectives, which are ubiquitous in modern machine learning due to ReLUs, max-pools, and mixture-of-experts. To overcome this fundamental limitation, we propose \textbf{StoSignSGD}, an algorithm that injects structural stochasticity into the sign operator while maintaining an unbiased update step. In the regime of (online) convex optimization, our theoretical analysis shows that StoSignSGD rigorously resolves the non-convergence issues of SignSGD, achieving a sharp convergence rate matching the lower bound. For the more challenging non-convex non-smooth optimization, we introduce generalized stationary measures that encompass prior definitions, proving that StoSignSGD improves upon the best-known complexity bounds by dimensional factors. Empirically, StoSignSGD exhibits robust stability and superior efficiency across diverse large language model (LLM) training regimes. Notably, in low-precision FP8 pretraining -- a setting where AdamW fails catastrophically -- StoSignSGD remains highly stable and yields a remarkable 1.44$\times$ to 2.14$\times$ speedup relative to established baselines. Furthermore, when fine-tuning 7B LLMs on mathematical reasoning tasks, StoSignSGD delivers substantial performance gains over both AdamW and SignSGD. Finally, to dissect the mechanisms driving its success, we develop a sign conversion framework capable of transforming any general optimizer into its unbiased, sign-based counterpart. Utilizing this framework, we deconstruct the core components of StoSignSGD and present a comprehensive ablation study to empirically validate our algorithmic design choices.

analysis.tldr: StoSignSGD通过注入无偏结构随机性解决了SignSGD在非光滑目标上的发散问题，在LLM训练中实现显著加速和稳定提升。
analysis.research_motivation: SignSGD在分布式学习和大型基础模型训练中表现出色，但在非光滑目标（如ReLU、max-pool、混合专家模型）上会发散，而现代机器学习中非光滑目标普遍存在，限制了SignSGD的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决SignSGD在非光滑凸和非凸优化中的非收敛问题，同时保持无偏更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SignSGD在非光滑目标上发散，而AdamW在低精度FP8预训练中失败。
analysis.method: 提出StoSignSGD，向符号算子注入结构随机性以保持无偏更新，并建立符号转换框架将任意优化器转化为无偏符号版本。
contributions: 提出StoSignSGD算法，通过结构随机性解决SignSGD的非收敛问题，在凸优化中达到匹配下界的收敛率，在非凸非光滑优化中改进复杂度界。
在LLM预训练（FP8低精度）和微调（7B模型数学推理）中展示显著加速和性能提升，并开发符号转换框架进行消融研究。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM预训练（FP8低精度）中，StoSignSGD相比基线实现1.44×到2.14×加速；在7B LLM数学推理微调中，性能优于AdamW和SignSGD。
limitations: 摘要未提及对更大规模模型（如100B+）的验证。
符号转换框架的通用性可能受限于特定优化器结构。

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验在LLM训练中效果显著，与LLM预训练方向高度相关。
