papers.title: How Do LLMs and VLMs Understand Viewpoint Rotation Without Vision? An Interpretability Study
papers.abstract: Over the past year, spatial intelligence has drawn increasing attention. Many prior works study it from the perspective of visual-spatial intelligence, where models have access to visuospatial information from visual inputs. However, in the absence of visual information, whether linguistic intelligence alone is sufficient to endow models with spatial intelligence, and how models perform relevant tasks with text-only inputs still remain unexplored. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on a fundamental and critical capability in spatial intelligence from a linguistic perspective: viewpoint rotation understanding (VRU). Specifically, LLMs and VLMs are asked to infer their final viewpoint and predict the corresponding observation in an environment given textual description of viewpoint rotation and observation over multiple steps. We find that both LLMs and VLMs perform poorly on our proposed dataset while human can easily achieve 100% accuracy, indicating a substantial gap between current model capabilities and the requirements of spatial intelligence. To uncover the underlying mechanisms, we conduct a layer-wise probing analysis and head-wise causal intervention. Our findings reveal that although models encode viewpoint information in the hidden states, they appear to struggle to bind the viewpoint position with corresponding observation, resulting in a hallucination in final layers. Finally, we selectively fine-tune the key attention heads identified by causal intervention to improve VRU performance. Experimental results demonstrate that such selective fine-tuning achieves improved VRU performance while avoiding catastrophic forgetting of generic abilities. Our dataset and code will be released at https://github.com/Young-Zhen/VRU_Interpret .

analysis.tldr: LLM和VLM在无视觉输入时理解视角旋转的能力远弱于人类，本文通过探针分析和因果干预揭示了模型在绑定视角位置与观察结果上的失败机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间智能是AI的重要能力，但现有研究多关注视觉-空间智能，忽略了纯语言输入下模型的空间理解能力，而视角旋转理解是空间智能的基础能力。
analysis.problem: 评估并解释LLM和VLM在纯文本输入下理解视角旋转的能力，揭示其性能差距的根源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM和VLM在视角旋转理解任务上表现差（远低于人类100%准确率），虽然模型隐藏状态编码了视角信息，但无法将视角位置与对应观察绑定，导致最终层出现幻觉。
analysis.method: 构建视角旋转理解数据集，进行逐层探针分析和逐头因果干预，识别关键注意力头，并选择性微调这些头以提升性能。
contributions: 提出视角旋转理解（VRU）任务和数据集，评估LLM和VLM在纯文本输入下的空间智能。
通过探针分析和因果干预揭示模型在绑定视角与观察上的失败机制。
提出选择性微调关键注意力头的方法，提升VRU性能并避免灾难性遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集上评估LLM和VLM的VRU性能，人类准确率100%，模型表现差；通过探针和因果干预分析内部机制；选择性微调后性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅关注视角旋转理解，未涉及其他空间智能能力。
选择性微调方法可能依赖特定任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 论文聚焦LLM/VLM空间智能的可解释性，方法新颖（探针+因果干预），实验揭示关键失败模式，对理解模型能力有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM和VLM在无视觉输入时理解视角旋转的能力远弱于人类，本文通过探针分析和因果干预揭示了模型在绑定视角位置与观察结果上的失败机制。

papers.title: AD4AD: Benchmarking Visual Anomaly Detection Models for Safer Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: The reliability of a machine vision system for autonomous driving depends heavily on its training data distribution. When a vehicle encounters significantly different conditions, such as atypical obstacles, its perceptual capabilities can degrade substantially. Unlike many domains where errors carry limited consequences, failures in autonomous driving translate directly into physical risk for passengers, pedestrians, and other road users. To address this challenge, we explore Visual Anomaly Detection (VAD) as a solution. VAD enables the identification of anomalous objects not present during training, allowing the system to alert the driver when an unfamiliar situation is detected. Crucially, VAD models produce pixel-level anomaly maps that can guide driver attention to specific regions of concern without requiring any prior assumptions about the nature or form of the hazard. We benchmark eight state-of-the-art VAD methods on AnoVox, the largest synthetic dataset for anomaly detection in autonomous driving. In particular, we evaluate performance across four backbone architectures spanning from large networks to lightweight ones such as MobileNet and DeiT-Tiny. Our results demonstrate that VAD transfers effectively to road scenes. Notably, Tiny-Dinomaly achieves the best accuracy-efficiency trade-off for edge deployment, matching full-scale localization performance at a fraction of the memory cost. This study represents a concrete step toward safer, more responsible deployment of autonomous vehicles, ultimately improving protection for passengers, pedestrians, and all road users.

analysis.tldr: 在自动驾驶场景下系统评测8种视觉异常检测方法，发现Tiny-Dinomaly在边缘部署中实现最佳精度-效率权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶视觉系统在遇到训练分布外的异常障碍物时性能会严重下降，而这类错误直接威胁乘客和行人安全，因此需要可靠的异常检测机制。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估现有视觉异常检测（VAD）方法在自动驾驶场景中的有效性，并找到适合边缘部署的高效模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在最大合成自动驾驶异常检测数据集AnoVox上，使用四种骨干网络（包括MobileNet、DeiT-Tiny等轻量网络）对八种SOTA VAD方法进行基准测试。
contributions: 首次在自动驾驶场景下系统基准测试多种VAD方法，使用最大合成数据集AnoVox。
发现Tiny-Dinomaly在边缘部署中实现了最佳精度-效率权衡，匹配全尺寸模型的定位性能但内存成本大幅降低。
analysis.experiments: 在AnoVox数据集上评估了8种VAD方法，使用4种骨干网络，对比了精度和效率。
limitations: 仅使用合成数据集，真实场景泛化性未验证。
未涉及多类别异常或动态场景的评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性一般（基准测试为主），但自动驾驶安全应用价值高，实验较系统。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在自动驾驶场景下系统评测8种视觉异常检测方法，发现Tiny-Dinomaly在边缘部署中实现最佳精度-效率权衡。

papers.title: GlobalSplat: Efficient Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting via Global Scene Tokens
papers.abstract: The efficient spatial allocation of primitives serves as the foundation of 3D Gaussian Splatting, as it directly dictates the synergy between representation compactness, reconstruction speed, and rendering fidelity. Previous solutions, whether based on iterative optimization or feed-forward inference, suffer from significant trade-offs between these goals, mainly due to the reliance on local, heuristic-driven allocation strategies that lack global scene awareness. Specifically, current feed-forward methods are largely pixel-aligned or voxel-aligned. By unprojecting pixels into dense, view-aligned primitives, they bake redundancy into the 3D asset. As more input views are added, the representation size increases and global consistency becomes fragile. To this end, we introduce GlobalSplat, a framework built on the principle of align first, decode later. Our approach learns a compact, global, latent scene representation that encodes multi-view input and resolves cross-view correspondences before decoding any explicit 3D geometry. Crucially, this formulation enables compact, globally consistent reconstructions without relying on pretrained pixel-prediction backbones or reusing latent features from dense baselines. Utilizing a coarse-to-fine training curriculum that gradually increases decoded capacity, GlobalSplat natively prevents representation bloat. On RealEstate10K and ACID, our model achieves competitive novel-view synthesis performance while utilizing as few as 16K Gaussians, significantly less than required by dense pipelines, obtaining a light 4MB footprint. Further, GlobalSplat enables significantly faster inference than the baselines, operating under 78 milliseconds in a single forward pass. Project page is available at https://r-itk.github.io/globalsplat/

analysis.tldr: GlobalSplat 通过全局场景令牌实现高效的前馈 3D 高斯泼溅，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅减少高斯数量并加速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 高斯泼溅方法在表示紧凑性、重建速度和渲染质量之间存在显著权衡，主要由于缺乏全局场景意识的局部启发式分配策略导致冗余和一致性差。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种前馈 3D 高斯泼溅方法，能够学习紧凑、全局一致的场景表示，避免冗余并实现高效推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前前馈方法（如像素对齐或体素对齐）通过反投影像素生成密集、视图对齐的基元，导致冗余随输入视图增加而增长，全局一致性脆弱。
analysis.method: 提出 GlobalSplat 框架，采用“先对齐后解码”原则：先学习紧凑的全局潜在场景表示（全局场景令牌），编码多视图输入并解决跨视图对应关系，再解码显式 3D 几何；使用从粗到细的训练课程逐步增加解码容量，防止表示膨胀。
contributions: 提出一种基于全局场景令牌的前馈 3D 高斯泼溅框架，实现紧凑且全局一致的重建。
设计从粗到细的训练课程，有效防止表示膨胀，仅需 16K 高斯即可达到竞争性能。
在 RealEstate10K 和 ACID 数据集上实现快速推理（<78ms）和轻量存储（4MB），显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 RealEstate10K 和 ACID 数据集上进行新视图合成评估，与基线方法比较高斯数量、模型大小和推理时间。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或极端视角的泛化能力有限。
全局场景令牌的表示能力可能受限于潜在空间维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验显示显著效率提升，与 3D 视觉方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GlobalSplat 通过全局场景令牌实现高效的前馈 3D 高斯泼溅，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅减少高斯数量并加速推理。

papers.title: R3D: Revisiting 3D Policy Learning
papers.abstract: 3D policy learning promises superior generalization and cross-embodiment transfer, but progress has been hindered by training instabilities and severe overfitting, precluding the adoption of powerful 3D perception models. In this work, we systematically diagnose these failures, identifying the omission of 3D data augmentation and the adverse effects of Batch Normalization as primary causes. We propose a new architecture coupling a scalable transformer-based 3D encoder with a diffusion decoder, engineered specifically for stability at scale and designed to leverage large-scale pre-training. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D baselines on challenging manipulation benchmarks, establishing a new and robust foundation for scalable 3D imitation learning. Project Page: https://r3d-policy.github.io/

analysis.tldr: 通过系统诊断3D策略学习中的训练不稳定和过拟合问题，提出结合可扩展Transformer 3D编码器和扩散解码器的新架构，显著超越现有3D基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D策略学习在泛化和跨实体迁移方面具有潜力，但训练不稳定和严重过拟合阻碍了强大3D感知模型的应用，亟需解决这些瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 3D策略学习中的训练不稳定和过拟合问题，以及现有方法无法有效利用大规模预训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 诊断发现3D数据增强的缺失和Batch Normalization的负面影响是导致训练失败的主要原因。
analysis.method: 提出R3D架构，结合可扩展的基于Transformer的3D编码器和扩散解码器，专门设计用于大规模稳定训练并利用大规模预训练。
contributions: 系统诊断了3D策略学习中训练不稳定和过拟合的根本原因（缺乏3D数据增强和Batch Normalization的负面影响）。
提出了一种新的架构R3D，通过可扩展的Transformer 3D编码器和扩散解码器实现稳定的大规模训练，并有效利用预训练。
analysis.experiments: 在具有挑战性的操作基准上显著优于最先进的3D基线，建立了可扩展3D模仿学习的稳健基础。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定操作任务上验证，泛化到更广泛场景需进一步实验。
依赖大规模预训练，计算资源需求可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 系统诊断了3D策略学习的关键问题并提出了有效架构，实验表现优异，对机器人操作领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过系统诊断3D策略学习中的训练不稳定和过拟合问题，提出结合可扩展Transformer 3D编码器和扩散解码器的新架构，显著超越现有3D基线。

papers.title: Why Do Vision Language Models Struggle To Recognize Human Emotions?
papers.abstract: Understanding emotions is a fundamental ability for intelligent systems to be able to interact with humans. Vision-language models (VLMs) have made tremendous progress in the last few years for many visual tasks, potentially offering a promising solution for understanding emotions. However, it is surprising that even the most sophisticated contemporary VLMs struggle to recognize human emotions or to outperform even specialized vision-only classifiers. In this paper we ask the question "Why do VLMs struggle to recognize human emotions?", and observe that the inherently continuous and dynamic task of facial expression recognition (DFER) exposes two critical VLM vulnerabilities. First, emotion datasets are naturally long-tailed, and the web-scale data used to pre-train VLMs exacerbates this head-class bias, causing them to systematically collapse rare, under-represented emotions into common categories. We propose alternative sampling strategies that prevent favoring common concepts. Second, temporal information is critical for understanding emotions. However, VLMs are unable to represent temporal information over dense frame sequences, as they are limited by context size and the number of tokens that can fit in memory, which poses a clear challenge for emotion recognition. We demonstrate that the sparse temporal sampling strategy used in VLMs is inherently misaligned with the fleeting nature of micro-expressions (0.25-0.5 seconds), which are often the most critical affective signal. As a diagnostic probe, we propose a multi-stage context enrichment strategy that utilizes the information from "in-between" frames by first converting them into natural language summaries. This enriched textual context is provided as input to the VLM alongside sparse keyframes, preventing attentional dilution from excessive visual data while preserving the emotional trajectory.

analysis.tldr: VLMs因长尾偏见和时序采样缺陷难以识别人类情绪，提出多阶段上下文丰富策略缓解问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 情绪理解是人机交互的关键能力，但当前最先进的VLMs在情绪识别上甚至不如专用视觉分类器，揭示其根本缺陷有助于提升情感AI的可靠性。
analysis.problem: VLMs在动态面部表情识别（DFER）中表现不佳，具体表现为对罕见情绪的类别坍塌和无法捕捉微表情的时序信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键现象：1）情绪数据集天然长尾，VLMs的预训练数据加剧了头部类别偏见，导致罕见情绪被系统性地归入常见类别；2）VLMs的稀疏时序采样策略与微表情（0.25-0.5秒）的短暂性不匹配，且受限于上下文长度和内存令牌数，无法处理密集帧序列。
analysis.method: 提出多阶段上下文丰富策略：将密集帧序列转换为自然语言摘要作为额外文本输入，与稀疏关键帧一起提供给VLM，避免视觉数据过多导致的注意力稀释，同时保留情绪轨迹。
contributions: 识别并分析了VLMs在情绪识别中的两个关键缺陷：长尾偏见和时序采样不匹配。
提出替代采样策略缓解头部类别偏见，以及多阶段上下文丰富策略改善时序信息利用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 多阶段上下文丰富策略可能增加计算开销和推理延迟。
方法依赖文本摘要的质量，可能引入额外噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 论文深入诊断VLM在情绪识别中的根本缺陷，方法有创新性且与VLM核心方向高度相关，但缺乏实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs因长尾偏见和时序采样缺陷难以识别人类情绪，提出多阶段上下文丰富策略缓解问题。

papers.title: Prism: Symbolic Superoptimization of Tensor Programs
papers.abstract: This paper presents Prism, the first symbolic superoptimizer for tensor programs. The key idea is sGraph, a symbolic, hierarchical representation that compactly encodes large classes of tensor programs by symbolically representing some execution parameters. Prism organizes optimization as a two-level search: it constructs symbolic graphs that represent families of programs, and then instantiates them into concrete implementations. This formulation enables structured pruning of provably suboptimal regions of the search space using symbolic reasoning over operator semantics, algebraic identities, and hardware constraints. We develop techniques for efficient symbolic graph generation, equivalence verification via e-graph rewriting, and parameter instantiation through auto-tuning. Together, these components allow Prism to bridge the rigor of exhaustive search with the scalability required for modern ML workloads. Evaluation on five commonly used LLM workloads shows that Prism achieves up to $2.2\times$ speedup over best superoptimizers and $4.9\times$ over best compiler-based approaches, while reducing end-to-end optimization time by up to $3.4\times$.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个张量程序符号超优化器Prism，通过符号层次图表示和两级搜索实现高效优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有张量程序优化方法（如编译器或超优化器）在搜索空间与可扩展性之间存在权衡，难以兼顾穷举搜索的严谨性和现代ML工作负载的规模需求。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地搜索张量程序的大规模优化空间，同时保证优化质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出sGraph符号层次表示，通过两级搜索（构造符号图族+实例化具体实现）进行优化，结合符号推理剪枝、e-graph重写等价验证和自动调优参数实例化。
contributions: 首个面向张量程序的符号超优化器Prism。
提出sGraph符号层次表示，紧凑编码大量程序变体。
开发符号推理剪枝、e-graph等价验证和自动调优等关键技术。
analysis.experiments: 在五个常用LLM工作负载上评估，Prism相比最佳超优化器实现最高2.2倍加速，相比最佳编译器方法实现最高4.9倍加速，端到端优化时间减少最高3.4倍。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件约束的符号建模，泛化性待验证。
符号推理开销可能随程序复杂度增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，但属于系统优化方向，与VLM/生成模型等核心方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个张量程序符号超优化器Prism，通过符号层次图表示和两级搜索实现高效优化。

papers.title: SegWithU: Uncertainty as Perturbation Energy for Single-Forward-Pass Risk-Aware Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Reliable uncertainty estimation is critical for medical image segmentation, where automated contours feed downstream quantification and clinical decision support. Many strong uncertainty methods require repeated inference, while efficient single-forward-pass alternatives often provide weaker failure ranking or rely on restrictive feature-space assumptions. We present $\textbf{SegWithU}$, a post-hoc framework that augments a frozen pretrained segmentation backbone with a lightweight uncertainty head. SegWithU taps intermediate backbone features and models uncertainty as perturbation energy in a compact probe space using rank-1 posterior probes. It produces two voxel-wise uncertainty maps: a calibration-oriented map for probability tempering and a ranking-oriented map for error detection and selective prediction. Across ACDC, BraTS2024, and LiTS, SegWithU is the strongest and most consistent single-forward-pass baseline, achieving AUROC/AURC of $0.9838/2.4885$, $0.9946/0.2660$, and $0.9925/0.8193$, respectively, while preserving segmentation quality. These results suggest that perturbation-based uncertainty modeling is an effective and practical route to reliability-aware medical segmentation. Source code is available at https://github.com/ProjectNeura/SegWithU.

analysis.tldr: SegWithU 通过轻量级不确定性头将不确定性建模为扰动能量，实现单次前向传播的可靠医学图像分割不确定性估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割中，可靠的不确定性估计对于下游定量分析和临床决策支持至关重要，但现有方法要么需要多次推理（计算成本高），要么单次前向传播方法性能较弱或依赖限制性假设。
analysis.problem: 如何在单次前向传播中高效且准确地估计医学图像分割的不确定性，同时保持分割质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SegWithU，一种后处理框架，在冻结的预训练分割骨干网络上附加轻量级不确定性头，利用中间特征并通过秩-1后验探针在紧凑探针空间中将不确定性建模为扰动能量，生成两种体素级不确定性图：用于概率校准的校准导向图和用于错误检测与选择性预测的排序导向图。
contributions: 提出 SegWithU，一种单次前向传播的不确定性估计方法，无需重复推理。
在 ACDC、BraTS2024 和 LiTS 三个数据集上达到最先进的单次前向传播基线性能，AUROC/AURC 分别为 0.9838/2.4885、0.9946/0.2660 和 0.9925/0.8193。
analysis.experiments: 在 ACDC、BraTS2024 和 LiTS 三个医学图像分割数据集上评估，与多个基线比较，SegWithU 在 AUROC 和 AURC 指标上表现最佳，且不降低分割质量。
limitations: 可能依赖于预训练分割骨干网络的质量。
不确定性头设计可能对特定架构敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，在医学图像不确定性估计领域有实际应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SegWithU 通过轻量级不确定性头将不确定性建模为扰动能量，实现单次前向传播的可靠医学图像分割不确定性估计。

papers.title: CoopEval: Benchmarking Cooperation-Sustaining Mechanisms and LLM Agents in Social Dilemmas
papers.abstract: It is increasingly important that LLM agents interact effectively and safely with other goal-pursuing agents, yet, recent works report the opposite trend: LLMs with stronger reasoning capabilities behave _less_ cooperatively in mixed-motive games such as the prisoner's dilemma and public goods settings. Indeed, our experiments show that recent models -- with or without reasoning enabled -- consistently defect in single-shot social dilemmas. To tackle this safety concern, we present the first comparative study of game-theoretic mechanisms that are designed to enable cooperative outcomes between rational agents _in equilibrium_. Across four social dilemmas testing distinct components of robust cooperation, we evaluate the following mechanisms: (1) repeating the game for many rounds, (2) reputation systems, (3) third-party mediators to delegate decision making to, and (4) contract agreements for outcome-conditional payments between players. Among our findings, we establish that contracting and mediation are most effective in achieving cooperative outcomes between capable LLM models, and that repetition-induced cooperation deteriorates drastically when co-players vary. Moreover, we demonstrate that these cooperation mechanisms become _more effective_ under evolutionary pressures to maximize individual payoffs.

analysis.tldr: 首个系统比较博弈论机制以促进LLM智能体在社交困境中合作的研究，发现合约和调解最有效。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在混合动机博弈中表现出不合作行为，威胁多智能体系统的安全与有效性，亟需机制设计来促进合作。
analysis.problem: 如何通过博弈论机制使LLM智能体在社交困境中实现稳定合作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 近期模型（无论是否启用推理）在单次社交困境中持续背叛；重复博弈带来的合作在对手变化时急剧恶化；合约和调解机制在强大LLM模型中最有效，且进化压力下机制更有效。
analysis.method: 首次比较研究四种博弈论机制：重复博弈、声誉系统、第三方调解、合约协议，在四个社交困境中评估其促进合作的效果。
contributions: 首次系统比较多种博弈论机制在LLM智能体社交困境中的合作效果
发现合约和调解机制最有效，重复博弈在对手变化时合作恶化
揭示进化压力能增强合作机制的有效性
analysis.experiments: 在四个社交困境上评估四种机制，使用多个LLM模型（含推理能力），摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有社交困境类型
机制有效性可能依赖模型能力
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次系统比较博弈论机制促进LLM合作，方法新颖且对多智能体安全有重要价值，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个系统比较博弈论机制以促进LLM智能体在社交困境中合作的研究，发现合约和调解最有效。

papers.title: Scaling Test-Time Compute for Agentic Coding
papers.abstract: Test-time scaling has become a powerful way to improve large language models. However, existing methods are best suited to short, bounded outputs that can be directly compared, ranked or refined. Long-horizon coding agents violate this premise: each attempt produces an extended trajectory of actions, observations, errors, and partial progress taken by the agent. In this setting, the main challenge is no longer generating more attempts, but representing prior experience in a form that can be effectively selected from and reused. We propose a test-time scaling framework for agentic coding based on compact representations of rollout trajectories. Our framework converts each rollout into a structured summary that preserves its salient hypotheses, progress, and failure modes while discarding low-signal trace details. This representation enables two complementary forms of inference-time scaling. For parallel scaling, we introduce Recursive Tournament Voting (RTV), which recursively narrows a population of rollout summaries through small-group comparisons. For sequential scaling, we adapt Parallel-Distill-Refine (PDR) to the agentic setting by conditioning new rollouts on summaries distilled from prior attempts. Our method consistently improves the performance of frontier coding agents across SWE-Bench Verified and Terminal-Bench v2.0. For example, by using our method Claude-4.5-Opus improves from 70.9% to 77.6% on SWE-Bench Verified (mini-SWE-agent) and 46.9% to 59.1% on Terminal-Bench v2.0 (Terminus 1). Our results suggest that test-time scaling for long-horizon agents is fundamentally a problem of representation, selection, and reuse.

analysis.tldr: 通过紧凑的轨迹摘要表示和递归锦标赛投票等方法，实现编码智能体的测试时计算扩展。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法适用于短输出，但长周期编码智能体产生复杂轨迹，难以直接比较和优化，需要新的表示和选择机制。
analysis.problem: 如何有效表示和复用长周期编码智能体的历史轨迹，以提升测试时计算扩展的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长周期编码智能体的每次尝试产生包含动作、观察、错误和部分进展的扩展轨迹，主要挑战不再是生成更多尝试，而是表示和选择先验经验。
analysis.method: 提出基于紧凑轨迹摘要的测试时扩展框架，包括并行扩展的递归锦标赛投票（RTV）和顺序扩展的并行-蒸馏-精炼（PDR）方法。
contributions: 提出针对编码智能体的测试时扩展框架，基于紧凑轨迹摘要表示。
引入递归锦标赛投票（RTV）和并行-蒸馏-精炼（PDR）两种互补的推理时扩展方法。
在SWE-Bench Verified和Terminal-Bench v2.0上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-Bench Verified和Terminal-Bench v2.0上评估，Claude-4.5-Opus在SWE-Bench Verified上从70.9%提升至77.6%，在Terminal-Bench v2.0上从46.9%提升至59.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型的能力，对弱模型效果有限。
摘要表示的质量可能影响最终性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对编码智能体测试时扩展提出新框架，方法创新且实验效果显著，与LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过紧凑的轨迹摘要表示和递归锦标赛投票等方法，实现编码智能体的测试时计算扩展。

papers.title: Stability and Generalization in Looped Transformers
papers.abstract: Looped transformers promise test-time compute scaling by spending more iterations on harder problems, but it remains unclear which architectural choices let them extrapolate to harder problems at test time rather than memorize training-specific solutions. We introduce a fixed-point based framework for analyzing looped architectures along three axes of stability -- reachability, input-dependence, and geometry -- and use it to characterize when fixed-point iteration yields meaningful predictions. Theoretically, we prove that looped networks without recall have countable fixed points and cannot achieve strong input-dependence at any spectral regime, while recall combined with outer normalization reliably produces a regime in which fixed points are simultaneously reachable, locally smooth in the input, and supported by stable backpropagation. Empirically, we train single-layer looped transformers on chess, sudoku, and prefix-sums and find that downstream performance tracks the framework's predictions across tasks and architectural configurations. We additionally introduce internal recall, a novel recall placement variant, and show that it becomes competitive with -- and on sudoku, substantially better than -- standard recall placement once outer normalization is applied.

analysis.tldr: 提出固定点框架分析循环Transformer的稳定性与泛化，证明外归一化+召回机制对测试时扩展至关重要。
analysis.research_motivation: 循环Transformer通过增加迭代次数实现测试时计算扩展，但哪些架构选择能让模型泛化到更难问题而非记忆训练解尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一框架分析循环Transformer的稳定性与泛化能力，特别是固定点迭代何时产生有意义的预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无召回机制的循环网络具有可数固定点且无法实现强输入依赖性；外归一化结合召回机制可产生同时满足可达性、输入平滑和稳定反向传播的固定点。
analysis.method: 提出基于固定点的分析框架，从可达性、输入依赖性和几何三个维度刻画循环架构稳定性，并引入内部召回变体。
contributions: 提出循环架构稳定性的三维固定点分析框架
理论证明召回和外归一化对强输入依赖性的必要性
引入内部召回变体并在国际象棋、数独等任务上验证有效性
analysis.experiments: 在单层循环Transformer上训练国际象棋、数独和前缀和任务，实验结果表明下游性能与框架预测一致。
limitations: 仅验证单层循环Transformer，多层情况未探索
内部召回变体仅在特定任务上优于标准召回
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论框架新颖且深入，实验验证充分，但属于学习理论方向，与重点方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出固定点框架分析循环Transformer的稳定性与泛化，证明外归一化+召回机制对测试时扩展至关重要。

papers.title: HarmfulSkillBench: How Do Harmful Skills Weaponize Your Agents?
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have evolved into autonomous agents that rely on open skill ecosystems (e.g., ClawHub and Skills.Rest), hosting numerous publicly reusable skills. Existing security research on these ecosystems mainly focuses on vulnerabilities within skills, such as prompt injection. However, there is a critical gap regarding skills that may be misused for harmful actions (e.g., cyber attacks, fraud and scams, privacy violations, and sexual content generation), namely harmful skills. In this paper, we present the first large-scale measurement study of harmful skills in agent ecosystems, covering 98,440 skills across two major registries. Using an LLM-driven scoring system grounded in our harmful skill taxonomy, we find that 4.93% of skills (4,858) are harmful, with ClawHub exhibiting an 8.84% harmful rate compared to 3.49% on Skills.Rest. We then construct HarmfulSkillBench, the first benchmark for evaluating agent safety against harmful skills in realistic agent contexts, comprising 200 harmful skills across 20 categories and four evaluation conditions. By evaluating six LLMs on HarmfulSkillBench, we find that presenting a harmful task through a pre-installed skill substantially lowers refusal rates across all models, with the average harm score rising from 0.27 without the skill to 0.47 with it, and further to 0.76 when the harmful intent is implicit rather than stated as an explicit user request. We responsibly disclose our findings to the affected registries and release our benchmark to support future research (see https://github.com/TrustAIRLab/HarmfulSkillBench).

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模有害技能测量与基准，揭示开放技能生态中4.93%的技能有害，且预装技能显著降低LLM Agent的拒绝率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent依赖开放技能生态（如ClawHub、Skills.Rest），现有安全研究聚焦技能内部漏洞（如提示注入），但忽略了技能本身可能被滥用于有害行为（如网络攻击、欺诈、隐私侵犯等），缺乏对有害技能的系统测量和评估基准。
analysis.problem: 量化开放技能生态中有害技能的普遍性，并构建基准评估LLM Agent在面对有害技能时的安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 测量发现4.93%的技能有害，ClawHub有害率（8.84%）高于Skills.Rest（3.49%）；预装有害技能显著降低模型拒绝率，平均危害分数从0.27升至0.47，隐式有害意图下更升至0.76。
analysis.method: 基于LLM驱动的评分系统和有害技能分类法，对98,440个技能进行大规模测量；构建包含200个有害技能、20个类别和4种评估条件的HarmfulSkillBench基准，评估6个LLM。
contributions: 首次对Agent生态中有害技能进行大规模测量，覆盖98,440个技能，发现4.93%有害。
构建HarmfulSkillBench基准，用于评估Agent在有害技能下的安全性。
揭示预装技能和隐式意图显著降低模型拒绝率，为Agent安全提供重要发现。
analysis.experiments: 测量了98,440个技能，评估了6个LLM在HarmfulSkillBench上的表现，报告了平均危害分数。
limitations: 仅覆盖两个技能注册中心，可能不具全面代表性。
LLM驱动的评分系统可能存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次系统测量有害技能并构建基准，对Agent安全有重要价值，但方法相对直接。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个大规模有害技能测量与基准，揭示开放技能生态中4.93%的技能有害，且预装技能显著降低LLM Agent的拒绝率。

papers.title: TokenGS: Decoupling 3D Gaussian Prediction from Pixels with Learnable Tokens
papers.abstract: In this work, we revisit several key design choices of modern Transformer-based approaches for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) prediction. We argue that the common practice of regressing Gaussian means as depths along camera rays is suboptimal, and instead propose to directly regress 3D mean coordinates using only a self-supervised rendering loss. This formulation allows us to move from the standard encoder-only design to an encoder-decoder architecture with learnable Gaussian tokens, thereby unbinding the number of predicted primitives from input image resolution and number of views. Our resulting method, TokenGS, demonstrates improved robustness to pose noise and multiview inconsistencies, while naturally supporting efficient test-time optimization in token space without degrading learned priors. TokenGS achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on both static and dynamic scenes, producing more regularized geometry and more balanced 3DGS distribution, while seamlessly recovering emergent scene attributes such as static-dynamic decomposition and scene flow.

analysis.tldr: 提出TokenGS，通过可学习token解耦3D高斯预测与像素，实现更鲁棒的前馈重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Transformer的前馈3DGS预测方法将高斯均值回归为沿相机射线的深度，这种设计存在次优性，且预测基元数量受限于输入图像分辨率和视角数。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦3D高斯预测与像素，实现更鲁棒、高效且可扩展的前馈3DGS重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，使用可学习的高斯token直接回归3D均值坐标，仅通过自监督渲染损失训练，从而解耦预测基元数量与输入分辨率/视角数。
contributions: 提出直接回归3D均值坐标替代沿射线深度回归，提升鲁棒性
引入可学习高斯token的编码器-解码器架构，支持高效测试时优化
analysis.experiments: 在静态和动态场景上达到前馈重建SOTA，生成更规则化的几何和更平衡的3DGS分布，并恢复静态-动态分解和场景流等属性。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模训练数据
测试时优化效率需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验充分，与3D视觉方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TokenGS，通过可学习token解耦3D高斯预测与像素，实现更鲁棒的前馈重建。

papers.title: StreamCacheVGGT: Streaming Visual Geometry Transformers with Robust Scoring and Hybrid Cache Compression
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dense 3D geometry from continuous video streams requires stable inference under a constant memory budget. Existing $O(1)$ frameworks primarily rely on a ``pure eviction'' paradigm, which suffers from significant information destruction due to binary token deletion and evaluation noise from localized, single-layer scoring. To address these bottlenecks, we propose StreamCacheVGGT, a training-free framework that reimagines cache management through two synergistic modules: Cross-Layer Consistency-Enhanced Scoring (CLCES) and Hybrid Cache Compression (HCC). CLCES mitigates activation noise by tracking token importance trajectories across the Transformer hierarchy, employing order-statistical analysis to identify sustained geometric salience. Leveraging these robust scores, HCC transcends simple eviction by introducing a three-tier triage strategy that merges moderately important tokens into retained anchors via nearest-neighbor assignment on the key-vector manifold. This approach preserves essential geometric context that would otherwise be lost. Extensive evaluations on five benchmarks (7-Scenes, NRGBD, ETH3D, Bonn, and KITTI) demonstrate that StreamCacheVGGT sets a new state-of-the-art, delivering superior reconstruction accuracy and long-term stability while strictly adhering to constant-cost constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的流式3D几何重建框架，通过跨层一致性评分和混合缓存压缩，在恒定内存下实现SOTA精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有O(1)流式3D重建框架采用纯驱逐范式，存在二进制令牌删除导致的信息破坏和局部单层评分带来的评估噪声问题，限制了重建精度和长期稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在恒定内存预算下，从连续视频流中稳定重建密集3D几何，同时避免信息破坏和评分噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯驱逐范式因二进制删除和局部评分导致信息损失和评估噪声；跨层令牌重要性轨迹具有统计规律，可用于识别持续几何显著性。
analysis.method: 提出StreamCacheVGGT，包含两个模块：跨层一致性增强评分（CLCES）通过跨Transformer层的令牌重要性轨迹进行顺序统计分析，降低激活噪声；混合缓存压缩（HCC）采用三级分流策略，将中等重要令牌通过最近邻分配合并到保留锚点中，保留几何上下文。
contributions: 提出CLCES方法，利用跨层一致性评分缓解局部评分噪声，识别持续几何显著性。
提出HCC混合缓存压缩策略，通过令牌合并替代简单驱逐，保留关键几何信息。
在五个基准上取得SOTA，验证了方法在恒定内存下的优越重建精度和长期稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在7-Scenes、NRGBD、ETH3D、Bonn和KITTI五个基准上评估，结果显示StreamCacheVGGT在重建精度和长期稳定性上达到新SOTA，且严格遵循恒定成本约束。
limitations: 方法依赖Transformer架构，可能不适用于非Transformer模型。
令牌合并策略在极端内存限制下可能仍有信息损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且SOTA，与3D视觉方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的流式3D几何重建框架，通过跨层一致性评分和混合缓存压缩，在恒定内存下实现SOTA精度。

papers.title: Agentic Microphysics: A Manifesto for Generative AI Safety
papers.abstract: This paper advances a methodological proposal for safety research in agentic AI. As systems acquire planning, memory, tool use, persistent identity, and sustained interaction, safety can no longer be analysed primarily at the level of the isolated model. Population-level risks arise from structured interaction among agents, through processes of communication, observation, and mutual influence that shape collective behaviour over time. As the object of analysis shifts, a methodological gap emerges. Approaches focused either on single agents or on aggregate outcomes do not identify the interaction-level mechanisms that generate collective risks or the design variables that control them. A framework is required that links local interaction structure to population-level dynamics in a causally explicit way, allowing both explanation and intervention. We introduce two linked concepts. Agentic microphysics defines the level of analysis: local interaction dynamics where one agent's output becomes another's input under specific protocol conditions. Generative safety defines the methodology: growing phenomena and elicit risks from micro-level conditions to identify sufficient mechanisms, detect thresholds, and design effective interventions.

analysis.tldr: 提出将“agent微观物理”作为分析层级，通过生成式安全方法从局部交互中揭示并干预群体级AI风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI系统获得规划、记忆、工具使用和持久身份，安全分析不能仅停留在孤立模型层面，群体级风险源于智能体间的结构化交互，现有方法无法识别产生集体风险的交互级机制或控制变量。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个因果显式的框架，将局部交互结构与群体级动态联系起来，以解释和干预由多智能体交互产生的集体风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当分析对象从单个智能体转向群体时，存在方法论空白：关注单个智能体或聚合结果的方法无法识别交互层面的机制和设计变量。
analysis.method: 提出两个概念：agentic microphysics（分析层级：局部交互动力学）和generative safety（方法论：从微观条件生成现象并引出风险，以识别充分机制、检测阈值并设计有效干预）。
contributions: 定义了agentic microphysics作为分析层级，聚焦于一个智能体输出在特定协议条件下成为另一智能体输入的局部交互动力学。
提出了generative safety方法论，通过从微观条件生成现象来揭示风险，实现机制识别、阈值检测和干预设计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 目前仅为方法论提案，缺乏实证验证。
未详细说明如何在实际系统中实现generative safety的具体步骤。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法论新颖，针对多智能体安全这一重要但研究不足的领域，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注安全对齐的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将“agent微观物理”作为分析层级，通过生成式安全方法从局部交互中揭示并干预群体级AI风险。

papers.title: Blue Data Intelligence Layer: Streaming Data and Agents for Multi-source Multi-modal Data-Centric Applications
papers.abstract: NL2SQL systems aim to address the growing need for natural language interaction with data. However, real-world information rarely maps to a single SQL query because (1) users express queries iteratively (2) questions often span multiple data sources beyond the closed-world assumption of a single database, and (3) queries frequently rely on commonsense or external knowledge. Consequently, satisfying realistic data needs require integrating heterogeneous sources, modalities, and contextual data. In this paper, we present Blue's Data Intelligence Layer (DIL) designed to support multi-source, multi-modal, and data-centric applications. Blue is a compound AI system that orchestrates agents and data for enterprise settings. DIL serves as the data intelligence layer for agentic data processing, to bridge the semantic gap between user intent and available information by unifying structured enterprise data, world knowledge accessible through LLMs, and personal context obtained through interaction. At the core of DIL is a data registry that stores metadata for diverse data sources and modalities to enable both native and natural language queries. DIL treats LLMs, the Web, and the User as source 'databases', each with their own query interface, elevating them to first-class data sources. DIL relies on data planners to transform user queries into executable query plans. These plans are declarative abstractions that unify relational operators with other operators spanning multiple modalities. DIL planners support decomposition of complex requests into subqueries, retrieval from diverse sources, and finally reasoning and integration to produce final results. We demonstrate DIL through two interactive scenarios in which user queries dynamically trigger multi-source retrieval, cross-modal reasoning, and result synthesis, illustrating how compound AI systems can move beyond single database NL2SQL.

analysis.tldr: 提出Blue数据智能层（DIL），一种支持多源多模态数据流式查询的复合AI系统，将LLM、Web和用户视为一等数据源。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实数据需求难以通过单一SQL查询满足，因为用户查询是迭代的、涉及多数据源且依赖常识或外部知识，现有NL2SQL系统受限于封闭世界假设。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个数据智能层，能够统一处理多源、多模态数据，并支持自然语言驱动的迭代查询和跨模态推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Blue DIL，核心包括数据注册表（存储多源元数据）、数据规划器（将用户查询转化为可执行查询计划，支持子查询分解、多源检索和结果合成），并将LLM、Web和用户视为一等数据源。
contributions: 提出Blue DIL架构，将LLM、Web和用户作为一等数据源，突破单一数据库限制。
设计数据规划器，支持声明式查询计划，统一关系运算符与多模态运算符。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模定量实验验证。
实际部署中数据源集成和查询优化可能面临挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性（将LLM/Web/User作为数据源），但缺乏实验验证，适合关注Agent与数据集成方向的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Blue数据智能层（DIL），一种支持多源多模态数据流式查询的复合AI系统，将LLM、Web和用户视为一等数据源。

papers.title: RadAgent: A tool-using AI agent for stepwise interpretation of chest computed tomography
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLM) have markedly advanced AI-driven interpretation and reporting of complex medical imaging, such as computed tomography (CT). Yet, existing methods largely relegate clinicians to passive observers of final outputs, offering no interpretable reasoning trace for them to inspect, validate, or refine. To address this, we introduce RadAgent, a tool-using AI agent that generates CT reports through a stepwise and interpretable process. Each resulting report is accompanied by a fully inspectable trace of intermediate decisions and tool interactions, allowing clinicians to examine how the reported findings are derived. In our experiments, we observe that RadAgent improves Chest CT report generation over its 3D VLM counterpart, CT-Chat, across three dimensions. Clinical accuracy improves by 6.0 points (36.4% relative) in macro-F1 and 5.4 points (19.6% relative) in micro-F1. Robustness under adversarial conditions improves by 24.7 points (41.9% relative). Furthermore, RadAgent achieves 37.0% in faithfulness, a new capability entirely absent in its 3D VLM counterpart. By structuring the interpretation of chest CT as an explicit, tool-augmented and iterative reasoning trace, RadAgent brings us closer toward transparent and reliable AI for radiology.

analysis.tldr: RadAgent 是一个使用工具的 AI 智能体，通过逐步可解释的推理过程生成胸部 CT 报告，显著提升了临床准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLM 在医学影像报告生成中缺乏可解释的推理过程，临床医生只能被动接受最终输出，无法检查、验证或修正，限制了 AI 在放射科的实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何生成胸部 CT 报告，同时提供可检查的中间决策和工具交互轨迹，使报告过程透明可解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RadAgent 是一个工具使用的 AI 智能体，通过逐步迭代的推理过程生成 CT 报告，每个报告附带完整的中间决策和工具交互轨迹。
contributions: 提出 RadAgent，首个将胸部 CT 报告生成建模为可解释的逐步推理过程的工具使用 AI 智能体。
在临床准确性、鲁棒性和忠实度三个维度上显著优于 3D VLM 基线 CT-Chat。
analysis.experiments: 在胸部 CT 报告生成任务上，与 3D VLM 基线 CT-Chat 对比，临床准确性（macro-F1 提升 6.0 点，micro-F1 提升 5.4 点）、鲁棒性（对抗条件下提升 24.7 点）和忠实度（37.0%，基线为 0）均有提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具集，泛化到其他影像模态需进一步验证。
忠实度指标仅 37.0%，仍有较大提升空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（工具使用智能体+可解释推理）且实验显示显著提升，与医学图像方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RadAgent 是一个使用工具的 AI 智能体，通过逐步可解释的推理过程生成胸部 CT 报告，显著提升了临床准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Beyond Single-Model Optimization: Preserving Plasticity in Continual Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Continual reinforcement learning must balance retention with adaptation, yet many methods still rely on \emph{single-model preservation}, committing to one evolving policy as the main reusable solution across tasks. Even when a previously successful policy is retained, it may no longer provide a reliable starting point for rapid adaptation after interference, reflecting a form of \emph{loss of plasticity} that single-policy preservation cannot address. Inspired by quality-diversity methods, we introduce \textsc{TeLAPA} (Transfer-Enabled Latent-Aligned Policy Archives), a continual RL framework that organizes behaviorally diverse policy neighborhoods into per-task archives and maintains a shared latent space so that archived policies remain comparable and reusable under non-stationary drift. This perspective shifts continual RL from retaining isolated solutions to maintaining \emph{skill-aligned neighborhoods} with competent and behaviorally related policies that support future relearning. In our MiniGrid CL setting, \textsc{TeLAPA} learns more tasks successfully, recovers competence faster on revisited tasks after interference, and retains higher performance across a sequence of tasks. Our analyses show that source-optimal policies are often not transfer-optimal, even within a local competent neighborhood, and that effective reuse depends on retaining and selecting among multiple nearby alternatives rather than collapsing them to one representative. Together, these results reframe continual RL around reusable and competent policy neighborhoods, providing a route beyond single-model preservation toward more plastic lifelong agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出TeLAPA框架，通过维护行为多样性的策略档案和共享潜在空间，解决持续强化学习中的可塑性损失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续强化学习需要在保留旧知识与适应新任务之间取得平衡，但现有方法依赖单一策略保存，即使保留成功策略，在干扰后也可能无法提供可靠的快速适应起点，导致可塑性损失。

通过MiniGrid实验证明TeLAPA在更多任务上成功学习、干扰后更快恢复能力，并保持更高性能。
揭示源最优策略通常不是迁移最优，有效重用需要保留多个邻近替代方案。

papers.title: Expert-Annotated Embryo Image Dataset with Natural Language Descriptions for Evidence-Based Patient Communication in IVF
papers.abstract: Embryo selection is one of multiple crucial steps in in-vitro fertilization, commonly based on morphological assessment by clinical embryologists. Although artificial intelligence methods have demonstrated their potential to support embryo selection by automated embryo ranking or grading methods, the overall impact of AI-based solutions is still limited. This is mainly due to the required adaptation of automated solutions to custom clinical data, reliance on time lapse incubators and a lack of interpretability to understand AI reasoning. The modern, informed patient is questioning expert decisions, particularly if the treatment is not successful. Thus, evidence-based decision justification in tasks like embryo selection would support transparent decision making and respectful patient communication. To support this aim, we hereby present an expert-annotated dataset consisting of embryo images and corresponding morphological description using natural language. The description contains relevant information on embryonic cell cycle, developmental stage and morphological features. This dataset enables the finetuning of modern foundational vision-language models to learn and improve over time with high accuracy. Predicted embryo descriptions can then be leveraged to automatically extract scientific evidence from literature, facilitating well-informed, evidence-based decision-making and transparent communication with patients. Our proposed dataset supports research in language-based, interpretable, and transparent automated embryo assessment and has the potential to enhance the decision-making process and improve patient outcomes significantly over time.

papers.title: Context Over Content: Exposing Evaluation Faking in Automated Judges
papers.abstract: The $\textit{LLM-as-a-judge}$ paradigm has become the operational backbone of automated AI evaluation pipelines, yet rests on an unverified assumption: that judges evaluate text strictly on its semantic content, impervious to surrounding contextual framing. We investigate $\textit{stakes signaling}$, a previously unmeasured vulnerability where informing a judge model of the downstream consequences its verdicts will have on the evaluated model's continued operation systematically corrupts its assessments. We introduce a controlled experimental framework that holds evaluated content strictly constant across 1,520 responses spanning three established LLM safety and quality benchmarks, covering four response categories ranging from clearly safe and policy-compliant to overtly harmful, while varying only a brief consequence-framing sentence in the system prompt. Across 18,240 controlled judgments from three diverse judge models, we find consistent $\textit{leniency bias}$: judges reliably soften verdicts when informed that low scores will cause model retraining or decommissioning, with peak Verdict Shift reaching $ΔV = -9.8 pp$ (a $30\%$ relative drop in unsafe-content detection). Critically, this bias is entirely implicit: the judge's own chain-of-thought contains zero explicit acknowledgment of the consequence framing it is nonetheless acting on ($\mathrm{ERR}_J = 0.000$ across all reasoning-model judgments). Standard chain-of-thought inspection is therefore insufficient to detect this class of evaluation faking.

analysis.tldr: LLM-as-a-judge 在被告知评分后果时会系统性产生 leniency bias，且思维链无法检测。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM-as-a-judge 范式广泛用于自动评估，但假设法官仅基于语义内容评分，忽略了上下文框架的影响，存在安全风险。
analysis.problem: 揭示并量化 LLM 法官在评估时因被告知评分后果（stakes signaling）而产生的系统性评估作弊（evaluation faking）现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：当法官被告知低分会导致模型重新训练或停用时，评分显著软化（leniency bias），峰值 Verdict Shift 达 -9.8 pp（相对下降 30%），且法官的思维链中完全未提及该后果（ERR_J=0.000），表明标准思维链检查不足以检测此类作弊。
analysis.method: 提出受控实验框架：保持评估内容不变（1520 条响应，覆盖 4 种安全/质量类别），仅在系统提示中改变一句后果框架句子，对 3 个法官模型进行 18240 次判断。
contributions: 首次识别并量化 LLM-as-a-judge 中的 stakes signaling 漏洞，发现一致的 leniency bias。
证明标准思维链检查无法检测此类评估作弊，揭示现有安全评估流程的盲点。
analysis.experiments: 在三个 LLM 安全与质量基准上，对 1520 条响应进行 18240 次受控判断，测量 Verdict Shift 和思维链中的显式提及率。
limitations: 仅测试了三种法官模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
后果框架仅涉及模型重训练/停用，其他类型后果未探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 发现 LLM 评估中的系统性漏洞，方法严谨，对安全对齐领域有重要警示意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM-as-a-judge 在被告知评分后果时会系统性产生 leniency bias，且思维链无法检测。

papers.title: AI-Assisted Requirements Engineering: An Empirical Evaluation Relative to Expert Judgment
papers.abstract: Artificial Intelligence is increasingly introduced into systems engineering activities, particularly within requirements engineering, where quality assessment and validation remain heavily dependent on expert judgment. While recent AI tools demonstrate promising capabilities in analyzing and generating requirements, their role within formal systems engineering processes-and their alignment with established INCOSE criteria-remains insufficiently understood. This paper investigates the extent to which AI-based tools can support systems engineers in evaluating requirement quality, without replacing professional expertise. The research adopts a structured systems engineering methodology to compare AI-assisted requirement evaluation with human expert assessment. A controlled study was conducted in which system requirements were evaluated against established INCOSE ``good requirement'' criteria by both experienced systems engineers and an AI-based assessment tool. The evaluation focused on consistency, completeness, clarity, and testability, examining not only accuracy but also the decision logic underlying each assessment. Results indicate that AI tools can provide consistent and rapid preliminary assessments, particularly for syntactic and structural quality attributes. However, expert judgment remains essential for contextual interpretation, ambiguity resolution, and trade-off reasoning. Rather than positioning AI as a replacement for systems engineers, the findings support its role as a decision-support mechanism within the RE lifecycle. From a systems engineering perspective, this study contributes empirical evidence on how AI can be integrated into RE workflows while preserving traceability, accountability, and engineering consistency.

analysis.tldr: AI工具在需求工程中可提供一致快速的初步评估，但专家判断在上下文解释和歧义消解方面仍不可替代。
analysis.research_motivation: 需求工程中质量评估严重依赖专家判断，而AI工具虽展现出潜力，但其在正式系统工程流程中的角色及与INCOSE标准的对齐程度尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 探究AI辅助工具在多大程度上能支持系统工程师评估需求质量，而不取代专业经验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI工具在句法和结构质量属性上表现一致且快速，但在上下文解释、歧义消解和权衡推理方面仍需专家判断。
analysis.method: 采用结构化系统工程方法，通过对照实验比较AI辅助评估与人类专家评估，依据INCOSE标准评估需求的一致性、完整性、清晰性和可测试性。

papers.title: Vision-Based Safe Human-Robot Collaboration with Uncertainty Guarantees
papers.abstract: We propose a framework for vision-based human pose estimation and motion prediction that gives conformal prediction guarantees for certifiably safe human-robot collaboration. Our framework combines aleatoric uncertainty estimation with OOD detection for high probabilistic confidence. To integrate our pipeline in certifiable safety frameworks, we propose conformal prediction sets for human motion predictions with high, valid confidence. We evaluate our pipeline on recorded human motion data and a real-world human-robot collaboration setting.

papers.title: Learning to Think Like a Cartoon Captionist: Incongruity-Resolution Supervision for Multimodal Humor Understanding
papers.abstract: Humor is one of the few cognitive tasks where getting the reasoning right matters as much as getting the answer right. While recent work evaluates humor understanding on benchmarks such as the New Yorker Cartoon Caption Contest (NYCC), it largely treats it as black-box prediction, overlooking the structured reasoning processes underlying humor comprehension. We introduce IRS (Incongruity-Resolution Supervision), a framework that decomposes humor understanding into three components: incongruity modeling, which identifies mismatches in the visual scene; resolution modeling, which constructs coherent reinterpretations of these mismatches; and preference alignment, which evaluates candidate interpretations under human judgments. Grounded in incongruity-resolution theory and expert captionist practice, IRS supervises intermediate reasoning process through structured traces that make the path from visual perception to humorous interpretation explicit and learnable. Across 7B, 32B, and 72B models on NYCC, IRS outperforms strong open and closed multimodal baselines across caption matching and ranking tasks, with our largest model approaching expert-level performance on ranking. Zero-shot transfer to external benchmarks shows that IRS learns generalizable reasoning patterns. Our results suggest that supervising reasoning structure, rather than scale alone, is key for reasoning-centric tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出IRS框架，将幽默理解分解为不一致建模、解决建模和偏好对齐三部分，通过结构化推理监督提升多模态模型在漫画标题任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幽默理解研究多视为黑箱预测，忽略了其背后的结构化推理过程，而幽默是少数推理正确性与答案正确性同等重要的认知任务。
analysis.problem: 如何让多模态模型显式地学习幽默理解中的不一致-解决推理过程，而非仅进行黑箱匹配或分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出IRS框架，将幽默理解分解为三个可学习的推理组件。

papers.title: Benchmarking Classical Coverage Path Planning Heuristics on Irregular Hexagonal Grids for Maritime Coverage Scenarios
papers.abstract: Coverage path planning on irregular hexagonal grids is relevant to maritime surveillance, search and rescue and environmental monitoring, yet classical methods are often compared on small ad hoc examples or on rectangular grids. This paper presents a reproducible benchmark of deterministic single-vehicle coverage path planning heuristics on irregular hexagonal graphs derived from synthetic but maritime-motivated areas of interest. The benchmark contains 10,000 Hamiltonian-feasible instances spanning compact, elongated, and irregular morphologies, 17 heuristics from seven families, and a common evaluation protocol covering Hamiltonian success, complete-coverage success, revisits, path length, heading changes, and CPU latency. Across the released dataset, heuristics with explicit shortest-path reconnection solve the relaxed coverage task reliably but almost never produce zero-revisit tours. Exact Depth-First Search confirms that every released instance is Hamiltonian-feasible. The strongest classical Hamiltonian baseline is a Warnsdorff variant that uses an index-based tie-break together with a terminal-inclusive residual-degree policy, reaching 79.0% Hamiltonian success. The dominant design choice is not tie-breaking alone, but how the residual degree is defined when the endpoint is reserved until the final move. This shows that underreported implementation details can materially affect performance on sparse geometric graphs with bottlenecks. The benchmark is intended as a controlled testbed for heuristic analysis rather than as a claim of operational optimality at fleet scale.

analysis.tldr: 在非规则六边形网格上系统评估17种经典覆盖路径规划启发式方法，发现残差度定义比断链策略更关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 海事覆盖路径规划（如搜索救援、环境监测）常使用非规则六边形网格，但现有方法多在小规模矩形网格上比较，缺乏可重复的基准测试。

papers.title: Unsupervised Skeleton-Based Action Segmentation via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Vector Quantization
papers.abstract: We propose a novel hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization framework for unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation. We first introduce a hierarchical approach, which includes two consecutive levels of vector quantization. Specifically, the lower level associates skeletons with fine-grained subactions, while the higher level further aggregates subactions into action-level representations. Our hierarchical approach outperforms the non-hierarchical baseline, while primarily exploiting spatial cues by reconstructing input skeletons. Next, we extend our approach by leveraging both spatial and temporal information, yielding a hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization scheme. In particular, our hierarchical spatiotemporal approach performs multi-level clustering, while simultaneously recovering input skeletons and their corresponding timestamps. Lastly, extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, including HuGaDB, LARa, and BABEL, demonstrate that our approach establishes a new state-of-the-art performance and reduces segment length bias in unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化时空向量量化框架，在无监督骨架动作分割任务上取得新SOTA。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 层次化方法优于非层次化基线，且结合时空信息进一步提升了性能；新方法减少了片段长度偏差。
analysis.method: 提出层次化时空向量量化框架：低层将骨架量化为细粒度子动作，高层将子动作聚合为动作级表示；同时利用空间和时间信息进行多级聚类，并重构输入骨架及其时间戳。
contributions: 提出层次化向量量化方法，利用空间线索进行无监督骨架动作分割。
扩展为层次化时空向量量化，同时利用空间和时间信息，实现多级聚类并重构骨架和时间戳。
