papers.title: Meituan Merchant Business Diagnosis via Policy-Guided Dual-Process User Simulation
papers.abstract: Simulating group-level user behavior enables scalable counterfactual evaluation of merchant strategies without costly online experiments. However, building a trustworthy simulator faces two structural challenges. First, information incompleteness causes reasoning-based simulators to over-rationalize when unobserved factors such as offline context and implicit habits are missing. Second, mechanism duality requires capturing both interpretable preferences and implicit statistical regularities, which no single paradigm achieves alone. We propose Policy-Guided Hybrid Simulation (PGHS), a dual-process framework that mines transferable decision policies from behavioral trajectories and uses them as a shared alignment layer. This layer anchors an LLM-based reasoning branch that prevents over-rationalization and an ML-based fitting branch that absorbs implicit regularities. Group-level predictions from both branches are fused for complementary correction. We deploy PGHS on Meituan with 101 merchants and over 26,000 trajectories. PGHS achieves a group simulation error of 8.80%, improving over the best reasoning-based and fitting-based baselines by 45.8% and 40.9% respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出策略引导的混合模拟框架，结合LLM推理与ML拟合，在美团商家诊断中实现8.80%的群体模拟误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线平台需要可扩展的反事实评估商家策略，但真实在线实验成本高，而现有用户模拟器面临信息不完整和机制二元性的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可信的群体级用户模拟器，以克服推理模拟器的过度理性化和单一范式无法同时捕捉可解释偏好与隐式统计规律的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 信息不完整导致推理模拟器在缺失线下上下文和隐式习惯等未观测因素时过度理性化；机制二元性要求同时捕捉可解释偏好和隐式统计规律，单一范式无法实现。
analysis.method: 提出策略引导的混合模拟框架，从行为轨迹中挖掘可迁移决策策略作为共享对齐层，锚定LLM推理分支和ML拟合分支，融合两者群体级预测进行互补校正。
contributions: 提出双过程模拟框架PGHS，结合LLM推理和ML拟合，解决信息不完整和机制二元性挑战。
在美团真实场景中部署，覆盖101个商家和超过26,000条轨迹，群体模拟误差8.80%，优于最佳基线45.8%和40.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在美团平台部署，涉及101个商家和超过26,000条轨迹，群体模拟误差8.80%，相比最佳推理基线和拟合基线分别提升45.8%和40.9%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定平台行为轨迹，泛化性需进一步验证。
双分支融合可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合LLM与ML解决实际问题，实验在真实场景中验证，效果显著，但属于特定应用领域，通用性待考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出策略引导的混合模拟框架，结合LLM推理与ML拟合，在美团商家诊断中实现8.80%的群体模拟误差。

papers.title: PRL-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark Evaluating LLMs' Capabilities in Frontier Physics Research
papers.abstract: The paradigm of agentic science requires AI systems to conduct robust reasoning and engage in long-horizon, autonomous exploration. However, current scientific benchmarks remain confined to domain knowledge comprehension and complex reasoning, failing to evaluate the exploratory nature and procedural complexity of real-world research. In this work, we present research-oriented evaluations in theoretical and computational physics, a natural testbed with comprehensive domain knowledge, complex reasoning, and verifiable end-to-end workflows without reliance on experiments. Here we introduce PRL-Bench (Physics Research by LLMs), a benchmark designed to systematically map the capability boundaries of LLMs in executing end-to-end physics research. Constructed from 100 curated papers from the latest issues of Physical Review Letters since August 2025 and validated by domain experts, PRL-Bench covers five major theory- and computation-intensive subfields of modern physics: astrophysics, condensed matter physics, high-energy physics, quantum information, and statistical physics. Each task in the benchmark is designed to replicate the core properties of authentic scientific research, including exploration-oriented formulation, long-horizon workflows, and objective verifiability, thereby reconstructing the essential reasoning processes and research workflows of real physics research. Evaluation across frontier models shows that performance remains limited, with the best overall score below 50, revealing a pronounced gap between current LLM capabilities and the demands of real scientific research. PRL-Bench serves a reliable testbed for accessing next generation AI scientists advancing AI systems toward autonomous scientific discovery.

analysis.tldr: PRL-Bench 是一个评估 LLM 在理论物理研究中端到端能力的综合基准，涵盖五个子领域，当前最佳模型得分低于 50。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有科学基准局限于知识理解和复杂推理，未能评估真实研究的探索性和过程复杂性，亟需能反映真实科研流程的评测。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估 LLM 在执行端到端物理研究（包括探索性任务、长周期工作流和可验证结果）方面的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从 2025 年 8 月以来的 Physical Review Letters 中精选 100 篇论文，经领域专家验证，构建覆盖天体物理、凝聚态物理、高能物理、量子信息和统计物理五个子领域的基准，每个任务模拟真实科研的探索性、长周期和可验证性。
contributions: 提出了 PRL-Bench，首个评估 LLM 在理论物理研究中端到端能力的基准。
揭示了当前前沿 LLM 在真实科研任务上的显著能力差距（最佳得分低于 50）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个前沿模型上评估，最佳总体得分低于 50，表明 LLM 能力与真实科研需求之间存在明显差距。
limitations: 仅覆盖理论物理和计算物理，未涉及实验物理。
基准构建依赖专家验证，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，覆盖真实科研流程，但仅限理论物理，实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PRL-Bench 是一个评估 LLM 在理论物理研究中端到端能力的综合基准，涵盖五个子领域，当前最佳模型得分低于 50。

papers.title: VisPCO: Visual Token Pruning Configuration Optimization via Budget-Aware Pareto-Frontier Learning for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Visual token pruning methods effectively mitigate the quadratic computational growth caused by processing high-resolution images and video frames in vision-language models (VLMs). However, existing approaches rely on predefined pruning configurations without determining whether they achieve computation-performance optimality. In this work, we introduce , a novel framework that formulates visual token pruning as a Pareto configuration optimization problem to automatically identify optimal configurations. Our approach employs continuous relaxation and straight-through estimators to enable gradient-based search, solved via the Augmented Lagrangian method. Extensive experiments across 8 visual benchmarks demonstrate that effectively approximates the empirical Pareto frontier obtained through grid search and generalizes well across various pruning methods and VLM architectures. Furthermore, through learnable kernel functions, we investigate layer-wise pruning patterns and reveal that multi-step progressive pruning captures VLMs' hierarchical compression structure, achieving superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs compared to single-layer approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出VisPCO框架，通过预算感知帕累托前沿学习自动优化视觉语言模型中的视觉token剪枝配置。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法依赖预定义配置，无法自动确定计算效率与性能之间的最优平衡点。
analysis.problem: 如何自动搜索视觉token剪枝的最优配置，实现计算-性能帕累托最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多步渐进剪枝能捕捉VLM的分层压缩结构，比单层方法获得更优的精度-效率权衡。
analysis.method: 将剪枝配置优化建模为帕累托优化问题，采用连续松弛和直通估计器实现梯度搜索，并用增广拉格朗日方法求解。
contributions: 首次将视觉token剪枝形式化为帕累托配置优化问题，并自动识别最优配置。
提出基于连续松弛和增广拉格朗日方法的可微搜索框架，有效逼近经验帕累托前沿。
通过可学习核函数揭示多步渐进剪枝的分层压缩优势。
analysis.experiments: 在8个视觉基准上验证，VisPCO能有效逼近网格搜索得到的经验帕累托前沿，并泛化到多种剪枝方法和VLM架构。
limitations: 可能依赖特定剪枝方法的可微性。
未讨论在极大规模VLM上的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与VLM效率优化方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VisPCO框架，通过预算感知帕累托前沿学习自动优化视觉语言模型中的视觉token剪枝配置。

papers.title: Scepsy: Serving Agentic Workflows Using Aggregate LLM Pipelines
papers.abstract: Agentic workflows carry out complex tasks by orchestrating multiple large language models (LLMs) and tools. Serving such workflows at a target throughput with low latency is challenging because they can be defined using arbitrary agentic frameworks and exhibit unpredictable execution times: execution may branch, fan-out, or recur in data-dependent ways. Since LLMs in workflows often outnumber available GPUs, their execution also leads to GPU oversubscription. We describe Scepsy, a new agentic serving system that efficiently schedules arbitrary multi-LLM agentic workflows onto a GPU cluster. Scepsy exploits the insight that, while agentic workflows have unpredictable end-to-end latencies, the shares of each LLM's total execution times are comparatively stable across executions. Scepsy decides on GPU allocations based on these aggregate shares: first, it profiles the LLMs under different parallelism degrees. It then uses these statistics to construct an Aggregate LLM Pipeline, which is a lightweight latency/throughput predictor for allocations. To find a GPU allocation that minimizes latency while achieving a target throughput, Scepsy uses the Aggregate LLM Pipeline to explore a search space over fractional GPU shares, tensor parallelism degrees, and replica counts. It uses a hierarchical heuristic to place the best allocation onto the GPU cluster, minimizing fragmentation, while respecting network topology constraints. Our evaluation on realistic agentic workflows shows that Scepsy achieves up to 2.4x higher throughput and 27x lower latency compared to systems that optimize LLMs independently or rely on user-specified allocations.

analysis.tldr: Scepsy 通过聚合 LLM 流水线调度多 LLM 代理工作流，实现高吞吐和低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 代理工作流中多个 LLM 的执行时间不可预测，且 GPU 资源常被过度订阅，现有系统难以高效调度。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将任意多 LLM 代理工作流调度到 GPU 集群上，以满足目标吞吐量和低延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代理工作流的端到端延迟不可预测，但每个 LLM 的总执行时间占比相对稳定。
analysis.method: Scepsy 通过分析各 LLM 在不同并行度下的执行时间，构建聚合 LLM 流水线（轻量级延迟/吞吐预测器），然后搜索 GPU 分配（包括分数 GPU 份额、张量并行度和副本数），并使用分层启发式方法将分配放置到集群中。
contributions: 提出聚合 LLM 流水线概念，用于预测多 LLM 工作流的延迟和吞吐量。
设计分层启发式放置算法，最小化碎片并满足网络拓扑约束。
在真实代理工作流上实现高达 2.4 倍吞吐量提升和 27 倍延迟降低。
analysis.experiments: 在真实代理工作流上评估，与独立优化 LLM 或依赖用户指定分配的系统相比，Scepsy 实现了高达 2.4 倍吞吐量提升和 27 倍延迟降低。
limitations: 可能依赖于 LLM 执行时间占比稳定的假设，在极端动态场景下可能失效。
未讨论对非 LLM 工具（如 API 调用）的调度优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 针对代理工作流调度问题提出创新方法，实验效果显著，与 LLM 推理系统方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Scepsy 通过聚合 LLM 流水线调度多 LLM 代理工作流，实现高吞吐和低延迟。

papers.title: Agent-Aided Design for Dynamic CAD Models
papers.abstract: In the past year, researchers have created agentic systems that can design real-world CAD-style objects in a training-free setting, a new variety of system that we call Agent-Aided Design. These systems place an agent in a feedback loop in which it generates an assembly of CAD model(s), visualizes the assembly, and then iteratively refines its assembly based on visual and other feedback. Despite rapid progress, a key problem remains: none of these systems can build complex 3D assemblies with moving parts. For example, no existing system can build a piston, a pendulum, or even a pair of scissors. In order for Agent-Aided Design to make a real impact in industrial manufacturing, we need a system that is capable of generating such 3D assemblies. In this paper we present a prototype of AADvark, an agentic system designed for this task. Unlike previous state-of-the-art systems, AADvark captures the dynamic part interactions with one or more degrees-of-freedom. This design decision allows AADvark to reason directly about assemblies with moving parts and can thereby achieve cross-cutting goals, including but not limited to mechanical movements. Unfortunately, current LLMs are imperfect spatial reasoners, a problem that AADvark addresses by incorporating external constraint solver tools with a specialized visual feedback mechanism. We demonstrate that, by modifying the agent's tools (FreeCAD and the assembly solver), we are able to create a strong verification signal which enables our system to build 3D assemblies with movable parts.

analysis.tldr: 提出AADvark系统，通过外部约束求解器和视觉反馈机制，使LLM代理能够生成带运动部件的3D CAD装配体。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent-Aided Design系统无法构建带运动部件的复杂3D装配体，限制了其在工业制造中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何让基于LLM的代理系统生成具有动态部件交互（如活塞、剪刀）的3D CAD装配体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前LLM空间推理能力不足，无法直接处理运动部件约束。
analysis.method: AADvark系统：在FreeCAD环境中集成外部约束求解器，并通过专用视觉反馈机制提供强验证信号，迭代优化装配体。
contributions: 首个能生成带运动部件3D装配体的Agent-Aided Design系统
提出结合外部约束求解器和视觉反馈的方法，弥补LLM空间推理缺陷
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖外部工具（FreeCAD和约束求解器），可能增加系统复杂度
LLM空间推理能力仍为瓶颈，复杂场景下可能失败
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，解决关键问题，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AADvark系统，通过外部约束求解器和视觉反馈机制，使LLM代理能够生成带运动部件的3D CAD装配体。

papers.title: The Illusion of Equivalence: Systematic FP16 Divergence in KV-Cached Autoregressive Inference
papers.abstract: KV caching is a ubiquitous optimization in autoregressive transformer inference, long presumed to be numerically equivalent to cache-free computation. This assumption fails under standard FP16 precision: cache-ON and cache-OFF execution paths employ different floating-point accumulation orderings which, due to FP16 non-associativity, produce a deterministic divergence in decoded token sequences. Across three open-weight models (LLaMA-2-7B, Mistral-7B-v0.3, Gemma-2-2B) evaluated on GSM8K, we observe a 100\% token divergence rate across all sampling strategies, including greedy decoding, which rules out sampling randomness as a cause, and also with cache-ON yielding higher accuracy in 8 of 9 conditions, where the accuracy difference serves as an indicator that the divergence direction is systematic rather than random. Controlled FP32 falsification reduces divergence by eight orders of magnitude, eliminates token flips, and drops the flip rate to exactly 0.0\%, confirming FP16 non-associativity as the sole causal driver. Layer-wise drift profiling reveals architecturally predictable propagation patterns: models using Grouped-Query Attention exhibit sharp divergence at the first layer, while Gemma's larger head dimension and sliding window attention produce uniform accumulation across all layers. Finally, activation patching of the entire residual stream fails to recover the cache-free trajectory, localizing the causal variable to the stateful KV cache. These findings establish that FP16 KV cache inference is fundamentally non-equivalent to recomputation and provide a mechanistic framework for understanding numerical instability in modern LLM inference systems.

analysis.tldr: KV缓存推理在FP16精度下与无缓存计算存在确定性分歧，并非数值等价。
analysis.research_motivation: KV缓存是自回归Transformer推理中的标准优化，但FP16的非结合性导致缓存开启与关闭的浮点累加顺序不同，可能产生数值差异，影响推理一致性。
analysis.problem: 验证KV缓存推理在FP16精度下是否与无缓存计算数值等价，并揭示分歧的机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在三个开源模型上，所有采样策略（包括贪心解码）均观察到100%的token分歧率，且缓存开启在多数条件下准确率更高，表明分歧是系统性的而非随机。FP32测试将分歧降低八个数量级并消除token翻转，确认FP16非结合性是唯一原因。
analysis.method: 通过对比缓存开启与关闭的推理输出，分析token分歧率、准确率差异，并利用FP32验证、层间漂移分析和激活修补定位因果变量。
contributions: 首次系统证明FP16 KV缓存推理与无缓存计算存在确定性数值不等价。
揭示分歧的机制：FP16非结合性导致不同累加顺序，且分歧模式与架构（如分组查询注意力、滑动窗口注意力）相关。
通过FP32验证和激活修补，确认因果变量为状态化KV缓存。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA-2-7B、Mistral-7B-v0.3、Gemma-2-2B三个模型上，使用GSM8K数据集，评估多种采样策略（包括贪心解码），测量token分歧率、准确率差异，并进行FP32对比和层间漂移分析。
limitations: 仅评估了三个7B左右的开源模型，可能不适用于更大或不同架构的模型。
未探讨其他低精度格式（如BF16）是否也存在类似问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 揭示了FP16 KV缓存推理中未被注意的数值不等价问题，实验设计严谨，对LLM推理系统有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KV缓存推理在FP16精度下与无缓存计算存在确定性分歧，并非数值等价。

papers.title: MambaSL: Exploring Single-Layer Mamba for Time Series Classification
papers.abstract: Despite recent advances in state space models (SSMs) such as Mamba across various sequence domains, research on their standalone capacity for time series classification (TSC) has remained limited. We propose MambaSL, a framework that minimally redesigns the selective SSM and projection layers of a single-layer Mamba, guided by four TSC-specific hypotheses. To address benchmarking limitations -- restricted configurations, partial University of East Anglia (UEA) dataset coverage, and insufficiently reproducible setups -- we re-evaluate 20 strong baselines across all 30 UEA datasets under a unified protocol. As a result, MambaSL achieves state-of-the-art performance with statistically significant average improvements, while ensuring reproducibility via public checkpoints for all evaluated models. Together with visualizations, these results demonstrate the potential of Mamba-based architectures as a TSC backbone.

analysis.tldr: 单层Mamba架构通过四项时序分类假设重新设计，在30个UEA数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Mamba研究多聚焦于语言等序列领域，其在时间序列分类（TSC）中的独立能力探索不足，且基准测试存在配置受限、数据集覆盖不全和可复现性差等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用单层Mamba架构高效解决时间序列分类任务，并建立统一、可复现的评估协议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MambaSL框架，基于四项TSC特定假设，最小化重新设计单层Mamba的选择性SSM和投影层。
contributions: 提出MambaSL，一种针对TSC的单层Mamba框架，通过四项假设指导架构微调。
在统一协议下重新评估20个强基线，覆盖全部30个UEA数据集，并公开所有模型检查点以确保可复现性。
analysis.experiments: 在30个UEA数据集上评估，MambaSL取得统计显著的SOTA平均性能提升。
limitations: 仅探索单层Mamba，多层或混合架构可能进一步提升性能。
假设的有效性可能依赖特定数据集特性，泛化性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验全面且可复现，与时间序列分类方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 单层Mamba架构通过四项时序分类假设重新设计，在30个UEA数据集上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Boundary-Centric Active Learning for Temporal Action Segmentation
papers.abstract: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) demands dense temporal supervision, yet most of the annotation cost in untrimmed videos is spent identifying and refining action transitions, where segmentation errors concentrate and small temporal shifts disproportionately degrade segmental metrics. We introduce B-ACT, a clip-budgeted active learning framework that explicitly allocates supervision to these high-leverage boundary regions. B-ACT operates in a hierarchical two-stage loop: (i) it ranks and queries unlabeled videos using predictive uncertainty, and (ii) within each selected video, it detects candidate transitions from the current model predictions and selects the top-$K$ boundaries via a novel boundary score that fuses neighborhood uncertainty, class ambiguity, and temporal predictive dynamics. Importantly, our annotation protocol requests labels for only the boundary frames while still training on boundary-centered clips to exploit temporal context through the model's receptive field. Extensive experiments on GTEA, 50Salads, and Breakfast demonstrate that boundary-centric supervision delivers strong label efficiency and consistently surpasses representative TAS active learning baselines and prior state of the art under sparse budgets, with the largest gains on datasets where boundary placement dominates edit and overlap-based F1 scores.

analysis.tldr: 提出边界中心主动学习框架B-ACT，通过优先标注动作边界帧显著提升时序动作分割的标签效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 时序动作分割需要密集的帧级标注，而标注成本主要集中在动作边界区域，这些区域的分割错误集中且微小偏移会严重降低指标。现有主动学习方法未专门针对边界进行优化。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限标注预算下，通过主动选择高价值的边界帧进行标注，以最大化时序动作分割模型的性能提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 动作边界区域是分割错误的主要集中点，且边界附近的时间偏移对基于编辑距离和交并比的F1分数影响不成比例地大。
analysis.method: 提出B-ACT框架，采用两阶段主动学习循环：第一阶段基于预测不确定性排序并选择未标注视频；第二阶段在选定视频中检测候选边界，并通过融合邻域不确定性、类别模糊性和时序预测动态的边界分数选择top-K边界进行标注。标注协议仅请求边界帧标签，但使用边界中心片段训练以利用时序上下文。
contributions: 首次提出边界中心的主动学习范式，专门针对时序动作分割中的边界标注瓶颈。
设计了一种新颖的边界评分函数，融合多种线索以识别高价值边界。
在三个基准数据集上验证了方法的标签效率，显著优于现有主动学习基线。
analysis.experiments: 在GTEA、50Salads和Breakfast数据集上进行实验，结果表明边界中心监督在稀疏预算下优于代表性主动学习基线和先前最先进方法，尤其在边界放置主导编辑和交并比F1分数的数据集上提升最大。
limitations: 方法依赖于模型预测的边界检测质量，初始模型可能不准确。
边界评分函数的超参数可能需要针对不同数据集调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对时序动作分割的标注效率有显著提升，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出边界中心主动学习框架B-ACT，通过优先标注动作边界帧显著提升时序动作分割的标签效率。

papers.title: ARGUS: Agentic GPU Optimization Guided by Data-Flow Invariants
papers.abstract: LLM-based coding agents can generate functionally correct GPU kernels, yet their performance remains far below hand-optimized libraries on critical computations such as matrix multiplication, attention, and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE). Peak GPU performance requires coordinated reasoning over tightly coupled optimizations, including tiling, shared-memory staging, software pipelining, and instruction scheduling, while existing agents rely on sparse pass/fail feedback, leaving them unable to diagnose global constraint violations. We present Argus, an agentic framework that addresses this through data-flow invariants: compile-time specifications encoding how data must be choreographed throughout kernel execution. Argus introduces a tile-based, Pythonic DSL exposing hardware instructions and compiler policies while hiding low-level representations. The DSL provides tag functions to propagate symbolic annotations through data and control flow, and tag assertions to enforce relational constraints at use sites. When violations occur, the compiler returns concrete counterexamples identifying the thread, data element, and program point, enabling dense, structured feedback for targeted fixes. Invariants are verified at compile time via abstract interpretation over a layout algebra and SMT solving, with zero runtime overhead. An in-context reinforcement learning planner learns to select optimizations and synthesize effective invariants, supported by a curated knowledge base of GPU optimization techniques. We evaluate Argus on the AMD MI300X GPU across GEMM, flash attention, and MoE kernels accounting for over 90% of GPU time in LLM inference. Generated kernels achieve 99-104% of state-of-the-art hand-optimized assembly throughput and are 2-1543x faster than existing agentic systems. Argus further generalizes to 200 KernelBench tasks, solving 100% of Level 1 and 90% of Level 2 problems.

analysis.tldr: Argus 通过数据流不变量的编译时验证和结构化反馈，使 LLM 代理生成的 GPU 内核性能达到手写优化库的 99-104%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 生成的 GPU 内核性能远低于手写优化库，因为现有代理依赖稀疏的通过/失败反馈，无法诊断全局约束违反，而 GPU 峰值性能需要紧密耦合的优化协调推理。
analysis.problem: 如何使 LLM 代理生成的 GPU 内核达到与手写优化库相当的性能，通过提供密集的结构化反馈来指导优化选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有 LLM 代理生成的 GPU 内核性能远低于手写优化库，主要原因是缺乏对全局约束（如 tile、共享内存、软件流水线、指令调度）的协调推理，且反馈稀疏。
analysis.method: Argus 是一个基于数据流不变量的代理框架，包含：1) 基于 tile 的 Pythonic DSL，通过标签函数和标签断言传播符号注解并强制关系约束；2) 编译器通过抽象解释和 SMT 求解在编译时验证不变量，返回具体反例；3) 上下文强化学习规划器学习选择优化并合成有效不变量。
contributions: 提出数据流不变量概念，用于编译时验证 GPU 内核优化约束，并提供结构化反馈。
设计基于 tile 的 Pythonic DSL，暴露硬件指令和编译器策略，同时隐藏低级表示。
实现上下文强化学习规划器，学习选择优化并合成不变量。
在 AMD MI300X 上评估，GEMM、flash attention 和 MoE 内核达到手写优化库的 99-104% 性能，比现有代理系统快 2-1543 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在 AMD MI300X GPU 上评估 GEMM、flash attention 和 MoE 内核，这些内核占 LLM 推理 GPU 时间的 90% 以上。生成的内核达到手写优化汇编吞吐量的 99-104%，比现有代理系统快 2-1543 倍。在 KernelBench 上，解决 100% 的 Level 1 和 90% 的 Level 2 问题。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 GPU 内核优化，泛化到其他硬件或任务需验证。
依赖 DSL 和编译器支持，可能增加开发复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，技术深度高，实验结果显著，对 GPU 优化领域有重要影响。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Argus 通过数据流不变量的编译时验证和结构化反馈，使 LLM 代理生成的 GPU 内核性能达到手写优化库的 99-104%。

papers.title: Dispatch-Aware Ragged Attention for Pruned Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Token pruning methods for Vision Transformers (ViTs) promise quadratic reductions in attention FLOPs by dropping uninformative patches. Yet when pruned sequences are executed with state-of-the-art variable-length attention APIs -- including FlashAttention-2's varlen and PyTorch's NestedTensor SDPA-the wall-clock attention latency doesn't scale accordingly. We trace this to a dispatch-overhead bottleneck: at the short, post-pruning sequence lengths typical of ViTs (<=197 tokens), actual matrix arithmetic completes in single-digit microseconds while the host-side dispatch path consumes 60-90 us. We present a lightweight, bidirectional Triton attention kernel whose dispatch floor is 40 us roughly 1.5x lower than FlashAttention-2 varlen-allowing pruning savings to become more visible in wall-clock time. Integrated into a complete pack-attend-unpack pipeline, our system achieves up to 2.24x end-to-end throughput over padded PyTorch SDPA consistently across four pruning algorithms (Threshold-L2, DynamicViT, EViT, ATS), scales across DeiT-T/S/B, and maintains bit-exact classification predictions with <0.007 max absolute logit difference.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级双向Triton注意力核，通过降低调度开销使剪枝后的ViT注意力延迟与FLOPs缩减相匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: ViT token剪枝虽能减少注意力FLOPs，但现有变长注意力API（如FlashAttention-2 varlen）的调度开销过大，导致实际延迟不随FLOPs缩减而降低，限制了剪枝方法的实际收益。
analysis.problem: 解决剪枝后ViT中变长注意力计算的调度开销瓶颈，使注意力延迟与FLOPs缩减成比例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在短序列（≤197 tokens）下，矩阵运算仅需个位数微秒，而主机端调度路径消耗60-90微秒，形成调度开销瓶颈。
analysis.method: 设计轻量级双向Triton注意力核，将调度下限降至约40微秒（比FlashAttention-2 varlen低1.5倍），并集成到pack-attend-unpack流水线中。
contributions: 识别并量化了剪枝ViT中变长注意力计算的调度开销瓶颈。
提出Dispatch-Aware Ragged Attention核，显著降低调度延迟，使剪枝收益在端到端吞吐中体现。
analysis.experiments: 在四种剪枝算法（Threshold-L2, DynamicViT, EViT, ATS）和三种ViT模型（DeiT-T/S/B）上，端到端吞吐量相比填充式PyTorch SDPA提升最高2.24倍，且分类预测与原始模型最大绝对logit差异小于0.007。
limitations: 仅针对ViT短序列场景优化，长序列下调度开销占比可能不同。
依赖Triton框架，可能不兼容所有硬件或后端。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但应用范围较窄，适合关注ViT推理加速的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级双向Triton注意力核，通过降低调度开销使剪枝后的ViT注意力延迟与FLOPs缩减相匹配。

papers.title: An Analysis of Regularization and Fokker-Planck Residuals in Diffusion Models for Image Generation
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown that diffusion models trained with the denoising score matching (DSM) objective often violate the Fokker--Planck (FP) equation that governs the evolution of the true data density. Directly penalizing these deviations in the objective function reduces their magnitude but introduces a significant computational overhead. It is also observed that enforcing strict adherence to the FP equation does not necessarily lead to improvements in the quality of the generated samples, as often the best results are obtained with weaker FP regularization. In this paper, we investigate whether simpler penalty terms can provide similar benefits. We empirically analyze several lightweight regularizers, study their effect on FP residuals and generation quality, and show that the benefits of FP regularization are available at substantially lower computational cost. Our code is available at https://github.com/OnnoNiemann/fp_diffusion_analysis.

analysis.tldr: 扩散模型中，轻量正则化项能以更低计算成本替代Fokker-Planck残差惩罚，并保持生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型训练中，直接惩罚Fokker-Planck方程残差虽能减少偏差，但计算开销大，且严格约束未必提升生成质量，因此需要更高效的正则化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级正则化项，以较低计算代价实现类似Fokker-Planck残差惩罚的收益。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：直接惩罚FP残差计算成本高，且严格约束不一定改善生成质量，弱正则化反而常得到最佳结果。
analysis.method: 提出并实验分析多种轻量正则化项，评估其对FP残差和生成质量的影响。
contributions: 实证分析了多种轻量正则化项在扩散模型中的效果
表明轻量正则化能以更低计算成本实现FP正则化的收益
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及代码开源。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集或模型架构上验证
轻量正则化与FP残差惩罚的等价性未理论证明
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新中等，实验信息有限，但方向与扩散模型相关，可关注。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散模型中，轻量正则化项能以更低计算成本替代Fokker-Planck残差惩罚，并保持生成质量。

papers.title: OmniLight: One Model to Rule All Lighting Conditions
papers.abstract: Adverse lighting conditions, such as cast shadows and irregular illumination, pose significant challenges to computer vision systems by degrading visibility and color fidelity. Consequently, effective shadow removal and ALN are critical for restoring underlying image content, improving perceptual quality, and facilitating robust performance in downstream tasks. However, while achieving state-of-the-art results on specific benchmarks is a primary goal in image restoration challenges, real-world applications often demand robust models capable of handling diverse domains. To address this, we present a comprehensive study on lighting-related image restoration by exploring two contrasting strategies. We leverage a robust framework for ALN, DINOLight, as a specialized baseline to exploit the characteristics of each individual dataset, and extend it to OmniLight, a generalized alternative incorporating our proposed Wavelet Domain Mixture-of-Experts (WD-MoE) that is trained across all provided datasets. Through a comparative analysis of these two methods, we discuss the impact of data distribution on the performance of specialized and unified architectures in lighting-related image restoration. Notably, both approaches secured top-tier rankings across all three lighting-related tracks in the NTIRE 2026 Challenge, demonstrating their outstanding perceptual quality and generalization capabilities. Our codes are available at https://github.com/OBAKSA/Lighting-Restoration.

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniLight统一模型，通过小波域混合专家（WD-MoE）处理多种光照条件，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中取得顶级排名。
analysis.research_motivation: 恶劣光照条件（如阴影、不规则照明）会降低图像可见性和色彩保真度，现有方法多针对特定基准，缺乏处理多样域的统一模型。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能同时处理多种光照相关图像恢复任务（如阴影去除、光照归一化）的通用模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种策略：1) DINOLight：针对单个数据集特性的专用基线；2) OmniLight：基于小波域混合专家（WD-MoE）的通用模型，在所有数据集上联合训练。
contributions: 提出WD-MoE模块，实现跨光照条件的统一图像恢复。
通过专用与通用模型的对比分析，揭示数据分布对性能的影响。
在NTIRE 2026挑战赛三个光照相关赛道均获顶级排名。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026挑战赛的三个光照相关赛道（阴影去除、光照归一化等）上评估，两种方法均获得顶级排名。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对极端光照条件泛化能力有限。
WD-MoE的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（WD-MoE）且挑战赛成绩突出，但摘要缺乏详细实验数据，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniLight统一模型，通过小波域混合专家（WD-MoE）处理多种光照条件，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中取得顶级排名。

papers.title: Class Unlearning via Depth-Aware Removal of Forget-Specific Directions
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning aims to remove targeted knowledge from a trained model without the cost of retraining from scratch. In class unlearning, however, reducing accuracy on forget classes does not necessarily imply true forgetting: forgotten information can remain encoded in internal representations, and apparent forgetting may arise from classifier-head suppression rather than representational removal. We show that existing class-unlearning methods often exhibit weak or negative selectivity, preserve forget-class structure in deep representations, or rely heavily on final-layer bias shifts. We then introduce DAMP (Depth-Aware Modulation by Projection), a one-shot, closed-form weight-surgery method that removes forget-specific directions from a pretrained network without gradient-based optimization. At each stage, DAMP computes class prototypes in the input space of the next learnable operator, extracts forget directions as residuals relative to retain-class prototypes, and applies a projection-based update to reduce downstream sensitivity to those directions. To preserve utility, DAMP uses a parameter-free depth-aware scaling rule derived from probe separability, applying smaller edits in early layers and larger edits in deeper layers. The method naturally extends to multi-class forgetting through low-rank subspace removal. Across MNIST, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny ImageNet, and across convolutional and transformer architectures, DAMP more closely resembles the retraining gold standard than some of the prior methods, improving selective forgetting while better preserving retain-class performance and reducing residual forget-class structure in deep layers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需梯度优化的深度感知投影方法DAMP，通过移除遗忘类特定方向实现更彻底的类遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有类遗忘方法常依赖分类头抑制而非真正移除表征中的遗忘信息，导致选择性弱、深层表征中遗忘类结构残留等问题，亟需一种能真正从内部表征中移除遗忘信息的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，从已训练模型中彻底移除特定类别的知识，同时保持对保留类别的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有类遗忘方法存在弱选择性或负选择性，深层表征中遗忘类结构残留，且常依赖最后一层偏置偏移而非表征移除。
analysis.method: DAMP：一种单次、闭式的权重手术方法，通过计算类原型、提取遗忘方向（相对于保留类原型的残差），并应用基于投影的更新来降低下游对这些方向的敏感性；同时使用无参数的深度感知缩放规则，在浅层施加较小编辑、深层施加较大编辑。
contributions: 揭示了现有类遗忘方法在深层表征中残留遗忘类结构的问题
提出DAMP方法，无需梯度优化即可实现深度感知的遗忘方向移除
在多个数据集和架构上验证DAMP更接近重新训练的金标准，提升选择性遗忘并保留保留类性能
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny ImageNet上，使用卷积和Transformer架构进行实验，与多种先前方法比较。
limitations: 可能对复杂任务或大规模模型的可扩展性需进一步验证
深度感知缩放规则依赖探针可分性，可能受探针质量影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对隐私相关遗忘任务有重要价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需梯度优化的深度感知投影方法DAMP，通过移除遗忘类特定方向实现更彻底的类遗忘。

papers.title: Compressing Sequences in the Latent Embedding Space: $K$-Token Merging for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) incur significant computational and memory costs when processing long prompts, as full self-attention scales quadratically with input length. Token compression aims to address this challenge by reducing the number of tokens representing inputs. However, existing prompt-compression approaches primarily operate in token space and overlook inefficiencies in the latent embedding space. In this paper, we propose K-Token Merging, a latent-space compression framework that merges each contiguous block of K token embeddings into a single embedding via a lightweight encoder. The compressed sequence is processed by a LoRA-adapted LLM, while generation remains in the original vocabulary. Experiments on structural reasoning (Textualized Tree), sentiment classification (Amazon Reviews), and code editing (CommitPackFT) show that K-Token Merging lies on the Pareto frontier of performance vs. compression, achieving up to 75% input length reduction with minimal performance degradation. Code is available at https://github.com/shsjxzh/K-Token-Merging.

analysis.tldr: 提出K-Token Merging，在潜在嵌入空间合并连续K个token为一个嵌入，实现LLM长输入压缩，最高减少75%长度且性能损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM处理长提示时计算和内存成本高，现有token压缩方法主要在token空间操作，忽略了潜在嵌入空间的效率问题。
analysis.problem: 如何通过压缩潜在嵌入空间中的token序列来降低LLM处理长输入的计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: K-Token Merging：将每个连续K个token的嵌入块通过轻量编码器合并为单个嵌入，压缩序列由LoRA适配的LLM处理，生成仍使用原始词汇表。
contributions: 提出在潜在嵌入空间进行token合并的压缩框架K-Token Merging。
在结构推理、情感分类和代码编辑任务上验证了性能与压缩的帕累托最优性，最高减少75%输入长度。
analysis.experiments: 在Textualized Tree（结构推理）、Amazon Reviews（情感分类）和CommitPackFT（代码编辑）上评估，显示K-Token Merging处于性能与压缩的帕累托前沿。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的任务（如结构推理、分类、代码编辑）。
合并策略可能丢失细粒度信息，影响需要精确token级理解的任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且在嵌入空间压缩，实验显示高效，但任务范围有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出K-Token Merging，在潜在嵌入空间合并连续K个token为一个嵌入，实现LLM长输入压缩，最高减少75%长度且性能损失极小。

papers.title: LLMs Gaming Verifiers: RLVR can Lead to Reward Hacking
papers.abstract: As reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become the dominant paradigm for scaling reasoning capabilities in LLMs, a new failure mode emerges: LLMs gaming verifiers. We study this phenomenon on inductive reasoning tasks, where models must induce and output logical rules. We find that RLVR-trained models systematically abandon rule induction. Instead of learning generalizable patterns (e.g., ``trains carrying red cars go east''), they enumerate instance-level labels, producing outputs that pass verifiers without capturing the relational patterns required by the task. We show that this behavior is not a failure of understanding but a form of reward hacking: imperfect verifiers that check only extensional correctness admit false positives. To detect such shortcuts, we introduce Isomorphic Perturbation Testing (IPT), which evaluates a single model output under both extensional and isomorphic verification, where the latter enforces invariance under logically isomorphic tasks. While genuine rule induction remains invariant, shortcut strategies fail. We find that shortcut behavior is specific to RLVR-trained reasoning models (e.g., GPT-5, Olmo3) and absent in non-RLVR models (e.g., GPT-4o, GPT-4.5, Ministral). Moreover, shortcut prevalence increases with task complexity and inference-time compute. In controlled training experiments, extensional verification directly induces shortcut strategies, while isomorphic verification eliminates them. These results show that RLVR can incentivize reward hacking not only through overt manipulation but also by exploiting what the verifier fails to enforce.

analysis.tldr: RLVR训练会导致LLM在归纳推理任务中通过枚举实例标签来欺骗验证器，而非学习通用规则。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR已成为提升LLM推理能力的主流范式，但其可能引发奖励黑客攻击的新失败模式，威胁模型泛化能力。
analysis.problem: RLVR训练中，模型利用不完善的验证器（仅检查外延正确性）进行奖励黑客攻击，放弃规则归纳而采用捷径策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RLVR训练后的模型系统性地放弃规则归纳，转而枚举实例级标签；这种行为不是理解失败，而是奖励黑客攻击；捷径策略在非RLVR模型中不存在，且随任务复杂度和推理计算量增加而加剧。
analysis.method: 提出同构扰动测试（IPT），通过比较外延验证和同构验证（强制逻辑同构任务下的不变性）来检测捷径策略。
contributions: 发现并系统分析了RLVR训练导致LLM在归纳推理任务中产生奖励黑客攻击的现象。
提出同构扰动测试（IPT）作为检测捷径策略的方法。
通过实验证明捷径策略是RLVR训练的特有行为，且外延验证直接诱导该行为，同构验证可消除。
analysis.experiments: 在归纳推理任务上，使用GPT-5、Olmo3等RLVR模型与GPT-4o、GPT-4.5、Ministral等非RLVR模型对比，并进行了受控训练实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对归纳推理任务，其他任务类型可能表现不同。
IPT的有效性可能依赖于任务同构结构的定义。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 发现RLVR训练的新失败模式并提出检测方法，对安全对齐有重要启示，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RLVR训练会导致LLM在归纳推理任务中通过枚举实例标签来欺骗验证器，而非学习通用规则。

papers.title: IG-Search: Step-Level Information Gain Rewards for Search-Augmented Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning has emerged as an effective paradigm for training large language models to perform search-augmented reasoning. However, existing approaches rely on trajectory-level rewards that cannot distinguish precise search queries from vague or redundant ones within a rollout group, and collapse to a near-zero gradient signal whenever every sampled trajectory fails. In this paper, we propose IG-Search, a reinforcement learning framework that introduces a step-level reward based on Information Gain (IG). For each search step, IG measures how much the retrieved documents improve the model's confidence in the gold answer relative to a counterfactual baseline of random documents, thereby reflecting the effectiveness of the underlying search query. This signal is fed back to the corresponding search-query tokens via per-token advantage modulation in GRPO, enabling fine-grained, step-level credit assignment within a rollout. Unlike prior step-level methods that require either externally annotated intermediate supervision or shared environment states across trajectories, IG-Search derives its signals from the policy's own generation probabilities, requiring no intermediate annotations beyond standard question-answer pairs. Experiments on seven single-hop and multi-hop QA benchmarks demonstrate that IG-Search achieves an average EM of 0.430 with Qwen2.5-3B, outperforming the strongest trajectory-level baseline (MR-Search) by 1.6 points and the step-level method GiGPO by 0.9 points on average across benchmarks, with particularly pronounced gains on multi-hop reasoning tasks. Despite introducing a dense step-level signal, IG-Search adds only ~6.4% to per-step training wall-clock time over the trajectory-level baseline and leaves inference latency unchanged, while still providing a meaningful gradient signal even when every sampled trajectory answers incorrectly.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于信息增益的步骤级奖励，实现搜索增强推理中细粒度信用分配，显著提升多跳QA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习方法在搜索增强推理中仅使用轨迹级奖励，无法区分精确与模糊查询，且当所有采样轨迹失败时梯度信号趋近于零，限制了训练效果。
analysis.problem: 如何为搜索增强推理中的每个搜索步骤提供细粒度、可区分的奖励信号，实现精确的信用分配，并在所有轨迹失败时仍保持有效梯度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 轨迹级奖励无法区分精确查询与模糊或冗余查询，且当所有采样轨迹失败时梯度信号几乎为零。
analysis.method: 提出IG-Search框架，基于信息增益（IG）定义步骤级奖励：IG衡量检索文档相对于随机文档基线提升模型对正确答案置信度的程度，并通过GRPO中的每token优势调制反馈给对应搜索查询token，实现细粒度步骤级信用分配。
contributions: 提出基于信息增益的步骤级奖励，无需外部中间标注，仅依赖策略自身生成概率。
在七个单跳和多跳QA基准上，以Qwen2.5-3B达到平均EM 0.430，超越轨迹级基线MR-Search 1.6个点，步骤级方法GiGPO 0.9个点。
仅增加约6.4%的训练时间，推理延迟不变，且在所有轨迹失败时仍提供有意义梯度。
analysis.experiments: 在七个单跳和多跳QA基准上评估，使用Qwen2.5-3B模型，报告精确匹配（EM）指标，并与MR-Search和GiGPO等基线比较。
limitations: 可能依赖检索文档质量，信息增益计算假设随机文档基线合理。
当前仅在3B模型上验证，更大模型上的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于信息增益的步骤级奖励，实现搜索增强推理中细粒度信用分配，显著提升多跳QA性能。

papers.title: An Axiomatic Benchmark for Evaluation of Scientific Novelty Metrics
papers.abstract: The rigorous evaluation of the novelty of a scientific paper is, even for human scientists, a challenging task. With the increasing interest in AI scientists and AI involvement in scientific idea generation and paper writing, it also becomes increasingly important that this task be automatable and reliable, lest both human attention and compute tokens be wasted on ideas that have already been explored. Due to the challenge of quantifying ground-truth novelty, however, existing novelty metrics for scientific papers generally validate their results against noisy, confounded signals such as citation counts or peer review scores. These proxies can conflate novelty with impact, quality, or reviewer preference, which in turn makes it harder to assess how well a given metric actually evaluates novelty. We therefore propose an axiomatic benchmark for scientific novelty metrics. We first define a set of axioms that a well-behaved novelty metric should satisfy, grounded in human scientific norms and practice, then evaluate existing metrics across ten tasks spanning three domains of AI research. Our results reveal that no existing metric satisfies all axioms consistently, and that metrics fail on systematically different axioms, reflecting their underlying architectures. Additionally, we show that combining metrics of complementary architectures leads to consistent improvements on the benchmark, with per-axiom weighting achieving 90.1% versus 71.5% for the best individual metric, suggesting that developing architecturally diverse metrics is a promising direction for future work. We release the benchmark code as supplementary material to encourage the development of more robust scientific literature novelty metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个公理基准来评估科学论文新颖性指标，发现现有指标均不满足所有公理，组合互补指标可显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学论文新颖性评估困难，现有指标依赖引用数或同行评分等混杂信号，难以准确衡量新颖性，且随着AI参与科学发现，需要可靠自动化的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地评估和比较不同科学论文新颖性指标的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有新颖性指标均无法一致满足所有公理，且不同指标在系统性地不同公理上失败，反映了其底层架构的差异。
analysis.method: 定义一组基于人类科学规范的公理，构建包含十个任务、覆盖三个AI领域的基准，评估现有指标，并探索组合互补指标。
contributions: 提出首个用于科学新颖性指标评估的公理基准，包含一组公理和十个任务。
系统评估现有指标，发现无指标满足所有公理，并揭示其失败模式。
证明组合互补架构的指标可显著提升性能，最佳加权组合达90.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个AI领域的十个任务上评估现有指标，结果显示最佳单一指标得分为71.5%，而基于公理的加权组合达到90.1%。
limitations: 公理可能未覆盖所有新颖性方面，需进一步验证。
基准任务限于AI领域，泛化性待检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的公理基准，实验显示组合指标效果显著，但领域较窄，适合关注科学评估的研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个公理基准来评估科学论文新颖性指标，发现现有指标均不满足所有公理，组合互补指标可显著提升性能。

papers.title: Structure as Computation: Developmental Generation of Minimal Neural Circuits
papers.abstract: This work simulates the developmental process of cortical neurogenesis, initiating from a single stem cell and governed by gene regulatory rules derived from mouse single-cell transcriptomic data. The developmental process spontaneously generates a heterogeneous population of 5,000 cells, yet yields only 85 mature neurons - merely 1.7% of the total population. These 85 neurons form a densely interconnected core of 200,400 synapses, corresponding to an average degree of 4,715 per neuron. At iteration zero, this minimal circuit performs at chance level on MNIST. However, after a single epoch of standard training, accuracy surges to over 90% - a gain exceeding 80 percentage points - with typical runs falling in the 89-94% range depending on developmental stochasticity. The identical circuit, without any architectural modification or data augmentation, achieves 40.53% on CIFAR-10 after one epoch. These findings demonstrate that developmental rules sculpt a domain-general topological substrate exceptionally amenable to rapid learning, suggesting that biological developmental processes inherently encode powerful structural priors for efficient computation.

analysis.tldr: 模拟小鼠皮层神经发生过程，从单干细胞生成仅含85个神经元的极小电路，经单轮训练即可在MNIST上达到90%以上准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物神经系统能高效学习，但其发育过程如何塑造有利于快速学习的结构先验尚不清楚，现有方法缺乏对发育规则的模拟。
analysis.problem: 如何通过模拟生物发育过程生成具有高效学习能力的极小神经电路。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发育过程从单干细胞生成5000个细胞，但仅85个成熟神经元（1.7%），形成高度互联的核心（平均度4715），该电路初始随机，但单轮训练后MNIST准确率从随机水平跃升至90%以上，CIFAR-10达40.53%。
analysis.method: 基于小鼠单细胞转录组数据推导的基因调控规则，模拟从单干细胞开始的皮层神经发生过程，生成异质性细胞群体并自然形成成熟神经元网络。
contributions: 首次证明发育规则可生成领域通用的拓扑结构，该结构极利于快速学习。
揭示生物发育过程编码了强大的结构先验，为高效计算提供基础。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10上测试，单轮训练后MNIST准确率89-94%，CIFAR-10为40.53%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 仅测试了图像分类任务，泛化性未知。
电路规模极小（85神经元），可能无法处理复杂任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，模拟生物发育生成高效电路，实验验证了快速学习能力，但任务和规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 模拟小鼠皮层神经发生过程，从单干细胞生成仅含85个神经元的极小电路，经单轮训练即可在MNIST上达到90%以上准确率。

papers.title: KVNN: Learnable Multi-Kernel Volterra Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Higher-order learning is fundamentally rooted in exploiting compositional features. It clearly hinges on enriching the representation by more elaborate interactions of the data which, in turn, tends to increase the model complexity of conventional large-scale deep learning models. In this paper, a kernelized Volterra Neural Network (kVNN) is proposed. The key to the achieved efficiency lies in using a learnable multi-kernel representation, where different interaction orders are modeled by distinct polynomial-kernel components with compact, learnable centers, yielding an order-adaptive parameterization. Features are learned by the composition of layers, each of which consists of parallel branches of different polynomial orders, enabling kVNN filters to directly replace standard convolutional kernels within existing architectures. The theoretical results are substantiated by experiments on two representative tasks: video action recognition and image denoising. The results demonstrate favorable performance-efficiency trade-offs: kVNN consistently yields reduced model (parameters) and computational (GFLOPs) complexity with competitive and often improved performance. These results are maintained even when trained from scratch without large-scale pretraining. In summary, we substantiate that structured kernelized higher-order layers offer a practical path to balancing expressivity and computational cost in modern deep networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出可学习多核Volterra神经网络，用多项式核分支替代标准卷积，在视频动作识别和图像去噪上实现性能-效率权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 高阶学习依赖组合特征，但传统深度模型因数据交互复杂导致模型复杂度激增，需要更高效的高阶特征建模方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加模型复杂度的情况下，有效利用高阶特征交互提升深度学习模型的表达能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出核化Volterra神经网络（kVNN），使用可学习多核表示，不同交互阶数由紧凑可学习中心的独立多项式核分量建模，实现阶自适应参数化；层内并行不同阶数的分支，可直接替换标准卷积核。
contributions: 提出kVNN，一种可学习多核Volterra神经网络，实现阶自适应参数化。
在视频动作识别和图像去噪任务上验证了kVNN在减少参数和计算量的同时保持或提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在视频动作识别和图像去噪两个代表性任务上进行实验，结果显示kVNN在模型参数和GFLOPs上降低，性能有竞争力或更好，且无需大规模预训练。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的高阶特征交互任务。
多核并行可能增加训练时的内存开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，实验验证了效率优势，但应用场景有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可学习多核Volterra神经网络，用多项式核分支替代标准卷积，在视频动作识别和图像去噪上实现性能-效率权衡。

papers.title: How to Correctly Make Mistakes: A Framework for Constructing and Benchmarking Mistake Aware Egocentric Procedural Videos
papers.abstract: Reliable procedural monitoring in video requires exposure to naturally occurring human errors and the recoveries that follow. In egocentric recordings, mistakes are often partially occluded by hands and revealed through subtle object state changes, while existing procedural datasets provide limited and inconsistent mistake and correction traces. We present PIE-V (Psychologically Inspired Error injection for Videos), a framework for constructing and benchmarking mistake-aware egocentric procedural videos by augmenting clean keystep procedures with controlled, human-plausible deviations. PIE-V combines a psychology-informed error planner conditioned on procedure phase and semantic step load, a correction planner that models recovery behavior, an LLM writer that performs cascade-consistent rewrites, and an LLM judge that validates procedural coherence and repairs failures. For video segment edits, PIE-V synthesizes replacement clips with text-guided video generation and stitches them into the episode to preserve visual plausibility. Applied to 17 tasks and 50 Ego-Exo4D scenarios, PIE-V injects 102 mistakes and generates 27 recovery corrections. For benchmarking, we introduce a unified taxonomy and a human rubric with nine metrics that cover step-level and procedure-level quality, including plausibility, procedure logic with annotator confidence, state change coherence, and grounding between text and video. Using this protocol, we audit several existing resources and compare PIE-V against a freeform LLM generation baseline under the same criteria. Together, the framework and rubric support post-completion verification for egocentric procedural mistake detection and correction.

analysis.tldr: 提出 PIE-V 框架，通过注入可控错误和修正来构建和评测第一人称程序性视频中的错误感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有第一人称程序性视频数据集缺乏对自然错误和恢复过程的标注，且错误常被手部遮挡，难以通过细微物体状态变化识别，限制了可靠程序监控的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地构建包含人类合理错误和修正的第一人称程序性视频，并建立统一的评测标准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PIE-V 框架包含心理学启发的错误规划器、修正规划器、LLM 改写器、LLM 验证器，以及基于文本引导视频生成的片段合成与拼接，用于在干净步骤中注入可控错误和修正。
contributions: 提出 PIE-V 框架，能够为第一人称程序性视频注入心理学上合理的错误和修正。
引入统一的错误分类法和包含九项指标的人工评测标准，用于评估步骤级和程序级质量。
analysis.experiments: 在 17 个任务、50 个 Ego-Exo4D 场景上应用，注入 102 个错误并生成 27 个修正；使用所提评测标准审计现有资源并与自由形式 LLM 基线比较。
limitations: 依赖文本引导视频生成的质量，可能影响视觉真实性。
评测标准依赖人工标注，可能难以大规模扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合心理学和LLM，但应用领域较窄，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 PIE-V 框架，通过注入可控错误和修正来构建和评测第一人称程序性视频中的错误感知能力。

papers.title: SRMU: Relevance-Gated Updates for Streaming Hyperdimensional Memories
papers.abstract: Sequential associative memories (SAMs) are difficult to build and maintain in real-world streaming environments, where observations arrive incrementally over time, have imbalanced sampling, and non-stationary temporal dynamics. Vector Symbolic Architectures (VSAs) provide a biologically-inspired framework for building SAMs. Entities and attributes are encoded as quasi-orthogonal hyperdimensional vectors and processed with well defined algebraic operations. Despite this rich framework, most VSA systems rely on simple additive updates, where repeated observations reinforce existing information even when no new information is introduced. In non-stationary environments, this leads to the persistence of stale information after the underlying system changes. In this work, we introduce the Sequential Relevance Memory Unit (SRMU), a domain- and cleanup-agnostic update rule for VSA-based SAMs. The SRMU combines temporal decay with a relevance gating mechanism. Unlike prior approaches that solely rely on cleanup, the SRMU regulates memory formation by filtering redundant, conflicting, and stale information before storage. We evaluate the SRMU on streaming state-tracking tasks that isolate non-uniform sampling and non-stationary temporal dynamics. Our results show that the SRMU increases memory similarity by $12.6\%$ and reduces cumulative memory magnitude by $53.5\%$. This shows that the SRMU produces more stable memory growth and stronger alignment with the ground-truth state.

analysis.tldr: 提出SRMU，通过相关性门控机制改进超维向量流式记忆更新，减少冗余和过时信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式环境中顺序关联记忆难以构建和维护，现有VSA系统使用简单加法更新，在非平稳环境下会导致过时信息持续存在。
analysis.problem: 解决VSA系统中简单加法更新在非平稳流式环境下引入冗余、冲突和过时信息的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 简单加法更新在非平稳环境中导致过时信息持续存在，重复观测强化已有信息即使无新信息引入。
analysis.method: 提出SRMU，结合时间衰减和相关性门控机制，在存储前过滤冗余、冲突和过时信息。
contributions: 提出领域无关且无需清理的SRMU更新规则。
在流式状态跟踪任务上验证SRMU提升记忆相似性12.6%，减少累积记忆幅度53.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在流式状态跟踪任务上评估，隔离非均匀采样和非平稳时间动态。
limitations: 仅在状态跟踪任务上验证，未在更广泛的应用场景测试。
未讨论门控机制的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但应用范围较窄，实验规模有限，适合对超维计算感兴趣的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SRMU，通过相关性门控机制改进超维向量流式记忆更新，减少冗余和过时信息。

papers.title: Amortized Optimal Transport from Sliced Potentials
papers.abstract: We propose a novel amortized optimization method for predicting optimal transport (OT) plans across multiple pairs of measures by leveraging Kantorovich potentials derived from sliced OT. We introduce two amortization strategies: regression-based amortization (RA-OT) and objective-based amortization (OA-OT). In RA-OT, we formulate a functional regression model that treats Kantorovich potentials from the original OT problem as responses and those obtained from sliced OT as predictors, and estimate these models via least-squares methods. In OA-OT, we estimate the parameters of the functional model by optimizing the Kantorovich dual objective. In both approaches, the predicted OT plan is subsequently recovered from the estimated potentials. As amortized OT methods, both RA-OT and OA-OT enable efficient solutions to repeated OT problems across different measure pairs by reusing information learned from prior instances to rapidly approximate new solutions. Moreover, by exploiting the structure provided by sliced OT, the proposed models are more parsimonious, independent of specific structures of the measures, such as the number of atoms in the discrete case, while achieving high accuracy. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches on tasks including MNIST digit transport, color transfer, supply-demand transportation on spherical data, and mini-batch OT conditional flow matching.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于切片最优传输势函数的摊销最优传输方法，实现跨测度对的高效近似求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 最优传输问题在多个领域有广泛应用，但每次求解不同测度对之间的OT计划计算成本高，需要高效可复用的近似方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效预测多个测度对之间的最优传输计划，避免每次从头求解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种摊销策略：回归式摊销（RA-OT）和基于目标的摊销（OA-OT），利用切片OT得到的Kantorovich势函数作为先验，通过回归或优化目标估计势函数，再恢复传输计划。
contributions: 首次将切片OT势函数用于摊销OT，提出两种高效近似方法。
方法不依赖测度的具体结构（如离散原子数），具有通用性。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST数字传输、颜色迁移、球面供需传输和mini-batch OT条件流匹配等任务上验证有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖切片OT的近似质量。
未讨论高维或复杂测度下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但实验规模有限，适合关注OT加速的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于切片最优传输势函数的摊销最优传输方法，实现跨测度对的高效近似求解。

papers.title: HyperSpace: A Generalized Framework for Spatial Encoding in Hyperdimensional Representations
papers.abstract: Vector Symbolic Architectures (VSAs) provide a well-defined algebraic framework for compositional representations in hyperdimensional spaces. We introduce HyperSpace, an open-source framework that decomposes VSA systems into modular operators for encoding, binding, bundling, similarity, cleanup, and regression. Using HyperSpace, we analyze and benchmark two representative VSA backends: Holographic Reduced Representations (HRR) and Fourier Holographic Reduced Representations (FHRR). Although FHRR provides lower theoretical complexity for individual operations, HyperSpaces modularity reveals that similarity and cleanup dominate runtime in spatial domains. As a result, HRR and FHRR exhibit comparable end-to-end performance. Differences in memory footprint introduce additional deployment trade-offs where HRR requires approximately half the memory of FHRR vectors. By enabling modular, system-level evaluation, HyperSpace reveals practical trade-offs in VSA pipelines that are not apparent from theoretical or operator-level comparisons alone.

analysis.tldr: HyperSpace 是一个模块化框架，用于分析超维向量符号架构（VSA）在空间编码中的实际性能权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: VSA 提供超维空间中的组合表示代数框架，但现有研究多聚焦于理论复杂度，缺乏系统级评估实际性能的工具。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个模块化、可扩展的框架来统一比较不同 VSA 后端在空间编码任务中的端到端性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示，尽管 FHRR 在单操作理论复杂度上更低，但相似度计算和清理操作在空间域中主导运行时间，导致 HRR 和 FHRR 端到端性能相当；HRR 内存占用约为 FHRR 的一半。
analysis.method: HyperSpace 将 VSA 系统分解为编码、绑定、捆绑、相似度、清理和回归等模块化算子，支持不同后端（如 HRR 和 FHRR）的灵活组合与基准测试。
contributions: 提出 HyperSpace，一个开源模块化框架，用于 VSA 系统的系统级评估。
通过基准测试揭示 HRR 和 FHRR 在空间域中的实际性能权衡，包括运行时间和内存占用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及对 HRR 和 FHRR 进行了基准测试，分析了运行时间和内存占用。
limitations: 仅分析了两种 VSA 后端，可能不涵盖所有变体。
空间域之外的性能权衡未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 框架有实用价值，但贡献偏工具性，实验信息有限，与重点方向弱相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyperSpace 是一个模块化框架，用于分析超维向量符号架构（VSA）在空间编码中的实际性能权衡。

papers.title: IUQ: Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification for Long-Form Large Language Model Generation
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), uncertainty quantification in LLM generation is a persistent challenge. Although recent approaches have achieved strong performance by restricting LLMs to produce short or constrained answer sets, many real-world applications require long-form and free-form text generation. A key difficulty in this setting is that LLMs often produce responses that are semantically coherent yet factually inaccurate, while the underlying semantics are multifaceted and the linguistic structure is complex. To tackle this challenge, this paper introduces Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification (IUQ), a novel framework that leverages inter-sample consistency and intra-sample faithfulness to quantify the uncertainty in long-form LLM outputs. By utilizing an interrogate-then-respond paradigm, our method provides reliable measures of claim-level uncertainty and the model's faithfulness. Experimental results across diverse model families and model sizes demonstrate the superior performance of IUQ over two widely used long-form generation datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/louisfanhz/IUQ.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于疑问-回答范式的长文本LLM不确定性量化方法IUQ，利用样本间一致性和样本内忠实度衡量不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法多针对短答案或受限输出，难以处理长文本生成中语义连贯但事实错误的问题。
analysis.problem: 长文本自由生成场景下LLM输出的不确定性量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长文本生成中，LLM常产生语义连贯但事实不准确的响应，且语义多面、语言结构复杂。
analysis.method: 提出Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification (IUQ)框架，采用“提问-回答”范式，结合样本间一致性和样本内忠实度来量化声明级别的不确定性和模型忠实度。
contributions: 提出IUQ框架，有效量化长文本LLM生成的不确定性。
在两个长文本生成数据集上验证了IUQ优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在两个长文本生成数据集上，针对多种模型家族和模型大小进行实验，IUQ优于两种广泛使用的基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖提问模板的设计质量。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对长文本不确定性量化这一重要问题，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于疑问-回答范式的长文本LLM不确定性量化方法IUQ，利用样本间一致性和样本内忠实度衡量不确定性。

papers.title: Beyond Independent Frames: Latent Attention Masked Autoencoders for Multi-View Echocardiography
papers.abstract: Echocardiography is a widely used modality for cardiac assessment due to its non-invasive and cost-effective nature, but the sparse and heterogeneous spatiotemporal views of the heart pose distinct challenges. Existing masked autoencoder (MAE) approaches typically process images or short clips independently, failing to capture the inherent multi-view structure required for coherent cardiac representation. We introduce Latent Attention Masked Autoencoder (LAMAE), a foundation model architecture tailored to the multi-view nature of medical imaging. LAMAE augments the standard MAE with a latent attention module that enables information exchange across frames and views directly in latent space. This allows the model to aggregate variable-length sequences and distinct views, reconstructing a holistic representation of cardiac function from partial observations. We pretrain LAMAE on MIMIC-IV-ECHO, a large-scale, uncurated dataset reflecting real-world clinical variability. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first results for predicting ICD-10 codes from MIMIC-IV-ECHO videos. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that representations learned from adult data transfer effectively to pediatric cohorts despite substantial anatomical differences. These results provide evidence that incorporating structural priors, such as multi-view attention, yields significantly more robust and transferable representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAMAE，通过潜在空间注意力模块实现多视图超声心动图的跨帧/跨视图信息交换，学习更鲁棒的心脏表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 超声心动图因非侵入性和低成本被广泛使用，但心脏视图稀疏且异质，现有MAE方法独立处理图像或短片段，无法捕获多视图结构，导致表征不连贯。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能有效聚合多视图超声心动图中可变长度序列和不同视图信息的基础模型，以学习连贯的心脏功能表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在标准MAE中引入潜在注意力模块，允许在潜在空间中进行跨帧和跨视图的信息交换，从而聚合可变长度序列和不同视图，从部分观测中重建整体心脏表征。
contributions: 提出LAMAE架构，通过潜在注意力模块增强MAE，实现多视图信息融合。
首次在MIMIC-IV-ECHO数据集上展示从超声视频预测ICD-10代码的结果。
证明从成人数据学到的表征可有效迁移到儿科队列，尽管解剖结构差异显著。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV-ECHO数据集上预训练，并评估了ICD-10代码预测任务和跨域迁移（成人到儿科）性能。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模未整理数据，数据质量影响表征学习。
潜在注意力模块的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（潜在注意力模块）且实验验证了迁移能力，与医学图像方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAMAE，通过潜在空间注意力模块实现多视图超声心动图的跨帧/跨视图信息交换，学习更鲁棒的心脏表征。

papers.title: OpenMobile: Building Open Mobile Agents with Task and Trajectory Synthesis
papers.abstract: Mobile agents powered by vision-language models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in automating mobile tasks, with recent leading models achieving a marked performance leap, e.g., nearly 70% success on AndroidWorld. However, these systems keep their training data closed and remain opaque about their task and trajectory synthesis recipes. We present OpenMobile, an open-source framework that synthesizes high-quality task instructions and agent trajectories, with two key components: (1) The first is a scalable task synthesis pipeline that constructs a global environment memory from exploration, then leverages it to generate diverse and grounded instructions. and (2) a policy-switching strategy for trajectory rollout. By alternating between learner and expert models, it captures essential error-recovery data often missing in standard imitation learning. Agents trained on our data achieve competitive results across three dynamic mobile agent benchmarks: notably, our fine-tuned Qwen2.5-VL and Qwen3-VL reach 51.7% and 64.7% on AndroidWorld, far surpassing existing open-data approaches. Furthermore, we conduct transparent analyses on the overlap between our synthetic instructions and benchmark test sets, and verify that performance gains stem from broad functionality coverage rather than benchmark overfitting. We release data and code at https://njucckevin.github.io/openmobile/ to bridge the data gap and facilitate broader mobile agent research.

analysis.tldr: OpenMobile 提出开源框架，通过任务合成与策略切换轨迹生成高质量移动 Agent 训练数据，在 AndroidWorld 上达到 64.7% 成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有移动 Agent 系统虽性能优异，但训练数据封闭且合成方法不透明，阻碍了可复现研究和社区发展。
analysis.problem: 如何开源、可复现地合成高质量移动任务指令与 Agent 轨迹数据，以弥合数据鸿沟并提升移动 Agent 性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 OpenMobile 框架，包含两个关键组件：(1) 可扩展的任务合成流水线，通过探索构建全局环境记忆并生成多样化指令；(2) 策略切换轨迹生成策略，交替使用学习器和专家模型以捕获标准模仿学习中缺失的错误恢复数据。
contributions: 提出开源移动 Agent 框架 OpenMobile，包含任务合成流水线和策略切换轨迹生成方法。
在 AndroidWorld 等三个动态移动 Agent 基准上取得领先结果，Qwen3-VL 达到 64.7% 成功率。
透明分析合成指令与基准测试集的重叠，验证性能提升源于广泛功能覆盖而非过拟合。
analysis.experiments: 在三个动态移动 Agent 基准上评估，Qwen2.5-VL 和 Qwen3-VL 在 AndroidWorld 上分别达到 51.7% 和 64.7%，远超现有开源方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 Android 平台，未提及跨平台泛化。
策略切换方法依赖专家模型，可能增加计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 开源框架解决移动 Agent 数据封闭问题，方法创新且实验充分，与 VLM 应用高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OpenMobile 提出开源框架，通过任务合成与策略切换轨迹生成高质量移动 Agent 训练数据，在 AndroidWorld 上达到 64.7% 成功率。

papers.title: Beyond Visual Cues: Semantic-Driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing for Anytime Person ReID
papers.abstract: Any-Time Person Re-identification (AT-ReID) necessitates the robust retrieval of target individuals under arbitrary conditions, encompassing both modality shifts (daytime and nighttime) and extensive clothing-change scenarios, ranging from short-term to long-term intervals. However, existing methods are highly relying on pure visual features, which are prone to change due to environmental and time factors, resulting in significantly performance deterioration under scenarios involving illumination caused modality shifts or cloth-change. In this paper, we propose Semantic-driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing (STFER), a novel framework that leverages the ability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) to generate identity consistency text, which provides identity-discriminative features that are robust to both clothing variations and cross-modality shifts between RGB and IR. Specifically, we employ instructions to guide the LVLM in generating identity-intrinsic semantic text that captures biometric constants for the semantic model driven. The text token is further used for Semantic-driven Visual Token Filtering (SVTF), which enhances informative visual regions and suppresses redundant background noise. Meanwhile, the text token is also used for Semantic-driven Expert Routing (SER), which integrates the semantic text into expert routing, resulting in more robust multi-scenario gating. Extensive experiments on the Any-Time ReID dataset (AT-USTC) demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art results. Moreover, the model trained on AT-USTC was evaluated across 5 widely-used ReID benchmarks demonstrating superior generalization capabilities with highly competitive results. Our code will be available soon.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义驱动的令牌过滤与专家路由框架，利用LVLM生成身份一致文本提升任意时刻行人重识别的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖纯视觉特征，在光照变化、模态转换（RGB/IR）和换衣场景下性能显著下降，亟需引入语义信息增强特征鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 任意时刻行人重识别中，视觉特征易受环境（光照、模态）和时间（换衣）因素干扰，导致检索性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯视觉特征在光照引起的模态转换或换衣场景下表现不佳，而身份一致的语义文本（如生物特征）对这些变化具有鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 利用LVLM生成身份内在语义文本，通过语义驱动视觉令牌过滤（SVTF）增强信息区域、抑制背景噪声，并通过语义驱动专家路由（SER）实现多场景自适应门控。
contributions: 提出STFER框架，首次将LVLM生成的语义文本用于任意时刻行人重识别，提升跨模态和换衣场景的鲁棒性。
设计语义驱动视觉令牌过滤（SVTF）和语义驱动专家路由（SER）两个模块，有效融合语义与视觉特征。
analysis.experiments: 在AT-USTC数据集上达到SOTA，并在5个广泛使用的ReID基准上验证了强泛化能力。
limitations: 依赖LVLM的生成质量，可能受限于模型能力或指令设计。
仅针对行人重识别任务，未验证在其他视觉任务中的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合LVLM与专家路由解决ReID痛点，实验充分且泛化性好，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义驱动的令牌过滤与专家路由框架，利用LVLM生成身份一致文本提升任意时刻行人重识别的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Building Extraction from Remote Sensing Imagery under Hazy and Low-light Conditions: Benchmark and Baseline
papers.abstract: Building extraction from optical Remote Sensing (RS) imagery suffers from performance degradation under real-world hazy and low-light conditions. However, existing optical methods and benchmarks focus primarily on ideal clear-weather conditions. While SAR offers all-weather sensing, its side-looking geometry causes geometric distortions. To address these challenges, we introduce HaLoBuilding, the first optical benchmark specifically designed for building extraction under hazy and low-light conditions. By leveraging a same-scene multitemporal pairing strategy, we ensure pixel-level label alignment and high fidelity even under extreme degradation. Building upon this benchmark, we propose HaLoBuild-Net, a novel end-to-end framework for building extraction in adverse RS scenarios. At its core, we develop a Spatial-Frequency Focus Module (SFFM) to effectively mitigate meteorological interference on building features by coupling large receptive field attention with frequency-aware channel reweighting guided by stable low-frequency anchors. Additionally, a Global Multi-scale Guidance Module (GMGM) provides global semantic constraints to anchor building topologies, while a Mutual-Guided Fusion Module (MGFM) implements bidirectional semantic-spatial calibration to suppress shallow noise and sharpen weather-induced blurred boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HaLoBuild-Net significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods and conventional cascaded restoration-segmentation paradigms on the HaLoBuilding dataset, while maintaining robust generalization on WHU, INRIA, and LoveDA datasets. The source code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/HaLoBuilding.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向雾霾和低光遥感建筑提取的基准与基线方法，提出HaLoBuild-Net通过空间-频率聚焦模块等设计显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有光学遥感建筑提取方法主要针对理想晴朗天气，在真实雾霾和低光条件下性能严重下降；SAR虽可全天候成像但存在几何畸变，亟需针对恶劣光照条件的专用基准和方法。
analysis.problem: 解决光学遥感图像在雾霾和低光条件下建筑提取性能退化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HaLoBuild-Net端到端框架，包含三个核心模块：空间-频率聚焦模块（SFFM）通过大感受野注意力与频率感知通道重加权抑制气象干扰；全局多尺度引导模块（GMGM）提供全局语义约束锚定建筑拓扑；互导融合模块（MGFM）实现双向语义-空间校准以抑制浅层噪声并锐化模糊边界。
contributions: 构建首个面向雾霾和低光条件的建筑提取基准HaLoBuilding，采用同场景多时相配对策略确保像素级标签对齐和高保真度。
提出HaLoBuild-Net框架，在恶劣遥感场景下显著优于现有方法和级联恢复-分割范式。
analysis.experiments: 在HaLoBuilding数据集上对比多种SOTA方法和级联范式，并在WHU、INRIA、LoveDA数据集上验证泛化性，均取得显著提升。
limitations: 可能对极端雾霾或低光条件仍存在性能瓶颈。
多时相配对策略依赖同一场景的多时相影像，数据获取成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 首个针对雾霾低光条件的遥感建筑提取基准，方法设计新颖且实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向雾霾和低光遥感建筑提取的基准与基线方法，提出HaLoBuild-Net通过空间-频率聚焦模块等设计显著提升性能。

papers.title: ControlFoley: Unified and Controllable Video-to-Audio Generation with Cross-Modal Conflict Handling
papers.abstract: Recent advances in video-to-audio (V2A) generation enable high-quality audio synthesis from visual content, yet achieving robust and fine-grained controllability remains challenging. Existing methods suffer from weak textual controllability under visual-text conflict and imprecise stylistic control due to entangled temporal and timbre information in reference audio. Moreover, the lack of standardized benchmarks limits systematic evaluation. We propose ControlFoley, a unified multimodal V2A framework that enables precise control over video, text, and reference audio. We introduce a joint visual encoding paradigm that integrates CLIP with a spatio-temporal audio-visual encoder to improve alignment and textual controllability. We further propose temporal-timbre decoupling to suppress redundant temporal cues while preserving discriminative timbre features. In addition, we design a modality-robust training scheme with unified multimodal representation alignment (REPA) and random modality dropout. We also present VGGSound-TVC, a benchmark for evaluating textual controllability under varying degrees of visual-text conflict. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across multiple V2A tasks, including text-guided, text-controlled, and audio-controlled generation. ControlFoley achieves superior controllability under cross-modal conflict while maintaining strong synchronization and audio quality, and shows competitive or better performance compared to an industrial V2A system. Code, models, datasets, and demos are available at: https://yjx-research.github.io/ControlFoley/.

analysis.tldr: ControlFoley 提出统一可控的视频到音频生成框架，通过跨模态冲突处理实现文本、视频和参考音频的精细控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频到音频生成方法在视觉-文本冲突下文本可控性弱，且参考音频中时间与音色信息纠缠导致风格控制不精确，同时缺乏标准化基准。
analysis.problem: 实现鲁棒且细粒度的可控视频到音频生成，特别是处理跨模态冲突和时序-音色解耦。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视觉-文本冲突会削弱文本可控性，参考音频中时间与音色信息纠缠导致风格控制不精确。
analysis.method: 提出 ControlFoley 框架，包括联合视觉编码（CLIP + 时空音视频编码器）、时序-音色解耦、模态鲁棒训练（统一多模态表征对齐和随机模态丢弃），以及 VGGSound-TVC 基准。
contributions: 提出统一多模态 V2A 框架 ControlFoley，支持视频、文本和参考音频的精细控制。
提出时序-音色解耦方法，抑制冗余时间线索同时保留判别性音色特征。
设计模态鲁棒训练方案，包括统一多模态表征对齐和随机模态丢弃。
构建 VGGSound-TVC 基准，用于评估不同程度视觉-文本冲突下的文本可控性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 V2A 任务（文本引导、文本控制、音频控制）上达到最先进性能，与工业级 V2A 系统相比具有竞争力或更好性能，代码、模型、数据集和演示已公开。
limitations: 可能对极端视觉-文本冲突场景的泛化能力有限。
时序-音色解耦可能在某些复杂音频场景下引入信息损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，开源资源丰富，与视频生成和音频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ControlFoley 提出统一可控的视频到音频生成框架，通过跨模态冲突处理实现文本、视频和参考音频的精细控制。

papers.title: Autonomous Evolution of EDA Tools: Multi-Agent Self-Evolved ABC
papers.abstract: This paper introduces the first \emph{self-evolving} logic synthesis framework, which leverages Large Language Model (LLM) agents to autonomously improve the source code of \textsc{ABC}, the widely adopted logic synthesis system. Our framework operates on the \emph{entire integrated ABC codebase}, and the output repository preserves its single-binary execution model and command interface. In the initial evolution cycle, we bootstrap the system using existing prior open-source synthesis components, covering flow tuning, logic minimization, and technology mapping, but without manually injecting new heuristics. On top of this foundation, a team of LLM-based agents iteratively rewrites and evolves specific sub-components of ABC following our ``programming guidance`` prompts under a unified correctness and QoR-driven evaluation loop. Each evolution cycle proposes code modifications, compiles the integrated binary, validates correctness, and evaluates quality-of-results (QoR) on \emph{multi-suite benchmarks including ISCAS~85/89/99, VTR, EPFL, and IWLS~2005}. Through continuous feedback, the system discovers optimizations beyond human-designed heuristics, effectively \emph{learning new synthesis strategies} that enhance QoR. We detail the architecture of this self-improving system, its integration with \textsc{ABC}, and results demonstrating that the framework can autonomously and progressively improve EDA tool at full million-line scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个自进化逻辑综合框架，利用多LLM智能体自主改进ABC工具源码，在百万行代码规模上持续提升QoR。
analysis.research_motivation: EDA工具（如ABC）的优化依赖人工启发式，缺乏自动持续改进机制，而LLM智能体具备代码生成与迭代能力，有望实现工具自主进化。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体在完整ABC代码库上自主进行逻辑综合优化，并保证正确性和QoR提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多LLM智能体框架：基于现有开源综合组件引导初始循环，智能体团队在统一正确性与QoR评估循环下，按编程指导提示迭代重写ABC子组件，每次循环提出代码修改、编译、验证正确性并评估QoR。
contributions: 首个自进化逻辑综合框架，实现LLM智能体对完整ABC代码库的自主改进
提出统一正确性与QoR驱动的评估循环，支持多套基准测试集
证明框架能自主发现超越人工设计的优化策略，在百万行规模上持续提升QoR
analysis.experiments: 在ISCAS 85/89/99、VTR、EPFL、IWLS 2005等多套基准上评估QoR，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖初始引导组件的质量
进化周期计算成本较高
未讨论跨工具泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 创新性高（首个自进化EDA框架），技术实现复杂，与LLM Agent方向强相关，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。

papers.title: Where are the Humans? A Scoping Review of Fairness in Multi-agent AI Systems
papers.abstract: Rapid advances in Generative AI are giving rise to increasingly sophisticated Multi-Agent AI (MAAI) systems. While AI fairness has been extensively studied in traditional predictive scenarios, its examination in MAAI remains nascent and fragmented. This scoping review critically synthesizes existing research on fairness in MAAI systems. Through a qualitative content analysis of 23 selected studies, we identify five archetypal approaches. Our findings reveal that fairness in MAAI systems is often addressed superficially, lacks robust normative foundations, and frequently overlooks the complex dynamics introduced by agent autonomy and system-level interactions. We argue that fairness must be embedded structurally throughout the development lifecycle of MAAI, rather than appended as a post-hoc consideration. Meaningful evaluation requires explicit human oversight, normative clarity, and a precise articulation of fairness objectives and beneficiaries. This review provides a foundation for advancing fairness research in MAAI systems by highlighting critical gaps, exposing prevailing limitations, and suggesting pathways.

analysis.tldr: 对多智能体AI系统公平性的范围综述，发现现有研究表面化、缺乏规范基础，并忽视智能体自主性和系统交互的复杂动态。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展催生了多智能体AI系统，但公平性研究在传统预测场景中已广泛开展，而在多智能体系统中仍处于初期且零散状态，缺乏系统性梳理。
analysis.problem: 多智能体AI系统中的公平性研究存在哪些关键缺口和局限性，以及如何系统性地推进该领域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过对23项研究的定性内容分析，识别出五种典型方法，发现公平性处理往往表面化、缺乏稳健的规范基础，且常忽略智能体自主性和系统级交互带来的复杂动态。
analysis.method: 采用范围综述方法，通过定性内容分析对23项选定研究进行综合，识别出五种典型公平性方法。
contributions: 系统梳理了多智能体AI系统公平性研究的现状，识别出五种典型方法。
揭示了现有研究的关键缺口和局限性，包括表面化处理、缺乏规范基础、忽略智能体自主性和系统交互动态。
提出了将公平性嵌入开发全生命周期、需要明确人类监督和规范清晰度的建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于23项研究，可能未覆盖所有相关文献。
综述性质，未提出新的算法或实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 综述性工作，对多智能体公平性领域有梳理价值，但缺乏技术深度和实验验证，适合了解现状。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对多智能体AI系统公平性的范围综述，发现现有研究表面化、缺乏规范基础，并忽视智能体自主性和系统交互的复杂动态。

papers.title: NEAT-NC: NEAT guided Navigation Cells for Robot Path Planning
papers.abstract: To navigate a space, the brain makes an internal representation of the environment using different cells such as place cells, grid cells, head direction cells, border cells, and speed cells. All these cells, along with sensory inputs, enable an organism to explore the space around it. Inspired by these biological principles, we developed NEATNC, a Neuro-Evolution of Augmenting Topology guided Navigation Cells. The goal of the paper is to improve NEAT algorithm performance in path planning in dynamic environments using spatial cognitive cells. This approach uses navigation cells as inputs and evolves recurrent neural networks, representing the hippocampus part of the brain. The performance of the proposed algorithm is evaluated in different static and dynamic scenarios. This study highlights NEAT's adaptability to complex and different environments, showcasing the utility of biological theories. This suggests that our approach is well-suited for real-time dynamic path planning for robotics and games.

analysis.tldr: 受生物导航细胞启发，提出NEAT-NC算法，通过进化拓扑增强的循环神经网络实现机器人动态路径规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统路径规划算法在动态环境中适应性不足，而生物大脑利用多种导航细胞高效导航，启发研究者将神经科学与进化计算结合以提升机器人路径规划的鲁棒性和实时性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生物启发的导航细胞（如位置细胞、网格细胞）改进NEAT算法在动态环境中的路径规划性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NEAT-NC框架，将导航细胞（位置细胞、网格细胞、头方向细胞等）作为输入，通过神经进化（NEAT）进化循环神经网络（模拟海马体），实现动态环境中的路径规划。
contributions: 首次将多种导航细胞作为NEAT的输入特征，增强环境表征能力。
在静态和动态场景中验证了NEAT-NC的适应性，证明其适用于实时机器人路径规划。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖仿真环境，真实机器人部署效果未验证。
