analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法有生物启发新颖性，但摘要缺乏实验细节，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受生物导航细胞启发，提出NEAT-NC算法，通过进化拓扑增强的循环神经网络实现机器人动态路径规划。

papers.title: Learning Where to Embed: Noise-Aware Positional Embedding for Query Retrieval in Small-Object Detection
papers.abstract: Transformer-based detectors have advanced small-object detection, but they often remain inefficient and vulnerable to background-induced query noise, which motivates deep decoders to refine low-quality queries. We present HELP (Heatmap-guided Embedding Learning Paradigm), a noise-aware positional-semantic fusion framework that studies where to embed positional information by selectively preserving positional encodings in foreground-salient regions while suppressing background clutter. Within HELP, we introduce Heatmap-guided Positional Embedding (HPE) as the core embedding mechanism and visualize it with a heatbar for interpretable diagnosis and fine-tuning. HPE is integrated into both the encoder and decoder: it guides noise-suppressed feature encoding by injecting heatmap-aware positional encoding, and it enables high-quality query retrieval by filtering background-dominant embeddings via a gradient-based mask filter before decoding. To address feature sparsity in complex small targets, we integrate Linear-Snake Convolution to enrich retrieval-relevant representations. The gradient-based heatmap supervision is used during training only, incurring no additional gradient computation at inference. As a result, our design reduces decoder layers from eight to three and achieves a 59.4% parameter reduction (66.3M vs. 163M) while maintaining consistent accuracy gains under a reduced compute budget across benchmarks. Code Repository: https://github.com/yidimopozhibai/Noise-Suppressed-Query-Retrieval

analysis.tldr: 提出噪声感知位置嵌入框架HELP，通过热图引导选择性保留前景位置编码，减少解码器层数并大幅降低参数量，实现小目标检测中的高效查询检索。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer检测器在小目标检测中易受背景噪声干扰，导致查询质量低，需要深层解码器来优化，但计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在小目标检测中抑制背景噪声对位置编码的干扰，实现高效且准确的查询检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 背景噪声导致查询嵌入质量下降，需要深层解码器（如八层）来补偿，但参数冗余。
analysis.method: 提出HELP框架，核心是热图引导位置嵌入（HPE），在编码器中注入热图感知位置编码抑制噪声，在解码器前通过梯度掩码过滤背景主导嵌入；并集成线性蛇形卷积丰富检索相关表示。
contributions: 提出噪声感知位置语义融合框架HELP，通过热图引导选择性保留前景位置编码。
设计热图引导位置嵌入（HPE）和梯度掩码过滤器，实现高效查询检索。
集成线性蛇形卷积解决小目标特征稀疏问题。
在减少解码器层数（8→3）和59.4%参数缩减下保持精度提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上验证，解码器从八层减至三层，参数量从163M降至66.3M，精度一致提升。
limitations: 热图监督仅在训练时使用，但可能对热图质量敏感。
方法在极稀疏小目标场景下的泛化性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，显著降低计算成本且保持精度，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出噪声感知位置嵌入框架HELP，通过热图引导选择性保留前景位置编码，减少解码器层数并大幅降低参数量，实现小目标检测中的高效查询检索。

papers.title: No More Guessing: a Verifiable Gradient Inversion Attack in Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Gradient inversion attacks threaten client privacy in federated learning by reconstructing training samples from clients' shared gradients. Gradients aggregate contributions from multiple records and existing attacks may fail to disentangle them, yielding incorrect reconstructions with no intrinsic way to certify success. In vision and language, attackers may fall back on human inspection to judge reconstruction plausibility, but this is far less feasible for numerical tabular records, fueling the impression that tabular data is less vulnerable. We challenge this perception by proposing a verifiable gradient inversion attack (VGIA) that provides an explicit certificate of correctness for reconstructed samples. Our method adopts a geometric view of ReLU leakage: the activation boundary of a fully connected layer defines a hyperplane in input space. VGIA introduces an algebraic, subspace-based verification test that detects when a hyperplane-delimited region contains exactly one record. Once isolation is certified, VGIA recovers the corresponding feature vector analytically and reconstructs the target via a lightweight optimization step. Experiments on tabular benchmarks with large batch sizes demonstrate exact record and target recovery in regimes where existing state-of-the-art attacks either fail or cannot assess reconstruction fidelity. Compared to prior geometric approaches, VGIA allocates hyperplane queries more effectively, yielding faster reconstructions with fewer attack rounds.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可验证的梯度反转攻击，通过ReLU激活边界的几何特性实现表格数据的精确重建并给出正确性证明。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有梯度反转攻击无法验证重建样本的正确性，依赖人工检查，对表格数据不适用，导致认为表格数据更安全的错误认知。
analysis.problem: 如何实现可验证的梯度反转攻击，在联邦学习中从共享梯度精确重建表格训练样本并证明重建正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于ReLU全连接层激活边界的几何视角，提出子空间验证测试检测超平面区域是否包含唯一记录，然后解析恢复特征向量并通过轻量优化重建目标。
contributions: 提出首个可验证的梯度反转攻击VGIA，提供重建样本的正确性证明。
引入基于子空间的代数验证测试，有效检测记录隔离状态。
在表格基准上实现精确重建，优于现有攻击且攻击轮次更少。
analysis.experiments: 在表格基准数据集上使用大批量进行实验，结果表明VGIA在现有攻击失败或无法评估重建保真度的场景下实现了精确的记录和目标恢复。
limitations: 方法依赖于ReLU激活函数，可能不适用于其他激活函数。
验证测试仅适用于全连接层，对卷积层等架构需扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，有理论验证，但应用场景较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可验证的梯度反转攻击，通过ReLU激活边界的几何特性实现表格数据的精确重建并给出正确性证明。

papers.title: Attention-Gated Convolutional Networks for Scanner-Agnostic Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: Motion artifacts present a significant challenge in structural MRI (sMRI), often compromising clinical diagnostics and large-scale automated analysis. While manual quality control (QC) remains the gold standard, it is increasingly unscalable for massive longitudinal studies. To address this, we propose a hybrid CNN-Attention framework designed for robust, site-invariant MRI quality assessment. Our architecture integrates a hierarchical 2D CNN encoder for local spatial feature extraction with a multi-head cross-attention mechanism to model global dependencies. This synergy enables the model to prioritize motion relevant artifact signatures, such as ringing and blurring, while dynamically filtering out site-specific intensity variations and background noise. The framework was trained end-to-end on the MR-ART dataset using a balanced cohort of 200 subjects. Performance was evaluated across two tiers: Seen Site Evaluation on a held-out MR-ART partition and Unseen Site Evaluation using 200 subjects from 17 heterogeneous sites in the ABIDE archive. On seen sites, the model achieved a scan-level accuracy of 0.9920 and an F1-score of 0.9919. Crucially, it maintained strong generalization across unseen ABIDE sites (Acc = 0.755) without any retraining or fine-tuning, demonstrating high resilience to domain shift. These results indicate that attention-based feature re-weighting successfully captures universal artifact descriptors, bridging the performance gap between diverse imaging environments and scanner manufacturers.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合CNN-注意力框架实现跨站点MRI质量评估，在未见站点上保持高泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 运动伪影严重影响结构MRI的临床诊断和大规模自动化分析，而人工质量控制难以扩展到大规模纵向研究，亟需自动化、跨站点鲁棒的质量评估方法。
analysis.problem: 现有MRI质量评估方法对站点间差异（如强度变化、噪声）敏感，难以泛化到未见过的扫描仪或成像环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合CNN-注意力框架：使用分层2D CNN编码器提取局部空间特征，结合多头交叉注意力机制建模全局依赖，通过注意力重新加权优先捕获运动伪影特征（如振铃、模糊），同时动态过滤站点特异性变化和背景噪声。
contributions: 提出一种结合CNN和注意力机制的混合架构，用于跨站点MRI质量评估。
在MR-ART数据集上训练，并在ABIDE的17个异构站点上验证了强大的域泛化能力（未见站点准确率0.755）。
analysis.experiments: 在MR-ART数据集（200名受试者）上训练，在MR-ART保留集（已知站点）上达到扫描级准确率0.9920、F1分数0.9919；在ABIDE数据集（17个站点，200名受试者）上无需微调即达到准确率0.755。
limitations: 未见站点准确率（0.755）仍有提升空间。
仅评估了结构MRI，未涉及其他模态（如fMRI、DTI）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合CNN和注意力机制解决跨站点MRI质量评估，实验显示良好泛化性，但未见站点准确率中等，适合关注医学图像质量控制的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合CNN-注意力框架实现跨站点MRI质量评估，在未见站点上保持高泛化性。

papers.title: Implicit Neural Representations: A Signal Processing Perspective
papers.abstract: Implicit neural representations (INRs) mark a fundamental shift in signal modeling, moving from discrete sampled data to continuous functional representations. By parameterizing signals as neural networks, INRs provide a unified framework for representing images, audio, video, 3D geometry, and beyond as continuous functions of their coordinates. This functional viewpoint enables signal operations such as differentiation to be carried out analytically through automatic differentiation rather than through discrete approximations. In this article, we examine the evolution of INRs from a signal processing perspective, emphasizing spectral behavior, sampling theory, and multiscale representation. We trace the progression from standard coordinate based networks, which exhibit a spectral bias toward low frequency components, to more advanced designs that reshape the approximation space through specialized activations, including periodic, localized, and adaptive functions. We also discuss structured representations, such as hierarchical decompositions and hash grid encodings, that improve spatial adaptivity and computational efficiency. We further highlight the utility of INRs across a broad range of applications, including inverse problems in medical and radar imaging, compression, and 3D scene representation. By interpreting INRs as learned signal models whose approximation spaces adapt to the underlying data, this article clarifies the field's core conceptual developments and outlines open challenges in theoretical stability, weight space interpretability, and large scale generalization.

analysis.tldr: 从信号处理视角综述隐式神经表示，分析其频谱行为、采样理论与多尺度表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统离散信号表示存在分辨率限制和操作不便，隐式神经表示通过神经网络参数化连续函数，为多种信号提供统一框架，但其频谱偏差和设计原理尚需系统梳理。
analysis.problem: 如何从信号处理角度理解隐式神经表示的频谱特性、采样理论及多尺度表示能力，并总结其设计演进与开放挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准坐标网络存在低频偏好（频谱偏差），而周期性、局部化等激活函数可重塑逼近空间；层次分解和哈希网格编码提升空间适应性与计算效率。
analysis.method: 从信号处理视角综述INR，涵盖频谱行为、采样理论、多尺度表示，并分类讨论激活函数设计（周期、局部、自适应）与结构化表示（层次分解、哈希网格）。
contributions: 系统梳理了隐式神经表示从标准坐标网络到高级设计的演进，强调频谱偏差与激活函数的作用。
从信号处理角度统一了图像、音频、视频、3D几何等模态的表示，并指出理论稳定性、权重空间可解释性等开放挑战。

papers.title: CoGrid & the Multi-User Gymnasium: A Framework for Multi-Agent Experimentation
papers.abstract: The increasing integration of artificial intelligence (AI) in everyday life brings with it new challenges and questions for regarding how humans interact with autonomous agents. Multi-agent experiments, where humans and AI act together, can offer important opportunities to study social decision making, but there is a lack of accessible tooling available to researchers to run such experiments. We introduce two tools designed to reduce these barriers. The first, CoGrid, is a multi-agent grid-based simulation library with dual NumPy and JAX backends. The second, Multi-User Gymnasium (MUG), translates such simulation environments directly into interactive web-based experiments. MUG supports interactions with arbitrary numbers of humans and AI, utilizing either server-authoritative or peer-to-peer networking with rollback netcode to account for latency. Together, these tools can enable researchers to deploy studies of human-AI interaction, facilitating inquiry into core questions of psychology, cognition, and decision making and their relationship to human-AI interaction. Both tools are open source and available to the broader research community. Documentation and source code is available at {cogrid, multi-user-gymnasium}.readthedocs.io. This paper details the functionality of these tools and presents several case studies to illustrate their utility in human-AI multi-agent experimentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoGrid和MUG两个开源工具，降低人类-AI多智能体实验门槛。

papers.title: When Fairness Metrics Disagree: Evaluating the Reliability of Demographic Fairness Assessment in Machine Learning
papers.abstract: The evaluation of fairness in machine learning systems has become a central concern in high-stakes applications, including biometric recognition, healthcare decision-making, and automated risk assessment. Existing approaches typically rely on a small number of fairness metrics to assess model behaviour across group partitions, implicitly assuming that these metrics provide consistent and reliable conclusions. However, different fairness metrics capture distinct statistical properties of model performance and may therefore produce conflicting assessments when applied to the same system. In this work, we investigate the consistency of fairness evaluation by conducting a systematic multi-metric analysis of demographic bias in machine learning models. Using face recognition as a controlled experimental setting, we evaluate model performance across multiple group partitions under a range of commonly used fairness metrics, including error-rate disparities and performance-based measures. Our results demonstrate that fairness assessments can vary significantly depending on the choice of metrics, leading to contradictory conclusions regarding model bias. To quantify this phenomenon, we introduce the Fairness Disagreement Index (FDI), a measure designed to capture the degree of inconsistency across fairness metrics. We further show that disagreement remains high across thresholds and model configurations. These findings highlight a critical limitation in current fairness evaluation practices and suggest that single-metric reporting is insufficient for reliable bias assessment.

analysis.tldr: 不同公平性指标可能对同一模型给出矛盾结论，单一指标评估不可靠。

papers.title: From Reactive to Proactive: Assessing the Proactivity of Voice Agents via ProVoice-Bench
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in LLM agents are gradually shifting from reactive, text-based paradigms toward proactive, multimodal interaction. However, existing benchmarks primarily focus on reactive responses, overlooking the complexities of proactive intervention and monitoring. To bridge this gap, we introduce ProVoice-Bench, the first evaluation framework specifically designed for proactive voice agents, featuring four novel tasks. By leveraging a multi-stage data synthesis pipeline, we curate 1,182 high-quality samples for rigorous testing. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art Multimodal LLMs reveals a significant performance gap, particularly regarding over-triggering and reasoning capabilities. These findings highlight the limitations of current models and offer a roadmap for developing more natural, context-aware proactive agents.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估语音助手主动性的基准ProVoice-Bench，揭示多模态大模型在主动干预和推理上的显著不足。

papers.title: Autogenesis: A Self-Evolving Agent Protocol
papers.abstract: Recent advances in LLM based agent systems have shown promise in tackling complex, long horizon tasks. However, existing agent protocols (e.g., A2A and MCP) under specify cross entity lifecycle and context management, version tracking, and evolution safe update interfaces, which encourages monolithic compositions and brittle glue code. We introduce Autogenesis Protocol (AGP), a self evolution protocol that decouples what evolves from how evolution occurs. Its Resource Substrate Protocol Layer (RSPL) models prompts, agents, tools, environments, and memory as protocol registered resources with explicit state, lifecycle, and versioned interfaces. Its Self Evolution Protocol Layer (SEPL) specifies a closed loop operator interface for proposing, assessing, and committing improvements with auditable lineage and rollback. Building on AGP, we present Autogenesis System (AGS), a self-evolving multi-agent system that dynamically instantiates, retrieves, and refines protocol-registered resources during execution. We evaluate AGS on multiple challenging benchmarks that require long horizon planning and tool use across heterogeneous resources. The results demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, supporting the effectiveness of agent resource management and closed loop self evolution. The code is available at https://github.com/DVampire/Autogenesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自演化智能体协议AGP，通过解耦演化内容与方式实现多智能体系统的动态资源管理与闭环改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体协议（如A2A和MCP）在跨实体生命周期管理、版本追踪和演化安全更新接口方面规范不足，导致系统脆弱且难以扩展。

papers.title: Quality-Aware Calibration for AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild
papers.abstract: Significant progress has been made in detecting synthetic images, however most existing approaches operate on a single image instance and overlook a key characteristic of real-world dissemination: as viral images circulate on the web, multiple near-duplicate versions appear and lose quality due to repeated operations like recompression, resizing and cropping. As a consequence, the same image may yield inconsistent forensic predictions based on which version has been analyzed. In this work, to address this issue we propose QuAD (Quality-Aware calibration with near-Duplicates) a novel framework that makes decisions based on all available near-duplicates of the same image. Given a query, we retrieve its online near-duplicates and feed them to a detector: the resulting scores are then aggregated based on the estimated quality of the corresponding instance. By doing so, we take advantage of all pieces of information while accounting for the reduced reliability of images impaired by multiple processing steps. To support large-scale evaluation, we introduce two datasets: AncesTree, an in-lab dataset of 136k images organized in stochastic degradation trees that simulate online reposting dynamics, and ReWIND, a real-world dataset of nearly 10k near-duplicate images collected from viral web content. Experiments on several state-of-the-art detectors show that our quality-aware fusion improves their performance consistently, with an average gain of around 8% in terms of balanced accuracy compared to plain average. Our results highlight the importance of jointly processing all the images available online to achieve reliable detection of AI-generated content in real-world applications. Code and data are publicly available at https://grip-unina.github.io/QuAD/

analysis.tldr: 提出质量感知校准框架QuAD，利用在线近重复图像提升AI生成图像检测的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测方法仅处理单张图像，忽略了真实传播中图像因重复压缩、缩放等操作产生多个质量下降的近重复版本，导致同一图像的不同版本检测结果不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何利用在线传播中同一图像的所有近重复版本，并考虑其质量差异，实现鲁棒的AI生成图像检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实传播中，同一图像因多次操作（如重压缩、缩放、裁剪）产生多个质量下降的近重复版本，导致单张图像检测结果不一致。
analysis.method: 提出QuAD框架：给定查询图像，检索其在线近重复版本，用检测器获取每个版本的分数，然后根据估计的图像质量加权聚合分数，质量越低权重越小。
contributions: 提出QuAD框架，利用近重复图像的质量感知融合提升检测鲁棒性。
构建两个数据集：AncesTree（13.6万张模拟在线传播的随机退化树图像）和ReWIND（近1万张真实网络病毒传播的近重复图像）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个SOTA检测器上实验，质量感知融合相比简单平均在平衡准确率上平均提升约8%。
limitations: 依赖近重复图像的检索质量，若检索不到足够近重复则效果受限。
质量估计方法可能对某些退化类型不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用近重复图像提升检测鲁棒性，实验充分且开源，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出质量感知校准框架QuAD，利用在线近重复图像提升AI生成图像检测的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Route to Rome Attack: Directing LLM Routers to Expensive Models via Adversarial Suffix Optimization
papers.abstract: Cost-aware routing dynamically dispatches user queries to models of varying capability to balance performance and inference cost. However, the routing strategy introduces a new security concern that adversaries may manipulate the router to consistently select expensive high-capability models. Existing routing attacks depend on either white-box access or heuristic prompts, rendering them ineffective in real-world black-box scenarios. In this work, we propose R$^2$A, which aims to mislead black-box LLM routers to expensive models via adversarial suffix optimization. Specifically, R$^2$A deploys a hybrid ensemble surrogate router to mimic the black-box router. A suffix optimization algorithm is further adapted for the ensemble-based surrogate. Extensive experiments on multiple open-source and commercial routing systems demonstrate that {R$^2$A} significantly increases the routing rate to expensive models on queries of different distributions. Code and examples: https://github.com/thcxiker/R2A-Attack.

analysis.tldr: 提出R²A攻击，通过对抗后缀优化欺骗黑盒LLM路由器选择昂贵模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 成本感知路由在平衡性能和推理成本时引入了新的安全风险，现有攻击方法依赖白盒访问或启发式提示，在黑盒场景下无效。
analysis.problem: 如何有效攻击黑盒LLM路由器，使其始终选择高能力（昂贵）模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 部署混合集成代理路由器模拟黑盒路由器，并针对集成代理适配后缀优化算法。
contributions: 提出R²A攻击方法，针对黑盒LLM路由器进行对抗后缀优化。
在多个开源和商业路由系统上验证了攻击有效性，显著提高昂贵模型路由率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个开源和商业路由系统上进行了实验，针对不同分布的查询，R²A显著增加了昂贵模型的路由率。
limitations: 可能依赖代理路由器的准确性，若代理与目标差异大则效果下降。

papers.title: What Is the Minimum Architecture for Prolepsis? Early Irrevocable Commitment Across Tasks in Small Transformers
papers.abstract: When do transformers commit to a decision, and what prevents them from correcting it? We introduce \textbf{prolepsis}: a transformer commits early, task-specific attention heads sustain the commitment, and no layer corrects it. Replicating \citeauthor{lindsey2025biology}'s (\citeyear{lindsey2025biology}) planning-site finding on open models (Gemma~2 2B, Llama~3.2 1B), we ask five questions. (Q1)~Planning is invisible to six residual-stream methods; CLTs are necessary. (Q2)~The planning-site spike replicates with identical geometry. (Q3)~Specific attention heads route the decision to the output, filling a gap flagged as invisible to attribution graphs. (Q4)~Search requires ${\leq}16$ layers; commitment requires more. (Q5)~Factual recall shows the same motif at a different network depth, with zero overlap between recurring planning heads and the factual top-10. Prolepsis is architectural: the template is shared, the routing substrates differ. All experiments run on a single consumer GPU (16\,GB VRAM).

analysis.tldr: 小规模Transformer中早期不可逆决策（prolepsis）的架构最小条件：任务特定注意力头维持承诺，且无层能纠正。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解Transformer何时做出不可逆决策以及为何无法纠正，对于模型可解释性和安全对齐至关重要，但现有归因方法（如残差流方法）无法揭示这一现象。
analysis.problem: 确定Transformer中早期承诺（prolepsis）的最小架构要求，并验证其在不同任务和模型中的普遍性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：规划任务中早期承诺出现在特定层（规划位点），由任务特定注意力头维持，且后续层无法纠正；事实回忆任务呈现相同模式但位于不同深度，且规划头与事实头无重叠。
analysis.method: 通过因果追踪（CLT）和注意力头分析，在Gemma 2 2B和Llama 3.2 1B上复现规划位点现象，并系统探究层数、注意力头角色等架构因素。
contributions: 提出prolepsis概念并证明其架构性：模板共享但路由基质不同。
揭示规划位点现象对残差流方法不可见，必须使用CLT。
填补归因图无法解释的空白：特定注意力头将决策路由到输出。
发现搜索需要≤16层，而承诺需要更多层。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma 2 2B和Llama 3.2 1B上复现规划位点，使用CLT和注意力头分析，所有实验在单张16GB GPU上完成。
limitations: 仅在小规模Transformer上验证，更大模型可能表现不同。
仅考察规划和事实回忆两类任务，其他任务类型未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 机制可解释性方向有创新，但实验规模有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 小规模Transformer中早期不可逆决策（prolepsis）的架构最小条件：任务特定注意力头维持承诺，且无层能纠正。

papers.title: Towards Faster Language Model Inference Using Mixture-of-Experts Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Flow matching retains the generation quality of diffusion models while enabling substantially faster inference, making it a compelling paradigm for generative modeling. However, when applied to language modeling, it exhibits fundamental limitations in representing complex latent distributions with irregular geometries, such as anisotropy and multimodality. To address these challenges, we propose a mixture-of-experts flow matching (MoE-FM) framework, which captures complex global transport geometries in latent space by decomposing them into locally specialized vector fields. Building on MoE-FM, we develop a non-autoregressive (NAR) language modeling approach, named YAN, instantiated with both Transformer and Mamba architectures. Across multiple downstream tasks, YAN achieves generation quality on par with both autoregressive (AR) and diffusion-based NAR language models, while requiring as few as three sampling steps. This yields a $40\times$ speedup over AR baselines and up to a $10^3\times$ speedup over diffusion language models, demonstrating substantial efficiency advantages for language modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合专家流匹配（MoE-FM）框架，实现非自回归语言模型仅需3步采样，比自回归模型快40倍，比扩散语言模型快1000倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配虽能加速生成，但在语言建模中难以表示各向异性和多模态等复杂潜在分布，导致生成质量受限。
analysis.problem: 流匹配在语言建模中无法有效捕捉复杂潜在空间的全局传输几何结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 流匹配在语言建模中表现出各向异性和多模态等不规则几何分布的表征瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出混合专家流匹配（MoE-FM）框架，将全局传输几何分解为局部专用向量场，并基于此构建非自回归语言模型YAN，支持Transformer和Mamba架构。
contributions: 提出MoE-FM框架，通过混合专家分解复杂传输几何，提升流匹配在语言建模中的表征能力。
基于MoE-FM开发非自回归语言模型YAN，仅需3步采样即可达到与自回归和扩散模型相当的质量，并实现40倍至1000倍的推理加速。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个下游任务上生成质量与自回归和扩散模型相当。
limitations: 可能依赖特定架构（Transformer/Mamba），泛化性需验证。
仅报告了3步采样的结果，更少步数下的性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合专家流匹配（MoE-FM）框架，实现非自回归语言模型仅需3步采样，比自回归模型快40倍，比扩散语言模型快1000倍。

papers.title: Flow of Truth: Proactive Temporal Forensics for Image-to-Video Generation
papers.abstract: The rapid rise of image-to-video (I2V) generation enables realistic videos to be created from a single image but also brings new forensic demands. Unlike static images, I2V content evolves over time, requiring forensics to move beyond 2D pixel-level tampering localization toward tracing how pixels flow and transform throughout the video. As frames progress, embedded traces drift and deform, making traditional spatial forensics ineffective. To address this unexplored dimension, we present **Flow of Truth**, the first proactive framework focusing on temporal forensics in I2V generation. A key challenge lies in discovering a forensic signature that can evolve consistently with the generation process, which is inherently a creative transformation rather than a deterministic reconstruction. Despite this intrinsic difficulty, we innovatively redefine video generation as *the motion of pixels through time rather than the synthesis of frames*. Building on this view, we propose a learnable forensic template that follows pixel motion and a template-guided flow module that decouples motion from image content, enabling robust temporal tracing. Experiments show that Flow of Truth generalizes across commercial and open-source I2V models, substantially improving temporal forensics performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向图像到视频生成的主动式时间取证框架，通过可学习模板追踪像素运动实现鲁棒时间溯源。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像到视频（I2V）生成技术快速发展带来新的取证需求，传统空间取证方法无法处理视频帧间痕迹漂移和变形的问题。
analysis.problem: I2V生成内容随时间演化，需要一种能随生成过程一致演化的取证签名，实现时间维度上的鲁棒取证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出I2V生成中嵌入痕迹会随帧推进而漂移变形，传统空间取证失效；视频生成本质是像素随时间运动而非帧合成。
analysis.method: 提出可学习取证模板（跟随像素运动）和模板引导流模块（解耦运动与图像内容），实现时间追踪。
contributions: 首次提出面向I2V生成的主动式时间取证框架Flow of Truth
设计可学习取证模板和模板引导流模块，实现运动与内容解耦
analysis.experiments: 在商业和开源I2V模型上验证，显著提升时间取证性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定生成模型架构
未提及对复杂场景或长视频的鲁棒性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 创新性高，首次解决I2V时间取证问题，方法有技术深度，但应用范围较窄，实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向图像到视频生成的主动式时间取证框架，通过可学习模板追踪像素运动实现鲁棒时间溯源。

papers.title: COEVO: Co-Evolutionary Framework for Joint Functional Correctness and PPA Optimization in LLM-Based RTL Generation
papers.abstract: LLM-based RTL code generation methods increasingly target both functional correctness and PPA quality, yet existing approaches universally decouple the two objectives, optimizing PPA only after correctness is fully achieved. Whether through sequential multi-agent pipelines, evolutionary search with binary correctness gates, or hierarchical reward dependencies, partially correct but architecturally promising candidates are systematically discarded. Moreover, existing methods reduce the multi-objective PPA space to a single scalar fitness, obscuring the trade-offs among area, delay, and power. To address these limitations, we propose COEVO, a co-evolutionary framework that unifies correctness and PPA optimization within a single evolutionary loop. COEVO formulates correctness as a continuous co-optimization dimension alongside area, delay, and power, enabled by an enhanced testbench that provides fine-grained scoring and detailed diagnostic feedback. An adaptive correctness gate with annealing allows PPA-promising but partially correct candidates to guide the search toward jointly optimal solutions. To preserve the full PPA trade-off structure, COEVO employs four-dimensional Pareto-based non-dominated sorting with configurable intra-level sorting, replacing scalar fitness without manual weight tuning. Evaluated on VerilogEval 2.0 and RTLLM 2.0, COEVO achieves 97.5\% and 94.5\% Pass@1 with GPT-5.4-mini, surpassing all agentic baselines across four LLM backbones, while attaining the best PPA on 43 out of 49 synthesizable RTLLM designs.

analysis.tldr: COEVO提出协同进化框架，将功能正确性与PPA优化统一在同一进化循环中，在RTL生成任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM-based RTL生成方法将功能正确性与PPA优化解耦，先追求完全正确再优化PPA，导致部分正确但架构有潜力的候选被丢弃，且PPA多目标被简化为单标量适应度，丢失了面积、延迟、功耗间的权衡信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在同一进化框架内联合优化RTL代码的功能正确性与PPA（面积、延迟、功耗）多目标，避免解耦带来的候选浪费和权衡丢失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法普遍将正确性与PPA解耦，通过顺序多智能体流水线、带二值正确性门控的进化搜索或分层奖励依赖，系统性地丢弃了部分正确但架构有潜力的候选。
analysis.method: 提出COEVO协同进化框架，将正确性作为连续协同优化维度，通过增强测试台提供细粒度评分和诊断反馈；采用自适应退火正确性门控允许PPA有潜力但部分正确的候选引导搜索；使用四维帕累托非支配排序替代单标量适应度，保留PPA权衡结构。
contributions: 提出COEVO框架，首次将功能正确性与PPA优化统一在同一进化循环中。
设计增强测试台和自适应退火正确性门控，实现部分正确候选的持续利用。
采用四维帕累托非支配排序，无需手动调权即可保留PPA多目标权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在VerilogEval 2.0和RTLLM 2.0上评估，COEVO使用GPT-5.4-mini达到97.5%和94.5% Pass@1，超越所有基于智能体的基线，并在49个可综合RTLLM设计中43个取得最佳PPA。
limitations: 依赖LLM backbone的质量，可能无法推广到较弱模型。
帕累托排序的计算开销可能随种群规模增大而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，与LLM应用方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: COEVO提出协同进化框架，将功能正确性与PPA优化统一在同一进化循环中，在RTL生成任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Predicting Power-System Dynamic Trajectories with Foundation Models
papers.abstract: As power systems transition toward renewable-rich and inverter-dominated operations, accurate time-domain dynamic analysis becomes increasingly critical. Such analysis supports key operational tasks, including transient stability assessment, dynamic security analysis, contingency screening, and post-fault trajectory evaluation. In practice, these tasks may operate under several challenges, including unknown and time-varying system parameters, privacy constraints on data sharing, and the need for fast online inference. Existing learning-based approaches are typically trained for individual systems and therefore lack generalization across operating conditions and physical parameters. Hence, this paper proposes LArge Scale Small ODE (LASS)-ODE-Power, a learning framework for general-purpose time-domain prediction. The proposed approach leverages large-scale pretraining on more than 40 GB of DAE or ordinary differential-equation (ODE) trajectories to learn transferable representations. The resulting model supports trajectory prediction from short measurement prefixes across diverse dynamic regimes, including electromechanical and inverter-driven systems. Hence, the model can be directly used without data sharing in a zero-shot setting. In addition, the proposed architecture incorporates parallel and linearized computation to achieve fast inference. Moreover, to enhance task-specific performance in power systems, a specialized fine-tuning strategy is developed based on approximately 1 GB of heterogeneous power-system dynamic data. Extensive experiments over diverse power-system simulation scenarios demonstrate that LASS-ODE-Power consistently outperforms existing learning-based models in trajectory prediction accuracy with efficient inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出LASS-ODE-Power，一种基于大规模预训练的通用电力系统动态轨迹预测框架，在零样本和微调场景下均优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 电力系统向高比例可再生能源和逆变器主导运行转型，时域动态分析至关重要，但面临参数时变、数据隐私和快速在线推理等挑战，现有学习方法缺乏跨工况泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能泛化到不同运行条件和物理参数的通用电力系统动态轨迹预测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LASS-ODE-Power框架，包含大规模预训练（>40 GB的DAE/ODE轨迹）、并行线性化计算架构，以及基于约1 GB异构电力系统动态数据的专用微调策略。
contributions: 提出首个基于大规模预训练的通用电力系统动态轨迹预测框架LASS-ODE-Power。
设计并行线性化计算架构实现快速推理，并开发专用微调策略提升任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多种电力系统仿真场景中，LASS-ODE-Power在轨迹预测精度和推理效率上持续优于现有学习模型。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模仿真数据，实际系统适配需进一步验证。
零样本场景下对极端动态事件的预测能力未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（大规模预训练+电力系统微调），实验充分，但属于物理科学应用，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LASS-ODE-Power，一种基于大规模预训练的通用电力系统动态轨迹预测框架，在零样本和微调场景下均优于现有方法。

papers.title: The Possibility of Artificial Intelligence Becoming a Subject and the Alignment Problem
papers.abstract: Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is increasingly being discussed not only as a tool, but also as a potential subject with personal and therefore moral status. In our opinion, the currently dominant alignment strategies, which focus on human control and containment of AI, therefore fall short. Building on Turing's analogy of "child machines", we are developing a vision of the possibility of autonomy-supporting parenting of AI, in which human control over a developing AGI is gradually reduced, allowing AI to become an independent, autonomous subject. Rather than viewing AGI, as is currently prevalent, as a dangerous creature that needs to be locked up and controlled, we should approach potential AGI with respect for a possible developing subject on the one hand, and with full confidence in our human capabilities on the other. Such a perspective opens up the possibility of cooperative coexistence and co-evolution between humans and AGIs. The relationship between humans and AGIs will thus have to be newly determined, which will change our self-image as humans. It will be crucial that humans not only claim control over potential AGIs, but also engage with AGIs through surprise, creativity, and other specifically human qualities, thereby offering them motivating incentives for cooperation.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出将AGI视为潜在主体，主张用自主支持式养育替代控制式对齐，以实现人机合作共存。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI对齐策略聚焦于人类控制和约束，但AGI可能具备道德主体地位，现有方法忽视了其自主性发展的可能性。
analysis.problem: 如何重新定义AI对齐问题，从控制转向支持AGI成为独立自主的主体，并建立人机合作共存的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，主要基于理论分析指出当前对齐策略的不足。
analysis.method: 基于图灵“儿童机器”类比，提出自主支持式养育框架，逐步减少人类控制，通过惊喜、创造力等人类特质激励AGI合作。
contributions: 提出将AGI视为潜在道德主体的新视角，挑战当前以控制为核心的对齐范式。
构建自主支持式养育的愿景，为人机合作共存与共同进化提供理论框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证验证，仅停留在理论探讨阶段。
未详细说明如何在实际中逐步减少控制并确保安全。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论视角新颖但缺乏技术细节和实验，适合对AI伦理感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出将AGI视为潜在主体，主张用自主支持式养育替代控制式对齐，以实现人机合作共存。

papers.title: Dr. RTL: Autonomous Agentic RTL Optimization through Tool-Grounded Self-Improvement
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have sparked growing interest in automatic RTL optimization for better performance, power, and area (PPA). However, existing methods are still far from realistic RTL optimization. Their evaluation settings are often unrealistic: they are tested on manually degraded, small-scale RTL designs and rely on weak open-source tools. Their optimization methods are also limited, relying on coarse design-level feedback and simple pre-defined rewriting rules. To address these limitations, we present Dr. RTL, an agentic framework for RTL timing optimization in a realistic evaluation environment, with continual self-improvement through reusable optimization skills. We establish a realistic evaluation setting with more challenging RTL designs and an industrial EDA workflow. Within this setting, Dr. RTL performs closed-loop optimization through a multi-agent framework for critical-path analysis, parallel RTL rewriting, and tool-based evaluation. We further introduce group-relative skill learning, which compares parallel RTL rewrites and distills the optimization experience into an interpretable skill library. Currently, this library contains 47 pattern--strategy entries for cross-design reuse to improve PPA and accelerate convergence, and it can continue evolving over time. Evaluated on 20 real-world RTL designs, Dr. RTL achieves average WNS/TNS improvements of 21%/17% with a 6% area reduction over the industry-leading commercial synthesis tool.

analysis.tldr: 提出Dr. RTL智能体框架，通过工具驱动的自我改进实现RTL时序优化，在真实设计上平均WNS/TNS改善21%/17%，面积减少6%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RTL优化方法评估设置不真实（使用人工退化的小规模设计、依赖弱开源工具），优化方法有限（依赖粗粒度设计反馈和简单预定义重写规则），难以应用于实际工业场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在真实评估环境下实现RTL时序优化，并具备持续自我改进和跨设计复用优化技能的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Dr. RTL智能体框架，包含多智能体协作（关键路径分析、并行RTL重写、基于工具的评估）和群体相对技能学习（从并行重写中提炼可解释的技能库，当前含47条模式-策略条目）。
contributions: 建立了包含更具挑战性RTL设计和工业EDA工作流的真实评估环境。
提出了多智能体闭环优化框架，实现关键路径分析、并行RTL重写和基于工具的评估。
引入了群体相对技能学习方法，从并行重写中蒸馏优化经验形成可复用的技能库。
analysis.experiments: 在20个真实世界RTL设计上评估，与行业领先的商业综合工具相比，平均WNS/TNS改善21%/17%，面积减少6%。
limitations: 技能库目前仅包含47条条目，可能覆盖有限的设计模式。
框架依赖工业EDA工具，可能限制可复现性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（多智能体+技能学习）且实验在真实设计上取得显著PPA改进，但属于硬件设计自动化领域，与主流ML方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Dr. RTL智能体框架，通过工具驱动的自我改进实现RTL时序优化，在真实设计上平均WNS/TNS改善21%/17%，面积减少6%。

papers.title: AI-Enabled Covert Channel Detection in RF Receiver Architectures
papers.abstract: Covert channels (CCs) in wireless chips pose a serious security threat, as they enable the exfiltration of sensitive information from the chip to an external attacker. In this work, we propose an AI-based defense mechanism deployed at the RF receiver, where the model directly monitors raw I/Q samples to detect, in real time, the presence of a CC embedded within an otherwise nominal signal. We first compact a state-of-the-art convolutional neural network (CNN), achieving an 80% reduction in parameters, which is an essential requirement for efficient edge deployment. When evaluated on the open-source hardware Trojan (HT)-based CC dataset, the compacted CNN attains an average accuracy of 90.28% for CC detection and 86.50% for identifying the underlying HT, with results averaged across SNR values above 1 dB. For practical communication scenarios where SNR > 20 dB, the model achieves over 97% accuracy for both tasks. These results correspond to a minimal performance degradation of less than 2% compared to the baseline model. The compacted CNN is further benchmarked against alternative classifiers, demonstrating an excellent accuracy-model size trade-off. Finally, we design a lightweight CNN hardware accelerator and demonstrate it on an FPGA, achieving very low resource utilization and an efficiency of 107 GOPs/W. Being the first AI hardware accelerator proposed specifically for CC detection, we compare it against state-of-the-art AI accelerators for RF signal classification tasks such as modulation recognition, showing superior performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于AI的隐蔽信道检测方法，通过压缩CNN模型在RF接收端实时检测无线芯片中的隐蔽信道。
analysis.research_motivation: 无线芯片中的隐蔽信道可泄露敏感信息，现有检测方法难以在资源受限的边缘设备上实时运行。
analysis.problem: 如何在RF接收端高效、实时地检测无线芯片中的隐蔽信道。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，参数减少80%，部署于RF接收端直接处理原始I/Q样本；并设计轻量级FPGA硬件加速器。
contributions: 提出首个针对隐蔽信道检测的AI硬件加速器，在FPGA上实现低资源消耗和高能效（107 GOPs/W）。
压缩CNN模型在参数减少80%的情况下，隐蔽信道检测准确率平均90.28%，硬件木马识别准确率86.50%（SNR>1 dB），性能下降小于2%。
analysis.experiments: 在开源硬件木马（HT）隐蔽信道数据集上评估，SNR>20 dB时两项任务准确率均超过97%，并与多种分类器对比，展示了优异的准确率-模型大小权衡。
limitations: 仅针对特定类型的隐蔽信道（基于硬件木马）进行检测，泛化性未知。
实验仅在公开数据集上进行，未在真实芯片或多样化场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（首个AI硬件加速器用于CC检测），技术深度扎实，但应用领域较窄，与主流ML方向相关性一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于AI的隐蔽信道检测方法，通过压缩CNN模型在RF接收端实时检测无线芯片中的隐蔽信道。

papers.title: Agentic Explainability at Scale: Between Corporate Fears and XAI Needs
papers.abstract: As companies enter the race for agentic AI adoption, fears surface around agentic autonomy and its subsequent risks. These fears compound as companies scale their agentic AI adoption with low-code applications, without a comparable scaling in their governance processes and expertise resulting in a phenomenon known as "Agent Sprawl". While shadow AI tools can help with agentic discovery and identification, few observability tools offer insights into the agents' configuration and settings or the decision-making process during agent-to-agent communication and orchestration. This paper explores AI governance professionals' concerns in enterprise settings, while offering design-time and runtime explainability techniques as suggested by AI governance experts for addressing those fears. Finally, we provide a preliminary prototype of an Agentic AI Card that can help companies feel at ease deploying agents at scale.

analysis.tldr: 探讨企业大规模部署智能体AI时的治理恐惧，提出基于可解释性的设计时与运行时技术及Agentic AI Card原型。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业快速采用低代码智能体AI导致治理流程和专业知识未能同步扩展，引发'Agent Sprawl'现象，且现有可观测性工具缺乏对智能体配置、设置及决策过程的洞察，亟需可解释性方案缓解治理恐惧。
analysis.problem: 如何通过可解释性技术解决企业大规模部署智能体AI时的治理恐惧和风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出企业存在'Agent Sprawl'现象，即智能体采用规模扩大而治理能力未同步提升。
analysis.method: 通过调研AI治理专业人士的担忧，提出设计时和运行时可解释性技术，并开发Agentic AI Card原型作为治理工具。
contributions: 识别企业大规模部署智能体AI时的关键治理恐惧和风险。
提出设计时和运行时可解释性技术以缓解这些恐惧。
开发Agentic AI Card原型，帮助企业在规模部署时感到安心。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 原型未经过大规模实证验证。
可解释性技术的有效性可能因企业环境而异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 问题重要但方法初步，缺乏实验验证，适合关注AI治理的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨企业大规模部署智能体AI时的治理恐惧，提出基于可解释性的设计时与运行时技术及Agentic AI Card原型。

papers.title: Hybrid Decision Making via Conformal VLM-generated Guidance
papers.abstract: Building on recent advances in AI, hybrid decision making (HDM) holds the promise of improving human decision quality and reducing cognitive load. We work in the context of learning to guide (LtG), a recently proposed HDM framework in which the human is always responsible for the final decision: rather than suggesting decisions, in LtG the AI supplies (textual) guidance useful for facilitating decision making. One limiting factor of existing approaches is that their guidance compounds information about all possible outcomes, and as a result it can be difficult to digest. We address this issue by introducing ConfGuide, a novel LtG approach that generates more succinct and targeted guidance. To this end, it employs conformal risk control to select a set of outcomes, ensuring a cap on the false negative rate. We demonstrate our approach on a real-world multi-label medical diagnosis task. Our empirical evaluation highlights the promise of ConfGuide.

analysis.tldr: ConfGuide 通过保形风险控制生成简洁、有针对性的文本指导，提升混合决策质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合决策中，AI 提供的指导常包含所有可能结果的信息，导致用户难以消化，限制了决策效率。
analysis.problem: 现有学习引导框架生成的指导信息过于冗长，缺乏针对性，增加认知负荷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Robustness of Vision Foundation Models to Common Perturbations
papers.abstract: A vision foundation model outputs an embedding vector for an image, which can be affected by common editing operations (e.g., JPEG compression, brightness, contrast adjustments). These common perturbations alter embedding vectors and may impact the performance of downstream tasks using these embeddings. In this work, we present the first systematic study on foundation models' robustness to such perturbations. We propose three robustness metrics and formulate five desired mathematical properties for these metrics, analyzing which properties they satisfy or violate. Using these metrics, we evaluate six industry-scale foundation models (OpenAI, Meta) across nine common perturbation categories, finding them generally non-robust. We also show that common perturbations degrade downstream application performance (e.g., classification accuracy) and that robustness values can predict performance impacts. Finally, we propose a fine-tuning approach to improve robustness without sacrificing utility.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统研究视觉基础模型对常见图像编辑操作的鲁棒性，提出评估指标并发现现有模型普遍不鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉基础模型广泛应用于下游任务，但其对JPEG压缩、亮度调整等常见图像编辑操作的鲁棒性尚未被系统研究，这些扰动可能影响嵌入向量质量并导致下游性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何量化并提升视觉基础模型对常见图像扰动的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三个鲁棒性指标并定义五个期望的数学性质，分析各指标满足或违反的性质；基于这些指标评估六个工业级基础模型；提出一种微调方法以提升鲁棒性而不牺牲效用。
contributions: 首次系统研究视觉基础模型对常见图像编辑操作的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Discovering Novel LLM Experts via Task-Capability Coevolution
papers.abstract: Frontier model developers aim to train models continually to possess emergent, diverse capabilities. To extend capabilities, the current pre-training and post-training paradigm requires manually starting training runs with static datasets or reward functions every time. Addressing this limitation, our work pursues the insight that open-endedness (via the coevolution of models and tasks) can discover models with increasingly novel skills in a single run. We introduce a new model development framework that extends coevolution to large language model (LLM) discovery, open-ended \textit{Assessment Coevolving with Diverse Capabilities} (AC/DC). AC/DC evolves both LLMs via model merging and natural language tasks via synthetic data generation. AC/DC discovers growing archives of LLMs that surpass the capabilities of larger LLMs while taking up less GPU memory. In particular, our LLM populations achieve a broader Coverage of expertise than other curated models or baselines on downstream benchmarks, without \textit{any} explicit benchmark optimization. Furthermore, AC/DC improves Coverage over time, continually innovates on tasks and models, and improves performance in multi-agent best-of-N selection. Our findings highlight the potential of coevolution as a means of discovering broader sets of capabilities from base LLMs. Overall, AC/DC brings us one step closer to a profoundly new paradigm of LLM development, where continual improvements to the diversity of model capabilities can be accelerated by leveraging existing models as stepping stones to increasingly powerful models.

analysis.tldr: 提出AC/DC框架，通过模型与任务的协同进化，在单次运行中持续发现具备新颖技能的LLM专家。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM开发依赖手动启动训练，难以在单次运行中持续涌现多样化能力，亟需自动化、开放式的模型发现方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过模型与任务的协同进化，在单次训练过程中自动发现具有日益新颖技能的LLM专家。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AC/DC框架：通过模型合并进化LLM，通过合成数据生成进化自然语言任务，实现模型与任务的协同进化。

实验表明AC/DC发现的LLM种群在专家覆盖度上超越基线，且无需显式基准优化。

papers.title: UniDoc-RL: Coarse-to-Fine Visual RAG with Hierarchical Actions and Dense Rewards
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) extends Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) with external visual knowledge. However, existing visual RAG systems typically rely on generic retrieval signals that overlook the fine-grained visual semantics essential for complex reasoning. To address this limitation, we propose UniDoc-RL, a unified reinforcement learning framework in which an LVLM agent jointly performs retrieval, reranking, active visual perception, and reasoning. UniDoc-RL formulates visual information acquisition as a sequential decision-making problem with a hierarchical action space. Specifically, it progressively refines visual evidence from coarse-grained document retrieval to fine-grained image selection and active region cropping, allowing the model to suppress irrelevant content and attend to information-dense regions. For effective end-to-end training, we introduce a dense multi-reward scheme that provides task-aware supervision for each action. Based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), UniDoc-RL aligns agent behavior with multiple objectives without relying on a separate value network. To support this training paradigm, we curate a comprehensive dataset of high-quality reasoning trajectories with fine-grained action annotations. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that UniDoc-RL consistently surpasses state-of-the-art baselines, yielding up to 17.7% gains over prior RL-based methods.

analysis.tldr: UniDoc-RL 提出一种统一强化学习框架，通过层次化动作空间和密集奖励机制，让视觉语言模型在检索、重排序、主动感知和推理中协同优化，显著提升复杂视觉推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉 RAG 系统依赖通用检索信号，忽略了复杂推理所需的细粒度视觉语义，导致检索结果不精确、推理质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何让视觉语言模型在检索增强生成中自主进行从粗到细的视觉证据获取，并实现端到端训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 UniDoc-RL 框架，将视觉信息获取建模为序列决策问题，设计层次化动作空间（文档检索→图像选择→区域裁剪），并引入密集多奖励方案，基于 GRPO 进行端到端训练。
contributions: 提出统一强化学习框架，联合优化检索、重排序、主动感知和推理。
设计层次化动作空间和密集多奖励机制，实现从粗到细的视觉证据获取。
构建高质量推理轨迹数据集，并在三个基准上超越现有方法，最高提升 17.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准上评估，UniDoc-RL 一致超越最先进基线，相比先前基于 RL 的方法最高提升 17.7%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量标注的推理轨迹数据。

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合层次化动作与密集奖励，实验提升显著，与 VLM 推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniDoc-RL 提出一种统一强化学习框架，通过层次化动作空间和密集奖励机制，让视觉语言模型在检索、重排序、主动感知和推理中协同优化，显著提升复杂视觉推理性能。

papers.title: Calibration-Gated LLM Pseudo-Observations for Online Contextual Bandits
papers.abstract: Contextual bandit algorithms suffer from high regret during cold-start, when the learner has insufficient data to distinguish good arms from bad. We propose augmenting Disjoint LinUCB with LLM pseudo-observations: after each round, a large language model predicts counterfactual rewards for the unplayed arms, and these predictions are injected into the learner as weighted pseudo-observations. The injection weight is controlled by a calibration-gated decay schedule that tracks the LLM's prediction accuracy on played arms via an exponential moving average; high calibration error suppresses the LLM's influence, while accurate predictions receive higher weight during the critical early rounds. We evaluate on two contextual bandit environments - UCI Mushroom (2-arm, asymmetric rewards) and MIND-small (5-arm news recommendation) - and find that when equipped with a task-specific prompt, LLM pseudo-observations reduce cumulative regret by 19% on MIND relative to pure LinUCB. However, generic counterfactual prompt framing increases regret on both environments, demonstrating that prompt design is the dominant factor, more important than the choice of decay schedule or calibration gating parameters. We analyze the failure modes of calibration gating on domains with small prediction errors and provide a theoretical motivation for the bias-variance trade-off governing pseudo-observation weight.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM生成伪观测值并通过校准门控衰减调度注入LinUCB，可降低冷启动遗憾，但提示设计比校准机制更关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 上下文赌博机算法在冷启动阶段因数据不足导致高遗憾，而LLM具备先验知识，但直接使用其预测可能引入偏差，需要可控的注入机制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM的伪观测值有效降低上下文赌博机在冷启动阶段的累积遗憾，同时避免LLM预测偏差带来的负面影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：任务特定提示能降低遗憾，但通用反事实提示反而增加遗憾；提示设计是主导因素，比衰减调度或校准门控参数更重要；校准门控在小预测误差域存在失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出Calibration-Gated LLM Pseudo-Observations方法，在Disjoint LinUCB每轮后，用LLM预测未选臂的反事实奖励，通过校准门控衰减调度（基于指数移动平均跟踪LLM在已选臂上的预测精度）控制注入权重，高校准误差时抑制LLM影响。
contributions: 提出一种校准门控的LLM伪观测值注入框架，用于改进上下文赌博机冷启动性能。
通过实验揭示提示设计比校准机制更关键，并分析了校准门控的失败模式。
提供了伪观测值权重偏差-方差权衡的理论动机。
analysis.experiments: 在UCI Mushroom（2臂，不对称奖励）和MIND-small（5臂新闻推荐）两个环境上评估，与纯LinUCB相比，任务特定提示下MIND上累积遗憾降低19%。摘要未提供其他实验细节。
limitations: 仅验证了两个环境，泛化性未知。
提示设计依赖人工，未探索自动优化。
校准门控在小预测误差域可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用LLM生成伪观测值并通过校准门控衰减调度注入LinUCB，可降低冷启动遗憾，但提示设计比校准机制更关键。

papers.title: Frequency-Enhanced Dual-Subspace Networks for Few-Shot Fine-Grained Image Classification
papers.abstract: Few-shot fine-grained image classification aims to recognize subcategories with high visual similarity using only a limited number of annotated samples. Existing metric learning-based methods typically rely solely on spatial domain features. Confined to this single perspective, models inevitably suffer from inherent texture biases, entangling essential structural details with high-frequency background noise. Furthermore, lacking cross-view geometric constraints, single-view metrics tend to overfit this noise, resulting in structural instability under few-shot conditions. To address these issues, this paper proposes the Frequency-Enhanced Dual-Subspace Network (FEDSNet). Specifically, FEDSNet utilizes the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) and a low-pass filtering mechanism to explicitly isolate low-frequency global structural components from spatial features, thereby suppressing background interference. Truncated Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) is employed to construct independent, low-rank linear subspaces for both spatial texture and frequency structural features. An adaptive gating mechanism is designed to dynamically fuse the projection distances from these dual views. This strategy leverages the structural stability of the frequency subspace to prevent the spatial subspace from overfitting to background features. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets - CUB-200-2011, Stanford Cars, Stanford Dogs, and FGVC-Aircraft - demonstrate that FEDSNet exhibits excellent classification performance and robustness, achieving highly competitive results compared to existing metric learning algorithms. Complexity analysis further confirms that the proposed network achieves a favorable balance between high accuracy and computational efficiency, providing an effective new paradigm for few-shot fine-grained visual recognition.

analysis.tldr: 提出频域增强双子空间网络，通过DCT分离低频结构特征和SVD构建独立子空间，解决小样本细粒度分类中的纹理偏差和过拟合问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 小样本细粒度图像分类中，现有基于度量学习的方法仅依赖空间域特征，易受纹理偏差和高频背景噪声干扰，且单视角度量缺乏跨视角几何约束，导致结构不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在小样本条件下，从有限标注样本中有效区分视觉相似度高的子类别，同时抑制背景噪声和纹理偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出空间域特征存在固有纹理偏差，高频背景噪声与结构细节纠缠，单视角度量易过拟合噪声导致结构不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出FEDSNet，利用DCT和低通滤波分离低频全局结构特征，用截断SVD为空间纹理和频域结构特征构建独立低秩线性子空间，并通过自适应门控机制动态融合双视角投影距离。
contributions: 提出频域增强双子空间网络，结合DCT和低通滤波显式分离低频结构成分，抑制背景干扰。
利用截断SVD构建独立低秩子空间，并通过自适应门控融合双视角距离，提升结构稳定性和分类鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在CUB-200-2011、Stanford Cars、Stanford Dogs和FGVC-Aircraft四个基准数据集上实验，FEDSNet取得有竞争力的分类性能和鲁棒性，复杂度分析表明在准确率和效率间取得良好平衡。
limitations: 可能对频域滤波参数敏感，需要调优。
仅验证了细粒度分类任务，泛化到其他小样本场景需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合频域分析和双子空间，创新性较好，实验充分，与视觉理解方向相关，推荐精读。

papers.title: Prompt-to-Gesture: Measuring the Capabilities of Image-to-Video Deictic Gesture Generation
papers.abstract: Gesture recognition research, unlike NLP, continues to face acute data scarcity, with progress constrained by the need for costly human recordings or image processing approaches that cannot generate authentic variability in the gestures themselves. Recent advancements in image-to-video foundation models have enabled the generation of photorealistic, semantically rich videos guided by natural language. These capabilities open up new possibilities for creating effort-free synthetic data, raising the critical question of whether video Generative AI models can augment and complement traditional human-generated gesture data. In this paper, we introduce and analyze prompt-based video generation to construct a realistic deictic gestures dataset and rigorously evaluate its effectiveness for downstream tasks. We propose a data generation pipeline that produces deictic gestures from a small number of reference samples collected from human participants, providing an accessible approach that can be leveraged both within and beyond the machine learning community. Our results demonstrate that the synthetic gestures not only align closely with real ones in terms of visual fidelity but also introduce meaningful variability and novelty that enrich the original data, further supported by superior performance of various deep models using a mixed dataset. These findings highlight that image-to-video techniques, even in their early stages, offer a powerful zero-shot approach to gesture synthesis with clear benefits for downstream tasks.

analysis.tldr: 利用图像到视频生成模型构建逼真的指示性手势数据集，验证合成数据可增强下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 手势识别研究面临数据稀缺问题，传统方法依赖昂贵的人工录制或图像处理，难以生成手势本身的真实变化。
analysis.problem: 能否利用视频生成AI模型创建合成手势数据，以补充传统人工手势数据，并评估其对下游任务的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成手势在视觉保真度上与真实手势高度一致，且引入了有意义的变异和新颖性，混合数据集训练的各种深度模型性能更优。
analysis.method: 提出一个数据生成流水线，从少量人类参与者参考样本出发，通过提示驱动的视频生成构建逼真的指示性手势数据集。
contributions: 提出并分析了基于提示的视频生成方法，用于构建逼真的指示性手势数据集。
验证了合成手势在视觉保真度和下游任务性能上均优于或补充真实数据。
analysis.experiments: 在多个深度模型上使用混合数据集进行实验，结果显示合成数据带来性能提升。
limitations: 可能仅针对指示性手势，未涉及其他手势类型。
图像到视频生成技术的早期阶段可能限制合成数据的多样性。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用图像到视频生成模型构建逼真的指示性手势数据集，验证合成数据可增强下游任务性能。

papers.title: RaTA-Tool: Retrieval-based Tool Selection with Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Tool learning with foundation models aims to endow AI systems with the ability to invoke external resources -- such as APIs, computational utilities, and specialized models -- to solve complex tasks beyond the reach of standalone language generation. While recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have expanded their reasoning and perception capabilities, existing tool-use methods are predominantly limited to text-only inputs and closed-world settings. Consequently, they struggle to interpret multimodal user instructions and cannot generalize to tools unseen during training. In this work, we introduce RaTA-Tool, a novel framework for open-world multimodal tool selection. Rather than learning direct mappings from user queries to fixed tool identifiers, our approach enables an MLLM to convert a multimodal query into a structured task description and subsequently retrieve the most appropriate tool by matching this representation against semantically rich, machine-readable tool descriptions. This retrieval-based formulation naturally supports extensibility to new tools without retraining. To further improve alignment between task descriptions and tool selection, we incorporate a preference-based optimization stage using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). To support research in this setting, we also introduce the first dataset for open-world multimodal tool use, featuring standardized tool descriptions derived from Hugging Face model cards. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves tool-selection performance, particularly in open-world, multimodal scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索式框架RaTA-Tool，让多模态大模型通过结构化任务描述检索工具，实现开放世界多模态工具选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具学习方法局限于纯文本输入和封闭世界设定，无法处理多模态用户指令，也无法泛化到未见过的工具。
analysis.problem: 如何让多模态大模型在开放世界中根据多模态查询选择合适的外部工具。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将多模态查询转换为结构化任务描述，通过检索匹配机器可读的工具描述来选择工具，并引入基于直接偏好优化的偏好对齐阶段。
contributions: 提出RaTA-Tool框架，实现开放世界多模态工具选择，无需重新训练即可扩展新工具。
构建首个开放世界多模态工具使用数据集，包含来自Hugging Face模型卡的标准工具描述。
analysis.experiments: 在开放世界多模态场景下进行实验，结果表明方法显著提升了工具选择性能。
limitations: 依赖高质量的工具描述和任务描述转换。

papers.title: HRDexDB: A Large-Scale Dataset of Dexterous Human and Robotic Hand Grasps
papers.abstract: We present HRDexDB, a large-scale, multi-modal dataset of high-fidelity dexterous grasping sequences featuring both human and diverse robotic hands. Unlike existing datasets, HRDexDB provides a comprehensive collection of grasping trajectories across human hands and multiple robot hand embodiments, spanning 100 diverse objects. Leveraging state-of-the-art vision methods and a new dedicated multi-camera system, our HRDexDB offers high-precision spatiotemporal 3D ground-truth motion for both the agent and the manipulated object. To facilitate the study of physical interaction, HRDexDB includes high-resolution tactile signals, synchronized multi-view video, and egocentric video streams. The dataset comprises 1.4K grasping trials, encompassing both successes and failures, each enriched with visual, kinematic, and tactile modalities. By providing closely aligned captures of human dexterity and robotic execution on the same target objects under comparable grasping motions, HRDexDB serves as a foundational benchmark for multi-modal policy learning and cross-domain dexterous manipulation.

analysis.tldr: HRDexDB是一个大规模、多模态的灵巧抓取数据集，包含人类和多种机器人手的抓取轨迹，支持策略学习和跨域操作研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有灵巧抓取数据集缺乏人类与机器人手部在相同物体上的对齐数据，且模态单一，限制了跨域策略学习和物理交互研究。
analysis.problem: 构建一个包含人类和多种机器人手部、多模态（视觉、运动学、触觉）的高保真灵巧抓取数据集，以支持基准测试和跨域操作学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用最先进的视觉方法和专用多相机系统，采集人类和多种机器人手部在100个物体上的抓取轨迹，包含1.4K次试验（成功和失败），并提供高精度3D运动、触觉信号、多视角视频和第一人称视频。
contributions: 提出了HRDexDB，一个大规模、多模态的灵巧抓取数据集，涵盖人类和多种机器人手部。
提供了高精度时空3D真实运动、触觉信号和多视角视频，支持物理交互研究。

papers.title: Generative Data Augmentation for Skeleton Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Skeleton-based human action recognition is a powerful approach for understanding human behaviour from pose data, but collecting large-scale, diverse, and well-annotated 3D skeleton datasets is both expensive and labor-intensive. To address this challenge, we propose a conditional generative pipeline for data augmentation in skeleton action recognition. Our method learns the distribution of real skeleton sequences under the constraint of action labels, enabling the synthesis of diverse and high-fidelity data. Even with limited training samples, it can effectively generate skeleton sequences and achieve competitive recognition performance in low-data scenarios, demonstrating strong generalisation in downstream tasks. Specifically, we introduce a Transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, combined with a generative refinement module and a dropout mechanism, to balance fidelity and diversity during sampling. Experiments on HumanAct12 and the refined NTU-RGBD (NTU-VIBE) dataset show that our approach consistently improves the accuracy of multiple skeleton-based action recognition models, validating its effectiveness in both few-shot and full-data settings. The source code can be found at here.

analysis.tldr: 提出条件生成式数据增强方法，通过Transformer架构合成多样且高保真的骨架序列，提升动作识别模型在低数据场景下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模、多样且标注良好的3D骨架数据集收集成本高、劳动密集，限制了骨架动作识别的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限训练样本生成高质量骨架序列以增强数据，提升动作识别模型的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Transformer的编码器-解码器架构，结合生成式精炼模块和dropout机制，在动作标签约束下学习真实骨架序列分布，实现高保真与多样性的平衡采样。
contributions: 提出一种条件生成式数据增强管道，用于骨架动作识别。
引入Transformer架构、生成式精炼模块和dropout机制，平衡合成数据的保真度和多样性。
在HumanAct12和NTU-VIBE数据集上验证了方法对多种骨架动作识别模型的提升效果。
analysis.experiments: 在HumanAct12和NTU-RGBD（NTU-VIBE）数据集上进行了实验，结果表明方法在少样本和全数据设置下均能提升多个骨架动作识别模型的准确率。

papers.title: WavAlign: Enhancing Intelligence and Expressiveness in Spoken Dialogue Models via Adaptive Hybrid Post-Training
papers.abstract: End-to-end spoken dialogue models have garnered significant attention because they offer a higher potential ceiling in expressiveness and perceptual ability than cascaded systems. However, the intelligence and expressiveness of current open-source spoken dialogue models often remain below expectations. Motivated by the success of online reinforcement learning(RL) in other domains, one might attempt to directly apply preference optimization to spoken dialogue models, yet this transfer is non-trivial. We analyze these obstacles from the perspectives of reward modeling and rollout sampling, focusing on how sparse preference supervision interacts with dense speech generation under shared-parameter updates. Based on the analysis, we propose a modality-aware adaptive post-training recipe that makes RL practical for spoken dialogue: it constrains preference updates to the semantic channel and improves acoustic behavior via explicit anchoring, while dynamically regulating their mixture from rollout statistics to avoid unreliable preference gradients. We evaluate the method across multiple spoken dialogue benchmarks and representative architectures, and observe consistent improvements in semantic quality and speech expressiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出WavAlign，一种模态感知的自适应后训练方法，通过混合偏好优化与显式锚定提升口语对话模型的智能性和表现力。
analysis.research_motivation: 端到端口语对话模型在表现力和感知能力上优于级联系统，但现有开源模型在智能性和表现力上仍不理想。直接应用在线强化学习面临奖励建模和 rollout 采样中的稀疏偏好监督与密集语音生成之间的冲突。
analysis.problem: 如何将偏好优化有效应用于口语对话模型，解决稀疏偏好监督与密集语音生成在共享参数更新下的冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要分析了将在线RL直接迁移到口语对话模型的障碍：稀疏偏好监督与密集语音生成在共享参数更新下相互干扰，导致不可靠的偏好梯度。
analysis.method: 提出模态感知的自适应后训练方法WavAlign：将偏好更新约束在语义通道，通过显式锚定改善声学行为，并根据rollout统计动态调节两者混合以避免不可靠的偏好梯度。
contributions: 分析了将偏好优化应用于口语对话模型的障碍，从奖励建模和rollout采样角度揭示稀疏偏好监督与密集语音生成的冲突。
提出WavAlign，一种模态感知的自适应后训练方法，通过语义通道约束和显式锚定实现有效的RL训练。
在多个口语对话基准和代表性架构上验证了方法在语义质量和语音表现力上的一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个口语对话基准和代表性架构上评估，观察到语义质量和语音表现力的一致提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定的奖励模型设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态调节机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对口语对话模型的对齐问题提出模态感知方案，实验验证有效，但摘要未提供具体数值，影响评分略保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WavAlign，一种模态感知的自适应后训练方法，通过混合偏好优化与显式锚定提升口语对话模型的智能性和表现力。

papers.title: Hallucination as Trajectory Commitment: Causal Evidence for Asymmetric Attractor Dynamics in Transformer Generation
papers.abstract: We present causal evidence that hallucination in autoregressive language models is an early trajectory commitment governed by asymmetric attractor dynamics. Using same-prompt bifurcation, in which we repeatedly sample identical inputs to observe spontaneous divergence, we isolate trajectory dynamics from prompt-level confounds. On Qwen2.5-1.5B across 61 prompts spanning six categories, 27 prompts (44.3%) bifurcate with factual and hallucinated trajectories diverging at the first generated token (KL = 0 at step 0, KL > 1.0 at step 1). Activation patching across 28 layers reveals a pronounced causal asymmetry: injecting a hallucinated activation into a correct trajectory corrupts output in 87.5% of trials (layer 20), while the reverse recovers only 33.3% (layer 24); both exceed the 10.4% baseline (p = 0.025) and 12.5% random-patch control. Window patching shows correction requires sustained multi-step intervention, whereas corruption needs only a single perturbation. Probing the prompt encoding itself, step-0 residual states predict per-prompt hallucination rate at Pearson r = 0.776 at layer 15 (p < 0.001 against a 1000-permutation null); unsupervised clustering identifies five regime-like groups (eta^2 = 0.55) whose saddle-adjacent cluster concentrates 12 of the 13 bifurcating false-premise prompts, indicating that the basin structure is organized around regime commitments fixed at prompt encoding. These findings characterize hallucination as a locally stable attractor basin: entry is probabilistic and rapid, exit demands coordinated intervention across layers and steps, and the relevant basins are selected by clusterable regimes already discernible at step 0.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果干预实验证明，自回归语言模型中的幻觉源于早期轨迹承诺，由非对称吸引子动力学控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解语言模型幻觉的底层机制对于提升模型可靠性至关重要，但现有研究多停留在现象描述，缺乏对轨迹动力学的因果分析。
analysis.problem: 揭示自回归语言模型中幻觉产生的因果机制，特别是轨迹承诺与吸引子动力学的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过同提示分叉实验发现，44.3%的提示在第一个生成token处即出现事实与幻觉轨迹的分叉；激活修补显示因果不对称性：注入幻觉激活破坏正确轨迹的成功率远高于反向恢复；步骤0的残差状态可预测幻觉率（r=0.776），无监督聚类识别出五个状态组，其中鞍点邻近组集中了13个分叉提示中的12个。
analysis.method: 使用同提示分叉实验、跨层激活修补、窗口修补以及步骤0残差状态探针和聚类分析，系统研究幻觉的轨迹承诺与吸引子动力学。
contributions: 首次提供因果证据表明幻觉是早期轨迹承诺，由非对称吸引子动力学控制。
揭示幻觉吸引子的因果不对称性：进入容易、退出困难，且吸引子结构在步骤0即可被聚类识别。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-1.5B模型上，使用61个提示（6个类别）进行实验，包括分叉分析、激活修补（28层）、窗口修补和步骤0探针/聚类。
limitations: 仅针对单一模型（Qwen2.5-1.5B）和有限提示集，泛化性需验证。
因果干预可能受模型架构和规模影响，结论是否适用于更大模型尚不明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，因果证据有力，对理解幻觉机制有重要贡献，但实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果干预实验证明，自回归语言模型中的幻觉源于早期轨迹承诺，由非对称吸引子动力学控制。

papers.title: Hybrid Latents: Geometry-Appearance-Aware Surfel Splatting
papers.abstract: We introduce a hybrid Gaussian-hash-grid radiance representation for reconstructing 2D Gaussian scene models from multi-view images. Similar to NeST splatting, our approach reduces the entanglement between geometry and appearance common in NeRF-based models, but adds per-Gaussian latent features alongside hash-grid features to bias the optimizer toward a separation of low- and high-frequency scene components. This explicit frequency-based decomposition reduces the tendency of high-frequency texture to compensate for geometric errors. Encouraging Gaussians with hard opacity falloffs further strengthens the separation between geometry and appearance, improving both geometry reconstruction and rendering efficiency. Finally, probabilistic pruning combined with a sparsity-inducing BCE opacity loss allows redundant Gaussians to be turned off, yielding a minimal set of Gaussians sufficient to represent the scene. Using both synthetic and real-world datasets, we compare against the state of the art in Gaussian-based novel-view synthesis and demonstrate superior reconstruction fidelity with an order of magnitude fewer primitives.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合高斯-哈希网格辐射场表示，通过解耦几何与外观实现高效高质量的新视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于高斯泼溅的方法中几何与外观高度耦合，导致高频纹理补偿几何误差，影响重建质量和渲染效率。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦场景的几何与外观信息，同时减少高斯原语数量以提升渲染效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高频纹理倾向于补偿几何误差，导致几何重建不准确；硬不透明度衰减有助于分离几何与外观。
analysis.method: 混合高斯-哈希网格辐射场表示：每个高斯附加潜在特征与哈希网格特征，显式分离低频与高频场景分量；结合硬不透明度衰减、概率剪枝和稀疏性诱导的BCE损失。
contributions: 提出混合高斯-哈希网格表示，通过频率分解解耦几何与外观。
引入概率剪枝和稀疏性损失，实现数量级更少的高斯原语。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上对比最先进的高斯新视角合成方法，以更少原语实现更优重建保真度。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角输入，单视角泛化能力未知。
哈希网格特征可能引入额外存储开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，显著减少原语数量，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合高斯-哈希网格辐射场表示，通过解耦几何与外观实现高效高质量的新视角合成。

papers.title: STEP-Parts: Geometric Partitioning of Boundary Representations for Large-Scale CAD Processing
papers.abstract: Many CAD learning pipelines discretize Boundary Representations (B-Reps) into triangle meshes, discarding analytic surface structure and topological adjacency and thereby weakening consistent instance-level analysis. We present STEP-Parts, a deterministic CAD-to-supervision toolchain that extracts geometric instance partitions directly from raw STEP B-Reps and transfers them to tessellated carriers through retained source-face correspondence, yielding instance labels and metadata for downstream learning and evaluation. The construction merges adjacent B-Rep faces only when they share the same analytic primitive type and satisfy a near-tangent continuity criterion. On ABC, same-primitive dihedral angles are strongly bimodal, yielding a threshold-insensitive low-angle regime for part extraction. Because the partition is defined on intrinsic B-Rep topology rather than on a particular triangulation, the resulting boundaries remain stable under changes in tessellation. Applied to the DeepCAD subset of ABC, the pipeline processes approximately 180{,}000 models in under six hours on a consumer CPU. We release code and precomputed labels, and show that STEP-Parts serves both as a tessellation-robust geometric reference and as a useful supervision source in two downstream probes: an implicit reconstruction--segmentation network and a dataset-level point-based backbone.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种从CAD B-Rep直接提取几何实例分割的确定性工具链，避免网格离散化带来的信息丢失。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CAD学习流程将边界表示(B-Rep)离散化为三角网格，丢失了解析曲面结构和拓扑邻接关系，导致实例级分析不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何从原始STEP B-Rep中直接提取几何实例分割，并稳定地迁移到网格表示上。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在ABC数据集上，相同图元类型的二面角呈现强双峰分布，存在一个阈值不敏感的低角度区域用于零件提取。
analysis.method: STEP-Parts工具链：基于B-Rep拓扑，合并相邻面当且仅当它们共享相同解析图元类型且满足近切连续准则，得到实例标签和元数据。
contributions: 提出一种确定性、无需学习的CAD几何实例分割方法，直接基于B-Rep拓扑。
在DeepCAD子集上6小时内处理约18万模型，并开源代码和预计算标签。
analysis.experiments: 在ABC的DeepCAD子集上验证效率，并在隐式重建-分割网络和点云骨干两个下游任务中展示其作为监督源的有效性。
limitations: 仅适用于STEP格式的B-Rep，依赖解析图元类型和近切连续性假设。
未在复杂工业CAD模型上评估分割质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，但下游实验较简单，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种从CAD B-Rep直接提取几何实例分割的确定性工具链，避免网格离散化带来的信息丢失。

papers.title: Improving Sparse Autoencoder with Dynamic Attention
papers.abstract: Recently, sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a promising technique for interpreting activations in foundation models by disentangling features into a sparse set of concepts. However, identifying the optimal level of sparsity for each neuron remains challenging in practice: excessive sparsity can lead to poor reconstruction, whereas insufficient sparsity may harm interpretability. While existing activation functions such as ReLU and TopK provide certain sparsity guarantees, they typically require additional sparsity regularization or cherry-picked hyperparameters. We show in this paper that dynamically sparse attention mechanisms using sparsemax can bridge this trade-off, due to their ability to determine the activation numbers in a data-dependent manner. Specifically, we first explore a new class of SAEs based on the cross-attention architecture with the latent features as queries and the learnable dictionary as the key and value matrices. To encourage sparse pattern learning, we employ a sparsemax-based attention strategy that automatically infers a sparse set of elements according to the complexity of each neuron, resulting in a more flexible and general activation function. Through comprehensive evaluation and visualization, we show that our approach successfully achieves lower reconstruction loss while producing high-quality concepts, particularly in top-n classification tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态稀疏注意力机制（sparsemax）改进稀疏自编码器，在保持高概念质量的同时降低重构损失。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）是解释基础模型激活的重要工具，但现有方法难以平衡稀疏性与重构质量：过度稀疏导致重构差，稀疏不足损害可解释性，且依赖手动调参。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种数据自适应的激活函数，使SAE能自动为每个神经元确定最优稀疏度，同时兼顾重构损失和概念质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出ReLU和TopK等激活函数需要额外的稀疏正则化或精心选择的超参数，无法灵活适应不同神经元的复杂度。
analysis.method: 基于交叉注意力架构，以潜在特征为查询、可学习字典为键值，采用sparsemax注意力机制自动推断每个神经元的稀疏激活集，实现数据依赖的稀疏模式学习。
contributions: 首次将sparsemax动态稀疏注意力引入稀疏自编码器，提出一种新的激活函数。
通过实验证明该方法在降低重构损失的同时生成高质量概念，尤其在top-n分类任务中表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加计算复杂度，因为sparsemax需要求解优化问题。
在极大规模模型上的可扩展性尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对可解释性核心问题，但实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态稀疏注意力机制（sparsemax）改进稀疏自编码器，在保持高概念质量的同时降低重构损失。

papers.title: Dual-Axis Generative Reward Model Toward Semantic and Turn-taking Robustness in Interactive Spoken Dialogue Models
papers.abstract: Achieving seamless, human-like interaction remains a key challenge for full-duplex spoken dialogue models (SDMs). Reinforcement learning (RL) has substantially enhanced text- and vision-language models, while well-designed reward signals are crucial for the performance of RL. We consider RL a promising strategy to address the key challenge for SDMs. However, a fundamental barrier persists: prevailing automated metrics for assessing interaction quality rely on superficial proxies, such as behavioral statistics or timing-prediction accuracy, failing to provide reliable reward signals for RL. On the other hand, human evaluations, despite their richness, remain costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale. We tackle this critical barrier by proposing a Dual-Axis Generative Reward Model, which is trained to understand complex interaction dynamics using a detailed taxonomy and an annotated dataset, produces a single score and, crucially, provides separate evaluations for semantic quality and interaction timing. Such dual outputs furnish precise diagnostic feedback for SDMs and deliver a dependable, instructive reward signal suitable for online reinforcement learning. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on interaction-quality assessment across a wide spectrum of datasets, spanning synthetic dialogues and complex real-world interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出双轴生成式奖励模型，为全双工口语对话模型提供语义和交互时序的细粒度奖励信号。

papers.title: Beyond Prompts: Unconditional 3D Inversion for Out-of-Distribution Shapes
papers.abstract: Text-driven inversion of generative models is a core paradigm for manipulating 2D or 3D content, unlocking numerous applications such as text-based editing, style transfer, or inverse problems. However, it relies on the assumption that generative models remain sensitive to natural language prompts. We demonstrate that for state-of-the-art native text-to-3D generative models, this assumption often collapses. We identify a critical failure mode where generation trajectories are drawn into latent ``sink traps'': regions where the model becomes insensitive to prompt modifications. In these regimes, changes to the input text fail to alter internal representations in a way that alters the output geometry. Crucially, we observe that this is not a limitation of the model's \textit{geometric} expressivity; the same generative models possess the ability to produce a vast diversity of shapes but, as we demonstrate, become insensitive to out-of-distribution \textit{text} guidance. We investigate this behavior by analyzing the sampling trajectories of the generative model, and find that complex geometries can still be represented and produced by leveraging the model's unconditional generative prior. This leads to a more robust framework for text-based 3D shape editing that bypasses latent sinks by decoupling a model's geometric representation power from its linguistic sensitivity. Our approach addresses the limitations of current 3D pipelines and enables high-fidelity semantic manipulation of out-of-distribution 3D shapes. Project webpage: https://daidedou.sorpi.fr/publication/beyondprompts

analysis.tldr: 发现文本到3D生成模型存在潜在“陷阱”导致对文本不敏感，提出利用无条件先验进行3D形状编辑的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本驱动3D生成模型假设对自然语言提示敏感，但实际中该假设常失效，限制了编辑和逆问题的应用。

papers.title: Reward-Aware Trajectory Shaping for Few-step Visual Generation
papers.abstract: Achieving high-fidelity generation in extremely few sampling steps has long been a central goal of generative modeling. Existing approaches largely rely on distillation-based frameworks to compress the original multi-step denoising process into a few-step generator. However, such methods inherently constrain the student to imitate a stronger multi-step teacher, imposing the teacher as an upper bound on student performance. We argue that introducing \textbf{preference alignment awareness} enables the student to optimize toward reward-preferred generation quality, potentially surpassing the teacher instead of being restricted to rigid teacher imitation. To this end, we propose \textbf{Reward-Aware Trajectory Shaping (RATS)}, a lightweight framework for preference-aligned few-step generation. Specifically, teacher and student latent trajectories are aligned at key denoising stages through horizon matching, while a \textbf{reward-aware gate} is introduced to adaptively regulate teacher guidance based on their relative reward performance. Trajectory shaping is strengthened when the teacher achieves higher rewards, and relaxed when the student matches or surpasses the teacher, thereby enabling continued reward-driven improvement. By seamlessly integrating trajectory distillation, reward-aware gating, and preference alignment, RATS effectively transfers preference-relevant knowledge from high-step generators without incurring additional test-time computational overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that RATS substantially improves the efficiency--quality trade-off in few-step visual generation, significantly narrowing the gap between few-step students and stronger multi-step generators.

analysis.tldr: 提出奖励感知轨迹塑形（RATS），通过偏好对齐使少步生成器超越教师模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有少步生成依赖蒸馏，学生受限于教师性能上限，缺乏向奖励偏好优化的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让少步生成器在极少量采样步数下超越教师模型，实现偏好对齐的高保真生成。

analysis.method: RATS框架：通过水平匹配对齐师生潜在轨迹，引入奖励感知门控根据相对奖励自适应调节教师引导强度，结合轨迹蒸馏、奖励感知门控和偏好对齐。
contributions: 提出RATS框架，首次将偏好对齐引入少步视觉生成，使学生能超越教师。
设计奖励感知门控机制，根据师生奖励差异动态调节蒸馏强度，实现持续奖励驱动改进。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖奖励模型质量，奖励噪声影响性能。
