analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合GNN与LLM解决推荐中的准确性与多样性平衡，实验充分，但领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CPGRec+框架，通过偏好感知边重加权和LLM增强表示生成，平衡游戏推荐的准确性与多样性。

papers.title: Prompt Optimization Is a Coin Flip: Diagnosing When It Helps in Compound AI Systems
papers.abstract: Prompt optimization in compound AI systems is statistically indistinguishable from a coin flip: across 72 optimization runs on Claude Haiku (6 methods $\times$ 4 tasks $\times$ 3 repeats), 49% score below zero-shot; on Amazon Nova Lite, the failure rate is even higher. Yet on one task, all six methods improve over zero-shot by up to $+6.8$ points. What distinguishes success from failure? We investigate with 18,000 grid evaluations and 144 optimization runs, testing two assumptions behind end-to-end optimization tools like TextGrad and DSPy: (A) individual prompts are worth optimizing, and (B) agent prompts interact, requiring joint optimization. Interaction effects are never significant ($p > 0.52$, all $F < 1.0$), and optimization helps only when the task has exploitable output structure -- a format the model can produce but does not default to. We provide a two-stage diagnostic: an \$80 ANOVA pre-test for agent coupling, and a 10-minute headroom test that predicts whether optimization is worthwhile -- turning a coin flip into an informed decision.

analysis.tldr: 提示优化在复合AI系统中效果如同抛硬币，仅当任务具有可开发的输出结构时才有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端优化工具（如TextGrad、DSPy）被广泛用于复合AI系统，但其实际效果缺乏系统分析，常常无效，造成资源浪费。
analysis.problem: 确定提示优化在复合AI系统中何时有效，并诊断其失败原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在72次优化运行中，49%的优化结果低于零样本基线，交互效应不显著，优化仅在任务具有可开发的输出结构时有效。
analysis.method: 通过18,000次网格评估和144次优化运行，测试两个假设（个体提示值得优化、代理提示交互需要联合优化），并提出两阶段诊断：ANOVA预测试和10分钟余量测试。
contributions: 揭示提示优化在复合AI系统中效果如同抛硬币，失败率高达49%。
提出两阶段诊断方法，将抛硬币决策转化为知情决策。
analysis.experiments: 在Claude Haiku和Amazon Nova Lite上进行了72次优化运行（6种方法×4个任务×3次重复）和18,000次网格评估。
limitations: 仅测试了两个基础模型，可能不适用于其他模型。
诊断方法需要额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 揭示了提示优化的实际效果问题，提供了实用诊断方法，但实验范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提示优化在复合AI系统中效果如同抛硬币，仅当任务具有可开发的输出结构时才有效。

papers.title: MapSR: Prompt-Driven Land Cover Map Super-Resolution via Vision Foundation Models
papers.abstract: High-resolution (HR) land-cover mapping is often constrained by the high cost of dense HR annotations. We revisit this problem from the perspective of map super-resolution, which enhances coarse low-resolution (LR) land-cover products into HR maps at the resolution of the input imagery. Existing weakly supervised methods can leverage LR labels, but they typically use them to retrain dense predictors with substantial computational cost. We propose MapSR, a prompt-driven framework that decouples supervision from model training. MapSR uses LR labels once to extract class prompts from frozen vision foundation model features through a lightweight linear probe, after which HR mapping proceeds via training-free metric inference and graph-based prediction refinement. Specifically, class prompts are estimated by aggregating high-confidence HR features identified by the linear probe, and HR predictions are obtained by cosine-similarity matching followed by graph-based propagation for spatial refinement. Experiments on the Chesapeake Bay dataset show that MapSR achieves 59.64% mIoU without any HR labels, remaining competitive with the strongest weakly supervised baseline and surpassing a fully supervised baseline. Notably, MapSR reduces trainable parameters by four orders of magnitude and shortens training time from hours to minutes, enabling scalable HR mapping under limited annotation and compute budgets. The code is available at https://github.com/rikirikirikiriki/MapSR.

analysis.tldr: MapSR利用视觉基础模型和轻量级线性探针，通过提示驱动实现无高分辨率标签的土地覆盖图超分辨率，大幅降低计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率土地覆盖制图通常需要密集的高分辨率标注，成本高昂；现有弱监督方法需重新训练密集预测器，计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用高分辨率标签且不重新训练模型的情况下，将粗分辨率土地覆盖产品提升至输入图像分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MapSR使用低分辨率标签一次，通过轻量级线性探针从冻结的视觉基础模型特征中提取类别提示，然后通过无训练的度量推理和图基预测细化进行高分辨率映射。
contributions: 提出提示驱动框架MapSR，将监督与模型训练解耦，仅需低分辨率标签即可实现高分辨率映射。
在Chesapeake Bay数据集上达到59.64% mIoU，与最强弱监督基线相当，且可训练参数减少四个数量级，训练时间从小时级降至分钟级。
analysis.experiments: 在Chesapeake Bay数据集上进行了实验，MapSR在无高分辨率标签下达到59.64% mIoU，与最强弱监督基线竞争，并超越全监督基线。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉基础模型的特征质量，在域外数据上泛化性未知。
图基细化步骤可能引入额外计算，但摘要未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（提示驱动解耦监督），实验效果显著且效率极高，与遥感应用方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MapSR利用视觉基础模型和轻量级线性探针，通过提示驱动实现无高分辨率标签的土地覆盖图超分辨率，大幅降低计算成本。

papers.title: TurboTalk: Progressive Distillation for One-Step Audio-Driven Talking Avatar Generation
papers.abstract: Existing audio-driven video digital human generation models rely on multi-step denoising, resulting in substantial computational overhead that severely limits their deployment in real-world settings. While one-step distillation approaches can significantly accelerate inference, they often suffer from training instability. To address this challenge, we propose TurboTalk, a two-stage progressive distillation framework that effectively compresses a multi-step audio-driven video diffusion model into a single-step generator. We first adopt Distribution Matching Distillation to obtain a strong and stable 4-step student, and then progressively reduce the denoising steps from 4 to 1 through adversarial distillation. To ensure stable training under extreme step reduction, we introduce a progressive timestep sampling strategy and a self-compare adversarial objective that provides an intermediate adversarial reference that stabilizes progressive distillation. Our method achieve single-step generation of video talking avatar, boosting inference speed by 120 times while maintaining high generation quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段渐进蒸馏框架TurboTalk，将多步音频驱动视频扩散模型压缩为单步生成器，推理加速120倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频驱动数字人生成模型依赖多步去噪，计算开销大，难以部署到实时场景；单步蒸馏方法训练不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何将多步音频驱动视频扩散模型高效压缩为单步生成器，同时保持生成质量和训练稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段渐进蒸馏：第一阶段使用分布匹配蒸馏获得稳定的4步学生模型；第二阶段通过对抗蒸馏逐步将去噪步数从4减少到1，并引入渐进时间步采样策略和自比较对抗目标以稳定训练。
contributions: 提出TurboTalk两阶段渐进蒸馏框架，实现单步音频驱动说话头像生成。
引入渐进时间步采样策略和自比较对抗目标，解决极端步数减少下的训练不稳定问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定音频驱动视频扩散模型架构。
单步生成质量可能仍与多步模型存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，推理加速显著，但摘要未提供实验细节，保守推荐。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段渐进蒸馏框架TurboTalk，将多步音频驱动视频扩散模型压缩为单步生成器，推理加速120倍。

papers.title: Enhancing Mental Health Counseling Support in Bangladesh using Culturally-Grounded Knowledge
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in generating supportive responses for mental health and counseling applications. However, their responses often lack cultural sensitivity, contextual grounding, and clinically appropriate guidance. This work addresses the gap of how to systematically incorporate domain-specific, clinically validated knowledge into LLMs to improve counseling quality. We utilize and compare two approaches, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and a knowledge graph (KG)-based method, designed to support para-counselors. Our KG is constructed manually and clinically validated, capturing causal relationships between stressors, interventions, and outcomes, with contributions from multidisciplinary people. We evaluated multiple LLMs in both settings using BERTScore F1 and SBERT cosine similarity, as well as human evaluation across five metrics, which is designed to directly measure the effectiveness of counseling beyond similarity at the surface level. The results show that KG-based approaches consistently improve contextual relevance, clinical appropriateness, and practical usability compared to RAG alone, demonstrating that structured, expert-validated knowledge plays a critical role in addressing LLMs limitations in counseling tasks.

analysis.tldr: 针对孟加拉国心理健康咨询，构建临床验证的知识图谱比检索增强生成更能提升大模型回复的文化敏感性和临床适用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型在心理健康咨询中缺乏文化敏感性和临床指导性，而现有方法未系统整合领域专业知识。
analysis.problem: 如何将领域特定、临床验证的知识系统性地融入大模型以提升咨询质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建手动且临床验证的知识图谱（KG），捕捉压力源、干预和结果间的因果关系，并与检索增强生成（RAG）对比，评估多种大模型。
contributions: 提出并比较了两种文化适应性知识整合方法（RAG和KG）用于心理健康咨询。
构建了临床验证的知识图谱，包含因果关系，并由多学科团队贡献。
通过自动指标和人工评估证明了KG方法在上下文相关性、临床适当性和实用性上优于RAG。
analysis.experiments: 使用BERTScore F1和SBERT余弦相似度自动评估，以及五项指标的人工评估。
limitations: 知识图谱构建依赖人工且规模有限，可能难以扩展。
仅针对孟加拉国背景，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有应用价值但创新性中等，实验规模有限，适合关注心理健康NLP的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对孟加拉国心理健康咨询，构建临床验证的知识图谱比检索增强生成更能提升大模型回复的文化敏感性和临床适用性。

papers.title: Generative Augmented Inference
papers.abstract: Data-driven operations management often relies on parameters estimated from costly human-generated labels. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and other AI systems offer inexpensive auxiliary data, but introduce a new challenge: AI outputs are not direct observations of the target outcomes, but could involve high-dimensional representations with complex and unknown relationships to human labels. Conventional methods leverage AI predictions as direct proxies for true labels, which can be inefficient or unreliable when this relationship is weak or misspecified. We propose Generative Augmented Inference (GAI), a general framework that incorporates AI-generated outputs as informative features for estimating models of human-labeled outcomes. GAI uses an orthogonal moment construction that enables consistent estimation and valid inference with flexible, nonparametric relationship between LLM-generated outputs and human labels. We establish asymptotic normality and show a "safe default" property: relative to human-data-only estimators, GAI weakly improves estimation efficiency under arbitrary auxiliary signals and yields strict gains whenever the auxiliary information is predictive. Empirically, GAI outperforms benchmarks across diverse settings. In conjoint analysis with weak auxiliary signals, GAI reduces estimation error by about 50% and lowers human labeling requirements by over 75%. In retail pricing, where all methods access the same auxiliary inputs, GAI consistently outperforms alternative estimators, highlighting the value of its construction rather than differences in information. In health insurance choice, it cuts labeling requirements by over 90% while maintaining decision accuracy. Across applications, GAI improves confidence interval coverage without inflating width. Overall, GAI provides a principled and scalable approach to integrating AI-generated information.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成增强推断（GAI）框架，利用LLM输出作为特征提升人类标注数据的估计效率，并保证统计有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据驱动的运营管理依赖昂贵的人工标注参数，而LLM等AI系统提供廉价辅助数据，但AI输出与人类标签的关系复杂且未知，直接代理使用效率低或不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何有效整合AI生成的高维表征作为信息特征，以提升基于人类标签的模型估计效率和推断有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出生成增强推断（GAI）框架，采用正交矩构造，允许LLM输出与人类标签之间灵活的非参数关系，实现一致估计和有效推断，并具有“安全默认”性质。
contributions: 提出GAI框架，通过正交矩构造实现AI辅助下的一致估计和有效推断。
证明“安全默认”性质：相比仅用人类数据，GAI弱提升效率，且辅助信息有预测性时严格增益。
在联合分析、零售定价和健康保险选择等应用中验证GAI降低标注需求并提升估计精度。
analysis.experiments: 在联合分析、零售定价和健康保险选择三个应用场景中，GAI相比基准方法降低估计误差约50%，减少人工标注需求超过75%至90%，并改善置信区间覆盖率。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM输出与人类标签之间的某种相关性假设。
框架在非参数关系下的计算效率可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论性质清晰，实验效果显著，但主题偏向统计推断与运营管理，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成增强推断（GAI）框架，利用LLM输出作为特征提升人类标注数据的估计效率，并保证统计有效性。

papers.title: M3D-Net: Multi-Modal 3D Facial Feature Reconstruction Network for Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancement of deep learning in image generation, facial forgery techniques have achieved unprecedented realism, posing serious threats to cybersecurity and information authenticity. Most existing deepfake detection approaches rely on the reconstruction of isolated facial attributes without fully exploiting the complementary nature of multi-modal feature representations. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel Multi-Modal 3D Facial Feature Reconstruction Network (M3D-Net) for deepfake detection. Our method leverages an end-to-end dual-stream architecture that reconstructs fine-grained facial geometry and reflectance properties from single-view RGB images via a self-supervised 3D facial reconstruction module. The network further enhances detection performance through a 3D Feature Pre-fusion Module (PFM), which adaptively adjusts multi-scale features, and a Multi-modal Fusion Module (MFM) that effectively integrates RGB and 3D-reconstructed features using attention mechanisms. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of detection accuracy and robustness, significantly outperforming existing methods while exhibiting strong generalization across diverse scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出M3D-Net，通过多模态3D人脸特征重建提升深度伪造检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法多依赖单一面部属性重建，未充分利用多模态特征互补性，且面对高真实感伪造时鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合RGB图像与3D重建特征以提升深度伪造检测的准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出M3D-Net，包含自监督3D人脸重建模块、3D特征预融合模块（PFM）和多模态融合模块（MFM），采用端到端双流架构。
contributions: 提出多模态3D人脸特征重建网络，结合RGB与3D特征进行深度伪造检测。
设计3D特征预融合模块和多模态融合模块，有效整合多尺度与多模态信息。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开数据集上达到SOTA，检测准确率和鲁棒性显著优于现有方法，且泛化能力强。
limitations: 依赖单视图RGB图像进行3D重建，可能受光照和姿态影响。
计算复杂度较高，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与视觉理解方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出M3D-Net，通过多模态3D人脸特征重建提升深度伪造检测性能。

papers.title: Don't Retrieve, Navigate: Distilling Enterprise Knowledge into Navigable Agent Skills for QA and RAG
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds LLM responses in external evidence but treats the model as a passive consumer of search results: it never sees how the corpus is organized or what it has not yet retrieved, limiting its ability to backtrack or combine scattered evidence. We present Corpus2Skill, which distills a document corpus into a hierarchical skill directory offline and lets an LLM agent navigate it at serve time. The compilation pipeline iteratively clusters documents, generates LLM-written summaries at each level, and materializes the result as a tree of navigable skill files. At serve time, the agent receives a bird's-eye view of the corpus, drills into topic branches via progressively finer summaries, and retrieves full documents by ID. Because the hierarchy is explicitly visible, the agent can reason about where to look, backtrack from unproductive paths, and combine evidence across branches. On WixQA, an enterprise customer-support benchmark for RAG, Corpus2Skill outperforms dense retrieval, RAPTOR, and agentic RAG baselines across all quality metrics. We further evaluate generalization on nine RAGBench subsets reformulated as retrieval-stress benchmarks: Corpus2Skill attains the highest macro-average F1 across the full 10-dataset suite and characterizes a clear regime -- single-domain, atomic-document corpora -- where corpus navigation is the right primitive, while flat retrieval remains preferable for open-domain or extractive pools.

analysis.tldr: 将文档语料库离线蒸馏为可导航的技能目录树，让LLM代理在服务时主动导航而非被动检索，显著提升企业QA和RAG性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG将LLM视为检索结果的被动消费者，模型无法感知语料库的组织结构或未检索内容，限制了回溯和跨片段证据组合的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM代理在服务时主动理解语料库结构，实现高效、可回溯的文档导航与证据组合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Corpus2Skill：离线将文档聚类并生成层级摘要，构建可导航的技能目录树；服务时代理先获得语料库概览，逐层深入主题分支，通过ID检索完整文档。
contributions: 提出Corpus2Skill方法，将语料库蒸馏为层级技能目录，使LLM代理能主动导航而非被动检索。
在企业基准WixQA和9个RAGBench子集上验证，Corpus2Skill在质量指标上超越稠密检索、RAPTOR和智能体RAG基线。
analysis.experiments: 在WixQA（企业客服RAG基准）和9个RAGBench子集（重新表述为检索压力基准）上评估，Corpus2Skill在WixQA上所有质量指标优于基线，在10数据集套件上取得最高宏平均F1。
limitations: 方法在开放域或抽取式语料库上可能不如平面检索。
构建层级目录的离线蒸馏过程可能计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，在企业RAG场景有显著提升，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将文档语料库离线蒸馏为可导航的技能目录树，让LLM代理在服务时主动导航而非被动检索，显著提升企业QA和RAG性能。

papers.title: Deepfake Detection Generalization with Diffusion Noise
papers.abstract: Deepfake detectors face growing challenges in generalization as new image synthesis techniques emerge. In particular, deepfakes generated by diffusion models are highly photorealistic and often evade detectors trained on GAN-based forgeries. This paper addresses the generalization problem in deepfake detection by leveraging diffusion noise characteristics. We propose an Attention-guided Noise Learning (ANL) framework that integrates a pre-trained diffusion model into the deepfake detection pipeline to guide the learning of more robust features. Specifically, our method uses the diffusion model's denoising process to expose subtle artifacts: the detector is trained to predict the noise contained in an input image at a given diffusion step, forcing it to capture discrepancies between real and synthetic images, while an attention-guided mechanism derived from the predicted noise is introduced to encourage the model to focus on globally distributed discrepancies rather than local patterns. By harnessing the frozen diffusion model's learned distribution of natural images, the ANL method acts as a form of regularization, improving the detector's generalization to unseen forgery types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ANL significantly outperforms existing methods on multiple benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy in detecting diffusion-generated deepfakes. Notably, the proposed framework boosts generalization performance (e.g., improving ACC/AP by a substantial margin on unseen models) without introducing additional overhead during inference. Our results highlight that diffusion noise provides a powerful signal for generalizable deepfake detection.

analysis.tldr: 利用扩散模型噪声特征提升深度伪造检测的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器对扩散模型生成的高保真图像泛化能力差，亟需鲁棒特征学习方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用扩散噪声特性设计检测框架，使其对未见过的伪造类型（尤其是扩散模型生成图像）具有良好泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型生成图像具有高度逼真性，传统基于GAN伪造训练的检测器难以捕捉其伪影；扩散噪声可暴露真实与合成图像间的细微差异。
analysis.method: 提出注意力引导噪声学习（ANL）框架：集成预训练扩散模型，通过预测输入图像在给定扩散步的噪声来强制检测器捕获全局分布差异，并利用预测噪声的注意力机制聚焦全局伪影。
contributions: 提出ANL框架，利用扩散噪声作为正则化信号提升深度伪造检测泛化性
在多个基准上达到SOTA，尤其对扩散模型生成图像检测效果显著
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，ANL显著优于现有方法，在未见过的模型上ACC/AP大幅提升，且推理时无额外开销。
limitations: 依赖预训练扩散模型，可能受限于其训练数据分布
未探讨对非扩散模型（如GAN）的泛化性能
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对深度伪造检测泛化问题有重要贡献，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用扩散模型噪声特征提升深度伪造检测的泛化能力。

papers.title: LinuxArena: A Control Setting for AI Agents in Live Production Software Environments
papers.abstract: We introduce LinuxArena, a control setting in which agents operate directly on live, multi-service production environments. LinuxArena contains 20 environments, 1,671 main tasks representing legitimate software engineering work, and 184 side tasks representing safety failures such as data exfiltration and backdooring, making it the largest and most diverse control setting for software engineering to date. We validate LinuxArena is useful for control research by running sabotage evaluations, which measure whether attackers can complete side tasks while working on main tasks, and monitor evaluations, which measure a monitor model's ability to detect sabotage attempts. Against a GPT-5-nano trusted monitor at a 1\% step-wise false positive rate, Claude Opus 4.6 achieves roughly a 23% undetected sabotage success rate. We additionally release LaStraj, a dataset of human-crafted attack trajectories that evade monitors at substantially higher rates than any model-generated attacks we elicited, showing that current attack policies do not saturate LinuxArena. These results suggest that LinuxArena has meaningful headroom for both attackers and defenders, making it a strong testbed for developing and evaluating future control protocols.

analysis.tldr: LinuxArena 是一个用于 AI Agent 在生产软件环境中安全控制的大型基准，包含主任务和侧任务，并提供了攻击与监控评估。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent 在真实生产环境中的安全控制缺乏大规模、多样化的基准，现有工作难以评估攻击与防御能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能全面评估 AI Agent 在生产软件环境中执行合法任务同时防止安全违规（如数据泄露、后门植入）的测试平台。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含 20 个环境、1671 个主任务和 184 个侧任务的 LinuxArena 基准，并引入破坏评估和监控评估两种协议，同时发布人类专家攻击轨迹数据集 LaStraj。
contributions: 提出了 LinuxArena，目前最大且最多样化的软件工程控制设置基准。
发布了 LaStraj 数据集，包含人类专家制作的攻击轨迹，其逃避监控的成功率远高于模型生成的攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在 LinuxArena 上进行了破坏评估和监控评估实验，使用 GPT-5-nano 作为可信监控器，在 1% 步级假阳性率下，Claude Opus 4.6 的未检测破坏成功率约为 23%。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖了部分生产环境场景，泛化性有限。
监控器性能依赖于特定模型，实际部署中可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks

papers.title: Learning Adaptive Reasoning Paths for Efficient Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Visual reasoning models (VRMs) have recently shown strong cross-modal reasoning capabilities by integrating visual perception with language reasoning. However, they often suffer from overthinking, producing unnecessarily long reasoning chains for any tasks. We attribute this issue to \textbf{Reasoning Path Redundancy} in visual reasoning: many visual questions do not require the full reasoning process. To address this, we propose \textbf{AVR}, an adaptive visual reasoning framework that decomposes visual reasoning into three cognitive functions: visual perception, logical reasoning, and answer application. It further enables models to dynamically choose among three response formats: Full Format, Perception-Only Format, and Direct Answer. AVR is trained with FS-GRPO, an adaptation of Group Relative Policy Optimization that encourages the model to select the most efficient reasoning format while preserving correctness. Experiments on multiple vision-language benchmarks show that AVR reduces token usage by 50--90\% while maintaining overall accuracy, especially in perception-intensive tasks. These results demonstrate that adaptive visual reasoning can effectively mitigate overthinking in VRMs. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/RunRiotComeOn/AVR.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应视觉推理框架AVR，通过动态选择推理路径减少冗余，在保持准确率的同时降低50-90%的token使用量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉推理模型存在过度思考问题，即对所有任务都生成冗长的推理链，导致计算浪费，而许多视觉问题实际上不需要完整推理过程。

papers.title: MARS$^2$: Scaling Multi-Agent Tree Search via Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) paradigms have demonstrated strong performance on reasoning-intensive tasks such as code generation. However, limited trajectory diversity often leads to diminishing returns, which constrains the achievable performance ceiling. Search-enhanced RL alleviates this issue by introducing structured exploration, which remains constrained by the single-agent policy priors. Meanwhile, leveraging multiple interacting policies can acquire more diverse exploratory signals, but existing approaches are typically decoupled from structured search. We propose \textbf{MARS$^2$} (Multi-Agent Reinforced Tree-Search Scaling), a unified RL framework in which multiple independently-optimized agents collaborate within a shared tree-structured search environment. MARS$^2$ models the search tree as a learnable multi-agent interaction environment, enabling heterogeneous agents to collaboratively generate and refine candidate solutions within a shared search topology. To support effective learning, we introduce a path-level group advantage formulation based on tree-consistent reward shaping, which facilitates effective credit assignment across complex search trajectories. Experiments on code generation benchmarks show that MARS$^2$ consistently improves performance across diverse model combinations and training settings, demonstrating the effectiveness of coupling multi-agent collaboration with tree search for enhancing reinforcement learning. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/TsinghuaC3I/MARTI.

analysis.tldr: 提出MARS²框架，将多智能体协作与树搜索结合，通过强化学习提升代码生成性能。

papers.title: Revisiting Token Compression for Accelerating ViT-based Sparse Multi-View 3D Object Detectors
papers.abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT)-based sparse multi-view 3D object detectors have achieved remarkable accuracy but still suffer from high inference latency due to heavy token processing. To accelerate these models, token compression has been widely explored. However, our revisit of existing strategies, such as token pruning, merging, and patch size enlargement, reveals that they often discard informative background cues, disrupt contextual consistency, and lose fine-grained semantics, negatively affecting 3D detection. To overcome these limitations, we propose SEPatch3D, a novel framework that dynamically adjusts patch sizes while preserving critical semantic information within coarse patches. Specifically, we design Spatiotemporal-aware Patch Size Selection (SPSS) that assigns small patches to scenes containing nearby objects to preserve fine details and large patches to background-dominated scenes to reduce computation cost. To further mitigate potential detail loss, Informative Patch Selection (IPS) selects the informative patches for feature refinement, and Cross-Granularity Feature Enhancement (CGFE) injects fine-grained details into selected coarse patches, enriching semantic features. Experiments on the nuScenes and Argoverse 2 validation sets show that SEPatch3D achieves up to \textbf{57\%} faster inference than the StreamPETR baseline and \textbf{20\%} higher efficiency than the state-of-the-art ToC3D-faster, while preserving comparable detection accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Mingqj/SEPatch3D.

analysis.tldr: 提出SEPatch3D框架，通过动态调整patch大小和特征增强，加速基于ViT的稀疏多视图3D目标检测器，实现高达57%的推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于ViT的稀疏多视图3D目标检测器精度高但推理延迟大，现有token压缩方法（如剪枝、合并、增大patch）会丢弃背景信息、破坏上下文一致性并丢失细粒度语义，影响检测性能。

analysis.method: 提出SEPatch3D框架，包含三个组件：1) 时空感知patch大小选择（SPSS），根据场景中物体距离动态分配小patch（近处物体）或大patch（背景主导区域）；2) 信息性patch选择（IPS），选取信息丰富的patch进行特征细化；3) 跨粒度特征增强（CGFE），将细粒度细节注入选中的粗粒度patch中。

提出SEPatch3D框架，通过动态patch大小调整和特征增强实现加速与精度平衡。
在nuScenes和Argoverse 2数据集上验证了SEPatch3D相比StreamPETR基线加速57%，相比ToC3D-faster效率提升20%，且精度相当。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2验证集上进行实验，SEPatch3D相比StreamPETR基线推理加速57%，相比ToC3D-faster效率提升20%，同时保持可比的检测精度。

papers.title: DVFace: Spatio-Temporal Dual-Prior Diffusion for Video Face Restoration
papers.abstract: Video face restoration aims to enhance degraded face videos into high-quality results with realistic facial details, stable identity, and temporal coherence. Recent diffusion-based methods have brought strong generative priors to restoration and enabled more realistic detail synthesis. However, existing approaches for face videos still rely heavily on generic diffusion priors and multi-step sampling, which limit both facial adaptation and inference efficiency. These limitations motivate the use of one-step diffusion for video face restoration, yet achieving faithful facial recovery alongside temporally stable outputs remains challenging. In this paper, we propose, DVFace, a one-step diffusion framework for real-world video face restoration. Specifically, we introduce a spatio-temporal dual-codebook design to extract complementary spatial and temporal facial priors from degraded videos. We further propose an asymmetric spatio-temporal fusion module to inject these priors into the diffusion backbone according to their distinct roles. Evaluation on various benchmarks shows that DVFace delivers superior restoration quality, temporal consistency, and identity preservation compared to recent methods. Code: https://github.com/zhengchen1999/DVFace.

papers.title: The Fourth Challenge on Image Super-Resolution ($\times$4) at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
papers.abstract: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 image super-resolution ($\times$4) challenge, one of the associated competitions of the NTIRE 2026 Workshop at CVPR 2026. The challenge aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a $\times$4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective super-resolution solutions and analyze recent advances in the field. To reflect the evolving objectives of image super-resolution, the challenge includes two tracks: (1) a restoration track, which emphasizes pixel-wise fidelity and ranks submissions based on PSNR; and (2) a perceptual track, which focuses on visual realism and evaluates results using a perceptual score. A total of 194 participants registered for the challenge, with 31 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, datasets, evaluation protocol, main results, and methods of participating teams. The challenge provides a unified benchmark and offers insights into current progress and future directions in image super-resolution.

papers.title: Controllable Video Object Insertion via Multiview Priors
papers.abstract: Video object insertion is a critical task for dynamically inserting new objects into existing environments. Previous video generation methods focus primarily on synthesizing entire scenes while struggling with ensuring consistent object appearance, spatial alignment, and temporal coherence when inserting objects into existing videos. In this paper, we propose a novel solution for Video Object Insertion, which integrates multi-view object priors to address the common challenges of appearance inconsistency and occlusion handling in dynamic environments. By lifting 2D reference images into multi-view representations and leveraging a dual-path view-consistent conditioning mechanism, our framework ensures stable identity guidance and robust integration across diverse viewpoints. A quality-aware weighting mechanism is also employed to adaptively handle noisy or imperfect inputs. Additionally, we introduce an Integration-Aware Consistency Module that guarantees spatial realism, effectively resolving occlusion and boundary artifacts while maintaining temporal continuity across frames. Experimental results show that our solution significantly improves the quality of video object insertion, providing stable and realistic integration.

papers.title: VeriGraphi: A Multi-Agent Framework of Hierarchical RTL Generation for Large Hardware Designs
papers.abstract: Generating synthesizable Verilog for large, hierarchical hardware designs remains a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs), which struggle to replicate the structured reasoning that human experts employ when translating complex specifications into RTL. When tasked with producing hierarchical Verilog, LLMs frequently lose context across modules, hallucinate interfaces, fabricate inter-module wiring, and fail to maintain structural coherence - failures that intensify as design complexity grows and specifications involve informal prose, figures, and tables that resist direct operationalization. To address these challenges, we present VeriGraphi, a framework that introduces a spec-anchored Knowledge Graph as the architectural substrate driving the RTL generation pipeline. VeriGraphi constructs a HDA, a structured knowledge graph that explicitly encodes module hierarchy, port-level interfaces, wiring semantics, and inter-module dependencies as first-class graph entities and relations. Built through iterative multi-agent analysis of the specification, this Knowledge Graph provides a deterministic, machine-checkable structural scaffold before code generation. Guided by the KG, a progressive coding module incrementally generates pseudo-code and synthesizable RTL while enforcing interface consistency and dependency correctness at each submodule stage. We evaluate VeriGraphi on a benchmark of three representative specification documents from the National Institute of Standards and Technology and their corresponding implementations, and we present a RV32I processor as a detailed case study to illustrate the full pipeline. The results demonstrate that VeriGraphi enables reliable hierarchical RTL generation with minimal human intervention for RISC-V, marking a significant milestone for LLM-generated hardware design while maintaining strong functional correctness.

analysis.tldr: VeriGraphi通过规范锚定的知识图谱驱动多智能体框架，实现大规模硬件设计的层次化RTL生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在生成大规模层次化硬件设计时，难以保持结构一致性，常出现上下文丢失、接口幻觉和模块间连线错误，且规范常包含非形式化文本、图表和表格，难以直接操作化。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM可靠地生成大规模、层次化的可综合Verilog代码，保持模块层次、接口和依赖关系的结构一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在生成层次化Verilog时，随着设计复杂度增加，会频繁丢失跨模块上下文、幻觉接口、编造模块间连线，且无法维持结构连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出VeriGraphi框架，通过多智能体迭代分析规范构建规范锚定的知识图谱（HDA），显式编码模块层次、端口接口、连线语义和模块间依赖，然后由渐进式编码模块基于该图谱逐步生成伪代码和可综合RTL。
contributions: 提出规范锚定的知识图谱作为RTL生成的架构基板，显式编码层次化硬件结构。
设计多智能体迭代分析流程，从非形式化规范中构建结构化知识图谱。
实现渐进式编码模块，利用知识图谱保证接口一致性和依赖正确性，生成可综合RTL。
analysis.experiments: 在来自美国国家标准与技术研究院的三个代表性规范文档及其对应实现上评估，并以RV32I处理器作为详细案例研究，结果显示VeriGraphi能以最少人工干预生成可靠的层次化RTL，并保持强功能正确性。
limitations: 评估仅基于三个规范文档和一个处理器案例，泛化性有待验证。

papers.title: Temporal Contrastive Decoding: A Training-Free Method for Large Audio-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large audio-language models (LALMs) generalize across speech, sound, and music, but unified decoders can exhibit a \emph{temporal smoothing bias}: transient acoustic cues may be underutilized in favor of temporally smooth context that is better supported by language priors, leading to less specific audio-grounded outputs. We propose \emph{Temporal Contrastive Decoding} (TCD), a training-free decoding method for unified LALMs that mitigates this effect at inference time. TCD constructs a temporally blurred slow-path view by smoothing the input waveform and re-encoding it, then contrasts next-token logits from the original and slow-path views. The contrastive signal is applied as a token-level logit update restricted to a small candidate set. A self-normalized stability score sets the blur window and update scale, and a step-wise gate based on uncertainty and audio reliance activates the update only when needed. Experiments on MMAU and AIR-Bench show consistent improvements on strong unified LALMs. We further conduct ablations and an architectural applicability study to analyze the contributions of key components and how TCD behaves across large audio-language model designs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种免训练的时域对比解码方法，缓解大型音频语言模型的时间平滑偏差，提升音频接地输出质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型音频语言模型（LALM）在统一解码时存在时间平滑偏差，即倾向于依赖语言先验支持的平滑上下文，而忽略瞬态声学线索，导致输出缺乏音频特异性。现有方法需要额外训练或修改模型结构，成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，在推理时缓解LALM的时间平滑偏差，增强对瞬态声学线索的利用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出统一解码器存在时间平滑偏差：瞬态声学线索被低估，模型更依赖语言先验支持的平滑上下文，导致输出音频接地性不足。
analysis.method: Temporal Contrastive Decoding (TCD)：通过平滑输入波形并重新编码构建时域模糊的慢路径视图，对比原始视图与慢路径视图的下一token logits，将对比信号作为token级logit更新（限制在小候选集），并利用自归一化稳定性分数设置模糊窗口和更新尺度，以及基于不确定性和音频依赖性的逐步门控激活更新。
contributions: 提出TCD，一种免训练的解码方法，有效缓解LALM的时间平滑偏差。
在MMAU和AIR-Bench上验证了TCD对强统一LALM的持续改进，并进行了消融和架构适用性研究。
analysis.experiments: 在MMAU和AIR-Bench上对强统一LALM进行实验，显示一致改进；还进行了消融实验和架构适用性分析。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定音频编码器或模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
对比解码可能引入额外计算开销，影响推理速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且免训练，实验充分，但应用范围限于音频语言模型，影响中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种免训练的时域对比解码方法，缓解大型音频语言模型的时间平滑偏差，提升音频接地输出质量。

papers.title: Giving Faces Their Feelings Back: Explicit Emotion Control for Feedforward Single-Image 3D Head Avatars
papers.abstract: We present a framework for explicit emotion control in feed-forward, single-image 3D head avatar reconstruction. Unlike existing pipelines where emotion is implicitly entangled with geometry or appearance, we treat emotion as a first-class control signal that can be manipulated independently and consistently across identities. Our method injects emotion into existing feed-forward architectures via a dual-path modulation mechanism without modifying their core design. Geometry modulation performs emotion-conditioned normalization in the original parametric space, disentangling emotional state from speech-driven articulation, while appearance modulation captures identity-aware, emotion-dependent visual cues beyond geometry. To enable learning under this setting, we construct a time-synchronized, emotion-consistent multi-identity dataset by transferring aligned emotional dynamics across identities. Integrated into multiple state-of-the-art backbones, our framework preserves reconstruction and reenactment fidelity while enabling controllable emotion transfer, disentangled manipulation, and smooth emotion interpolation, advancing expressive and scalable 3D head avatars.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种前馈式单图3D头部重建中的显式情感控制框架，通过双路径调制实现情感与几何/外观的解耦控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单图3D头部重建方法中情感与几何或外观隐式纠缠，无法独立、跨身份一致地操控情感，限制了表情化3D头像的可控性和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在前馈式单图像3D头部重建中实现显式、解耦且跨身份一致的情感控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双路径调制机制：几何调制在原始参数空间进行情感条件归一化，解耦情感与语音驱动动作；外观调制捕获身份感知的情感相关视觉线索。同时构建时间同步、情感一致的多身份数据集。
contributions: 首次在前馈式单图3D头部重建中实现显式情感控制，将情感作为独立控制信号。
提出双路径调制机制，在不修改核心架构前提下实现情感与几何/外观的解耦。
构建时间同步、情感一致的多身份数据集，支持跨身份情感迁移。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量情感标注数据，数据构建成本较高。
情感控制效果可能受限于前馈架构的表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强（显式情感控制+双路径调制），但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评估；推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种前馈式单图3D头部重建中的显式情感控制框架，通过双路径调制实现情感与几何/外观的解耦控制。

papers.title: WILD-SAM: Phase-Aware Expert Adaptation of SAM for Landslide Detection in Wrapped InSAR Interferograms
papers.abstract: Detecting slow-moving landslides directly from wrapped Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) interferograms is crucial for efficient geohazard monitoring, yet it remains fundamentally challenged by severe phase ambiguity and complex coherence noise. While the Segment Anything Model (SAM) offers a powerful foundation for segmentation, its direct transfer to wrapped phase data is hindered by a profound spectral domain shift, which suppresses the high-frequency fringes essential for boundary delineation. To bridge this gap, we propose WILD-SAM, a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework specifically designed to adapt SAM for high-precision landslide detection on wrapped interferograms. Specifically, the architecture integrates a Phase-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (PA-MoE) Adapter into the frozen encoder to align spectral distributions and introduces a Wavelet-Guided Subband Enhancement (WGSE) strategy to generate frequency-aware dense prompts. The PA-MoE Adapter exploits a dynamic routing mechanism across heterogeneous convolutional experts to adaptively aggregate multi-scale spectral-textural priors, effectively aligning the distribution discrepancy between natural images and interferometric phase data. Meanwhile, the WGSE strategy leverages discrete wavelet transforms to explicitly disentangle high-frequency subbands and refine directional phase textures, injecting these structural cues as dense prompts to ensure topological integrity along sharp landslide boundaries. Extensive experiments on the ISSLIDE and ISSLIDE+ benchmarks demonstrate that WILD-SAM achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing methods in both target completeness and contour fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出WILD-SAM，通过相位感知专家适配和频率感知提示，将SAM迁移至InSAR包裹干涉图滑坡检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 从包裹InSAR干涉图中直接检测缓慢滑坡对地质灾害监测至关重要，但相位模糊和相干噪声导致传统方法困难，且SAM因频谱域偏移无法直接应用。
analysis.problem: 解决SAM在包裹相位数据上的频谱域偏移问题，实现高精度滑坡分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出SAM直接迁移到包裹相位数据时存在频谱域偏移，抑制了边界所需的高频条纹。
analysis.method: 提出WILD-SAM框架，包含相位感知混合专家适配器（PA-MoE）对齐频谱分布，以及小波引导子带增强策略（WGSE）生成频率感知密集提示。
contributions: 提出PA-MoE适配器，通过动态路由机制聚合多尺度频谱-纹理先验，对齐自然图像与干涉相位数据的分布差异。
提出WGSE策略，利用离散小波变换显式解耦高频子带并细化方向相位纹理，作为密集提示注入以保持边界拓扑完整性。
analysis.experiments: 在ISSLIDE和ISSLIDE+基准上达到最先进性能，显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定InSAR数据格式，泛化性需验证。
小波变换的分解层数可能影响性能，需调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合SAM适配与频率感知，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WILD-SAM，通过相位感知专家适配和频率感知提示，将SAM迁移至InSAR包裹干涉图滑坡检测。

papers.title: CSRA: Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation for Robust Sepsis Prediction
papers.abstract: Accurate prediction of future risk and disease progression in sepsis is clinically important for early warning and timely intervention in intensive care. However, short-window sepsis prediction remains challenging, because shorter observation windows provide limited historical evidence, whereas longer prediction horizons reduce the number of patient trajectories with valid future supervision. To address this problem, we propose CSRA, a Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation framework for short-window multi-system ICU time series. CSRA first groups variables by clinical systems and extracts system-level and global representations. It then performs input-adaptive residual perturbation in the spectral domain to generate structured and clinically plausible trajectory variations. To improve augmentation stability and controllability, CSRA is trained end-to-end with the downstream predictor under a unified objective, together with anchor consistency loss and controller regularization. Experiments on a MIMIC-IV sepsis cohort across multiple downstream models show that CSRA is consistently competitive and often superior, reducing regression error by 10.2\% in MSE and 3.7\% in MAE over the non-augmentation baseline, while also yielding consistent gains on classification. CSRA further maintains more favorable performance under shorter observation windows, longer prediction horizons, and smaller training data scales, while also remaining effective on an external clinical dataset~(ZiGongICUinfection), indicating stronger robustness and generalizability in clinically constrained settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出CSRA框架，通过频域残差增强提升短窗口脓毒症预测的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 脓毒症预测中短观察窗口历史证据有限，长预测窗口有效轨迹减少，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 短窗口多系统ICU时间序列的鲁棒预测问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 短窗口和长预测窗口下预测性能显著下降，小训练数据规模下泛化不足。
analysis.method: CSRA框架：按临床系统分组变量提取系统级和全局表示，在频域进行输入自适应残差扰动生成结构化轨迹变体，通过锚点一致性损失和控制器正则化与下游预测器端到端联合训练。
contributions: 提出CSRA框架，首次将频域残差增强用于短窗口脓毒症预测。
在MIMIC-IV和外部数据集上验证了鲁棒性和泛化性，MSE降低10.2%，MAE降低3.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV脓毒症队列和外部ZiGongICUinfection数据集上，使用多种下游模型进行回归和分类评估。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床分组先验。
频域扰动可解释性需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CSRA框架，通过频域残差增强提升短窗口脓毒症预测的鲁棒性。

papers.title: TRACER: Trace-Based Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing for LLM Classification
papers.abstract: Every call to an LLM classification endpoint produces a labeled input-output pair already retained in production logs. These pairs constitute a free, growing training set: a lightweight surrogate trained on them can absorb a significant portion of future traffic at near-zero marginal inference cost. The open questions are when the surrogate is reliable enough to deploy, what it handles versus defers, and how that boundary evolves as data accumulates. We introduce TRACER (Trace-based Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing), an open-source system that trains ML surrogates on an LLM's own production traces and governs deployment through a parity gate: the surrogate is activated only when its agreement with the LLM exceeds a user-specified threshold α. To make the routing boundary transparent, TRACER generates interpretability artifacts describing which input regions the surrogate handles, where it plateaus, and why it defers. On a 77-class intent benchmark with a Sonnet 4.6 teacher, TRACER achieves 83-100% surrogate coverage depending on the quality target α; on a 150-class benchmark, the surrogate fully replaces the teacher. On a natural language inference task, the parity gate correctly refuses deployment because the embedding representation cannot support reliable separation. The system is available as open-source software.

analysis.tldr: TRACER利用LLM生产日志训练轻量代理模型，通过一致性门控实现自适应路由，在分类任务中大幅降低成本。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM分类端点每次调用都会产生带标签的输入-输出对，这些数据被保留在生产日志中，但未被有效利用来降低推理成本。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM生产日志中的历史数据训练轻量代理模型，并动态决定何时由代理模型处理请求以降低成本，同时保证与LLM输出的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TRACER系统：基于LLM生产轨迹训练ML代理模型，通过一致性门控（parity gate）仅在代理与LLM的协议超过阈值α时激活代理，并生成可解释性工件描述代理的覆盖区域和延迟原因。
contributions: 提出TRACER系统，利用LLM生产日志训练代理模型并实现自适应路由。
设计一致性门控机制，确保代理仅在可靠时部署。
生成可解释性工件，揭示代理的决策边界和延迟原因。
analysis.experiments: 在77类意图基准（Sonnet 4.6教师）上，TRACER根据质量目标α实现83-100%的代理覆盖率；在150类基准上，代理完全替代教师；在自然语言推理任务上，门控正确拒绝部署。
limitations: 代理模型依赖LLM生产日志，可能受日志分布偏移影响。
门控阈值α需要用户指定，可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验覆盖多场景，开源系统，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRACER利用LLM生产日志训练轻量代理模型，通过一致性门控实现自适应路由，在分类任务中大幅降低成本。

papers.title: Dissecting Failure Dynamics in Large Language Model Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance through extended inference-time deliberation, yet how their reasoning failures arise remains poorly understood. By analyzing model-generated reasoning trajectories, we find that errors are not uniformly distributed but often originate from a small number of early transition points, after which reasoning remains locally coherent but globally incorrect. These transitions coincide with localized spikes in token-level entropy, and alternative continuations from the same intermediate state can still lead to correct solutions. Based on these observations, we introduce GUARD, a targeted inference-time framework that probes and redirects critical transitions using uncertainty signals. Empirical evaluations across multiple benchmarks confirm that interventions guided by these failure dynamics lead to more reliable reasoning outcomes. Our findings highlight the importance of understanding when and how reasoning first deviates, complementing existing approaches that focus on scaling inference-time computation.

analysis.tldr: LLM推理错误常源于早期少数关键转折点，GUARD通过不确定性信号干预这些转折点提升推理可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM通过扩展推理时间计算提升性能，但推理失败的产生机制尚不明确，现有方法主要关注计算规模而非错误根源。
analysis.problem: 理解LLM推理过程中错误如何产生，并设计针对性干预方法提升推理可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 错误并非均匀分布，而是源于早期少数转折点，之后推理局部连贯但全局错误；转折点伴随token级熵的局部峰值，且从相同中间状态出发的替代路径仍可导向正确解。
analysis.method: GUARD：一种基于不确定性信号探测并重定向关键转折点的目标推理时框架。
contributions: 揭示LLM推理错误源于早期关键转折点的动态规律
提出GUARD框架，利用不确定性信号进行推理时干预
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上验证了基于失败动态的干预能带来更可靠的推理结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构或推理策略
干预时机和信号阈值需进一步调优
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 揭示了LLM推理失败的关键动态，方法新颖且实验验证有效，与LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM推理错误常源于早期少数关键转折点，GUARD通过不确定性信号干预这些转折点提升推理可靠性。

papers.title: Design and Validation of a Low-Cost Smartphone Based Fluorescence Detection Platform Compared with Conventional Microplate Readers
papers.abstract: A low cost fluorescence-based optical system is developed for detecting the presence of certain microorganisms and molecules within a diluted sample. A specifically designed device setup compatible with conventional 96 well plates is chosen to create an ideal environment in which a smart phone camera can be used as the optical detector. In comparison with conventional microplate reading machines such as Perkin Elmer Victor Machine, the device presented in this paper is not equipped with expensive elements such as exciter filer, barrier filter and photomultiplier; instead, a phone camera is all needed to detect fluorescence within the sample. The strategy being involved is to determine the relationship between the image color of the sample in RGB color space and the molar concentration of the fluorescence specimen in that sample. This manuscript is a preprint version of work related to a publication in IEEE. The final version may differ from this manuscript.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于智能手机的低成本荧光检测平台，与商用微孔板读取仪对比验证可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统荧光检测设备（如微孔板读取仪）成本高昂，限制了其在资源有限环境中的应用；开发低成本、便携的替代方案具有重要实用价值。
analysis.problem: 如何利用智能手机摄像头替代昂贵的光学元件（如激发滤光片、屏障滤光片和光电倍增管），实现荧光样本的浓度检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计兼容96孔板的装置，用智能手机摄像头作为光学探测器，通过分析样本在RGB颜色空间中的图像颜色与荧光样本摩尔浓度之间的关系来定量检测。
contributions: 提出一种低成本、基于智能手机的荧光检测平台设计
通过与商用微孔板读取仪（Perkin Elmer Victor Machine）对比验证了该平台的可行性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能受限于手机摄像头灵敏度和环境光干扰
检测精度和动态范围可能低于商用设备

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于智能手机的低成本荧光检测平台，与商用微孔板读取仪对比验证可行性。

papers.title: FreqTrack: Frequency Learning based Vision Transformer for RGB-Event Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Existing single-modal RGB trackers often face performance bottlenecks in complex dynamic scenes, while the introduction of event sensors offers new potential for enhancing tracking capabilities. However, most current RGB-event fusion methods, primarily designed in the spatial domain using convolutional, Transformer, or Mamba architectures, fail to fully exploit the unique temporal response and high-frequency characteristics of event data. To address this, we1 propose FreqTrack, a frequency-aware RGBE tracking framework that establishes complementary inter-modal correlations through frequency-domain transformations for more robust feature fusion. We design a Spectral Enhancement Transformer (SET) layer that incorporates multi-head dynamic Fourier filtering to adaptively enhance and select frequency-domain features. Additionally, we develop a Wavelet Edge Refinement (WER) module, which leverages learnable wavelet transforms to explicitly extract multi-scale edge structures from event data, effectively improving modeling capability in high-speed and low-light scenarios. Extensive experiments on the COESOT and FE108 datasets demonstrate that FreqTrack achieves highly competitive performance, particularly attaining leading precision of 76.6\% on the COESOT benchmark, validating the effectiveness of frequency-domain modeling for RGBE tracking.

analysis.tldr: 提出频域学习框架FreqTrack，通过频谱增强Transformer和小波边缘细化模块实现RGB-事件融合跟踪，在COESOT上达76.6%精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 单模态RGB跟踪器在复杂动态场景下性能受限，现有RGB-事件融合方法主要在空间域设计，未能充分利用事件数据独特的时序响应和高频特性。
analysis.problem: 如何通过频域变换建立RGB与事件模态间的互补关联，实现更鲁棒的特征融合与跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FreqTrack框架，包含频谱增强Transformer（SET）层，利用多头动态傅里叶滤波自适应增强和选择频域特征；以及小波边缘细化（WER）模块，通过可学习小波变换显式提取事件数据的多尺度边缘结构。
contributions: 首次将频域学习引入RGB-事件跟踪，提出FreqTrack框架。
设计SET层和WER模块，分别实现频域特征增强和边缘结构提取。
analysis.experiments: 在COESOT和FE108数据集上实验，COESOT上精度达76.6%，验证了频域建模的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频域变换，泛化性需进一步验证。
计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，频域融合思路新颖，实验验证有效，但应用场景较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频域学习框架FreqTrack，通过频谱增强Transformer和小波边缘细化模块实现RGB-事件融合跟踪，在COESOT上达76.6%精度。

papers.title: Quantifying Cross-Query Contradictions in Multi-Query LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models frequently produce mutually inconsistent answers when reasoning over multiple related queries. We study case-file logical consistency: maintaining a globally satisfiable belief state across interdependent queries. We introduce a benchmark of 390 multi-query reasoning instances with entailment/contradiction/unknown labels and propose set-level metrics including Case Satisfiability Rate, Contradiction Density and Revision Cost. Our solver-augmented approach extracts commitments, verifies global satisfiability and performs counterexample-guided repair. Across four reasoning domains, our method substantially reduces cross-query contradictions (SetCons: 0.56 to 0.94) while preserving per-query accuracy, demonstrating that global coherence is critical for robust multi-query reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出量化多查询LLM推理中跨查询矛盾的方法和基准，通过求解器增强的修复显著提升全局一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在处理多个相关查询时经常产生相互矛盾的答案，影响推理的可靠性和可信度，现有方法缺乏对跨查询逻辑一致性的系统量化与修复。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出求解器增强方法：从LLM输出中提取承诺（commitments），验证全局可满足性，并通过反例引导的修复来减少矛盾。
contributions: 构建了包含390个多查询推理实例的基准，带有蕴涵/矛盾/未知标签。
提出了集合级指标：案例可满足率、矛盾密度和修订成本。
提出求解器增强的修复方法，在四个推理领域显著降低跨查询矛盾，同时保持单查询准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在四个推理领域上评估，SetCons指标从0.56提升至0.94，表明方法有效减少矛盾。
limitations: 基准规模较小（390个实例），可能不足以覆盖复杂场景。

papers.title: Chain of Modality: From Static Fusion to Dynamic Orchestration in Omni-MLLMs
papers.abstract: Omni-modal Large Language Models (Omni-MLLMs) promise a unified integration of diverse sensory streams. However, recent evaluations reveal a critical performance paradox: unimodal baselines frequently outperform joint multimodal inference. We trace this perceptual fragility to the static fusion topologies universally employed by current models, identifying two structural pathologies: positional bias in sequential inputs and alignment traps in interleaved formats, which systematically distort attention regardless of task semantics. To resolve this functional rigidity, we propose Chain of Modality (CoM), an agentic framework that transitions multimodal fusion from passive concatenation to dynamic orchestration. CoM adaptively orchestrates input topologies, switching among parallel, sequential, and interleaved pathways to neutralize structural biases. Furthermore, CoM bifurcates cognitive execution into two task-aligned pathways: a streamlined ``Direct-Decide'' path for direct perception and a structured ``Reason-Decide'' path for analytical auditing. Operating in either a training-free or a data-efficient SFT setting, CoM achieves robust and consistent generalization across diverse benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Chain of Modality框架，将多模态融合从静态拼接转为动态编排，解决Omni-MLLM中单模态优于多模态的性能悖论。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前Omni-MLLM存在性能悖论：单模态基线常优于多模态联合推理，根源在于静态融合拓扑导致的位置偏差和交错格式对齐陷阱，限制了模型对任务语义的适应能力。
analysis.problem: 现有Omni-MLLM的静态融合拓扑结构存在功能刚性，无法根据任务动态调整输入拓扑，导致注意力被结构偏差扭曲。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个结构病理：顺序输入中的位置偏差和交错格式中的对齐陷阱，它们系统性地扭曲注意力，与任务语义无关。
analysis.method: Chain of Modality (CoM) 是一个智能体框架，通过动态编排输入拓扑（并行、顺序、交错路径）来中和结构偏差，并分叉为Direct-Decide（直接感知）和Reason-Decide（分析审计）两条任务对齐路径。
contributions: 识别了Omni-MLLM中静态融合拓扑导致的性能悖论及其结构病理。
提出CoM框架，实现从静态融合到动态编排的转变，支持训练-free或数据高效的SFT设置。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖额外的智能体调度开销。
在极端复杂任务中动态路径选择的鲁棒性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，针对多模态融合关键问题，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分。

papers.title: CI-CBM: Class-Incremental Concept Bottleneck Model for Interpretable Continual Learning
papers.abstract: Catastrophic forgetting remains a fundamental challenge in continual learning, in which models often forget previous knowledge when fine-tuned on a new task. This issue is especially pronounced in class incremental learning (CIL), which is the most challenging setting in continual learning. Existing methods to address catastrophic forgetting often sacrifice either model interpretability or accuracy. To address this challenge, we introduce ClassIncremental Concept Bottleneck Model (CI-CBM), which leverage effective techniques, including concept regularization and pseudo-concept generation to maintain interpretable decision processes throughout incremental learning phases. Through extensive evaluation on seven datasets, CI-CBM achieves comparable performance to black-box models and outperforms previous interpretable approaches in CIL, with an average 36% accuracy gain. CICBM provides interpretable decisions on individual inputs and understandable global decision rules, as shown in our experiments, thereby demonstrating that human understandable concepts can be maintained during incremental learning without compromising model performance. Our approach is effective in both pretrained and non-pretrained scenarios; in the latter, the backbone is trained from scratch during the first learning phase. Code is publicly available at github.com/importAmir/CI-CBM.

analysis.tldr: 提出类增量概念瓶颈模型（CI-CBM），在持续学习中保持可解释性并缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习中灾难性遗忘问题严重，尤其在类增量学习（CIL）中；现有方法常牺牲可解释性或准确性。
analysis.problem: 在类增量学习场景下，如何同时保持模型的可解释性和准确性，避免灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CI-CBM，利用概念正则化和伪概念生成技术，在增量学习阶段维持可解释的决策过程。
contributions: 提出CI-CBM框架，在类增量学习中实现可解释性且性能接近黑盒模型。
通过概念正则化和伪概念生成有效缓解灾难性遗忘，平均准确率提升36%。
analysis.experiments: 在七个数据集上评估，CI-CBM性能与黑盒模型相当，优于先前可解释方法，平均准确率提升36%。
limitations: 可能依赖概念定义的质量。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出类增量概念瓶颈模型（CI-CBM），在持续学习中保持可解释性并缓解灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Mind DeepResearch Technical Report
papers.abstract: We present Mind DeepResearch (MindDR), an efficient multi-agent deep research framework that achieves leading performance with only ~30B-parameter models through a meticulously designed data synthesis and multi-stage training pipeline. The core innovation of MindDR lies in a collaborative three-agent architecture (Planning Agent, DeepSearch Agent, and Report Agent) and a four-stage agent-specialized training pipeline comprising SFT cold-start, Search-RL, Report-RL and preference alignment. With this regime, MindDR demonstrates competitive performance even with ~30B-scale models. Specifically, MindDR achieves 45.7% on BrowseComp-ZH, 42.8% on BrowseComp, 46.5% on WideSearch, 75.0% on xbench-DS, and 52.5 on DeepResearch Bench, outperforming comparable-scale open-source agent systems and rivaling larger-scale models. MindDR has been deployed as an online product in Li Auto. Furthermore, we introduce MindDR Bench, a curated benchmark of 500 real-world Chinese queries from our internal product user interactions, evaluated through a comprehensive multi-dimensional rubric system rather than relying on a single RACE metric. On MindDR Bench, MindDR achieves a state-of-the-art score of 51.8.

analysis.tldr: 提出高效多智能体深度研究框架MindDR，通过三智能体架构和四阶段训练，以约30B参数模型达到领先性能。

analysis.problem: 如何以较小规模模型（~30B参数）实现高效的深度研究能力，并构建全面的评测体系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三智能体架构（Planning、DeepSearch、Report Agent）和四阶段训练流程（SFT冷启动、Search-RL、Report-RL、偏好对齐）。
contributions: 提出高效多智能体深度研究框架MindDR，以约30B参数模型达到领先性能。
引入MindDR Bench，包含500个真实中文查询和综合多维度评估体系。
analysis.experiments: 在BrowseComp-ZH、BrowseComp、WideSearch、xbench-DS、DeepResearch Bench和MindDR Bench上评测，MindDR取得领先结果。

papers.title: Perspective on Bias in Biomedical AI: Preventing Downstream Healthcare Disparities
papers.abstract: Healthcare disparities persist across socioeconomic boundaries, often attributed to unequal access to screening, diagnostics, and therapeutics. However, this perspective highlights that critical biases can emerge much earlier, during data collection and research prioritization, long before clinical implementation in cases where the focus of the studies and the data that is collected is at the molecular level. A vast number of studies focus on collecting omics data but the demographic information associated with these datasets is often not reported in the studies, and when it is reported, it shows big biases. An automated analysis of 4719 PubMed-indexed omics publications from 2015 to 2024 reveals that only a small fraction report ancestry or ethnicity information, with ancestry reporting improving slightly. Analysis of large-scale datasets commonly used for model training, such as CellxGene and GEO, reveals substantial population bias where European-ancestry data dominates. As biomedical foundation models become central to biomedical discovery with a paradigm in which base models are pretrained on large datasets and reusing them time and again for many different downstream tasks, they risk perpetuating or amplifying these early-stage biases, leading to cascading inequities that regulatory interventions cannot fully reverse. We propose a community-wide focus on three foundational principles: Provenance, Openness, and Evaluation Transparency to improve equity and robustness in biomedical AI. This approach aims to foster biomedical innovation that more effectively serves underserved populations and improves health outcomes.

analysis.tldr: 生物医学AI中的偏见源于数据收集和研究优先级，可能导致下游医疗不平等，提出溯源、开放和评估透明三大原则。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗不平等持续存在，传统观点归因于临床接入不平等，但偏见可能在数据收集和研究优先级阶段就已产生，尤其是在分子层面的研究中，而现有研究对此关注不足。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对4719篇组学出版物的分析显示，只有少数报告祖先或种族信息；大型数据集如CellxGene和GEO中欧洲血统数据占主导，存在显著种群偏差。
analysis.method: 提出三个基本原则：溯源（Provenance）、开放（Openness）和评估透明（Evaluation Transparency），以改善生物医学AI的公平性和鲁棒性。
contributions: 揭示生物医学AI中早期偏见（数据收集和研究优先级）对下游医疗不平等的潜在影响
提出溯源、开放和评估透明三大原则作为社区行动框架

papers.title: CBCL: Safe Self-Extending Agent Communication
papers.abstract: Agent communication languages (ACLs) enable heterogeneous agents to share knowledge and coordinate across diverse domains. This diversity demands extensibility, but expressive extension mechanisms can push the input language beyond the complexity classes where full validation is tractable. We present CBCL (Common Business Communication Language), an agent communication language that constrains all messages, including runtime language extensions, to the deterministic context-free language (DCFL) class. CBCL allows agents to define, transmit, and adopt domain-specific "dialect" extensions as first-class messages; three safety invariants (R1--R3), machine-checked in Lean 4 and enforced in a Rust reference implementation, prevent unbounded expansion, applying declared resource limits, and preserving core vocabulary. We formalize the language and its safety properties in Lean 4, implement a reference parser and dialect engine in Rust with property-based and differential tests, and extract a verified parser binary. Our results demonstrate that homoiconic protocol design, where extension definitions share the same representation as ordinary messages, can be made provably safe. As autonomous agents increasingly extend their own communication capabilities, formally bounding what they can express to each other is a precondition for oversight.

analysis.tldr: 提出CBCL语言，将智能体通信约束在确定型上下文无关语言类，并通过形式化验证保证扩展安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体通信语言需要可扩展性以适应多样领域，但表达性强的扩展机制可能导致输入语言超出可验证的复杂度类，带来安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证智能体通信语言可扩展的同时，确保所有消息（包括运行时扩展）的可验证性和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出CBCL语言，将智能体通信约束在DCFL类，支持安全的运行时扩展。

papers.title: NewsTorch: A PyTorch-based Toolkit for Learner-oriented News Recommendation
papers.abstract: News recommender systems are devised to alleviate the information overload, attracting more and more researchers' attention in recent years. The lack of a dedicated learner-oriented news recommendation toolkit hinders the advancement of research in news recommendation. We propose a PyTorch-based news recommendation toolkit called NewsTorch, developed to support learners in acquiring both conceptual understanding and practical experience. This toolkit provides a modular, decoupled, and extensible framework with a learner-friendly GUI platform that supports dataset downloading and preprocessing. It also enables training, validation, and testing of state-of-the-art neural news recommendation models with standardized evaluation metrics, ensuring fair comparison and reproducible experiments. Our open-source toolkit is released on Github: https://github.com/whonor/NewsTorch.

analysis.tldr: NewsTorch 是一个面向学习者的 PyTorch 新闻推荐工具包，提供模块化框架和 GUI 支持。

papers.title: H2VLR: Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning for Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: As a classic vision task, anomaly detection has been widely applied in industrial inspection and medical imaging. In this task, data scarcity is often a frequently-faced issue. To solve it, the few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD) scheme is attracting increasing attention. In recent years, beyond traditional visual paradigm, Vision-Language Model (VLM) has been extensively explored to boost this field. However, in currently-existing VLM-based FSAD schemes, almost all perform anomaly inference only by pairwise feature matching, ignoring structural dependencies and global consistency. To further redound to FSAD via VLM, we propose a Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning (H2VLR) framework. It reformulates the FSAD as a high-order inference problem of visual-semantic relations, by jointly modeling visual regions and semantic concepts in a unified hypergraph. Experimental comparisons verify the effectiveness and advantages of H2VLR. It could often achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on representative industrial and medical benchmarks. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出异构超图视觉-语言推理框架，将少样本异常检测建模为高阶关系推理问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 少样本异常检测面临数据稀缺问题，现有VLM方法仅做成对特征匹配，忽略结构依赖和全局一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用VLM进行少样本异常检测时建模视觉区域与语义概念之间的高阶结构关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有VLM方法仅进行成对特征匹配，缺乏对结构依赖和全局一致性的建模。

papers.title: Co-distilled attention guided masked image modeling with noisy teacher for self-supervised learning on medical images
papers.abstract: Masked image modeling (MIM) is a highly effective self-supervised learning (SSL) approach to extract useful feature representations from unannotated data. Predominantly used random masking methods make SSL less effective for medical images due to the contextual similarity of neighboring patches, leading to information leakage and SSL simplification. Hierarchical shifted window (Swin) transformer, a highly effective approach for medical images cannot use advanced masking methods as it lacks a global [CLS] token. Hence, we introduced an attention guided masking mechanism for Swin within a co-distillation learning framework to selectively mask semantically co-occurring and discriminative patches, to reduce information leakage and increase the difficulty of SSL pretraining. However, attention guided masking inevitably reduces the diversity of attention heads, which negatively impacts downstream task performance. To address this, we for the first time, integrate a noisy teacher into the co-distillation framework (termed DAGMaN) that performs attentive masking while preserving high attention head diversity. We demonstrate the capability of DAGMaN on multiple tasks including full- and few-shot lung nodule classification, immunotherapy outcome prediction, tumor segmentation, and unsupervised organs clustering.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合噪声教师的共蒸馏注意力引导掩码方法，提升医学图像自监督学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像中相邻补丁上下文相似，随机掩码导致信息泄露和自监督学习简化，而Swin Transformer缺乏全局[CLS]令牌，无法使用高级掩码方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在Swin Transformer中实现有效的注意力引导掩码，同时保持注意力头多样性，避免对下游任务性能的负面影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力引导掩码会降低注意力头多样性，从而损害下游任务性能。
analysis.method: 在共蒸馏学习框架中引入噪声教师，进行注意力引导掩码，同时保持高注意力头多样性。
contributions: 首次将噪声教师集成到共蒸馏框架中，用于注意力引导掩码。
在多个医学图像任务上验证了方法的有效性，包括肺结节分类、免疫治疗结果预测、肿瘤分割和无监督器官聚类。
analysis.experiments: 在肺结节分类（全样本和少样本）、免疫治疗结果预测、肿瘤分割和无监督器官聚类等多个任务上进行了实验。
limitations: 可能对噪声教师的噪声水平敏感，需要调参。
仅在医学图像上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合噪声教师和共蒸馏解决注意力头多样性问题，在多个医学任务上验证，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合噪声教师的共蒸馏注意力引导掩码方法，提升医学图像自监督学习性能。

papers.title: On the Expressive Power and Limitations of Multi-Layer SSMs
papers.abstract: We study the expressive power and limitations of multi-layer state-space models (SSMs). First, we show that multi-layer SSMs face fundamental limitations in compositional tasks, revealing an inherent gap between SSMs and streaming models. Then, we examine the role of chain-of-thought (CoT), showing that offline CoT does not fundamentally increase the expressiveness, while online CoT can substantially increase its power. Indeed, with online CoT, multi-layer SSMs become equivalent in power to streaming algorithms. Finally, we investigate the tradeoff between width and precision, showing that these resources are not interchangeable in the base model, but admit a clean equivalence once online CoT is allowed. Overall, our results offer a unified perspective on how depth, finite precision, and CoT shape the power and limits of SSMs.

analysis.tldr: 多层SSM在组合任务上有根本局限，在线思维链可显著提升其表达能力至流算法等价。
analysis.research_motivation: 状态空间模型（SSM）在序列建模中广泛应用，但其多层架构的表达能力边界尚不清晰，特别是与流模型的差距以及思维链（CoT）的作用未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 揭示多层SSM在组合任务中的表达局限，并分析离线/在线CoT及宽度-精度权衡对其能力的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多层SSM在组合任务上存在固有局限，与流模型有差距；离线CoT不增加表达能力，而在线CoT可大幅提升，甚至使SSM等价于流算法；宽度和精度在基础模型中不可互换，但在线CoT下可等价。
analysis.method: 理论分析：通过形式化定义组合任务、流模型和CoT变体，证明多层SSM的表达能力边界及CoT的作用。
contributions: 证明多层SSM在组合任务上存在根本局限，揭示其与流模型的差距。
阐明离线CoT不增加表达能力，而在线CoT可使SSM等价于流算法。
揭示宽度与精度在基础模型中不可互换，但在线CoT下可等价。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖于特定假设（如有限精度、任务形式），实际SSM变体可能不同。
未讨论训练动态或实际数据下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论分析深入，揭示SSM表达局限和CoT作用，但缺乏实验验证，适合理论研究者精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多层SSM在组合任务上有根本局限，在线思维链可显著提升其表达能力至流算法等价。

papers.title: Geometric Metrics for MoE Specialization: From Fisher Information to Early Failure Detection
papers.abstract: Expert specialization is fundamental to Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model success, yet existing metrics (cosine similarity, routing entropy) lack theoretical grounding and yield inconsistent conclusions under reparameterization. We present an information-geometric framework providing the first rigorous characterization of MoE specialization dynamics. Our key insight is that expert routing distributions evolve on the probability simplex equipped with the Fisher information metric, enabling formal analysis via Riemannian geometry. We prove that standard heuristic metrics violate parameterization invariance (Theorem 1), establish that specialization corresponds to geodesic flow with quantified approximation bounds (Theorem 2), and derive a failure predictor with theoretical threshold justification (Theorem 3). The framework introduces two principled metrics: Fisher Specialization Index (FSI) achieving r=0.91+/-0.02 correlation with downstream performance, and Fisher Heterogeneity Score (FHS) predicting training failure at 10% completion with AUC=0.89+/-0.03 -- outperforming validation-loss-based early stopping by 23% while requiring 40x fewer compute cycles. We validate intervention protocols achieving 87% recovery rate when FHS>1 is detected. Comprehensive experiments across language modeling (WikiText-103, C4), vision MoE (ImageNet), and scaling studies (8-64 experts, 125M-2.7B parameters) validate our theoretical predictions.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Fisher信息度量的几何框架，为MoE专家专业化提供理论严谨的指标，并实现早期训练失败检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MoE专业化度量（如余弦相似度、路由熵）缺乏理论依据，在重参数化下结论不一致，亟需理论严谨的度量方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从信息几何角度严格刻画MoE专家专业化动态，并设计理论驱动的度量指标和失败预测器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Fisher信息度量构建概率单纯形上的黎曼几何框架，提出Fisher专业化指数（FSI）和Fisher异质性分数（FHS），并证明标准启发式度量的参数化不变性违反、专业化对应测地流等定理。
contributions: 首次从信息几何角度严格刻画MoE专业化动态，证明标准启发式度量违反参数化不变性。
提出两个理论驱动的度量指标：FSI（与下游性能相关性r=0.91）和FHS（早期失败预测AUC=0.89）。
验证干预协议在FHS>1时实现87%恢复率，且FHS比验证损失早停节省40倍计算。
analysis.experiments: 在语言建模（WikiText-103, C4）、视觉MoE（ImageNet）和规模实验（8-64专家，125M-2.7B参数）上验证理论预测。
limitations: 可能仅适用于标准MoE架构，对变体（如稀疏MoE）需额外验证。
理论分析依赖Fisher信息度量，计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 理论创新强，实验充分，对MoE训练监控有重要实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Fisher信息度量的几何框架，为MoE专家专业化提供理论严谨的指标，并实现早期训练失败检测。

papers.title: Improving Machine Learning Performance with Synthetic Augmentation
papers.abstract: Synthetic augmentation is increasingly used to mitigate data scarcity in financial machine learning, yet its statistical role remains poorly understood. We formalize synthetic augmentation as a modification of the effective training distribution and show that it induces a structural bias--variance trade-off: while additional samples may reduce estimation error, they may also shift the population objective whenever the synthetic distribution deviates from regions relevant under evaluation. To isolate informational gains from mechanical sample-size effects, we introduce a size-matched null augmentation and a finite-sample, non-parametric block permutation test that remains valid under weak temporal dependence. We evaluate this framework in both controlled Markov-switching environments and real financial datasets, including high-frequency option trade data and a daily equity panel. Across generators spanning bootstrap, copula-based models, variational autoencoders, diffusion models, and TimeGAN, we vary augmentation ratio, model capacity, task type, regime rarity, and signal-to-noise. We show that synthetic augmentation is beneficial only in variance-dominant regimes, such as persistent volatility forecasting-while it deteriorates performance in bias-dominant settings, including near-efficient directional prediction. Rare-regime targeting can improve domain-specific metrics but may conflict with unconditional permutation inference. Our results provide a structural perspective on when synthetic data improves financial learning performance and when it induces persistent distributional distortion.

analysis.tldr: 合成数据增强在金融机器学习中仅在方差主导场景有效，在偏差主导场景会损害性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成数据增强被广泛用于缓解金融数据稀缺问题，但其统计角色和适用条件尚不明确，缺乏理论指导可能导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 揭示合成数据增强在金融机器学习中的统计作用，明确其何时有益、何时有害。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成增强引入结构性的偏差-方差权衡：额外样本可减少估计误差，但若合成分布偏离评估相关区域，会偏移总体目标。
analysis.method: 形式化合成增强为有效训练分布的修改；提出大小匹配的零增强和有限样本非参数块置换检验；在多种生成器（bootstrap、copula、VAE、扩散模型、TimeGAN）下系统评估。
contributions: 形式化合成增强的偏差-方差权衡理论
提出用于隔离信息增益的统计检验方法
通过大量实验揭示合成增强有效的条件（方差主导场景）和失效条件（偏差主导场景）
analysis.experiments: 在受控马尔可夫切换环境和真实金融数据集（高频期权交易数据、日度股票面板）上评估，涵盖多种生成器、增强比例、模型容量、任务类型、罕见机制和信噪比。
limitations: 实验仅聚焦金融领域，泛化性待验证
未深入探讨罕见机制目标与无条件置换推断冲突的解决方案
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 理论形式化清晰，实验系统，但领域较专，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 合成数据增强在金融机器学习中仅在方差主导场景有效，在偏差主导场景会损害性能。

papers.title: Decoupling Identity from Utility: Privacy-by-Design Frameworks for Financial Ecosystems
papers.abstract: Financial institutions face tension between maximizing data utility and mitigating the re-identification risks inherent in traditional anonymization methods. This paper explores Differentially Private (DP) synthetic data as a robust "Privacy by Design" framework to resolve this conflict, ensuring output privacy while satisfying stringent regulatory obligations. We examine two distinct generative paradigms: Direct Tabular Synthesis, which reconstructs high-fidelity joint distributions from raw data, and DP-Seeded Agent-Based Modeling (ABM), which uses DP-protected aggregates to parameterize complex, stateful simulations. While tabular synthesis excels at reflecting static historical correlations for QA testing and business analytics, the DP-Seeded ABM offers a forward-looking "counterfactual laboratory" capable of modeling dynamic market behaviors and black swan events. By decoupling individual identities from data utility, these methodologies eliminate traditional data-clearing bottlenecks, enabling seamless cross-institutional research and compliant decision-making in an evolving regulatory landscape.

analysis.tldr: 提出差分隐私合成数据框架，在金融场景中解耦身份与效用，兼顾隐私保护与数据可用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融机构在最大化数据效用与降低传统匿名化方法的重识别风险之间存在矛盾，现有方法难以同时满足严格监管和实用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计隐私保护框架，在输出隐私保证下生成高可用合成数据，替代传统匿名化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 探索两种生成范式：直接表格合成（重构高保真联合分布）和DP种子智能体建模（用DP保护聚合参数化复杂仿真），实现隐私与效用的解耦。
contributions: 提出差分隐私合成数据作为金融生态系统的隐私设计框架。
对比两种生成范式（表格合成与ABM）在不同场景下的适用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未讨论合成数据在极端事件下的保真度。
跨机构协作的实际部署挑战可能未被充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法框架有应用价值，但摘要缺乏实验验证，创新性和深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出差分隐私合成数据框架，在金融场景中解耦身份与效用，兼顾隐私保护与数据可用性。

papers.title: Pushing the Limits of On-Device Streaming ASR: A Compact, High-Accuracy English Model for Low-Latency Inference
papers.abstract: Deploying high-quality automatic speech recognition (ASR) on edge devices requires models that jointly optimize accuracy, latency, and memory footprint while operating entirely on CPU without GPU acceleration. We conduct a systematic empirical study of state-of-the-art ASR architectures, encompassing encoder-decoder, transducer, and LLM-based paradigms, evaluated across batch, chunked, and streaming inference modes. Through a comprehensive benchmark of over 50 configurations spanning OpenAI Whisper, NVIDIA Nemotron, Parakeet TDT, Canary, Conformer Transducer, and Qwen3-ASR, we identify NVIDIA's Nemotron Speech Streaming as the strongest candidate for real-time English streaming on resource-constrained hardware. We then re-implement the complete streaming inference pipeline in ONNX Runtime and conduct a controlled evaluation of multiple post-training quantization strategies, including importance-weighted k-quant, mixed-precision schemes, and round-to-nearest quantization, combined with graph-level operator fusion. These optimizations reduce the model from 2.47 GB to as little as 0.67 GB while maintaining word error rate (WER) within 1% absolute of the full-precision PyTorch baseline. Our recommended configuration, the int4 k-quant variant, achieves 8.20% average streaming WER across eight standard benchmarks, running comfortably faster than real-time on CPU with 0.56 s algorithmic latency, establishing a new quality-efficiency Pareto point for on-device streaming ASR.

analysis.tldr: 通过系统基准测试和ONNX Runtime量化优化，将NVIDIA Nemotron Speech Streaming模型压缩至0.67 GB，在CPU上实现8.20% WER和0.56秒延迟，达到设备端流式ASR的新质量-效率帕累托前沿。
analysis.research_motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上部署高质量ASR需要同时优化准确率、延迟和内存占用，且完全在CPU上运行，现有模型难以满足这些约束。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用GPU加速的CPU上，实现高精度、低延迟、小内存占用的流式英文ASR模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 系统评估50多种ASR架构（包括Whisper、Nemotron、Parakeet TDT等），选出Nemotron Speech Streaming作为最佳候选；在ONNX Runtime中重新实现完整流式推理管线，并采用多种后训练量化策略（如重要性加权k-quant、混合精度、四舍五入量化）结合图级算子融合进行优化。
contributions: 对多种先进ASR架构在批量、分块和流式推理模式下进行了系统实证研究，识别出Nemotron Speech Streaming为最佳候选。
在ONNX Runtime中实现了完整的流式推理管线，并通过后训练量化和算子融合将模型从2.47 GB压缩至0.67 GB，同时WER损失在1%以内。
推荐int4 k-quant配置，在8个标准基准上达到8.20%平均流式WER，CPU上0.56秒算法延迟，建立了新的质量-效率帕累托前沿。
analysis.experiments: 在超过50种配置上进行了基准测试，涵盖Whisper、Nemotron、Parakeet TDT、Canary、Conformer Transducer和Qwen3-ASR；评估了多种量化策略；在8个标准基准上报告了平均流式WER。
limitations: 仅针对英文流式ASR，未涉及多语言或非流式场景。
量化策略可能对特定噪声环境或口音敏感，摘要未提供详细鲁棒性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统性的架构评估和量化优化，在设备端ASR上取得显著效率提升，但方法本身为现有技术组合，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过系统基准测试和ONNX Runtime量化优化，将NVIDIA Nemotron Speech Streaming模型压缩至0.67 GB，在CPU上实现8.20% WER和0.56秒延迟，达到设备端流式ASR的新质量-效率帕累托前沿。
